Aipha Khua
Khuasatna thu: Tualzang khua pan Munsuang Pu Go Thio, Lailo khua pan Gualnam Pu Chin Khup le Haupi khua pan Halkik Pu Zel Chin te makaihna tawh gam vah nading leh innmun logam nuamzaw zotna in 1930 kumin inn 20 tawh Aipha khuasat uh hi. Vaphualte omna gam suankhia a, gam-ai phat mahmahna munah, khuasatna thu tawh kimaplapin khuasat Pu Go Thio in khua satna la a phuak hi. Ka zua gamalo, tuang nungsia’ng e, Mualcin sangah luai ing ee. P hualva tuanna suan ing aw ee, Kawi tawh settang gual ing e. Khua min vawhna thu: Tulai Aipha gam sung tanglai-Tungnung khualui mun tengah gam-ai nam khatte, pha mahmah takin po-a, gam-vaphualte in mun-le-gamin a nei uhi. Hun khat ciangin hih khualui mun gamteng pen Gamngai-singhalh sungah kikoih hi. Tualzang khua pan Gualnam-Munsuang Pu Go Thio in hih singhalh gam sungah khua sat nuamin, Gamngai Hausa Pu Khup Za Mang tungah a ngen hi. Pu Mang’ zi Pi Ciin Khaw Lun in, “gam-ai phatna, vaphual gam suan-a khua sat sawmna hih uh leh khua min mangsa “Tungnung khua” lokik nawnlo-in, “Aipha khu cipah uin” ci-a a minvawhsakna bangin “Aipha khua” a kiminvawh pah hi, ci-a aciamteh zong om hi. Beh om teng Gualnam-Munsuang, Gualnam-Kikkai, Gualnam-Halkik Pawlpi om teng : Laipian Sanginn : Basic Education Primary School Zato : Sub RHC (28.7.2011) Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 2015 mencipna hangin Thangzang ah tai. Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 2015 mencipna hangin Thangzang ah tai. Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : 2015 mencipna hangin Thangzang ah tai. Thu tawkna te: Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Hausa Pu Thang Khan Khup(Kahngen) lai Pu Go Suan Thang lai, March 30,1990 dated mem
Anlangh Khua
Khuasatna thu: Tu aa Anlangh khua ah zankhawng in Thado te na tengngei uh hi. A khua min taktak uh pen, ‘Lasan khua (Lahosan kung tampi pona’ ci-uh a, a khua gei-a lui min zong tu dongin ‘Lasan lui’ a kici hi. Mikang gal thu a kigal zakzak ciangin pawlkhat in galvai lungmuang zolo in, Tedim pan Muizawl ah, Muizawl pan Tongsial na zuan uh a, pawlkhat in Tedim pan Vanglai (Ngennung gam) ah cih bangin na pem kawikawi uh hi. 1878 kum pawl in Ngennung khua panin Hatlang Pu Am Tun makaihna tawh Gualnam Pu Lam Suang te unau, Naulak te Pu Thang Luan te leh Pu Nok Kham te unau tawh Meitei gungal kaaikhia-in, tulai Anlang khua nuailam “Khuamun” kicihna mun ah na teng uhhi. Khuamun ah kum 20 bang a tenkhit uh ciangin 1896 kumin nat hoihlo tung in a hausapa uh Pu Nok Kham akipan luang 40 bang hong sih ciangin 1898 kumin tulaitak aa akitenna mun ah hong kituah uh a, tudong in khuakip suak in “Anlang khua” kici suak hi. Khua min vawhna thu: Khua omna mun pen mual in kiimkot in, van kua toi ahih manin singkung lopa te khangnuam diak in, lo khawhna ah zong ankung te hoih in, ankhing kham mahmah uh hi. A ankhing te nangawn uh ui leh ak nangawn in gai zolo in, a kongzing te uh ah na bua khia uh a, tua ankhing kibua te mundang nangawn panin kilangh ahih manin “Anlangh khua” a kici ahi hi. Beh om teng: Hatlangh, Gualnam, Naulak, Sukte, Suante, Sote, Buansing, Tohing Pawlpi om teng: ABM Thang Za Kam pawlpi, Church of God, BCBC, SDA (Mission), SDA (Conference), Laipian, New Apostolic Church, RCM, TCBC, AG, CBC Sanginn : Basic Education Middle School Zato : Rural Health Centre (17.1.2010) Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 150 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 150 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (532) + Numei (510) = 1042 Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Luan Don, Tedim ah niangtuisai nei masapawl Dr Hau Za Cin Pau, Zogam ah tan 10 zo masa(1932), Zato siahuan masa leh Tedim aa teng masapawl. Col.Kam Khan Thawng Judith Go Lun Niang Dr Lian Khan Cing Dr Cing Deih Lian Dr Gin Lian Mung, Ph.D Sia Suan Sawm Sang, SDA Radio AWR pan thugen aa minthang Dr Sian Cin Zam Thu tawk nate Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Anlangh khua kum 136 cin Jubilee (1878-2014) Lethil Innkuan Laibu, 2022 Tedim No 1. BEHS Golden Jubilee
Bukphil Khua
Khua min vawhna; Hualngo pu le pate in gamvak theizel-in gam a giah uh ciangin giah buk a lam thei zel uh hi. A giah buk lamte uh innpi tawh a kizomin innmeng tawh lam thei zel uh a, tua innmeng kilam sawm pen Hualngo mite in ‘phir’ a ci uhi. Tedim kam a buk cih leh hualngo kam a ‘phir’ cih kammal te hong kigamwm ciagnin ‘buk-phir’ cih kammal hong piang hi. Khuasatna thu; Sulbung khua leh Satawm khuate panin 1888 kumin Pu Lama makaihna tawh Hualngo mite inn li leh Zahau mite thum tawh hih gam giahna buk meng kilamna mun, Bukphir mun-ah khua a hong sat uh hi. Falam Ukpipa Pu Tson Bik tungah Bukphir gam leina dingin maihun 1, vaidial 1, sialpi 1, kipia, Bukphir khua sat zawh a km 6 khit ciangin Zahau miteng a khua lui lam uh ah ciahkik u a, pawlkhat lalkhiia zel, pawlkhat tungkik zel uh ahih manin khuakip a suak zo pak kei uhi. 1899 kumin khua kisat a, 1902 pul natna hangin mi tampi a sih uh ciangin 1903 kum sung sung in Bukphir khua mun saklamah khua kikhin to in, inn 5 apha lai uhi. 1909 kum sungin khua inn 7 bek pha lai uh a, inn 5 sangin a tawmzawk lai uleh khua kiphiat vet ding cih thu a ki-om sak hi. Khuasak lam tai 1 1/2na munah a kikhin ma-a, a kikhin khit ding uh Falam DC zumpi panin L.E Burne in 1911 May 15ni ma-a, a kikhin khit dingin thu a pia hi. 1924 kumsungin inn 20 ciang bang pha uh a, a khuazang lang val, Christian ahi uhi. Pawlpi om teng : ABM Independent Church of Burma EFC Methodist RCM AG CBC EBC Beh om teng Bocung Chalthleng Gualnam Hatzaw Naulak Neihkhup Siamsuang Suankhup Thangzom Sanginn : Basic Education Sub High School Zato : Sub RHC (2.9.2011) Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 154 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 154 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (496) + Numei (566) = 1062 Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Pu Laldingliana, LLB Pu Vanlaldinga, LLB Pu Lalhruaia, BA, LLB Pu Vula, BEd Siapi Sapkhuma Thutawkna te: Pu Khen Go Thang, Hausapa Siapi U Ngin Za Mang, Khua Sangsia pipa Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Lethil Innkuan Laibu, 2022
Bumzang Khua
Khuasatna thu Pa Kam Ul in Tedim hausa Pu Khaw Chin tungah Pawttui gam teng, zaamkang khat leh sial zabo khatin na lei a, ‘Pawttui Tungnung khua’ ci-in khua a kisat hi. Hih gam sungah Pu Kam Ul in khuai khawina mun khat nei a, tua zong tuhun dongin Pu Kam Ul’ khuai hawina mun’ kici lai hi. Hun khat ciangin Pu Kam Ul zong Lamthang khua ah lal hi. Lamthang khua ah a om sungin khatvei zusa han luat manin kial a tung hi. Tua ciangin Lamthang khua Pu Khual Go in Tonzang Ukpipa Pu Hau Chin Khup tungah zusa mei bekbek hanbawm dim puakin Zusa han luatna hanga Lamthang gamah kial tunna thu a gen hi. Tua ciangin Innpipa in khuasat theihna ding thu a piak ciangin Bumzang khua-awng mun tengah 1912 kumin inn 16 tawh tu aa Bumzang khua akisat ahi hi. Khua min vawhna thu Haidawi khua ah Phiamphu Pu Dip Thang aten hun lai-in Tedim hausa Pu Kam Hau tungah tulai Bumzang gam teng Sial zabo khat in a lei hi. Sial khawk sung pan tua sial kileisa teng a kihawlkhiat zawhloh nadingin Pu Dip Thang in a ai tawh tua sial teng a bum ban ah tua sial kikoihna kuamzang sung zong bum-ai tawh dai a kai lai hi. Sial bum na zang kuam teng min lawh nadingin Bumzang mun akici ahi hi. Beh om teng Dopmul Taithul Thawmging Milun Pawlpi om teng ZBC AG CJC SDA Sanginn : BE(P)PS Zato : Sub RHC (28.7.2011) Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 55 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 48 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (141) + Numei (145) = 286 Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Kham Khan Mang, Party makai Thawng Khan Mang, council makai Bu Mang Cin Pau, Bumzang khua khaipa Kham Za Mang, ZBA phuankhiapa Kham Lian Mang, BA, LLB, MDiv U Cin Lian Pau, H/A U Thang Sial Mang, H/A U Thang Khan Mang, Burma Football Selected U Cin Khen Mang, Burma Army Boxing selected Thu tawk nate Pu Thang Khan Hau, hausa Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Lethil Innkuan Laibu, 2022
Dimzang Khua
Khua min vawhna thu Nidang hun in tulai Dimzang gam teng pen Tuitaizang kici masa hi. Dolsing tam pona mun ahih manin kuamah ten nadinga kiphal vetlo gam ahi hi. Revolution Council Kumpi a hong khan ciangin Tedim Party Unit Zum leh Tedim Township People Council Zumpi pan in phalna tawh khua a kisat theih ciangin Tedim gam sunga om Zanggam ahihna kitamh sak in Dimzang khua kici hi, ci-in Pu leh pa thukan te in na ciamteh uh hi. Khuasatna thu 1962 kum Revolution Council Kumpi a hong kah ciangin ‘Zang gam khempeuh lokho thei ding’ cihthu a om sak uh ciangin Pu Ngul Za Go in tulai Dimzang gam; Tuitai lui leh Sumkuang lui kikal teng lo a zuan masa phot hi. A pawlteng Pu Lam Khaw Neng, Pu Ngul Suan, Pu Neng Suan, Pu Zel Khan Thang, Pu Vung Za Go, Pu Hen Za Gin leh Rev. Neng Khaw Gin te in kum khat khit ciangin taisan mangkik uh a, Pu Ngul Za Go leh Pu Ngul Suan tegel bek, a buk sung tuak uh ah, kum guk sung a tolten tuakphot uh hi. 1968 kum teh Gualnam Pu Ngul Suan, Naulak Pu En Za Chin, Pu Hen Za Gin, Tawmbing Pu Kham Za Thang, Samte Pu Chin Khual, Naulak Pu Ngul Za Dong, Naulak Pu Go Cin leh Pi Nem Khaw Cingte in Sumkuanglui gei mah ah, “Sumkuang khua” nasat leuleu uh hi. 1969 kumteh Sumkuang khua panin Pu Ngul Za Go deihsakna tawh Pu En Za Chin leh Pu Hen Za Gin te makai in Tuipi lui gei ah “Dimzang khua” ci-in khua sat uh hi. Beh om teng Gualnam Hautual Naulak Phaipi Phiamphu Sukte Soote Hawngsawk Vangaw Samte Pawlpi om teng RCM ABM Yahweh ECC BCBC EBC SDA AG UPC NAC CJC CBC Sanginn : Basic Education Middle School Zato : Sub RHC (7.7.2015) Inn phazah (2023) : 178 Innkuan phazah (2023) : 178 Mi phazah (2023) : Pasal (440) + Numei (445) = 885 Thu tawk nate Pu Pum Za Khup, hausa Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Lethil Innkuan Laibu, 2022
Dampi Khua
Khuasatna thu Nidang lai-in tulai Dampi gam pen tulai Tauleng gam leh Thinglei gamte kikal-aom, gam-awng mun ahihi. Pu Hrang Ching le Buanli khua panin Pu Hen Za Nial te in khua nasat sawm masa ngei uh a, tangtut lo-in a ciahkik tuak uhi. Pu Za Bil pa’ Pu Za Dun pen Piantit pulnatna hangin Ukpite leh Tangpite-in na hawlkhia uha, Falam gam; Khuanglung; Ruasih khua-ah tawl khat a ten khit ciagnin Hualgno gam; Tuidil khua-ah a lal to suak hi. 1910-1912 kum sungin Tuidil khua-ah a na tengsa Falam mi pawlkhatte Tapidaw a suah uh ciangin kideihlo lua in a kibawlsiat ciangin Tapidawte in khua tuamtuam-ah a kikhenthang ciat uhi. Hih bang hun ciangin Pu Za Bil in zong a tate teng leh a unau teng tawh India mizo gam: Khuanglam khua-ah a lalsawm hi. Ukpipa Pu Thang Tin Lian in a theih ciangin a pianna apu te, Mizo gam ah a lalkhiat ding a phalloh manin Falam DC Mangpi zumah khua sat theihna ding gam a ngetsak hi. Tauleng, Tuisan luidung to gam teng, singtang gamzaipi awnglai muun teng a ngah sak hi. Gam lei nadingin Pu Thang Tin Lian tungah Sailpi nih keng uh a, Sial zabo nih tawh gam lei uh a, khua sat theihna ding thu a ngah uh ciangin 1930 kumin Dampi khua a sat uhi. Khua min vawhna thu Nidang hun lai-a kipanin tulai Dampi khua mun teng pen ni suak hak mahmah in, gammang-tulakpi sung ahih manin, “ Taampi munh” kici masa phot hi. Pu Za Bil leh a tateng leh a unau teng tawh hih “Taampi mun” sungah khua asat uh ciangin, ni suak hak-a, gammang ‘ daampi’ sungah, khuasat uh ahih manin “ Daampi khua” ci-in min a vawh uh hi. Beh om teng Hatzaw Boithang Sunthang Tlaisun Chimlung Kawngte Munluah Pawlpi om teng ABM RCM AG CJC Sanginn : Basic Education Post Primary School Zato : Sub RHC (1.4.1967) Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 70 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 57 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (153) + Numei (145) = 298 Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Vai Lian Khuai Bawka Cong Luai, BA,BD, MTh Mang Lian On Khan Suan Sia Khai Lian Siam, BA, BTh,BD,MTh Siapi Dal Tum Siapi Thang Khan Suan Siapi Ciang Khan Vung Thu tawk nate Pu Song Do Thang, hausa Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Lethil Innkuan Laibu, 2022
Dimlo Khua
Khua min vawhna thu Dimpi khua ah Naulak Pu El Thuam in tapasal 13 aneih lak ah Pu Khup Vungh leh a sunghpa Hatlang Pu Muang Suan te in AD 1700 hun pawl in Sialtang lui gal kanin, tulai Dimlo gamsung; Ngalzang lo a zuan khawm uh hi. Tuk hun ciangin Sialtang lui khang in, kikantan zolo zel ahih manin Ngalzang lobuk ah a giah suaksuak uh leh teeng suak ta uh a, “ Dimpi te’lo” cih ki minvawh in “Dimlo” khua a suak ta hi. Khuasatna thu Dimlo Ngalzang lo panin AD 1760 pawl ciangin Tuilum mun ah na kituah uh hi. Tua sungin Pu Khup Vungh’ tapa Vungh Tong leh Go Kim te unau in a pute Hatlang te tawh vakhu bu vai in a kisiat uh ciangin Saizang ah Pu Mat vungh tungah tokai in Saizang na zuan uh hi. Adang Naulak leh Hatlang te Dimlo ah na tenglai uh a, Pu El Thuam pan khang 13 na Pu Khum Mang hun ciangin Lenzang kicihna mun ah na kituah hi. Hih hun sungin Pu Khum Mang leh Mualbem Pu Khan Thuam na kizawl uh hi. Dimlo khua na luun mahmah aa, Dimpi khua panin Naulak innpi zong Dimlo ah na tuahzo uh hi. Mangkang te hong khan ciangin 1889 January 23 ni in Mangkang te in Suangpi, Dimpi leh Dimlo khua te na hal uh a, 1892 November 5 ni in a nih veina a hal leuleu ciangin Dimlo panin khua tuamtuam ah na kikhenthang uh hi. Mikang gal daihdeuh ciangin pawlkhat te Dimlo ah hong ciahkik uh a, 1894 kum in Pamuazang mun a cihna ah khua na sat kik uh hi. Hih Pamuazang ah a om sungun Piantit gal hong om ahih manin Piantit pai zong a om uh hi. Hih Pamuazang mun ah a kicidam theihloh ciangin Pu Sut Vungh, Pu Hang Cin, Pu On Nok leh Pu Zing Awn te in 1920 kumin tulaitak aa a kitenna Sialtual acihna mun ah tui khuat in hong kituah uh hi. Hih mun ah nuamsa mahmah uh a, tudong in kiteng suak in, khua kip khat hong suak hi. Beh om teng Naulak- Tualtung Naulak-Tualkong Naulak-Dothang Naulak-Henzom Pawlpi om teng ABM RCM Laipian EBC AG Sanginn : Basic Education Post Primary School Zato : Sub RHC (4.3.2013) Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 82 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 73 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (263) + Numei (245) = 508 Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Fr.Kam Khua Hau, Zomi te sung pan Fr ngah masapawl Khai Khaw Pau, USA (Dimlo khua khai) Pa Dai Cin Pau, District Officer, Ministry of Information Pa Dai Thawn Thang, Deputy Staff Officer Thu tawk nate Pu Thawng Khua Mang, Hausa Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Lethil Innkuan Laibu, 2022
Buanli Khua
BUANLI Khua min vawhna thu: A.D 1600? hun lai-in Vaiphei Pu Mang Ngul in tulai Buanli gam sung; Khuamun, khuatangmun,Lotual mun, Lentang mun le Tuiphul mun teng huamin Dimpi khua panin inn 300 tawhna teeng ngei a, Elliang-uum vum pann a khuatang dung tai sagih cia ana huam hi. Pu Mang Ngul a khan lai-in lawi 99 ciang na khawi ngei a, alawite bualna mun nuite tuhun dongin kimu thei lai hi. A lawite bualna mun tengah ‘buan’ bekbek, tui li bangin cing liang ahih manin tua mun teng min lawhna dingin ‘Buanli’ kicipah hi. Khuasatna thu: 1890 kum sungin Mikangte in Tedim khua le Lamzang khua te a hal tum uh ciangin Tedim, Lamzang, Mualbem leh Saizang khua te pan gal kitai in khua tuamtuam kibeel hi. Mualbem pan Kawngte Pu Ngak Lam’ suan teng; Pu Hau Khai, Pu Vum Vial, Pu Kip Thual, Pu Khual Suak, Pu Khat Suak, Pu Lam Sel leh Pu Sel Neng te unau zong Pakzang, Lamzang, Muizawl, Lunmual, Tuicinlui, leh Tongsial khuate-ah kikhenthang kawikawi uh a, hun khat teitei teh, tul kigawm theikik a, pulepate hun pana hausa upatnasa zaate ngah theihkikna dingin khua khat sat-a, tenkhop theihkik nadingin Pu Hau Khai le Pu Vum Vialte kam vaikhakna a kinei uhi. Lamzang khua-h Pu Hau Khai leh Pu Vum Vialte a sih uh hangin a sanggam dang tengin kikaikhawm kik in, 1895 January 25 ni-in Lamzang, Muizawl, Tongsial leh Tuicinlui khuate pan Pu Khat Suak, Pu Lam Sel, Pu Kip Thual, Pu Sel Neng, Pu Lam Nang, Pu Lam Vum leh Pu Sum Awn te makai Buanli khua sat uh hi. Beh om teng Kawngte Hatlangh Thawmte Sektak Tunglut Phaipi Gualnam Naulak Pawlpi om teng : ABM RCM ICB UPC EBC CBC AG Yahweh Sanginn : Basic Education Post Primary School Zato : Sub RHC Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 68 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 55 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (287) + Numei (259) = 546 A madawk deuh te U Lal Nok (Township People Council) Zam Khan Mang, TBA, E M Director Dr. Nang Sawm Piang, Professor, TCC Gin Deih Sian, Professor, FBTS Dr. Nang Sian Mung, Bible Translator Dr. Pau Suan Kam, Principal, TTC Dr. Thang Geel Sum, Pastor, Berean EBC Dr. Lian Muan Kim, Founder President, KTS Thu tawkna te Pu Vungh Kam &#8211; Khua hausapa Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Kum 100 cin phawkna, Buanli khua [1895-1995],
Dimpi Khua
Khuasatna thu leh Khua min vawhna thu Gualnam te Mualleng khua pan paikhia in Simzang (Pakzang gam) ah, tua pan Saizang gam Mim-ek a kitun laitak in, Saizang khua ah Pu Mang Sum (Thawmte) a maan laitak hi a, pu dangte in Saizang ah a tennop laitak un Pu Nam Thang in Hatzaw leh Siam Suang te tawh khuathak sat ding hong ngaihsun uh hi. Amau teng makai in khuasat dingin inn 188 te hong dingkhia uh hi. Tulaitak aa Saizang khuakhung Khuangdingmual panin khua dak kawikawi uh a, pawlkhat in ngak in, pawlkhat in gam a va zon nading uh leh gamzong te in a tuntuna uh pan a khuang puak uh tum in, thu akizak nadingun a kivai tha uh hi. Pawlkhat in Khuangdingmual ah na ngak uh a, pawlkhat te gamzong dingin Sialtanglui ah tuaksuk pah uh hi. Sialtang lui panin kahto in, munzang piankhat a tun uh ciangin khawl uh a, tua lai ah Khuangdingmual dawn aa om a lawmte tawh a kiciamna bangun a khuang puak uh khatvei tum in thu a zasak uh hi. Tua mun pen Khuangtumzang cipah uh hi. Tua mun panin paito leuleu uh a, mual nih leh thum bang a then zawh uh ciangin mualsangbel khat a tung uh hi. Mualdang tampi khum ih hih ciangin ci in tua mun pen “Khum Vum” aci pah uh hi. Tua mun pan a paikhiat ding ciangun a khuang uh betkhat bengkik in a paikhia leuleu uh hi. Khumvum dung zui in pai leuleu uh a, mualtamzang khat a tuak uh hi. Tua lai panin a gil uh kial lua ta in, a lu uh vai gawp in am gawp uh ahih manin tua mun pen “Vaih Mual” ci in min pia uh hi. Tua mun ah a tawlnga phot uh hi. (Hih mun ah ni bangzah, kha bangzah tawlnga cih kitheilo hi) Tua pan mualdung zui in pai leuleu uh a, mualsang dawn khat a tung uh hi. Tua mun panin a khuang puapa uh gim lua ta ahih manin a khuang puak a tunglam in nga in tawlnga uh hi. Tua manin tua mun pen “Khuangphuh mual” ci in min pia pah uh hi. Tua pan a tawldam uh ciangun pai khia leuleu uh a, mualdung zui in tuaksuk uh a, Phaibul bekbek akiphek na munkhat a tuak uh hi. Tua lai mun pen Phai bekbek kiphek bekbak in kiphu zo nawnlo ahih manin ci in “Phaiphek mual” ci in min a pia pah leuleu uh hi. Tua lai mun ah tawlkhat a tawlnga leuleu uh hi. (Hih mun ah ni bangzah, kha bangzah tawlnga cih kitheilo hi) Tua Phaibul tamna mun panin kilehkik uh a, Khuangphuh mual lam ah tuaksuk in, Vaihmual a tungkik uh hi. Tua panin a nuailam ah tuak suksuk uh a, tuisam khat mu uh a, tua tui a dawnpah ngeingai uh hi. Tua a tui nekna uh kicingsa in lim sa mahmah uh ahih manun “Tuilii” ci in min a pia pah uh hi. A tawldam khit uh ciangin paikhia leuleu uh a, munzang khat a tung uh hi. Tua lai ah gamsial te bualbualna Ciknawngpi khat tuak uh a, tua mun pen “Sialbual” ci pah uh hi. Tua lai panin pawlkhat te gim lua ta ahih manina amai aa pai te pha zolo in a nung uah damdam in a zui uh hi. A mai aa paite pawlkhat in mualtam khat ah na ngak uh a, tua a kingakna mun uh pen “Tangpelh” ci in min pia uh hi. A tunkim uh ciangin tawlkhat a tawlnga kawm leuleu uh hi. (Hih mun ah ni bangzah, kha bangzah tawlnga cih kitheilo hi) Tua lai panin paikhia leuleu uh a, mualno khat a tun uh leh tua takah Beleng kungpi khat na om in tua beel in tawlnga leuleu uh a, tua mun pen “Beleng mual” cipah uh hi. Tua panin pai pheiphei uh a, mualzingh pian khat a tuak uh hi. Tua panin a khuadak uh leh tulaitak aa Dimpi khua sung teng galmuh uh aa, munhoih sa mahmah uh hi. Zanglai kidawh dimdiam leh a kiim ah mual in kiimkot in, mun noptuak sa uh ahih manin tua mun zuan in a pai uh hi. Tua munzang kidawh nawl ah tui nek ding zong na om pah in, a kiim kot ah mual in uumcih lai ahih manin galkulh dingin zong hoih sa pah uh a, tua takah khua sat aa tensuak ding a ngaihsun uh hi. Tua mun a tun uh ciangin gam a vel uh ciangin gan te dawn ding leh mihing nektheih dingin Zil-khuk leh a khuakiim keendaang te ah Khuaipi kaai zong a na om hi. Hi bangin khuamun ahoih banah Nek leh dawn dinglah kicing in, gal dal nading mual inzong uumcih lailai ahih manin duh leh deih teng a dim in om hi ci in, “Dimpi” khua a phuak uh hi. Khuathak sat dinga a paikhawm innkuan 188 te in hih Dimpi khua ah hong tensuak ding uh ciangin tui khuat in, khua biakna zong bawl pah in hong teng suak uh hi. Hih hun pen AD 1550 kiim hiding in kisansat hi. Khua biakna a bawl uh ciangin “Nam Thang khuasat, Hatzaw khuasat, Siam Suang khuasat, khua na siam in, tui na siam in; ka khua phuh, ka khua phahpek na siam in&#8230;” ci in phuisam uh hi. Kumsim in Tual akibawl ciangin khuasat inn 188 te ciaptehna in sabak mal 188 in kiseh in kihawm hi. Dimpi khuasat Gualnam Pu Nam Thang in a khuasat, a tuikhuatna tawh kisai in, a nuai a bangin la na phuak aa, tudong in kiciamteh lai hi. (a) Mimbang pianna tuang nusia’ng e,Gual tawh ciamin Dimtui vangkhua sat ingh ee. (b) Dimtui vangkhua sat ingh e, Ka sau nen ah damtui lii bang cing ingh ee. (a) Dimtui vangkhua ka sat in e, Ka min lawi bang thang na ee. (b) Khuavang sum bang ka biak, Dimtui tual ah, Nam Thang ka min manmawh na ding, Ciautui lum suang in phut ing. Hih Dimpi khuataw aa om Zil khuk ah khuasung mite bek hilo, khuadang panzong ci but in aa, hausa te in cisiah la uh a, khuakiim keendaang aa kaai Khuaipi te zong a deih te in at in, hausa te tungah Khuaisiah pia uh hi. Hi bangin Dimpi khua in Cisiah leh Khuaisiah kaai in nuam nasa mahmah aa, gal leh sa hang a hilo, si leh nai tawh lei ahilo, Pasian piaksa, a omsa leisung piang Siah a ne, Dimpi khua ahi hi. Dimpi khua sat hun pan a hunhun aa hausa te in Siah ne in nuam na sa mahmah uh a, Tedim gam sung khua te lakah khua minthang leh khua thupi khat hong suak hi. Dimpi khua hong kisat ciangin mundang pan beh tuamtuam inzong hong beel uh a, khua lianpi khat suak hi. A phat mahmah laitak in inn 800 bang pha ngei hi, kici hi. Inn tam mahmah ahih manin a khuataw leh a khuakhung kikal nangawn ah Vakhu leng paisuak zolo hi, ci in Pu Mitsum la te tungtawn in kimu thei hi. Kum tampi khit Naulak te Pu El Thuam hun inzong Dimpi khua na luun mahmah in, Dimpi gam sungah lo khawh nadingin gam kicing nawnlo ahih manin tulaitak aa Dimlo gam teng lo in na kho uh a, a ten suaksuak na panun Dimte’ lo cihna in Dimlo khua nangawn hong piang hi. Dimpi khuasat hun AD 1550 pan Pu Gualnam te in hausa sem in, khuasat Pu Nam Thang’ sanggampa Pu Kik Thang pan kipan khang 9 na Pu Pau Suang hun dongin Dimpi ah hausa sem in maang hi. Pu Pau Suang khang panin hausa sem kimlai Laaitui khua satin, inn 27 tak paikhia ahih manin Dimpi khua hong dai mahmah hi. Pu Pau Suang a paikhiat ciangin Hatlang te Pu Pau Zel in hausa sem in, Dimpi Zil siah leh Dimpi khuaisiah te kai hi. Dimpi khua sungah mi tam nawnlo ahih manin Saizang leh Vangteh te in Dimpi gam kuamkhat tuak hong sut uh hi. Tua bang kawmkal ah Mangkang te hong khan ciangin Dimpi, Dimlo leh Saizang khua te hong hal lailai ahih manin Dimpi khua pan pawlkhat paikhia in, Dimlo,Tungzang, Tuicinlui, Laaitui, Suanghoih akipan khua tuamtuam ah kilalkhia in, Dimpi khua hong dai mahmah leuleu hi. Galpi masa hong bei ciangin pawlkhat te Dimpi ah hong ciahkik uh a, tua pan kitawhkik in, mi hong tam deuhdeuh in a na omlai te tawh kigawm in inn tampi kipha kik thei ahi hi. Beh om teng Gualnam Gualnam-Munsuan Hatlangh Naulak Songput Buansing Pawlpi om teng ABM RCM Laipian Yahweh Sanginn : Basic Education Middle School Zato : Sub RHC (4.3.2013) Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 223 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023): 223 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (623) + Numei (682) = 1305 Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Bo Gum Khua Langh, Palik bu Pu Zam Za Thawn, BE Pa Thuam Khua Vungh, MA (Phil) Zam Sawm Sing, DMin (Cand) Kam Suan, Youth Director, TBA Thu tawk na te Pu Gin Za Dal, hausa Zam Sawm Sing, Pastor, Dimpi Baptist Church Pu Nang Thian Gin, Gualnam Beh thudot Pu Zam Za Thang, Hatlang beh thudot Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Lethil Innkuan Laibu, 2022
Buanman Khua
K hu amin vawhna: Nidang lai-in tulai Buanman gamsung tengah sing manphate thamlo, haigah le theigahte a kipan nektheih namkimte om in, Zanggam pan nangawnin gamsa ten tentolhna in nei ahih manin, tuk le khal le leikeu man ngeilo-in cimsel den a, buan nawi denin, mundang buante tawh kibang lo-in ‘man’ phadiak lai ahih manin tua munkuam teng lawhna in ‘Buanman mun’ cih kammal hong piang hi. Khuasatna thu Pu Thuk Lai tapa Pu Tuah Aam khang pan khang 8 na (1795?) pawlin a inntuan nadingun Buanman khua na sat hi. Hunkhat ciangin gal launa hangin kitaikek a, Vahui, Ngalthang, Ngaldim, Ektaak, Theilau, Phanzang, Haipeng leh Anthang khuate ah kitaikek ciat a, 1850 kum, galven ciangin Anthang mun panin Pu Thuam Khup makaihna tawh Buanman khua kizuan kik hi. Mangkang te hong khan leuleu 1889 kum ciangin Siallum ah nasia takin kidona lianpi om a, tua sung teng Buanman lawi in Voklak khua-ah tai uh hi. Galven 1904 kum sungin innbul zawdiak teng leh innmun logam neilo zawdiak tengin Buanman khua zuankik a, 1916 kum ciang teng phot hi. Buanman khua pen Thuklai te’ hanmun teng, akilukhapna mun ahih manin kikaamsia hi ci in 1917 kum ciangin Leisan khua sat uh hi. Ahizong Leisan khua ah kum 22 sung innmong 10 bang hong om veve ciangin 1939 kum pan kipan Buanman kizuan kik in tudong kitengsuak hi. Leisan aa omlai a tai nunung inn 9 teng in 1950 kum ciangin Buanman zuan nawn loin Pu Khai Khaw Pau makaihna tawh Buanman khawtaw Tai 1 bang a kigamlatna aa om ‘Sialtuzang’ mun ah khua sat in tengsuak hi. Tua hun pan kipan Buanman khua pen Buanman le Sialtuuzang mun 2 ah tu dong teng uh hi. Beh om teng: Munza Lianzaw Thanthang Pawlpi om teng : ABM SDA Reformed SDA Laipian Sanginn : Basic Education Primary School Zato : ngah nailo Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 32 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 29 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (56) + Numei (65) = 121 Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Major Awn Ngin Major Cin Kho Mang Major Cin Za Pau Khup Za Thang, Zo khangsimna bawlpa Capt Khai Khat Pum, police officer Lian Kham, Tedim aa teng masapawl Awn Za Nang, Law Officer Hau Za Kimlai, Director, Forest Department Dr Kam Za Dal, Health Officer Lian Za Nang, Law Officer Mang Nang, Head of BSSP Tun Thawng, AD, Co-operative department Dim Khan Neam, Asst Principal, Agriculture Suak Za Nang, Assistant Manager, Trade Vum Do Pau, Archeology Officer Sing Khan Chin, HQA, GAD Dr Vum Za Cing, MBBS,MSc,MD(Og) Cing Neam, Secretary, YMCA Cing Za Niang, SAE Khai Za Thang, SAE Dr Suak Khat Pum, Deputy Director, Livestock Breeding Cherry Mang Man, Director, Planning Cing Lun Huai, Deputy Director, Central statistics Thu tawk nate Pu Ngo Za Thang, Khua Hausa pa Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Sizang min-pianna-le-pu-thuan-tak-tangthu Thuklai khua leh Sizang ngam tangthu, 2020
Cingpikot (Keizang) Khua
Khuasatna thu Suante beh Suanzong te Pu Son Kham te Muizawl ah a ten laitak un Pu Son Kham makai in, gamkuan uha, Teute ken-ah khuai a at uhi. Pu Hang Chin in ngal 1 le sazuk 1, Pu Son Kham in sazuk 1 manin tuahpha kisa uh ahih manin tulai Keizang gam sung “Cingpikot mun ah khua sat dingin a vaihawmpah uh ih. Kithukim uh a, 1894 kum in Muizawl panin ‘Cingpi kot khua’ na sat uh hi. 1908-1909 kum sungin Muizawl Hausa Pu Pau Khen in Buhlei tui mun ciang Muizawl gam dingin deih a, Mualnuam Hausa Pu Thawng Lian inzong tulai Cingpikot khuamual ciang, Mualnuam gam dingin a deih hi. Pu Son Kham leh Pu Suan Khai te in Tonzang Ukpipa Pu Hau Cin Khup a dot ciangin “Keizang mun” ah ana kituh a a khiatna dingin thu pia a, Tedim SDO vuandok Zum leh Falam DC Mangpi Zum ah zong na gen sak lai hi. Khua kituah nading thu angah uh ciangin Cingpikot panin Keizang munah kituah uh a, “Cingpikot khua” ahih keileh, “Keizang khua” ci-in khuamin nih anei khua a suak hi. Kumpi Zum tawh kizopna thu ah “ Cingpikot khua” ci-in kiciamteh a, Biakna lam panin, “Keizang khua” ci-in kiciamteh zaw hi. Khua min vawhna thu Nidang hun-in tulai Keizang gamsungah ciing khauguite bekbek a tam mahmahna mun teng “Cingpikotmun” ci-in kiminvawh msa hi. Pu lepate in tua mun ah khua asat uh ciangin munmin ki vawhsa tam in “Cingpikot khua” a cisuak uhi. Keizang min kiphuahna thu in, Keising pi khat om a, tua mun zang tengah kiteng ahih manin Keizang akici ahi hi. Beh om teng Buansing Suante Naulak Hatlangh Songvak Pawlpi om teng ABM RCM AG UPC Sanginn : Basic Education High School Zato : Sub RHC (21.10.1968) Inn phazah (2023) : 140 Innkuan phazah (2023) : 147 Mi phazah (2023) : Pasal (503) + Numei (480) = 983 Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Thawng Do Nang Awn Zam Fr. Andrew Thang Za Khai Son Khaw Kham Dr. Smith Ngul Za Thawng Khoi Lam Thang Dr. Thang Cin Lian Dal Za Kap Ngin Khan Dongh E. U Hau Do Suan Siapi Phut Khua Suan Siapi Thang Suan Dal Siapi Son Mun Mang Limsuaisiam ST Suanno Nu Luan Za Cing Thu tawk nate Pu Ngul Dai, hausa Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Lethil Innkuan Laibu, 2022
Vando Khua
Khuasatna thu Tedim gam Suangpi khua panin Buansing beh Pu Nok Khaw Zam, Pu Nok Khaw Thang leh Pu Kham Khaw Ngin te makai in 1940 kumin Dolluang hausa Pu Do Hang thupiakna tawh Vando khua sat uh hi. Vando gam teng Dolluang gam sung hi a, gamhoih mahmah in, Vaimim leh Alu piang hi. Gankhawl inzong hoih mahmah aa, Sial khawina gamkhawk inzong kinei hi. Inn a tam hun in inn 10 kim bang pha hi. Khua min vawhna thu Bang min tap in &#8216; Vandon khua &#8216; kici hiam cih thu, ciamteh na kician a om loh hangin, tu lai Vando khuakhang a, Hunghum mualvum pen, van tawh aki do (a kinangg) ding zahin sang mahmah hi. Tua ahih manin &#8216; Vando (nangg) &#8216; cih kammal panin &#8216; Vando mun &#8216;min kici a, tua munah khua hong kisat ciangin &#8216;Vando mun&#8217;min omsatam hin &#8216; Vando khua &#8216; kici hi ding hi, cih in kiciamteh hi. Beh om teng Buansing Suante Naulak Pawlpi om teng Laipian RCM Sanginn : 1985 kum in Zolai sang ngah uh a, sangnaupang tawm lua ahih manin 2000 kum in kumpi a sang uh Mainuai khua ah khiinsak uh hi. Zato : Nei nailo Kivaakna Khutsiamna (Lawh, Ciang, Bawm, Seng phamsiam) Lo khawh (Alu, Vaimim) Meilah sat in zuak Gankhawi Inn phazah leh mi phazah: Kum 70 sung bang khua ah mi teng in, tuhun ciangin lo kuanna leh lokhawhna, gankhawina dan bek in kinei in, a mi te in khuapi te ah innkip neizaw tek uh hi. Thu tawk nate Pa Khai Za Suan, hausa Pathian ompui Dolluang khua since 1897 Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township ~~~~~~~~~~~~
Tuivial Khua
Khuasatna thu 1903 kum in Phunom khua panin Naulak te Pu Lam Sing makai in pasal 13 in a satna khua ahi hi. Phunom khua pan Suangdawh khua ah (1903 pan 1906), Kuangphual khua ah (1906 pan 1923), Akbutun khua ah (1923 pan 1978), tua pan Tuivial khua ah 1978 pan tudong abanbanin kitungkim ahih manin, ‘Tuivial khuasat Pupite’ ci-in kiciamteh kim hi. Ahizongin Akbutun khua panin tulai Tuivial khua akiten zawhtheih nadingin zulesa leh sialpi a liau Pu Suak Vial, Pu Kham Thang le Pu Son Ngin te lawmta thumteng pen, Tuivial khuamun a zuan masapen hi, ci-in a ciamteh diakzong om hi. 2015 July in guah tamluatna hangin mun tuamtuam ah mim cipna om a, Tuivial khuataw lam tengzong cim kawikawi ahih manin khua thung lamah inn 38 te kikhiinto uh hi. Khua min vawhna thu Nidang hun akipanin tuhun dong mahin tulai Tuivial khuataw lam, tai khat bang akigamlatna munah mualbo zangtam tungah cik tuikhuk khat om hi; tua ciktui a luankhiat ciangin a kivial in luangkhia sese hi. Tua ciktui khuk bel in khua hong kisat ciangin tua ciktui luangkhia a kivial kawikawi aa luang pen kimin vawh in ‘Tuivial khua’ kici ahihi. Beh om teng Naulak Haunung Suante Pawlpi om teng ABM RCM AG Laipian EBC Sanginn : Basic Education Middle School Zato : Sub RHC (4.3.2016) Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 99 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 108 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (401) + Numei (379) = 780 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gankhawi Gamdang pai Kumpi nasem Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Kam Do Thang, council makai Cin Khai, ASEO Cin Za Kap, Tsp Judge Tuang Ngin Cin Za Mung Kam Ngo Thang, Oculist Khai Cin Khup, ATEO Cin Tuk Kim, Asst Agr Officer Vial Khan Kap, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Thang Khan khual, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Thu tawk nate Pa Thang Za Ngin, hausa Pathian ompui Dolluang khua since 1897 Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Tuithang Khua
Khua min vawhna thu Tuhun a Tuithang khua kici, mun pen nidang lai-in Khuangzang khua mun hi a, Thadote’ tenna mun mah ahi hi. Tua Khuangzang khua lui mah ah, tulai Tuithang khua hong sat ciangin Khuangzang kici nawn tuan loin mi khempeuh ii theih khua minthang mindapin Tuithang khua a kici ahi hi. AD. 1700 hun bei kuan lamin Gangte-te leh Thadote’ tenna, “Tuithang” kici khua khat om a, tua khua pen tu laitak hun a, “Tuithang” kici logam munteng ahi hi. “Tui” cihpen, khua cihna hi a, “Tuithang” cih pen “Khua minthang” cih nopna ahi hi. Khuasatna thu Losau khua thumna abei zawh a sawt loin Lamzang khua Samte Pu Kei En in Mualbem khua Sukte Pu Khan Lam2 Losau khua-ah tengkhawm dingin a zol hi. A kiim apaam khuate pan in pawl zawn kawikawi in Losau khua munlui mahah, a thumveina Losau khua hong sat leuleu uhi. Khua sat hun pen 1856-1860 hun sungteng hi ding hi, ci-in aki seh hi. Sukte Pu Khan Lam in hausa sem in Pu Sing Kam khang dong tuk-tha, khal- tha, innliang, gamliang kai-uh hi. Pu Khan Hang in a zi Pi Kam Ciin (Laaitui khuasat Pu Pau Suang’ unu) tawh Losau panin Shelphei khua sat hi. Tua ciangin Losau panin pawlkhat in Pu Khan Hang beel uh a, pawlkhat ah Losau ah omlai uh hi. Selphei khua-a, a lal lo tengin tua laitak aa hausa Pu Sing Kam tunga a siah piak uh hamsa sa uh ahih manin Losau pan paikhiat ding a ngaihsun veve uh hi. Tua bang hun laitak in Losau ah Phiamphu Pu Awn Neng le Biangtung Pi Nok Niang kingai-a, a u Pu Am Vial in a kiten’ dinguh awi lo hi. Tua ciangin Losau khua pan Meitei gungal lamah Pu Awn Neng nuaktai-a, Thakpi vumah sathak luang khat manin Salam (Voklai) munah a giak hi. Pu On Neng in khua munnuam zong kawmin Voklai mun panin gam vakkhia-a, tuhun a Gakuang kici munah tuinak hoih mahmah khat a tuak a khua tui nek dingin hoihsa a, singsan gil khat phut in a ciamteh hi. Losau khua a tun kik ciangin Pu Suan Ai kiangah “Ka gam muh va en ni,” ci-in a zawn a, a nih un a va-et ciangin ama ciamtehna mun sanga khuamun ding a hoihzaw, Khuangzang khualuimun a mu-uh hi. Pu On Neng leh Pu Suan Ai-te hong tunkik ciangun Tuithang gama khuasat ding vai, hausa Pu Sing Kam theihloh kalin Pu Suan Kho Thang’ inn ah upateng tawh a kikum sim uh hi. Khuathak sattheih leh hausa dingin Pu Am Vial a seh uh leh, “Kei teek lua khin ka hih manin Suan Kho Thang in sem hen,” ci-in a khiatphot hi. 1892 kumin Khampheng buk lamkhol dingin Losau panin a kuan khia uh hi. Khuangzang mun a tu’n uh ciangin Kongpi lui(luipi)su’ng suangpi nuai-ah giahphual sat uh a, Zanglai mun a Pangpi bul tuinak bulphuh in hausa upa tengin inn munding a ciamteh masa uh hi. Belh theih ding zah in, inn vai, lovai a ma’n siang uh ciangin Losau khua ah a ciah kik phot uh hi. 1893 kum ciangin khampheng buk lamkhol, inn 27 teng-in Losau hausa Pu Sing Kam theihloh kal, ak masa khuanin a dingkhia uh aa, Losau ah inn 3 bek omlai hi. Pu Sing Kam in a theih ciangin nungdelh a, Lamzang khuataw zangmanglii ah a pha hi. Kuamah kihopih loin Phil tundong pai uha, Philtun a tun ciangun khawl uha thukikupna a nei hi. Mi a tamzawte in Losau-ah Pu Sing Kam ciahkik hen, a cih uh ciangin Pu Sing Kam in “Losau khua ah kei guak, sihen, mang hen hongci na hi uh hiam? Ka giim ciikpi nam a, tumtek nam hiam? Na paipaina vuah kei zong ka bantangin hong kai-un; hausa dingin nong deih kei uh lezong, nautang khatin hong omsak unla, hausa dingin nong deih lai uhlehlah kaih leh bum, no hong piak tengteng bek ka ne ding hi,” ci-in a thuum hi. “Tua ahihleh hong makai-inla, tuktha, khaltha, innsaliang, gamsaliang, siahtung teng bek ne in; siahphei hong nei kei in,” ci-in a hausa dinga, a sehsa uh Pu Suan Kho Thang in a hausa za, Pu Sing Kam a khiatkik hi. Khuangzang mun a tun uh ciangin a lamsa uh Khampheng mun ciat ah lut uh a, hausa upate’ mun dinga, a seh kholhsa mun mahmah uah hausa upa tengmah a tungpah uh hi. Khuakulh zong bawl pah uh hi. Khuangzang munah hong te’n uh ciangin a khuamin uh Khuangzang khua kici loin, Tuithang khua a ci uh hi. Beh om teng Biangtung Gualnam Guite Naulak Ngaihte Phiamphu Samte Sukte Siamsuang Tawmging Tunglut Vangaw Pawlpi om teng ABM AG BCM BCJC EFCB Laipian Methodist NAC Piangthak pawlpi RCM SDA Siangsawn UPC World Pentecostal Yahweh Yahvah Kumpi zum leh inn Branch Post Office : 1965 Sanginn : Basic Education High School, Tuithang : Basic Education Middle School, Tuithang Zato : RHC (1.9.1955) : Station Hospital (1996) Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 554 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 584 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (1699) + Numei (1636) = 3335 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gan khawi Gamdang pai Kumpi nasem Sumbuk Lettama Pazan Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Ai Khen Thang, Bawhlung siam leh Secretary for Ma Wa Ta(1988-90) Cin Go Kap, Township Coop Officer Dal Deih Piang, Oral Robert University ah Doctorarte sin Nung Mun Thawn, MBBS ngah masa En Khan Gin, mihau le Lainatna Sang neipa Gin Kap Nang, State Coop Officer Hau Za Tung, khua hausa lui leh a tumdiak Vanlenginn kici a neipa hi. Khawm Lian Sang, Zolai tawh Manglai grammar a bu aa hawmkhia Khen Do, Tedim aa teng masapawl Langh Sawm Pau, Township Coop Officer Lengtong Go Lian, Tumging siam leh Lasiam Lengtong Pauno@Cin Za Hu Pau, Laphuak siam leh Zogam Labupi kicipa Lian Than Tuang, Zomi te lakah UK aa Computer Network sin masa Col.Kam Do Khup, State Peoples Council Major Kam Khan Cin Pum Za Sum, Forest Dept ah Director Man Za Lun, Tsp Judge Ngai Za Ciin, Sanvon te tunga pulepa mawhna a sutpinu Pau Khat Suan, BE (C) ngah masa leh Senior Engineer sem masa Dr. Kam Khaw Thang, Tedim LST teipa Dr. Pum Khan Nang, Zomi Encyclopedia bawlpa Thawng Za Kimh, La phuaksiam. Dr. Pau Gin Mang, Korea pan Worldcup lai at siam kidemna ah a khatna leh Tuithang te sung pan LST sangah Dean of Student sem masa leh Tedim- Eng Dictionary bawlpa. Song Khan Thang, State Peoples Council, District Judge Officer Subedar Thang Za Kai, Tuithang mi Bo ngah masa leh Malaysia, Thailand pai masa Thang Deih Khup, Mihau leh ZCD MP Thang Suan Gin, bawhlung siam (Chin state leh Yangon Division aiawh) Thomas Khanno, mihau aa minthang Thuam Go Thang, High School Head Tual Za Kham, Tedim aa teng masapawl Thu tawk nate Pa Hen Za Pau, hausa Tuithang khua tangthu, Second Edition 2014 Tuithang khua leh Siamsinna, Vol. I Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Tuipi Khua
Khuasatna thu Pu Pau Za Lian in Tungzang khua nusia-in Mualnuam pana a paikhiatpih a lawmte tawh 1888 kum in Tuipi khua a sat uh hi. Tungzang panin Pu Tun Lut leh Pu Lut Kham te in a zui uh hi. Tua lo a nungzui dangte pen Mualnuam leh Vangteh Guite leh Teizang mite ahi uh hi. Khuangsuanzo a tu’n ciangin Pu Tun Lut mah in tuinak khuat a, tuinak bia siampi mah sem hi. (Pu Tun Lut Tuipi-ah kum nih bang a om khit ciangin Tuithang a, a beh pa Pu Suan Kho Thang in sam kik a, a tuinak biak siampi za a khiat hi. Tua bang mahin Pu Lut Kham zong Tungzanga, a behte in zol kik a,Tungzang ah ciah kik uh hi. ) Khua min vawhna thu Nidang lai in tulai Tuipi gamten pen, Tonzang gam hi a, ‘ Khuang suanzo’ a cihna logam ahih manin Tonzang pan in lo a galkhawh na mun uh ahihi. Hih Khuangsuanzo mun pana lui lianpi 4 te pan a luang, tuite tam thei mahmah ahih manin ‘tui tam’ cihna in ‘tui pi’ ci-in kiminvawh hi. Hih munteng ah khua kisat ciangin, mun min kivawhna zui in, Tuipi khua a kici ahihi. Beh om teng Sukte Hatzaw Gualnam Buansing Zamang Hangsawk Guite Nekgen Thawmte Thawngnawk Munvungh Pawlpi om teng ABM RCM AG Sanginn : Basic Edication Post Primary School (2015) Zato : S ub Rural Health Center (28.12.2009), Tuipi Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 99 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 81 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (250) + Numei (254) = 504 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gan khawi Gamdang pai Kumpi nasem Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Cin Za Khup, State Cooperative Chairman Tun Za Kham, Tama chairman Neek Khan Pau, Tama Go Lian Pau, Bank Manager Cin Do Lian, UBA Cin Za Tuang, UBA Gin Lun Cing, Tutor Capt Khual Lian Mang Capt Thang Suan Piang Thu tawk nate Kam Za Mung, hausa Tuithang khua tangthu, 2 nd edition, 2014 Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Gamlai Siakhawk Tuiphum pawlpi kipawlna Diamond Jubilee Laibu, 2020 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Tuilang Khua
Khuasatna thu AD 1600-1700 hun pawl in Ciimnuai panin Pu Hang Hil tapate ahi Man Lun leh Man Tuang; Thawmte, Guite leh Thahdo mite kipawl in Phaileeng mun ah hong teng uh hi. A khawtaw zang ah Phai kung tampi po a, khuakhal hun ciangin tua Phaipak te huih in mut in leng zuazua ahih manin Phaileng khua ci in a kiminvawh ahi hi. Amaute khuado in zu kham sakham in a om laitak un Zo tualgal in na sim gawl hi. Tawmging Pu Suah Phung in hausa a sep hun inzong Pawi gal in a nih veina na simgawp in khuazang bup dektak thatlum ahih manin Phaileng khua masa hong bei hi. AD 1700 pawl ciangin Saizang panin Tawmbing Pu Neih Awn te innkuan in hih Phaileng khua munlui ah lo gal khawh in tengsuak hi. Pu Neih Awn kawlkai lo ah Pu Kawm Lam zong hong teng hi. Hun khat ciangin Lamzang pan Pu Paam Thuam in Pu Khan Thuam tungah Phaileng khuamun lui ah khuasat ding anget leh na pia a, Dak bu khat, Khuang khat leh Sialtal khat tawh khua phuhna na nei hi. Tuikhuat dingin Tangpua Pu Hen Kai kicial in a nung ah beh dangdang tezong tungthuah hi. Hunkhat ciangin Mualbem te leh Buanman te kiciam in Kalzang khua a simh ciangin Kalzang pan leh Vangteh Botung pan in gal tai uh a, Phaileng khua tung uh a, ana tengsa tawh tengkhawm uh hi. Hih bangin Phaileng khua ah Kalzang pau, Saizang pau, Losau pau leh Tedim pau kihelzau in a pau uh ciangin awsuah nam khat hong piang khia aa, Phaileng pau kici suak hi. Phaileng khua pana pusuak tezong Phaileng mi kici pah hi. Mikang kumpi te hong khan ciangin 1889 kum in Phaileng khua inn 40 val halsak ahih manin gal tai uh a, Phiantang mun ah kikhin uh hi. Phiantang panin Omlui khua ah kituah in kum khat sung bang teng uh hi. Hih khua ah sukte Pu Sum Pau in hausa sem hi. Mikang galkap Gualkha galkap te in Omlui khua halsak leuleu uh a, Lailo gam Singmual ah kikhin uh hi. Omlui khua a kihal hun in Losau khua zong kisusia hi. Phaileng kampau teng Singmual ah kum 2 bang tengkhawm uh a, Gualnam Pu Son Kai in hausa sem in Pu Zong Son in upa sem hi. Singmual panin Tuilang gam Khuangnung ah kikhin uh hi. Khuangnung ah kum 3 sung bang a tenkhop zawh uh ciangin tensuak ding lung tung zolo uh ahih manin 1895 kum in Thatmun Pu Bena makai in Lunmual khua sat uh hi. 1896 kum in Gualnam Pu Lam Sawm makai in Suante beh, Tomging beh, Suankhup beh leh Phaipi beh pawlkhat tawh Phaileng (Tatzang) khua zuan kik uh a, tudong in kiteng suak in, khuakip khat suak hi. 1896 kum in Suankhup beh Pu Khoi Vum makai in Khuangnung aa om lai tengin tui tamna mun Tuilangh khua sat uh hi. Khua sat ding ciangin Khuangnung leh Singmual khua te pan a sisa pu leh pa te luguh te pua in Tuilangh khua sat uh a, khua phut dingin Sukte Pu Sum Pau ngak in, lo ciing khat zong siah uh hi. Amah a paitheihloh ciangin Tonzang ukpi Hau Cin Khup in voktal tuk 5 khat tawh khuakip pia hi. Pu Khoi Vum mahin hausa sem hi. Khua min vawhna Nidanglai-in tulai Tuilangh khuataw zang mun ah ciktuikhuk lianpi khat om a, a gamlapi panin a kilang in kimuthei hi. Tua ciktuikhuk kilang cihnop na in Tuilang mun kici masa hi. Khuangnung khua pan in Suankhup Pu Khoi Vum makaihna tawh hih Tuilangh mun ah khua a kisatciang in ‘Tuilangh khua’ci- in a kimin vawhsuak a hihi. Beh om teng Suankhup, Suante Lianzaw Phiamphu Phaipi Biangtung Gualnam Pawlpi om teng Laipian Siangsawn ABM RCM TBC TCBC Methodist CBCM GBC EBC AG Sanginn : Basic Education Middle School, Tuilangh Zato : Sub Rural Health Center (4.3.2016),Tuilangh Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 220 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023): 220 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (683) + Numei (708) = 1391 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gan khawi Kumpi nasep Gamdang pai Leisek cian siam Innlam siam Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Tun Za Thang, Tedim aa teng masapawl Kham Za Langh, Engineer Tual Khan Dal, khazai uapdi azasih Ngin Cin Khual, Myone Pianciazi usimu Go Za Thang, Commercial Suh Office Mawnager Do Suan Pau, Immigration Officer Ciin Hau Dim, MBBS Thang Suan Mung, khua tangthu kan Daniel Zen Khua Tuan, DMin ngah masa Fr. Lucas Suan Za Lian, Fr suak masa Pum Za Dal, Rev ngah masa Thu tawk nate Thang Suan Mung, AG pastor Kum 120 cin Tuilangh khua tangthu (1896-2016) Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Tuilangh AG Kum 40cin Jubilee Laibu (2016) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Thuklai Khua
Khuasatna leh Khua min vawhna thu Thuklai khua pen Pu Thuklai phawk nadinga ama min kitamh sak khua ahi hi. Pu Thuan Tak ii tapa Pu Vang Lok in tapa 3 nei a, Pu Thuklai, Pu Hang Sawk leh Pu Lim Khai ahi hi. Pu Thuklai in zi a neih ciangin Thuan Tak khua panin inntuan in Vomhzang khua sat hi. Vomhzang khua ah Pu Thuklai suante khang 6 ( kum 150 bang) na teng uh a, Pu Sum Sel hun ciangin Muipi khua na sat hi. Muipi khua a sat lai in khawk 6 suah in na sat aa, Muipi (khua makai deuh t eng), Muitung (Lunmun te), Muinuai(Sumniang te), Muikhua (Zamang te), Muidaam(Lunmun te), Muisang ci in na khen uh hi. Hun khat ciangin Falam, Mualbem, Limkhai, Buanman eh Lophei kipawl in Muipi khua simh a, Muipi khua kaangtham in bei hi. Tua panin Kalzang, Khuasak, Phaipi te ah gal tai uh hi. 1866 kum pawl in, Falam te tawh Ngatan luika ah kilemna bawl uh hi. Kilemna bawlzawh ciangin Khuasak pan Pu Lam Mang, Pu Hau Thuam, Pu Suak Thang, Pu Thuk Lam, Phaipi khua pan Pu Kam Lam, Pu Kim Hau, Pu Mang Thuam, Pu Lam Vum, Bellei khua pan Pu Khup Hau, Pu Lam Tuang, Pu Pau Vum, Pu Kip On, Pu Zong Thuam te kisutuah in, Muipi khua zotkik ding vaihawm uh hi. Tenkhop kik ding kithukim uh a, Muipi khua zuan kik in, a Pu uh Pu Thuklai min a manloh nading leh a phawk tawntung nading un Muipi khua pen Thuklai khua ci in min laih uh hi. Thuklai khua a tenkik ciangun Pu Kam Lam in hausa sem hi. Mikang te hong khan ciangin 13.2.1889 ni in Thuklai khua la uh a, galkap phualpi phut uh hi. Tua galphualpi pen Mikang galkapmang Field Marshal White min vawh in Fort White cin min vawh hi. Gam vaihawm nadingin Mangpi Carey, Vuandok Captain Rundall, Myo uk U Tun Win leh palik koih aa, Zogam ah khuapi masabel hong suak hi. Thuklai ah kum 2 a om sungun sungpai natna hong om in, galkap tampi asih ciangin mun hoihlo hi ci in 1890 tuuk sungin Capt. Rundall makai in Thuklai pan Tai 7 a phakna Thaangmual ah galkap phualpi khiin uh hi. 1892 ciangin Myo uk U Tun Win a kisuamlup ciangin Limkhai khua simlo khuabup in hong haltum in gamlak gal tai uh hi. Hausa ukpi tezong a buk gaih uh ciangin mikang te in khua hausa ding na laih a, Thuklai hausa dingin Pu Ngo Khaw Thang, Khuasak hausa dingin Pu Lian Vum, Buanma hausa dingin Pu Pau Khai leh Myo uk suamna aa kihello Lophei leh Limkhai te hausa kilaih loin Lophei-Pu Khup Lian, Limkhai-Pu Mang Lun temah na koih hi. Tua panin Thuklai khua khuakip suakin tudong kiteng suak hi. Beh om teng Zamang Zangkai Mangzong Hautong Tunngo Laiteng Niangtawng Lunteng Lenteng Thangngiak Sumkip Sumsel Thatmun Thawmte Pomzul/Thangbel Naulak Taihlaw Pawlpi om teng ABM Laipian RCM SDA AG Sanginn : Basic Education High School Zato : Station Hospital (1967) : Rural Health Center (1953) Zum om te Sub Township Office (1964), 1974 in kiphiat kik.
