Cin Kho Pau (2022) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Theizang Khua
Khuasatna thu Theizang khua pen Mikang te Khamtung hong tun ma in Lim Khai Mang Tawn tu Pu Tawn Thang in tulaitak Theizang khuamun ah khua sati na teng ngeizo hihtuak hi. Pu Tawn Thang tanu Pi Ciang Dim leh Khuasak Pu Tong Seal kiteng hi. Tua hun lai in Tualgal, Pawi gal leh Mitpheikhit gal te na piang hi. Khuasak bangah Mitpheikhit gal kum 7 sung kido hi kici hi. Hi bang gal te hong khan ciangin Pu Tawn Thang te in ciitawm kisalai ahih manun Lim Khai aa a u anau te zuankik gai in Theizang na nusia kik uh hi. Mikang te hong khan ciangin 4.2.1889 ni in Khuasak khua haltum uh hi. Thaangpi (Fortwhite) ah camp hoihtak bawl uh a, Zato inn, galkap, sikkhau to, galkap len, lineman line te akipan kumpi inn te lam uh hi. Tuulsuk, Phatzang, Thaang, Dimlo leh Tedim ah Buzung koih uh a, Buzung sim ah Dolman koihtek hi. Phatzang buzung dolman dingin Hangman te Pu Lam Suan koih uh hi. Tua hun lai in Phatzang nai ah khua omlo ahih manin ulian te hong pai ciangin zin do nading aktui aktak te ngah nading haksa ahih manin Mikang kamphenpa Paw Two in Lam Suan kiangah Theizang khua a sat nadingin vai khak hi. Tua ciangin Pu Lam Suan zong Khuasak ah ciah pah in, Theizang khua sat dingin Pu Thang Hau leh Pu Mang Lian tawh vaihawm in 1901 kumin Theizang khua satkik uh a, Pu Thang Hau in hausa na sem hi. Theizang khua akisat kik ciangin Mikang gal hanga gam sunga om Thei ek pan Khaman te, Vauna pan Naulak te, Zaunuai leh Thulzang pan Khuasak mi peuhmah in Theizang khua hong zuan in teng uh hi. Khua kisat zo ahih hangin Khuasak khua panin Pu Lian Vum in hausa Pu Thang Hau leh khua upa ahi Pu Mang Lian, Pu Son Suang te Tedim ah khia in, thong taak sak hi. Hausa Pu Thang Hau in zum thu tanna tawh a satsa Theizang khua nusia in Khuasak ah tungkik hi. Pu Thang Hau in Khuasak khua a zotkik ciangin Pu Mang Lian hausa sem sak aa, khuasat zawh kum 9 a phak, 1909 kum ciangin khuakip aa sanna laipi ngah in, tudongin khuakip khat suak hi. Khua min vawhna thu Pu Tawn Thang in khua a satcill lai in tulaitak aa Pu Kham On lo sung (Pa Nang Thian Pau) inn thang zaangtam teng ah Thampheng lam in omphot hihtuak hi. Tua mun teng Koaikii khua ci uh hihtuak hi. A sauvei lam ciangin tua mun teng ah Theikung lianpi honkhat a omna zangtam ahih manin ‘Theizang khua’ na cipah hihtuak hi. Beh om teng Tuanthang Khumthang Tongseal Thatmun Namzo Hangman Tawtak Khupthang Naulak Panghvom Holte Luktai Buansing Zahlangh Khupmu Nisuah Guite Pawlpi om teng Laipian ABM SDA AG NAC UPC Sanginn : Basic Education Sub High School Zato : Sub RHC (1974) Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 120 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 114 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (314) + Numei (321) = 635 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gankhawi Gamdang pai Kumpi nasem Lettama Telawng leh nahtang ciing Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Non Kim, Dental doctor Suan Za Cin, Staff Officer (Forestry) Cing Kaang Niang, AD (Post Telegraph Transport) Khai Lian Cin Thang, Director (Revenue) Thu tawk nate Kham Za Nang, hausa Theizang khua leh Tuiphum pawlpi tangthu, 2011 Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Sizang min-pianna-le-pu-thuan-tak-tangthu Thuklai khua leh Sizang ngam tangthu, 2020 ~~~~~~~~~~~~
Thangsan Khua
Khuasatna leh khuamin vawhna thu Mangkang kumpite hong khan ciangin khamtung gam pawlkhat in Mangkang kumpi hong do hi ci in a theih te mei tawh na halsak hi. Tua sungah Vangteh khua zong kihel ahih manin khuadang ah na taitek uh a, Thawmte Pu Vial Suan, Pu Beal Tun leh Pu Suan Khai te in Tuitawh khua na bel uh hi. Tua hun sungin Dolluang khuamun ah khuasat hunsung ahih manin Dolluang hausa Pu Ngo Khaw Thang in a khua upa Pu Kham Pau leh Pu Vum Thang te sawl in, Keizang khua aa abeh te uh a zawn dingin paisak hi. Keizang aa te a na utloh ciangin Tuitawh aa behte zawn ning ci in, Tuitawh pai uh hi. 1906 kum ciangin Tuitawh panin Pu Vial Suan, Pu Beal Tun te unau leh Pu Suan Khai in na zuisuk pah uh hi. Dolluang atun uh ciangin kum 3 sung na tengkhawm uh hi. Ahizongin Dolluang khua aa atengsa te tawh dawi biakna kibang theilo ahih manin Pu Vial Suan leh Pu Beal Tun te unau Laangkham mun ah a tuamten hi. Kum khat khit ciangin Saizang khua panin Vangaw Pu Zing Thang leh Pu Ngaih Thualte unau in hong zuan uha, a ten masakna munteng lei san lua sa uh ahih manin Thangsan nuainung munah a kikhiin uhi. Tua mun panin Pu Vial Suan’ tapa nihna Pu Awn Vung in inn a hong neih ciangin Pu Zing Thangte unauteng tawh inn (5) a pha uhi. Khatvei Tedim vuandokpa Mr. Thomson gam van dingim hong zin a, “Ngo Khaw Thang aw, na siah nek nop mana hong tungthak te khuatuam ah tengsak cih za ing. Tuabang hithei lo hi” a cih leh Pu Ngo Khaw Thang in ‘ka dawi biakna uh aki batloh man hi’ acih ciangin Vuandokpa in ‘tua ahih lehzong vai khat peuh aom ciangin na sapna hong zak nading ciangah tengsak thei bek ding hi teh’ ci hi. Tua ciangin hausapa inzong ngaihsun pah a, a zingsang ciangin a sapna a za theipah ding ci in, Dolluang thaan khang( tu laitak aa Rev. J Thang Za Pau te lo lu) singkung tungah zing tuung in pasal khat tukhol sak pah hi. Vuandokpa in a sapsak ciangin za theipah lian ahih manin vuandokpa lungkimsa in Tedim zuan kik hi. Hunkhat ciangin Tedim vuandokpa Dolluang gam van dingin hong zin kik in, Tedim pan Laihan (Pimpih) lam tawn in hong lehsuak thong hial a, Kawllang mual panin Langkham munah inn a om te mupah ahih manin hehsa in Dolluang hong tung hi. Hong tun ciangin ‘Ngo Khaw Thang aw banghang a hong khem na hiam’ ci in Dolluang khua te Rs.50 tek liausak in, Langkham aa teng inn (5) teng zong phiatsakin Samual munah Dolluangte tawh teeng khawmsak hi. Tua hun a kipan Langkham te, Vangteh te, Sizang te cihbang kici nawnlo in Sizang te tenna teng Dolluang khua tung ci in, Vangteh mite tenna teng Dolluang khua nuai ci in khua khat in kiciamteh hi. Pu Vial Suan tapa Pu OnVungh hong khan ciangin Simzang, Vangteh leh Heilei khuate pai in mia a va zot ciangin pawlkhat in hong pom uh a, hong pawlcing uh hi. 1960 kum ciangin Hausa Pu Thuam Ngaih Lian in a tenna leitang san tawh in Thangsan khua cih khua minin a laihsakkik hun a kipanin tuhun dongin Thangsan kici suak hi. Tawlanzi kumpi hong kah ciangin khuakip a suahtheih nading uh siau uh a, khuakip khat hong suak hi. 1997 kumciangin a khua thung nisuahna lam teng min cim ahihmanin khuamun hoihsa lo uh a, tulaitak aa Mualzang khua khang ah kituah suk in, khuakip khat in tudong omsuak hi. Beh om teng Thawmte Guite Vangaw Neihkhup Pawlpi om teng ABM Laipian AG Sanginn : Basic Education Primary School Zato : nei nailo Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 12 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 10 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (59) + Numei (41) = 100 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gankhawi (Sial, Bawng) Niangteh ciin Gamdang pai Kumpi nasep Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Vungh Sian Langh, TCO Thang Khaw Pau, High School Headmaster Dai Pum, IP Tun Lang Thang, ATEO Vungh Khan Do, Middle Head Luai Do Thang Ngin Suan, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Pum Khaw Ngin, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Cin Suan Mung, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Hau Ngaih Langh, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Kam Tual Lian, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Cing It Lian, Bawhlung siam (upper Myanmar selected) Thu tawk nate Pathian ompui Dolluang khua since 1897 Pu Thang Za Do, hausa Sia Thawng Khen Langh, Tuiphumsia Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township ~~~~~~~~
Teekzang Khua
Khuasatna thu 1958 kum in Geelzang khua panin Pu Go Lun Mang na teng masapen hi. 1980 kum ciangin Anlangh panin Pu Pau Za Mung leh Pu Pau Za Dal te in zanglo leilet lunggulhna tawh na beelsuk uh a, 1980 kum mahin kumpi in zanglo lokhawh khuan na pia hi.1982 December 3 ni in kumpi in teen theih na pia a, sakhan khat in kipsakna na nei hi. Inn hong kibehlap toto uh a, tu in inn 225 bang pha uh hi. Khua min vawhna thu Teelzang pen Tedim leh Tonzang gamgi, Tedim lampang, Vialcian lui gei aa om ahi hi. Gunzang munnuam khua lumna mun ahi hi. Teekzang cih pen Zo pau hi a, Theithekpi zang cihna ahi hi. Beh om teng Suantak Naulak Gualnam Sukte Sote Pawlpi om teng : ABM AG ZBA SDA Sanginn : nei nailo Zato : nei nailo Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 27 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 17 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (38) + Numei (40) = 78 Kivaakna Zanglo leilet Gan khawi Thu tawk na te Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Gamlai Siakhawk Tuiphum pawlpi kipawlna Diamond Jubilee Laibu, 2020 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Suangdoh Khua
Khuasatna thu 1899 kum in Lophei ukpi Pu Khup Lian makai in pasal 17 in a satna khua ahi hi. Khuasat cil hun lai-in tulai Suangdaw khuataw lam, Kuangphual lui tungah ‘Saibual mun’ ah kiteng masa hi. A masa Suangdaw khua mun pan in Tamdeang a kicihna mun ah khua kikhiin kik a, tua zawhciang Tamdeang pan a sak lamah khua tuahto lai hi. Tamdeang khua ii nisuahna lam tai thum bang a kigamla mun teng, a lei kidawhzia, taam to ding deng ahih manin, “Tamdeang khua” kiminvawh pah hi. Tua mun-a tuicing zong, ‘Tamdeang tuicing’ kici banah, tua nuai a, mincim zong, ‘Tamdeang mincim” kici lai hi. Kum 7 sung, Tamdeang khua min tawh kitengphot a, 1906 kum ciangin tazavuan min a suahna dingin Pu Khup Lian in kumpi zum ah, ‘Suangdaw khua” ci-a a puakna bangin kilosuak ahihi. Beh om teng Suantak Suante Sektak Samte Zil Om Pawlpi om teng Laipian ABM RCM AG Sanginn : Basic Education Primary School Zato : nei nailo Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 34 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 37 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (98) + Numei (104) = 202 Kivaakna Niangteh ciin Gan khawi Kumpi nasem Gamdang pai Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Khai Nang Ngin Khaw Mang Cin Za Pum, Staff Officer (Information Film) Mang Khan Cing@Bianca Son, PhD, Sosa Vum Son,PhD, Staff Officer (Mining), Zo History laibu gelhpa Zam Lian Vung@Liana Suantak, PhD, Robotic engineer Hang Za Nang, Deputy Director (Ministry of Forest) Lam Za Cin, AD (Ministry of Education) Lian Kop Cin, Deputy Director (Construction) Lian Za Thang, General Manager (Timber Board) Col. En Tual Luka, Ministerm Taninthayi division (2016) Mang Hen Dal, Asst. Director (Forestry), Minister of Chin State Agriculture Ngin Khai, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Ngin Khaw Mang, Tennis siam Ngo Cin Thawng, Secy Tsp Co-op Ngul Cin Khai, Bawhlung siam (State Division) D. Kip Thian Pau, Director, Lit Pub MBC Dr. Thang Za Thawng, DD Dr. Cin Khaw Zam, DD Dr. Langh Khan Khai, DD Dr.G.Cin Za Mang, DMin Siapi Lam Za Tinh, SEO, Tedim party unit EC Suak Khaw Khai, Staff Officer (Information Film) Suak Pum, Staff Officer, Nursing Thang Dal Mung, Tennis sat siam Thawng Khan Kim, Tennis siam Thawng Khan Thang, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Tual Thang, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Zam Khan Cingh, HDO, UNDP Zam Khat Thang, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Thu tawknate Pu Ngul Khaw Kam, thudot Pathian ompui Dolluang khua since 1897 Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township
Pumva Khua
Khuasatna thu Pumva khua pen khatvei sat a kip paisuak hilo in, 3 vei bang a kisat zawh cianga tuni dong kiteng paisuak ahi hi. AD 1720 kum Muipi (Thuklai) a kisat lai in Aisan lo gam teng lo in kho in a kuan ciangun hamsa sa uh ahih manin Pumva khua sat in, Pu That Zong, Pu Khat Lam, Pu Sung Hang, Pu Zong Lam te akipan mi 10 te na teng uh a, Pu Khat Lam in hausa sem hi. Pawi gal hangin tai tek uh a, Pumva khua masa hong bei hi. Mikang kumpi hong khan 1889 ciangin Thuklai khua simh ahih manin Pumva khua ah galtai in, Pu Kam Lam, Pu Pau Thang, Pu Thang Suan, Pu Nga Son, Pu Ngo Khaw Thang, Pu Hong Thuam, Pu Hong Tuang te akipan mi 22 in Pumva khua kisat kik hi. Thuklai hausa Pu Kam Lam mahin hausa sem hi. 1892 October 9 ni in Suangbum mual ah Myo uk U Tun Win a kisuamlupna hangin Mikang te in khua tuamtuam te hal aa, Pumva zong hal ahih manin a 2 veina Pumva khua bei leuleu hi. 1922 Feb 14 ni in Pu Khan Pau, Pu Hong Thuam, Pu Khup Lam, Pu Khup Khaw Hau, Pu Thuam Tuang, Pu Kham Son, Pu Ngul Khai te in a 3 veina Pumva khua satkik uh a, Pu Khan Pau in hausa sem hi. Tua pan tudongin khuakip suak hi. Khua min vawhna thu Pumva khua a kisat lai in Cik nawngpi pumpeng (pumpa) bekbek a po na mun ahih manin, a kuan ciangun bang sem ding kici leh ‘Pum vat ding’ ci in dawng hi. Tua manin pumvat pan Pumva khua ci in min hng ngah a, tuni ciangdong Pumva ci in kip paisuak hi. Beh om teng Suanthuk Thatmun Zamang Thangngiak Lunteng Pawlpi om teng ABM AG RCM Sanginn : Basic Education Primary School, Pumva Zato : Nei nailo Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 30 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 27 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (60) + Numei (58) = 118 Kivaakna Lo thawh Gan khawi Sing ciin Gamdang pai Lenggah, Apple, Lingmaw ciing Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te E.Cin Khua Lian, DD Hau Cin Dal, Staff Officer (Agri) Major Tuang Za Pum Myit Myit Than, Staff Officer (Agri) Nang Pum Tuang, Asst Lecturer, Uni of Kalay Ngo Ko Pau, Director (Foreign Affair) Pum Cin Kam, TEO Dr. Thuam Khua Pau, DMin Dr.Cin Ko Lian, DD Thuam Nang, AE (Construction) Thu tawk nate Centenial Milestone by Rev. Cin Kho Pau, 2022 Thuklai khua leh Sizangngam tangthu, 2020 Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Phaileng Khua
Khuasatna leh Khua min vawhna thu AD 1600-1700 hun pawl in Ciimnuai panin Pu Hang Hil tapate ahi Man Lun leh Man Tuang; Thawmte, Guite leh Thahdo mite kipawl in Phaileeng mun ah hong teng uh hi. A khawtaw zang ah Phai kung tampi po a, khuakhal hun ciangin tua Phaipak te huih in mut in leng zuazua ahih manin Phaileng khua ci in a kiminvawh ahi hi. Amaute khuado in zu kham sakham in a om laitak un Zo tualgal in na sim gawl hi. Tawmging Pu Suah Phung in hausa a sep hun inzong Pawi gal in a nih veina na simgawp in khuazang bup dektak thatlum ahih manin Phaileng khua masa hong bei hi. A khualui munte-ah ahi, Aikop mun, Khangzang mun, Luipi mun, Zozang mun leh Omlui munte tuhun dongin kimu thei lai hi. AD 1700 pawl ciangin Saizang panin Tawmbing Pu Neih Awn te innkuan in hih Phaileng khua munlui ah lo gal khawh in tengsuak hi. Pu Neih Awn kawlkai lo ah Pu Kawm Lam zong hong teng hi. Hun khat ciangin Lamzang pan Pu Paam Thuam in Pu Khan Thuam tungah Phaileng khuamun lui ah khuasat ding anget leh na pia a, Dak bu khat, Khuang khat leh Sialtal khat tawh khua phuhna na nei hi. Tuikhuat dingin Tangpua Pu Hen Kai kicial in a nung ah beh dangdang tezong tungthuah hi. Hunkhat ciangin Mualbem te leh Buanman te kiciam in Kalzang khua a simh ciangin Kalzang pan leh Vangteh Botung pan in gal tai uh a, Phaileng khua tung uh a, ana tengsa tawh tengkhawm uh hi. Hih bangin Phaileng khua ah Kalzang pau, Saizang pau, Losau pau leh Tedim pau kihelzau in a pau uh ciangin awsuah nam khat hong piang khia aa, Phaileng pau kici suak hi. Phaileng khua pana pusuak tezong Phaileng mi kici pah hi. Mikang kumpi te hong khan ciangin 1889 kum in Phaileng khua inn 40 val halsak ahih manin gal tai uh a, Phiantang mun ah kikhin uh hi. Phiantang panin Omlui khua ah kituah in kum khat sung bang teng uh hi. Hih khua ah sukte Pu Sum Pau in hausa sem hi. Mikang galkap Gualkha galkap te in Omlui khua halsak leuleu uh a, Lailo gam Singmual ah kikhin uh hi. Omlui khua a kihal hun in Losau khua zong kisusia hi. Phaileng kampau teng Singmual ah kum 2 bang tengkhawm uh a, Gualnam Pu Son Kai in hausa sem in Pu Zong Son in upa sem hi. Singmual panin Tuilang gam Khuangnung ah kikhin uh hi. Khuangnung ah kum 3 sung bang a tenkhop zawh uh ciangin tensuak ding lung tung zolo uh ahih manin 1895 kum in Thatmun Pu Bena makai in Lunmual khua sat uh hi. 1896 kum in Gualnam Pu Lam Sawm makai in Suante beh, Tomging beh, Suankhup beh leh Phaipi beh pawlkhat tawh Phaileng (Tatzang) khua zuan kik uh a, tudong in kiteng suak in, khuakip khat suak hi. (1896 kum in Suankhup beh Pu Khoi Vum makai in Khuangnung aa om lai tengin tui tamna mun Tuilangh khua sat uh hi. 1904 kum in Samte beh Pu Thang Tel makai in Khuabem khua zuan uh hi. 1920 kum in Tuilangh, Phaileng leh Lunmual pan inntuan thak ding teng kiciam in Suante beh Pu Neng Thual leh Gualnam Pu Khan Sing makai in Lalta khua sat uh hi. ) Beh om teng Gualnam Phaipi Suante Tomging Pawlpi om teng ABM RCM AG Laipian Sanginn : Basic Education Post Primary School, Phaileng Zato : Sub Rural Health Center (4.3.2013), Phaileng Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 60 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 60 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (207) + Numei (206) = 413 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gan khawi Kumpi nasep Gamdang pai Ngasa khawi Lettama Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Cin Khan Piang, Custom Awn Za Kam, Custom Tual Mung, AE, Irrig Zen Khan Cin, Coop Do Pau, 2MC,Kalay Thu tawk nate Pu Ngul Heh Nang Pu Zen Khan Cin Kum 120 cin Tuilangh khua tangthu (1896-2016) Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township
Pangzang Khua
Khuasatna thu leh Khua min vawhna thu Pu Kam Za Mang (Sukte) in 1925 kum in Tuipi panin Pangzang khua sat hi. A mun zangin Pangsing tampi po ahih manin ‘Pangzang khua’ ci pah hi. Pangzang khua akisat theih na thu in nidang lai in gungal gam pen Falam gam ahih manin Pu Za Tual in Falam ukpipa Pu Con Bik tungah a leisa ahi hi. Hih a gam teng a kep nadingin Muallum khua sat in a teng hi. Muallum ah a ten sungin apa Pu Kam Hau Tedim ah a si hi. A pa sih ciangin Tedim khua ah vaihawm dingin tengkik aa, Muallum nusia hi. A gam leina munte ah a tate hausa dingin paisak kawikawi aa, 1888 kum in a tapa Pau Za Lian in a pawlte tawh Tungzang panin Tuipi khua sat hi. Pu Pau Za Lian leh anau Pau Cin Thawn in Tuipi hausa dingin Haupi khua aa Pu Thang Kam tapa Kam Za Mang a neulai mahin na la hi. Kam Za Mang hong khangcin ciangin 1920 kum in Pu Pau Cin Thawn in a hausa nasep Kam Za Mang sem sak hi. 1925 kum ciangin Pu Kam Za Mang in Tuipi panin Pangzang khua sat hi. A sat tuung in, kha 6 sung amau innkuan bekmah a om uh hi. A sawt loin Keltal khua panin Pu Kam Khaw Thang (Khuptong) in beel aa, a nung ciangin Tuipi panin pawlkhat in zuan in inn 20 bang a pha uh hi. Tua panin mi teng suaksuak in tudong in khuakip khat a suak hi. Beh om teng Sukte Hangsawk Lethil Gualnam Thangnok Guite Naulak Buansing Khuptong Nekgen Pawlpi om teng ABM AG Emmanuel Sanginn : Basic Education Primary School, Pangzang Zato : Sub Rural Health Center (28.12.2009), Pangzang Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 10 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 12 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (39) + Numei (37) = 76 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gan khawi Gamdang pai Kumpi nasem Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Kam Za Mang, Battalon Commander (Piantit pailai) Cing Lam Lun, BA ngah masa Tual Khan Pau, MA ngah masa Gin Khaw Kam, BSc ngah masa Dai Khan Thang, H/A Kap Khen Pau, Zomi lakah MBA ngah masa leh FPB ah BOD Thu tawk nate Cin Za Khen, hausa Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Gamlai Siakhawk Tuiphum pawlpi kipawlna Diamond Jubilee Laibu, 2020
Ngalbual Khua
Khuasatna thu Kalzang khua a bei ciangin Suante Pu Thuam Hong tate zong muntuamtuam ah kikhenthang uh a, a tapa nihna Pu Lut Son in a tapa Khaat Lian tawh Phaipheek khua-ah, tawl khat a ten khit ciangin tulai Pakzang (Simzang ) khua na tung a, tua panin 1845 kum in Losau khua na tung hi. Losau panin Tawmging Pu Khaat Thual leh Pu Dam Awn te tawh na kithu tuakin Tangngal khua na tung khawmsuak uhi. Tanggal hausa Pu Pau Khaw Vung vaihawm siam ahih manin khuakim khua pamte in bel ciat uh a, khua inn a khangto mahmah uhi. Hun khat ciangin innmun logamte kikham zo nawnlo zel ahih manin tu aa Tuitawh khuamun ah kituahphei uh a, Tuitawh khua sat uh hi. Hun khat ciangin Pulepate in Tuitawh, Phaileng le Losau khuate panin kizawn kawikawikik ciat uh a, tulai Ngalbual khua khanglam tai khat leh lang na munah &#8216;Khawmun khua&#8217; a sat masa phot uhi. Hih Khawmun khua pen, Sihpi lui leh Hai luite kikal mun hi a, kum simin Hailui tui khangin, ginsia mahmah hi. Hih lui ginsia huatna in, Khawmun khua a saklam, &#8216;Ngalbualna mun&#8217; khat mahah, 1885 kum sungin kikhiinkhia uh a, &#8216;Ngabual khua&#8221; min vawhin tuhun dongin kiteng ahi hi. Khua min vawhna thu Nidang lai-in tulai Ngalbual gam sung tengah cik tuikhkte om kawikawi a, tua munte-ah, ngal honpipite bualna munte zong kimu kawikawi hi. Tua ngal hongpipite bualna munte, &#8216;Ngal-bual&#8217; kicipah hi. Beh om teng Tomging Samte Naulak Suante Mantuang Milun Sukte Phiamphu Pawlpi om teng RCM ABM Laipian UPC AG Sanginn : Basic Education Middle School, Ngalbual Zato : Sub Rural Health Center (28.12.2009), Ngalbual Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 102 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 102 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (287) + Numei (314) = 601 Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Langh Go Kap, Kachin leh Chin unau hihna laibu bawlpa Hau Khan Kap, BA Kai Za Pau, BSc Thang Ngaih Kam, BA Vung Go Kap, BA Thu tawknate Pa Kap Za Pau, hausa Chin (ZO), KACHIN, Langh Go Kap Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Lethil Innkuan Laibu, 2022
Mualzang Khua
Khuasatna thu Thangsan khua panin 1954 kum in Pu Khual Khaw Thawng makai in a kisat khua ahi hi. A kipat tuung in Vangteh mi tawmno khat ahih hangin Valvum, Phaileng, Dimpi, Simzang, leh Heilei khua te panin hong tungthuah uh a, khuakip khat hong suak hi. Khua min vawhna thu Dolluang khuataw lam, gam-awng, mualtung zang mun khat om a, tua mun teng minlawhna dingin &#8216;Mualzang mun&#8217; kici masa phot hi; Hih mun mahah khua a hong kisat ciangin, &#8216;Mualzang khua&#8217; a kiminvawh suakpah ahi hi. Beh om teng Guite beh Hatlang beh Munluah beh Neihgup beh Samte beh Sawmte beh Suante beh Songput beh Gualnam beh Tangsan beh Vangaw beh Zilom beh Pawlpi om teng ABM AG Laipian ZBCM RCM EBC Sanginn : Basic Education Post Primary School Zato : Nei nailo Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 63 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 75 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (243) + Numei (193) = 436 Kivaakna Lo thawh Niangteh ciin Gankhawi Gamdang pai Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Thang Khaw Pau, TEO Dong Za Ngin, SIP Ngin Hang, Lecturer Cing Do Nem, Lecturer Tuang Za Thawng, SIP Cin Do Suan, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Zen Sian Huai, Bawhlung siam (MWFA) Thu tawk nate Pa Hen Go Thang, hausa Pathian ompui Dolluang khua since 1897 Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township
Mualnuam (D) Khua
Khuasatna thu Falam Pawigal launa hangin Khuasak khua, Lophei khua leh Khuakhuan khua te ah a ki-om theih nawnloh ciangin Sinzang miteng, Thuklai khuapi-ah, kum sagih sung tengkhawm tadih phot uh hi. Thuklai khua ah kum sagih sung a kitenkhop hunsungin Pu Lun Kam, Pu Hen Khup, Pu Mang Lam, Pu Mang Lam, Pu Ngo Mang, Pu Thang Pau, Pu Kim kam, Pu Thuk Son leh Pu Thuk Khupte in vaihawm uh a, lo khawhna dingle singhalh gam ding teng hawmin, amau tan ciat, &#8216;bilgam&#8217; a suah ciat uh hi. Pulepate in amau tansa, &#8216;bilgamte&#8217; kuamah hawm nuam nawn lo uh ahih manin, Thuklaikhua-a a pemte leh inntuan dingte in innmun logam a ngahna ding ham sa ta hi. Hih thu hangin Thuklai khua panin innmun laogam nei lo teng in hih Dolluang gam ah khua satkik ding a kithukim uh hi. 1873 kum in Thuklai panin Pu Vum Thang, Pu Thuam Kham, Pu Ngo Khua Thang leh Pu Do Kham te makai in a sat khua ahi hi. Dolluang gam sung khua kisat masakpen na khua ahi hi. Haksatna tuamtuam tawh 1875 ciangin Thuklai ah ciahkik uh hi. Cingpikot panin Suante Pu Kham Za Neng in cikhum tawi 1 le bawngnawi bung 1 tawi-in, Dolluang Hausa Pu Khual Khaw Thang1 Rev. Thang Ngin le Sia Suah Kamte tungah Pu Awn Za Do leh Pu Kham Tualte tawh khua sat theihna dingi ana kingetna bangin a kipia ahi uh hi. 10.1.1948 ni in Cingpikot khua panin khuano mi inn 12 in a nih veina Mualnuam (D) a sat kik ahi hi. Khua min vawhna thu Thuklai pan Pu Vum Thang te in khua satcil hun lai-in, hih Mualnuam khua mun teng pen, a mual kidawhdan, amun nuam mahmah ma mun ahih manin, mun min lawhna dingin &#8220;Mualnuam khua&#8221; kimin vawh pah hi, ci-in Thudot Pupite in ana ciamteh uh hi. Dolluagn osu gam sunga om khua ahih manin, &#8220;Dolluang Mualnuam khua&#8221; ci-in kiciam teh a, Zumlai lai tuamtuamte sungah a kigelh ciangin, Mualnuam D. khua ci-in kigelh hi. Beh om teng Gualnam Gualnam-Halkik Naulak Suante Samte Tawmbing Songput Gualnam-Zuisang Pawlpi om teng ABM RCM Laipian AG Sanginn : Basic Education Primary School Zato : Nei nailo Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 20 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 9 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (59) + Numei (41) = 100 Thu tawk nate Hausa Pu Ngin Dai Siapi U Son Khan Dal Pathian ompui Dolluang khua since 1897 Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township
Muallum Khua
Khuasatna thu Pu Khoi Lam, Pu Mang Gin, Pu Kam Hau te in tulaitak aa Tedim khua hong sat in, hong ten uh ciangin veng tuamtuam khen in na teng uh hi. Pu Kam Hau tapa upen Pu Za Tual pen Botung veng ah Teizang mi pawlkhat tawh na tengkhawm hi. Pu Za Tual in ama tenna Botung veng bek kiuksak ahih manin lungkim lo in inn 50 tawh 1860 kiim in Muallum khua na sat hi. Tua mun pen Keizang leh Muizawl kikal Uilei mual dung nuai hi a, tulaitak in Muizawl gam in huam hi. Gamkip a suah nading in Falam ukpi Con Bik tung pan van leh na pawlkhat tawh na lei hi. Hih Muallum ah aom laitak in Tedim aa apa Pu Kam Hau si ahih manin Tedim ah ciahkik in Muallum khua nusia in, a khua bei hi. 1890 pawl ciangin Kaptel, Hiang Awn khua panin Pu Vum Pau (Sukte), Pu Pau Dongh te in na sat kik uh a Khuamial or Komeal ah na teng uh hi. Hun khat ciangin Thalmual ah lalsawm uh a, ahizongin Thalmual sangin leitang hoihzaw ci in Muallum gam Bukpi mun ah Pu Pau Dongh te innkuan na kha to uh a, a dang teng pawlkhat in Thalmual ah na taisan uh hi. Bukpi ah Pu Pau Dongh nungzui in a naupa Pu Awn Cin na teng to hi. Khuamial aa tenglai Pu Eng Ngul (Gualnam) te leh Pu Phut ngak tezong in Mualnuam khuatung/ Bukpi zuan in Pu Pau Dong tetawh tengkhawm uh hi. Mangkang te hong khan ciangin amau a lehdo khua te hong hal toto uh ahih manin gal tai tek uh hi. Tua lai in Muizawl Pu Am Thang in mangkang te na do lo ahih manin Muizawl khua kihal lo a, mun tuamtuam panin kibeel ngeingai aa inn 600 val bang pha man hi kici hi. Muizawl ah tua bangin a omkhop lai un Zung khua pana hong pai Pu Lam Awn (Naulak), Takmual pana hong pai Pu Dong Thual (Buansing), Phunom pana hong pai Pu En Lam (Naulak) leh Pu Tuang Ngul (Hatlangh) te in Muizawl panin Muallum gam khuallo in kho uh hi. Muizawl ah mun tuamtuam pan mi tampi kigawm khawm ahih manin thu tuamtuam tawh hong buai uh ciangin Muallum gam aa khuallo nei tengin a lo ciat uah hong taamsuak uh a, 1892 kum ciangin Pu Lam Awn lobuk kiim tengah hong kigawmkhawm in Tual na phut uh a, Muallum khua ahih keileh Mualnuam Khuatung ci in khua khat in na ding uh hi. Tua kum mah in Pu Thang Zel leh Pu Dong Kai te na tung uh hi. Bukpi aa om Pu Pau Dong te inzong na beelto uh a, Bukpi khua a bei hi. 1899 kum pawl in Pu Ngen Pum te unau, Pu Awn Thawng te unau leh Pu Be Sul, Pu Tun Hang te in Sa ek, Haimual lam panin Muallum gam Saibual ah hong teng uh hi. A sawtlo in Muallum/ Mualnuam khuatung ah hong kigawm uh a, Saibual khua bei hi. 1892 kuma Pu Lam Awn te satna Muallum in khuakip hong suak in, tudong in kiteng suaksuak in, khuakip khuanuam khat suak hi. Tua hun laitak a tenna uh luikawm keenkawm ahih manin 1967 kum ciangin khuazang thukim na tawh tulaitak aa akitenna mun ah kituah in 1974 kum ciangin kituah siang uh hi. Khua min vawhna thu Muallum pen mual pumpi 4 pan kituahna hi a, tua kituahna mun pen nidang in gammang tulak ahih manin a pai peuhmah gam mang in nung leh ma thei lo in lung am thei ci hi. Sun leh zan in huih nung in, aphun a pau (buktep) peuh kiza in tua mualkituahna teng gamlum ngeingai den ahih manin ‘Mualluum’ aki ci hi kici hi. Tua mual kituahna peh Mualhai kici hi. Hih Mualhai mual tung pan a luang,lui sung teng zong ni taang zo ngeilo ahih manin ‘Khawmial lui’kici pah a, tuhun in Cingpikot le Muallum gamgi hipah hi. Beh om teng Buansing Samte Milun Naulak Suante Pawlpi om teng ABM Laipian RCM AG BCM Sanginn : Basic Education Middle School, Muallum Zato : Sub Rural Health Center (4.3.2016), Muallum Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 109 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 109 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (410) + Numei (406) = 816 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gan khawi Gamdang pai Kumpi nasem Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Khual Cin Kam, AD (Ministry of Foreign Affair) Cin Khan Dal, Rev ngah masa Thang Suan Ngin, TBC G/S Dal Khan Khual, Professor of FBBC S Pr Gin Kam Khup, Muallum mi bawhlung suihna tawh thasum sang masa (GFA Club) Thu tawknate Pa Suak Za Go, hausa A (15) veina NTBA Souvenir Magazine, Muallum (2016) Muallum khua Pasian thu tunzawh kum 100 cin phawkna laibu Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township
Mawnglang
Khuasatna thu Tuitawh khua-a teeng, Tunglut beh pu Thual Do in 1915 kumin Mawnglang gam ah zangsial sawmin gam kuana, zangsial khat manin a ai hi. Tua laitak pen sabet dign a kikhaam laitak hi-a, vuandok kamphen pu Kham Tut in a theih ciangin vuandokpa tung ah a heek hi. Vuandokpa in pu Thual Do sama, a thau leh a salu matsakin zum ah a thau a tuung sak hi Pu Thual Do khasia lua ahihmanin ukpipa Hau Cin Khup tungah huhna a nget ciangin pu Hau Cin Khup in: “Na zangsial matna mun ah khua sat inla, inntuanna thau lawng khat hong pia ning” ci hi. A pa Khoi Thuam kiangah tua thu a gen ciangin Tuithang khua-a a nau Thang Gen tawh kikum dingin paisaka, Tuithang ah pu Hang Tual, pu Thuam Za Nang, pu Zong Cin, pu Son Ngul, pu On Do, pu Suak Hang leh pu Hang Khen (Khawm) te tawh kikumin Mawnglang khua sat dingin kiciam pah uhi. 1917 kum ciangin pu Thual Do’ zangsial matna mun Mawnglang gam ah khua satin inn lam uh hi. Tua zawh ciangin pu Hau Cin Khup kiangah pu Thual Do vapai-a, “Pu aw, nong deihsakna bang-in Mawnglang gam ah inn ka lam khin uhi; tu-in ka innkuanun kisuan sawm ta ung,” a ci hi. Hau Cin Khup in, “Himah hi, hoihtkain om unla, na kikhual mahmah un. Sa tampi na man inla, a liang a limcilai mah hong puak pahpah un,” ci-in thaulawng khat tawh a inntuan hi. “Na cih bang in Pasian in hong siamleh ut mahmah ing, pu aw,” ci-in lungtaitakin pu Thual Do a ciahkik hi. Mawnglang khua satzawh kum 6 ciangin pu Thual Do si hi. Khua min vawhna thu Tuhun laitak hun a khua tui nekkhuk pen nidang lai-in sih tuikhuk hi a, a gei-ah mawng kung lian mahmah khat a po ngei hi. Tua mawnggah min le sihtuikhuk tui ne dingin gamsa te in a zuanthei zel uhi. Gamsate leh vasate panna dingin Pulepate in tua mawngkung tungah tau dawh uh a, tua tau pen, Khanglui kamin &#8216;laang&#8217; kici hi. &#8220;Mawng singkung tunga laang kidawh&#8221; cihna kammal panin &#8216;mawng-laang&#8217; cih kammal piangkhia hi a, khua a kisat ciangin kammal kizangtesa kilosuak in &#8220;Mawnglaang khua&#8221; ci-in kiminvawh ahi hi. Beh om teng Kipgen Tunglut Vangaw Phaipi Samte Thangniang Biangtung Bawmkhai Buansing Gualnam Pawlpi om teng Laipian ABM RCM ZBCM Sanginn : Basic Education Primary School Zato : nei nailo Inn phazah (2023) : 28 Innkuan phazah (2023) : 28 Mi phazah (2023) : Pasal (73) + Numei (88) = 161 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gan khawi Siam gat Sa bet Gamdang pai Thu tawk nate Pa Thang Khan Suan, hausa Tuithang khua tangthu, Second Edition 2014
Mainuai Khua
Khuasatna thu Dolluang gam zangdawk sunga om khua khat ahi hi. 1964 kum ciangin Suangdaw khua pan in Bo Ngin Khaw Mang leh, Lophei khua panin Pu Khai Pum leh Pu Lam Nangte in, gam khawina ding ngaihsutna tawh hih Mainuai khua a saat uh hi a, khua inn 30 ciang val ngei uhi. A hih hangin ganta pung theilo,, ganta cidam theilo, leh an zong mun dang zah in a hoihloh ciangin, khuasat teng nangawn khatkhat in lalkhiakik uh ahih manin khua beikik dekta uh hi. Tua zawh ciangin Khuadak (Pyinkhonegyi) panin Ngawn te pawlkhat na tengto kik hi. Tedim gam Thalmual khua mim a cip ciangin dongtuak inn 20 val te a teen theih nadingin Bishop Mang Thang in na vaihawm sak a, Dolluang hausa Pu Thang Kam thusiamna tawh na tengthei uh hi. RC Bishop pa in Mainuai ah mi hong tentheih ciangin RC Laisiantho Sang phuan in, Hydro mei zong na vaihawm sak pah hi. Khua min vawhna thu Mai mual kici, mualnuai a, khua kisat ahih manin &#8220;Mainuai khua&#8221; kici hi. Hih Mainuai khuamun ah, nidang hun in Sailo kici, Lushei ( Mizo)te, na teng ngei uh ahih manin, tu hun dingin Sailo khua mun ci-in kiciamteh thei lai hi. Beh om teng Hausuang Mangvum Zahau Pawlpi om teng RCM ABM Sanginn : Basic Education Middle School Zato : nei nailo Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 76 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 82 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (231) + Numei (227) = 458 Kivaakna Lo thawh (Zanglo) Buh gawina set nei Gan khawi Gamdang pai Thu tawk nate Pu Thang Kam, hausa Pathian ompui Dolluang khua since 1897 Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township
Lezang Khua
Khuasatna thu Lailui khua panin Mawngken khua kisat hi. Mawngken khua ah Sukte Hausa Pu Thuam Lian’ sial leh Suantak Pu Gin Kai’ sialte gel kilemlo-in, kisiden uh a, Pu Thuam Lian, sial in a lelhden ciangin sialnei pupite gel kikal ah zong lungsim kinopmawhna hong piangta hi. Hih thu hangin Pu Thuam Lian in Pu Gin Kai tunga siah a mapsa hinapi, a map nawn loh zel ciangin Pu Gin Kai zong khasia-in lunglenga Mawngken khua tawh kipelh theihna ding a tum vinven ta hi. Tua bang laitak in Mawngken khua panin Buansing Pu Son Zang in Lezang gam; Lopi mun tengah lo a na galkhawh a, gatam seu zakhat a nei hi. Pu Thual Tun le Pu Hong Ginte in, “An hizah peuhmah gunpi gal kaai-in pusuah zo kei nicin, ci-in Pu Thawng Lian zong zawnthuah lai uh a, gam a enkhawm uhi. Tulai Lezang khua nuailamah kibusa phot uhi. Hih Lezang khua thak munah a kiten theihlam a kizak ciangin Mawngken, Tonzang, Singgial, Lailui le Ngennung khuate panin innmun logam nuamzaw lunggulhna tawh inn 16 teng a tun thuah uh ciangin Lezang khua inn 20 ciang a pha thei ta uhi. A lungmuan laitak un, “Hong Gin in ngetna le phalna omlopi-in Lezang khua sat hi, ci-in Ukpite tungah lehhekna thu a om ciangin Lezang khua mun pan a taikhiatkikna ding thu le la a hong tam mahmah hi. Hi bangin thu buai a om ciangin khua ngetkikna thu a genna nei dingin 1895 kum in Pu Thual Tun’ sum, Rs. 30/- le zubel khat masuanin Pu Gin Kai, Pu Hau Suak, Pu Son Zang le Pu Thawng Liante in Tonzang Innpi-ah vahawh uhi; Pu Khup in zong, “Lezang gam pen a kigen ciangin taaksing lak, valuk bulak, le tumtai-lee kunglak hi, a kicih hangin kei zong ka velsa hi in, khuata khat i nuntakna lahna dingin kei, sat-a satkhinta, tu-a tukhinta na hih nungsangun, kihawlkhia vanvan ding cileng zong kuamah midang sadang omlo i hih ciangin, hoihtakin teeng unla, lokhawh singpuak na hanciam un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Hih pan kipan khuakip khat suakin tudongin mi tengin nuamsa mahmah uh hi. Khua min vawhna thu Tu laitak aa khuazang tui nek ahi Cik zang ah Tum (Le) kung tam mahmah ahih manin tua bulphuh in Lezang a kici ahi hi. Beh om teng Suantak Buansing Sote Naulak Tungdim Songput Pawlpi om teng ABM AG CBCM EBC Laipian RCM UPC SDA Sanginn : Basic Education Middle School, Lezang Zato : Sub Rural Health Center (17.1.2010), Lezang Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 147 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 142 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (609) + Numei (598) = 1207 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gankhawi Gamdang pai Kumpi nasem Lettama Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Suan En Pau, BA Thang Kang lo, BA Nang Suan Thang, BA Nang Pian Pau, BA En Khen Lun, BA Cing Lawh Nuam, BA, BEd Chin Khua Kai, BA Thu tawk nate Pu Nang Za Tuang, hausa Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Gamlai Siakhawk Tuiphum pawlpi kipawlna Diamond Jubilee Laibu, 2020
Laibung
Khua min vawhna thu Tanglai pute pate in Laibung khua pen ‘Ralbuk’ a cihna mun hi, na ci uh hi. Pawigal hun in a kiim apaam khua te asimh pakpak theih nading un abuk pakpakna mun acihna ‘Ralbuk’ a cih hi a, a phuak masa Falam te hi a cizong om hi. Hih Ralbuk cihna pen Tedim lam te in ‘R’ aw suaksak lo in ‘L’ aw tawh ‘Lalbuk’ a kici ahi hi. Tua ‘Lalbuk’ cihzong hong sawt semsem ciangin ‘Laibung’ akici tosuak hi kici hi. Khuasatna thu Laihan khua ah gilsan zavat aom ciangin honpi khat si uh a, a silo sun kikhenthang uh a, Sihzang gam, Bialteng gam, Dimpi gam leh Dimlo khuate a bel ciat uhi. Pu Zaw Sing leh Pu Teng Khup i suan pawlkhatte leh Pu Tel Paute in Laibung mun ah teeng a, Pu Thuam Lam leh a pawl teng, Laibung gam; Suangsau mun ah a teeng uhi. Hih Laibung khua ah Pu Tel Pau a khanlai in Hatzaw, Hatlangh leh Zote teeng khawm uh a, khua inn(80) ciang pha in, Kuailui nitumna lam leh nitumna lam leh a khuasung uh ah, tual mun nih ah a bawl uhi. Tuhun a Khuano mite sung a Khuado la kisa pawlkhatte Pu Tel Pau hun a kiphuak ladawngte hi a, ‘ Laibung la ’ kici lai hi. Khatvei khuakhung lamah mikhat in thaang a khaak leh Gulpi samnei khat awk in, a sa ne uh hi. Tua zawh a sawt lo-in Laibung khuakhung ken panin mincim a, mitampi tak si-in a nungta laisun pawl khatte in Zo lam ah taito in, pawlkhat te Mualbem leh Kalzang ah taimang uh a, Laibung khua a beita hi. (1838 pawl) Mangkang te hong khan ciangin 1901 in Mr. Tuck in Zogam aa ukpi hausa te kiangah ‘Na saihkaihna khua leh gam teng uh sazian hong puak un’ ci in tangko hi. Pawlkhat in a siahkaihna te uh puakpah uh a, pawlkhat in siah a kaihnopna munte zong bawltawm in a puak uh hi. Tua ciangin Khuasak ukpi Pu Lian Vum in ama siahkaih nadingin Pimpih khua na ap hi. Tua panin Pu Lian Vum in 1901 April kha panin Pimpih ah hausa sem in na teng hi. Ukpi Lian Vum in Khuasak ah a om lai in Dimpi pan Buansing te Pu Gen Awn in na beel aa, Sabaalpi in na kiman uh hi. Pu Lian Vum Khuasak pan Pimpih ah a ten ciangin zong Pu Gen Awn leh a naupa Pu Awn Ngul in Pimpih ah na beelsuk lai aa, ahizongin 1916 kum ciangin Dimpi ah ciahkik uh hi. 1917 kum Piantit paina ah Pu Lian Vum tapa Suang Thawng zong a pai hi a, Piantit ah hong si hi. A kizak ciangin khuakiim khuapam panin Pimpih ah sigal in kipai aa, Dimpi pan Pu Gen Awn zong Saino khua satsawm kawm in Pimpih ah sigal in va baang hi. Pu Lian Vum in Pu Gen Awn kiangah ‘Saino khua na sat sangin na pawl ding zawn inla, Laibung khua va satkik in; gamhoih, gam mun nuam hi’ ci in ana han thawn hi. Tua ciangin Pu Gen Awn zong lawm zawn dingin Dimpi ah ciahkik pah vingveng in, lawm zong kawikawi hi. Zung khua ah pai in lawm a zon leh Pu Tuang Ngul ngah masa hi. Tua pan Pu Khan Suan, Pu Phut Zel, Pu Son Thuam, Pu Kip Eng te ngah aa, tua pan Phunom ah pai in Pu On Thawng bek ngah hi. Tua pan Pimpih ah pai in Pu Phut Ngak leh Pu Lam Thang te unau na ngah hi. Khuakip sat theih nadingin Tedim Vuandok zumah sumtang 300 khiat kul ci ahih manin Pu Tuang Ngul in sum 300 na sik hi. Hih sum tawh Pimpih pan Pu Lian Vum in Tedim Vuandok Mr Miller kiangah pai in, Magwe menzipa Mr. Barth tungah khua sat theihna va ngen uh hi. Phalna a ngah ciangun Dimpi pan Pu Awn Thuam zong ngah leuleu uh ahih manin mi 10 in, 1918 October kha sungin tu aa Laibung khua na sat uh hi. Khua asat zawh uh ciangin Pu Gen Awn in hausa sem dingin Dimpi panin Pu Ngul Dai na zawn to in, hausa sem sak in, Pu Tuang Ngul in Tual phuisam Siampi na sem hi. 2015 kum ciangin Zogam ah guahzuk luatna hangin Laibung khua sung kicimh ahih manin September 2015 in Khaikam khuasak ah kituah uh hi. Beh om teng Buansing Gualnam Haunung Hatlangh Namzo Naulak Samte Pawlpi om teng ABM RCM ICB (EFCM) SDA Laipian Siangsawn EBC NAC AG Sanginn : Basic Education Middle School, Laibung : Basic Education Primary School, Laibung Zato : Sub Rural Health Center (1.1.1973) Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 11 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 8 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (45) + Numei (56) = 101 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gan khawi Coffee (Laibung coffee) Alu Gamdang pai Kumpi nasem Lettama Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Thawng Khua Zam, council makai Suan Za Kam, EE Tun Za Dal, AE, Staff Officer Ngin Dai Thang, Staff Officer (Coop) Cin Langh, Manger (Agri) Suan Za Go, Bawhlung siam (Chin aiawh) Tun Sing, Bawhlung siam (Burma selected) Thang Sian Pau, State Statistics Officer Zam Thuam, Zomi Siamsin makai lui Dal Suan Nging, Laibu khua laibu bawl Zam Khan Khai, Cpatian ngah masa Peter Thawng Mung, Fr suak masa leh Director of Literature (Kalay Diocese) Sia Thang Sian Khai Thu tawk nate Pu Thang Lian, hausa Laibung khua kum 100 cin ciaptehna laibu, 2018 Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township
Khaikam Khuapi
Khuasatna thu 1966 kum in Tittaw Mengyi U Hau Za Nang Kimlai ii vaihawmna tawh Tai 9 ah Pu Suang Za Nang, Pu Son Khua Hau, Pu Pau Vum, Pu Ngin Khup, Pu Ko Net, Pu Lian Pau, Pu Awn Khua Thang te in khua na sat in Pu Lian Pau in hausa na sem hi. Theizang ohsuh sungah khua khat in kumpi in koih hi. Tai 9 kici phot a, 1979 kum ciangin Bo Khai Kam phawkna dingin Lt.Col. E.K. Kim Ngin in Zogam makai a sep hun sungin Khaikam khua ci in a min laih a, tua mun ah Pu Khai Kam Park khat bawl hi. Khaikam khua ah Police zum, Forest le sing bawlna, Lotho zum, tan 10 sangpi, MPPE le ganno khawina cih te om hi. Khatvei lai in Zogam makai te vaihawmna tawh khuaimei bawlna zongh om ngei hi. Khaikam leitangh tungah kumpi te in Khaikam College khat hong koih aa, 16.7.1990 ni in kihong hi. 1993 kum ciangin Kalay College kici hi. 7.7.1999 ciangin Degree College in kikhanto hi. 14.5.2003 ciangin Kalay University kici hi. 11.2.2016 ni in Khaikam khua in Myo (town) ngah in, veng 4 in kikhen hi. Kumpi zum te zong om in, Tedim District sungah kikoih hi. Beh om teng Khenglot Khaman Mangtawn Mantuang Naulak Tawnzo Tungdim Thatmun Vungthuam Pawlpi om teng ABM RCM Buddhi Jehovah Witness AG Sanginn : Basic Education High School Zato : Sub RHC Inn phazah (2020) : 676 Mi phazah (2020) : 3775 Kivaakna Lo khawh Van zuak Gamdang pai Kumpi nasem Gan khawi Thu tawk nate Pu Lian Pau, hausa Theizang khua leh Tuiphum pawlpi tangthu, 2011 Thuklai khua leh Sizang ngam tangthu, 2020 Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township
Gamlai Khua
Khuasatna thu 1910 kum khawng panin Tungtuang leh Tonzang panin Gamlai gam ah Lo na galkhawh uh a, kinilehleh zolo uh ahih manin na giakdeen uh hi. Lobuk tezong gina takin lam uh a, inn bangmah phial in bawl in tenden uh hi. Tua bang kawmkalin Tapidaw suahna hangin Ukpite leh Tapidaw te kikal ah kinopmawhna a om ciangin Tungtuang leh Tonzang panin Tapidaw te pawlkhat na lal khiakhia uh hi. 1915 ciangin Tungtuang hausa leh upa te sung pan Pu Dim Kham leh Pu Khawl Gin in ‘khuapih te Kawlzang ah a lal khit ding sangin Gamlai gam ngen in, ih ngah leh nauzaw inntuan ding, logam nei lo peuh va teng le uh’ ci in vaihawm uh a, kampau mukpau a siam Pu Thang Do (Milun) cial in, Tonzang Ukpi Pu Hau Cin Khup kiangah a ngensak hi. Pu Khup inzong phalna na pia hi. Tua kum 1915 kum in kuamah lalbeh zo tuan lo in, 1917 kum in Tungtuang khua pan pawlkhat leh Anlangh pan pawlkhat kigawm in beh nam 8 tawh pupi te 17 in Gamlai khua na sat uh hi. Lethil beh Pu Dah Cin in hausa na sak uh hi. AD 2000 kum ciangin Thahlang Sabuk a cihna munah pawlkhat in khuathak khat sat uh a, tudong in tengsuak uh a, Gamlai khuathak kici hi. Tui, Tuimei zong nei in, Zolai sanginn leh Tualpi zong nei uh hi. Khua min vawhna thu Gamlai khua akisat ma in Gamlai khua cih khuamin na om ngei hi. Gamlai gam pen Tonznag Daihual sung hi a, Tedim leh Tonzang Myone a kikhen ciangin Tedim myone sungah kikoih hi. Gamlai khua saklam khempeuh Zo gam hi a, a khanglam teng Simgam ahih manin Gamlai na ci uh hi. Tua banah Tonzang ukpipa in a gam teng a vaan ciangin Gamlai khua mun pen tawlngakna in na nei in, giahbuk na lam hi. Tonzang gam pan sa beng te inzong gam laizang pen sa uh ahih manin giahbuk na lam uh hi. Tua manin ukpipa adingin zong gam laizang suak ahih manin gamlaizang a kicihcihna pan “Gamlai khua” a kici suak ahi hi. Beh om teng Lethil Hatzaw Suante Naulak Sote Gualnam Zilom Suankhup Hatlangh Pawlpi om teng ABM AG Yahweh Sanginn : Basic Education Middle School, Gamlai : Basic Education Primary School, New Gamlai Zato : Sub Rural Health Center (28.12.2009), Gamlai Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 75 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 70 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (269) + Numei (230) = 499 Kivaakna Lo khawh Gankhawi Kumpi nasem Gamdang pai Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Khaat Khaw Gin, Zogam pastor masapawl Langh Za Pau, Tedim aa teng masapawl Go Lian Thang, SBC pastor Deacon Ngul Khaw Pau, Yahweh pawlpi phuanpa Tuan Suan Dal, AG pastor Go Za Nang, AMC pawlpi neipa Tuan Suan Thang, AG Pastor Kham Khen Tual, AMC phuankhiapa Job Nang Khaw Thawng@Job Thawngno, Zomi te laka Laibu tam bawlpen Dai Khen Mang, Ngabeng lasa leh ciamnuihsiam Go Sawm Khup, ZIUSA makailui Man Suan Cing@Esther Cingsan, lasiam Dorcas Liansen, Lasiam Thu tawk nate Chin Khan En, hausa Gamlai Centennial Jubilee Magazine (1917-2017) Gamlai Siakhawk Tuiphum Pawlpi Kipawlna Diamond Jubilee Laibu (1945-2020) Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township
Dolluang Khua Tangthu
Khuasatna thu Thuklai khua panin Lunmun beh te leh Sumniang beh te vaihawm in Thaangkai Dolluang gam ah ten theih nadingin Falam ukpi Con Bik kiangah 1872 kum in Sialtal khat leh Zothau lawng khat tawh na ngen hi. Tentheih nading thu a ngah ciangin Pu Vum Thang, Pu Thuam Kham leh Pu Ngo Khaw Thang te makai in 1873 kum in Dolluang Mualnuam khua na sat uh hi. Kawltual teng tawh na tengkhawm uh a, kampau luhek leh annek tuidawn kibat loh manin gamkhing kisa in, 1875 kum dongbek teng uh a, a vek un Thuklai khua ah ciahkik in Pu Ngo Khaw Thang in Thuklai ukpi sem hi. Mangkang te hong khan ciangin phungkhopna leh Zawlta nei te a kithahlupna thu upadi hong omsak uh hi. Tua laitak Thuklai ukpi Pu Ngo Khaw Thang in Pu Son Lam leh Pi Suang Dim te ii naubawlna (thatna) thu ip pih hi, cihthu Tedim vuandok zum ah a kikhiat ciangin Pu Ngo Khaw Thang pen a ukpi za pan kikhawl sakin, Pu Khan Mang kisem sak hi. Tua bang hunsung in Pu Vum Thang in Pu Kham Pau te tawh vaihawm in Dolluang Khuapha gam teng ah khua sat theih nadingin Falam ukpi Con Bik tungah Bawngtal khat tawh na ngen kik uh hi. A ngah uh ciangin Zam khat, Daak bukhat leh Khuang khat na piathuah lai uh hi.Tua ciangin Pu Vum Thang in Pu Ngo Khaw Thang kiangah ‘ken hausa sem nuam keng, na ukpiza tawknga nahih ciangin Dolluang Khuapha khua ah hausa hong sem in’ acih ciangin Pu Ngo Khaw Thang inzong sangthei hi. 1897 kum ciangin Pu Ngo Khaw Thang (Thuklai ukpi) makai in Pu Vum Thang leh Pu Kham Pau te tawh Thuklai khuabup vaihawm in inn 72 kipan pah in Dolluang Khuapha khua na sat uh hi. Inn 50 te in lo nasep sungteng lo ah giak in, anlak zawh ciangin Thuklai ah ciahkik hilhial uh hi. Inn 22 te ahih leh Khuapha khua ah tengsuak uh hi. A tenzawh uh kum 3 pha nailo in, zankhat thu in Pu Son Thuam zi Pi Awi Ngoih pen sahang in a mat ciangin kamsia kisa uh a, Thuklai ah innkuan 9 ciahkik leuleu in, inn 13 te citak takin tenglai uh hi. 1912 kum ciangin Dolluang khua mun pen nisuahna lam tai khatna, tu aa zato inn kilamna mualdung suk tengah kituah uh hi. Hi mun ah kum 53 sung teng uh hi. 1965 kum ciangin hausa Pu Thang Suak vaihawmna tawh Sia Hang Thian Thang makai in, Keakmual ah khuamun kituah uh hi. 2000 kum, Dolluang kum 100 cin ciangin Keakmual pen Zion mual ci in kilaih hi. Khua min kivawhna thu Thuklai khuasat Pu leh pa te in Zogam leh Zanggam te a uk hun a ki panin Kawlzang gam sung a sing manpha: Dolsing te peuhmah Tangpi te phuk ding, puak ding leh zat ding peuhmah nakpitak in khaam uh a, a deih te in kumpi zumah siau-in a ngah uh ciang bek in phuk thei, pua thei, zang thei, bek uh hi. Tua ahih manin pawl khatte in amau siamna ciat tawh tua dolsing te Khamtung gam lam ah Zat dingin a tam thei thei in puak khia ciat uh hi. Kawlzang gam panin Khamgam lam manawh a dolsing te a kitam puak mahmah hun laitak in ‘Tui te suklam luang a, dolsing te a tolam ah luang hi,’ a kicihna kammal zui-in “Dolluang” cih kammal hong piangkhia thei hi. Tu lai Dolluang gam tawn in Zanggam dolsing te a kipuak tohna gam teng ‘dolluang gam, dolluang mun’ cihna mun tengah khua aki sat ciangin kammal kilosa siksan in “Dolluang khua” a ki vawh ahi hi. Beh om teng Thangngiak Thatmun Zamang Tunngo Lenteng Sumkip Pawlpi om teng Laipian ABM AG TCBC Sanginn : Basic Education High School Zato : RHC (27.4.1972) Inn phazah (Feb, 2023) : 23 Innkuan phazah (Feb, 2023) : 19 Mi phazah (Feb, 2023) : Pasal (58) + Numei (80) = 138 Kivaakna Singtang Lothawh Niangteh ciinna Singno ciin (Lingmaw, Kaaphi, Haai, Tapaya) Gankhawi (Bawng, Sial) Kumpi nasep Gamdang ah sumzong Lettama Khuami te sungpan a madawk deuh te Lam Khaw Thang, Thangkai kual ah Captain ngah masabel Cing Deih Lun, All D (2015) Cing Kam Nem, SAE, MPA Gin Kaang, Tedim aa teng masapawl Hang Ko Pau, AD (Post Telegraph Transport) Hang Za Thang, TEO Hang Khaw Pau, Asst.Director Dr. Chin Khua Zam, DD, a thungetna tawh mi tampi dam Dr. Thang Khan Pau, DD J.Thang Za Pau, former TBC president JM Suak Khaw Mang, Back to the Bible Mission, Kalaymyo Thang Ngin, Sukte gungal ah Pasian thu gen aa vak masa Dr.Cin Do Kang, GTh, BTh, MMis, MDiv, DD Sgt Zam Cin Thang, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Hang Khaw Lian, Burma selected footballer Sing Ngo, SAE Thang Suak, Tedim aa teng masapawl leh mihau Thawng Khan Cin, Bawhlung siam (State Division) Thu tawk nate Pu Thang Kam, hausa Pathian ompui Dolluang khua since 1897 Public Health Department record file, Tedim Hospital Schools Profile, Basic Education Department – Tedim Township Thuklai khua leh Sizang ngam tangthu, 2020 “Sizang” min pianna le pu thuan tak tangthu
Phaitu Khua Tangthu
Phaitu Khau Tangthu. Tangthu-kan te na ciemte na-ah,(Kum pi khang khat pan kang khat ki kal pen kum 28 kim in na ki ciem ta )na kici hi. Phaitu khuo zongh,1919 kum aa-si, Pu Khan Thawng muolsuong tungpan a kicienin kithei hi. Phaitu khuo Man Tuong te muolsuong tungah, (1919 kum in Pu,Khan Thawn in ei nua sie hi. A gel Let Thang) ci-in kigiel ahi manin, Khan Thawng pan atunglam Pu ManTuong ciengdong akim-in kituot thei hi. PAHITU KHUO TA’NGTHU A TOM (A Brief History of Phaitu Village) AD. 1583 kum hun pawlin, Pu Hang Ngul tate ahi, Pu Hang Hil, Pu Min Lun leh Ni Tongpi te Unau Bumzaang khuo ah natee’ngton vuhi. Pu Hang Hil in azi masa Pi Mann Nawh tawh, Pu Mann Luna hi, a nei zaw ciengin, Pi Man Nawh, asal/sila (Slave) pa Mi Mang in that hi. Pi, Man Nawh a sizaw ciengin, a naunu Pi,Mang Son, Pu,Hang Vung leh Pu, MatMang, tapasal (4), hingh hiing, hingh neibe kia hi. Pu Hang Hil in a tate teng anggol, mi leh sa angsuo tah ciengin, aluo di’ngvuh, gam leh lei, mun leh muolte, a ge’lkholsa a om ma bangin, tam bangin, na pulaah hi.tua bang a gam hawmpieh thei na pen, a masa in, Pu Hang Hill eh Pu Mi Lunt e ii a naunu vuh, Ni Tong Pi Khuongnung khuomi Naih Te kici patawh a na kite’nna tung pan aa tambang thu a pieng hi. AD. 1583 – 1611 kaal hunsungin, khuongnung khuo ah, Thang Sing, Lei Vang leh Naih Te kici Be leh Phung sungte na tee’ngtonin, tua khuo pen, Gui Te Be sung ahi, Nuong Mang in Thang Khal huo panin naga’l – Uh in, seitung siephei nakai hi. Nuong Mang pen, neehsie luo thamlo, khuo dang khat pan aa aga’l – Uh a hi ziehin, khuong Nung khuo a Uh Di’ng, Hausa a se’m di’ngin, Bumzaang khuo aa om, Zo Tulpi nam, milun nam ahi; ka U Hang Hul tate khat vange’n ta vunlen, Hausa se’msah vai aci ciengin, a khuo bupin kithukim ahi manin, Khuongnung khuo Upate, Bumzaang khuo ah, Pu Hang Hil tate khat a nge’n di’ngin, vakuon vuhi. Bumzaang khuo angtun cieng vun, Pu Hang Hil azi, Pi Manno kuu’ngah, Pu leh Pi aw, Ko’ khuongnung khuo ah, Guite Nuong Mang in, Thang Khal pan, eiga’l Uh pen deihlo kahi manvun, na tate sungpan khat penpen Khuongnung khuo aa, Hausa a se’m di’ngin, ci aa anget ciengvun, Pu Hang Hil in, a tate Uh nading gam a hawm piehsate, Pi Manno@Man Ngeh in, tabang age’n hi. Tuongdaw (Mann Tuong) pen, Seilciem nei Phaitu khuo pan ahizongin, Sondaw (Mang Son) pen, Sinhum nei Gam Ngai khuo pan ahi zongin, Vungdaw (Hang Vung) pen, Muolkawm nei, Khuo Daii khuo pan ahi zongin, a maahaw a Uh nadi’ng gam a kihawm pieh sieng- sa hi; a ciciengin, Mann Lun a nga’p leh amaa thu hi aci cieng in, Khuonung Khuo mite in, Pu Mann Lun Khuongnung khuo aa, Huasa di’ngin, a nalaah mabangvun, Khuongnung khuo ah Huasa nasem suoh hi. Tua bang aa, Hausa a nasep suoh theina zong, a na omsa, Hausa a na se’mpa Nuong Mang tawh, Pilna, Siemna, Hatna, Thuohzawhna tampitah tawh kidem aa, a na guolzaw tahcieng aa, Khuong Nung Khuo ah, Sietung Siephei kai aa, Hausa a na se’m theipan ahi hi. Nikhat ni hun ciengin, Pu Mann Lun in, Khuong Nung Khuo panin, Bum Zaang khuo aa om anu leh apa tung aa, a lung noplona thu, tam bang in LA khat angphou, angge’n, ang pula’h hi. : Kat un aw, tun ciin aw e, Naih Te nei suo taaimaw e; : Ka zuo aw, zuo lun aw e, tembang nongdeih lai hiam aw. Pu Mann Lun in, anu leh apa tambang aa LA angpaih, angphuo ciengin, anu leh apa in, Aw! I tapa Mann Lun tawh a kinai thei nadi’ng in – ci’n, Bum Zaang khuo pan, Va’ngaLai Khuo hingsa’t in hing – te’ng hi. Tua Va’ng Lai khuo ma ah, Pu Hang Hil si-in, Pu Mann Lun in apa luong, Va’ngLai khuo pan la – in, Khuong Nung khuo ah navui hi. Pu Hang Hil asi mansang hun in, Pu Mann Tuong in, apa sehsa Phaitu gam a vaan di’ngin, a khuopi a tuipite sung pan in, a khuo suonpi di’ng a muoteng teel in, gam vaan di’ngin a sawl hi. Phaitu khuo avaan di’ngte pen Pu Mann Tuong in amuon a suon teng ahi. : Pu, Vum Hul (Lien Zaw te) : Pu, Thuo Vom (Tung Nung te) : Pu, Tum Siing (Tai Thul te) : Pu, Tung Gen (Hang Pa ate) ahi vuh hi. Pahitu gam avaante, Sielciem zaang tung masa in, tuapna singsie – vum tungin, tuapan Khuainei Baw, tuapan Natang Khailawn panin, Phaitu gamteng alut da’n di’ngvai ngaihsun vuhi. Tua hun laitah in Phaitu gam sung teng pen, gammaang tuulahpi ahi aa, Saai, Zaangsiel, Tawpi(Humpi) te tam mama kici hi. Tua gamvaan te in, Phaitu khuolai ahi; Pu, Sawm Lien (Pa Nang Khan Lien) innsia, Pa Cin Min Thang ( Tu’ laitah,Pa Thang Go Kap) innmai hang laitah ah, SINGMAI mee’t in, Mun natang, na ciemte masa vuhi. Tua MUN laitah TUINEEH, TUIKHUUH na nei vuhi. Kho vaante ahi leh, atungin, Phaitu khuo mun ah, Giephuol na sa’t ngamlo uh hi. A gie phuol masa vu pen, Phaitu khuo nei Siingbuuh lui tung, suongkaw hawm lah aa gieh vuh ahia aa,Siingbuuh luitui a ne’h vuh ahi hi. Tua Siingbu’h lui tung kawl hawm lah pan, su’n lai tengin, innmun di’ngte geel, gamva’t in na’ ase’m let vuhi. Phaitu gam akisa’t tungin, leitang hoih mama in, Gamphaaipo na Mun ahi na leh, Gammaang Tuu – lah bihbeh ahi zeih in, PHAITU na kici hi. Phaitu khuo a kisa’t tungin, Vanghsing agil kingkeng pen, Sum agolte sangin golzaw lai hi kici hi. Phin-ga pumkhat Pasal te Sakhau sungah thawl z ova-ialo hi kici hi. Tua gamvaan te’n, a maahaw deihna munteng a puo-zaw aseim zaw ciengvun, Va’nglai khuo ah peikia vun, azi atete vuh ha’n in, a gam neipa Pu Maan Tuong kohlo in, atee’ng vuhi. Tuabang ate’nna vuah atate vuh, khol mite’n thepieh paipai vuh ahi ciengin, a ma hawleh a ma haw kihung zolo aa ang op ciengun, a gam neipa Mann Tuong makai na, khuosuon nalo tawh apien theilo lam athei ciengvun, Pu Mann Tuong leh a innkuonpi te vala, vaha’n vun, Pu Mann Tuong in, Uhpi (Hausa) ang se’m suoh hi. Phaitu khuo kisa’t tungin, inn guh (6) pha hi kici hi. Khuo khai Hausa Pu Mann Tuong hun aa kipan Phaitu khuo taa’ngthu kipan hi. (Laa’mpi La) A : Sawmtui tungah, ngalpa ba’ng, sou suong ingh, khuo kii’m vakhuoi, ba’ng kasaw, la beita; B : Khuo kii’m vakhoi, bangsawh ta’ng, he’n bulphu ta’ng, ka sulnaang sa, ba’ng eizui, ngam omlo. Mann Lun leh Mann Tuong sung, a sanggam tage’l a kilemlo na zieh in, gal leh sa bangin hing om aa, nikhat ni Pu Mann Tuong gam ahi, Sielciem zaang kitu in, Pu Mann Tuong khang (7) na, Pu Tuong Tawng leh Salzaang om Mann Lunt e, kido in Pu Tuong Tawng’ Sielciem zaangah that vuhi. Alu tan in Salaang ah vui vuhi. Nikhat ni ciengin, sanggam nau zawteng ahi; Mang Son, Hang Vung leh Mat Mang sungtengin, lemtuo in, Salzaang Mann Lun te’n, Pu Tuong Tawng luting, puondum khat tawh tuu’n in, Sielpi khat tawh kuosa in Phaitu khuo ah hingvui kia vuhi. Tua bang ang kuon laitah vun, tam bangin LA a phuo vuhi. A : Khuokii’m lelh Phaitui – pi aw, na tuollai tah aa katha; B : Amin ka tha PhaiKhuo ah zinba’ng ha’ng, a tunnu’n naubang nasaang, thei nai maw. Pu Mann Tuong pan kizomsuh in, Tulpi khuokhai Hausa ki – Uhna ( Village Tract) tawh a natawn mabangin, Pu Mann Tuong Pan ki – zom khang (9) na Pu,Khaih Vum in zongh, a Uhna gamsung tengah, miim – sie taangsie a kaihna leh midong te’n, a amm, a enn na thu, tamnbangin, La khat naphuo lai hi. Pu Khaih Vum La: A : Ka phung luisuh, zatam aw e, miim leh seitaang ka kaih na; B : Miim leh sietaang, ka kaihna cieu-lipi tu’ng, siingta’n laa’mba’ng, enng aw e. Phaitu khuo sa’t-ci’ltung Pu Mann Tuong Uhpi Hausa sep tung aa kipan, khuopi tuipi tea a di’ng aa, spkhietna a ki langhtang zaw deuh teng ensuh kia leih; Pu Mann Tuong pan Khang (7) na Pu Tuong Tawng in, Phaitu gam a hungna tawh, Sielciem zaang laitah aa si-na angtuoh na, a luong tawh a Phaitu mite leh a Phaitu gam aa di’ng aa, si-na ang thuona tea hi zongin, Pu Tuong Tawng in, khuo leh tui, gaal leh sa a nang di’ng leh ata anaute inntuon, khuosuon nate na guon hi. Tua a khuosuon sahte sungah, a tapa (2) na, Pu Neih Le’t khawzaang khuo ah a hi zongin, a (3)na, Pu Vai Vum Tuitum khuo ahizongin, khuokhai hausa in guon hi. Pu Tuong Tawng tapa, Pu Vai Saa hun ciengin, a tapa, Pu Tuong Seem (Thang Mann Innkuon Haitawipa) zong, Tangh leu khuo ah na inntuon in, khuokhai Hausa nase’m sah hi. Pu VaiSaa in azi Pi Phal Ngul tawh Pu Khaih Vum ang hin, aneih zaw ciengin, Pu Vai Saa sihi. Pu Vai Saa a sizaw ciengin, a tapa Kaih Vum lah naupanglai ahi manin, Pi Phal Ngul in, a pasal Pu Vai Saa mun ah, khuokhai Hausa hingh se’mto hi. Pi Phal Ngul in khuokhai Hausa a sep hun sungin, Laaitang khuo Hausapa Pu Enn Laang a gamvanna pan, Taasa’t khuo mite’n a tha zieh in, puasuui aa hingpei Taasa’t khuomite (3), Laaitang khuomite’n atha piehna vangin, Laaitang khuo mite leh Taasa’t khuo mite kigaal neina thu hing pieng hi. Athu ah, Nikhatni Laaitang khuo ah, innkhup zu kine’h ni khat, Taasa’t khuo mite (4) puasuui in atung vuhi. Laaitagn khuo mite’n a mahaw tawh kibangin, zu neton, dawnton vuhi. Zu a kha-m tah ciengvun, Pu Enn Laang that in, a lungtang tawh gungal kaai aa, a khuolam, a innlam zuon aa peihna thu, Taasa’t te khat in, tam bangin La khat ahil hi; Lam Tung kicipa pen, Pahitu khuo ah, a deihdeih in, numei naupang te in, athuoh zolo ahi hi. Lokuon vaitung upite, awkawng, aseeu (Bag) sung longin, amma dieh, Ba’lpi pum tuituoh, Maaipum tuituoh amu leh adeihza laa’h – pieh thei tawntung hi. Pasal thazomte zongh, nuoisie in zawthaw bawl den ahi manin, khuomi te’n Dawi lelh aa anglelh tah ciengin, Phaitu khuo ni-suona hanglam (South) mun ahi, Leisan bawm ke’lsuong-kot mun-ah, nab u-h uh aa, Lam Tung vaikuon angtun, angsuo ciengin, teipi tawh khawlum in a that ta vuhi. Nidang hunciengin, migilo, mi kipausah khat a opleh, “ Na LAM TUNG pau ngam amah” ci-in, THU TAMTUH in, na kinei suohhi. Tam thu tepen, Pi PhalNgul Hausa sep hunsung thu piengte ahi hi. Pi Phal Ngul in Phaitu khuo Hausa kum (3) sung and sepzaw cieng-in, Pasal Khuokhai Hausa tawhlo,apien theilo tah ciengin, Pi Phal Ngul in a pasal naupa, Pu Neih Let, Phaitu khuo ah ha’nin, a ki te’n pi hi. Tua hun akipan Pu Neih Let in Phaitu khuo Hausa ase’m hi. ( Pu Neih Let pen, azi atate tawh, khuozaang khuo Huasa a seplaitah ahi hi.) Pu Kaih Vum in Zi ang nei ciengdongin, Pu Neih Let in Phaitu khuo Hausa ase’m hi. Pu Kaih Vum hun in, a gamsungteng, miinsei taangsis kai aa, a khuo atui zongh, gilva ankhawm nuomsa tah a opna vuh ahizongin, khuo dang midang te’n a enn na thu vuh a tung aa a laphuo nate enlei kimu thei hi. Pu Tuong Za Lien hun ciengin, Pu Enng Seep te-haw tawh, Mawki khuo a vasim vuo, Pu Enng Seep in, a gaalte mi (7) kawikaht aa akawi, amat hun laitah ahi hi. Tua sungah a tapa Seel Let zong, Mawku khuo ah a gaalte’n, thaukaa’ tawh kaplum in asihi. Pu Khan Thawng pen, a khankum (1891 – 1919) kaal hunsung ahi aa, 1919 kum sungin, Tedim gam sungtengah Zolai kihil tadi’ng ahi ciengin, koikam, kioha’m kizang di’ng cithu, Rev.J.H Cope( Cope Topa) makai in, Tedim gam sung aa om, Hausa Thuneipi teng tawh kikupna kinei hi. Tua kikupna ah, Rev.J.H Cope in, Sizang kam tawh atei, agielsa laimai (20) bang apha, Mangkaang te taa’ngthu “Jack the Gain Killer” a kici khat, hat Lian Bu ci-in, Rev. J.H. Cope in a simsuh hi. Tua Laisim Bu kibawl na di’ngah, Sizaang kam mitampi in telzolo ahi man-in Tedim kam tawh bawl di’ngin kithukim vuhi. Tua sungah, a thukimpi thudowhpi lah ah, Zo kuol sung thusunna ah, Phaitu khuo Hausa Pu Khna Thawng ahi zongin, Salzaang khuo Hausa Pu Zaang Kho Lien ahi zongin na kihal vuhi. Pu Khan Thawng ahi leh innpipa Hau Cin Khup in, a zata’h mama khat leh amuon asuon mama khat ahi mabangin, 1919 kum tawplam n, khamtung gam Uhpi Milien teng leh (British Government) tawh Yangon khuo ah, kikupna omdi’ng ahi ciengin ci-in, innpipa Hau Cin Khup leh Pu Khan Thawng Yangon ah, Maang Kaang kumpi te tawh va kimu vuhi.tua akimu, a an neehton navuah, Pu Khan Thawng an-nee’h touhkhiel hi, ci-in, a sisa in, a luonghawm beh Phaitu khuo ah a kipuoh hi. Tuabang Pu Khan Thawng asi-na pen, Innpipa in abumlia, a annleh aa guza a khiehpieh hiva ci-in ki-ummaw hi. Pu Khan Thawng aluong a kipuoh na Dolkuong sankingkeng pen, Pi Vung Za Nieng ( a Zi In), tam bangin La a phuoh hi. A : Zaangdon tuol aa, deih ziingzin aw, tuongtun di’ng, lungsiel maw’ng e; B : Zaang aa pe’ksi’k, ngo no aw e, Kiengmaang ngul, bang a lupna. Pu Khan Thawng pen, Zogam bup sung, Hausa sung pan, muon leh suon khat a nahi aa, a khuo atuite thamlo, Zo gambup aa di’ng a na ki piekhie masa pen khatzong ahi hi. A tawp na ah, A khhuo atui aa di’ng leh a Zo gam aa di’ngin, a luong tawh a nalei a na si-pi mikhat ahi ciengin, tam Lai tawh paa’tawi in, a Min kaphat hi. Gamke’h Mikaangte in , 1896 pan a thugui-hunh bawlvuh “ The Chin Feudalism” Uhpi ngaina tawh ki uhna ahi hi. Tua Uhpi te’n , zmaa Uhna gamtengah, “Sietung Siephei,Salieng Samal, tuatha khaal tha, miim-sie taangsie” akaii vuhi. Phaitu khuo aa di’ngin, seikhaih na tawh ki-uhna a kizom suh diuhdeuh a nukhia pen, 1944 kum cieng ase’m, Pu Thawng Cin Mang hun cieng dong kici thei hi. Bnag ding a heii cileh, Jpan gaal hun siet sungin, Pu Nang Za Mang in, a gam nei Mann Tuong te phalna omlopi, Hausa a sepzieh in, Uhpi Hausa kizopna nawngkai sah hi. Tua tamloh, Pu Thawng Cin Mang in, Hausa se’m ngailo hi a cizong a om hi. Pu Thawng Cin Mang in , apa Pu Lien Za Khup asizaw, 1941 kum pna 1944 kum, Japan gaal hun ciengdong, Phaitu khuo ah Tulpi, Uhpi ki-Uhna tawh Hau sa nase’m ahi hi. Tua Hausa a sepna thu, tam bangin La phuo hi. Pu Thawng Cin Mang La: A : Va’ngkhuo saaisa, le’nmuol khalta’ng, lungno khuong daii, dam-ah hei-ta’ng e; B : Lungno khuong daii, dam-ah heita’ng, kawi leh vonlaw, no natuom aw e. Phaitu khuo ah, 1944 – 1945 kum, Japan gaal hunsiet sungteng in, Pu Nang Za Mang ( Tung Nung ) in, Innpipa Pum Za Mang panpi-na tawh Phaitu khuo ah Hausa nase’m hi. Tua hun laitah pen, Tulpi Uhpi ki-Uhna hun hilai ahi manin, Hausa ase’m ki cikithei tahtah lo hi. Ahi vangin Phaitu hausa gui kizopna ah, ka guong hi( Lai Atapa) Pu Lien kho Mang in, 1945 – 1948 kum sung, Kawlgam in, suotat – na a nga masang ciengdong, Uhpi ki- Uhna ma tawh hingh- Uh suh hi. Tua Uhpi ki-Uhna tawh a Uh sungin, February 12, 1947 ni aa, Kawlgam sung suotatna nga nadi’ng, Minam makaite zosie thu kimna tawh kibawl “ Pin-Long Thukimna (Pinlong Agreement) pen, Mikaang (Britsih) kumpi te in umzolo ahi manvun, Kawlgam sung om, Minam kim in, a thu-kim tahpi ahi amah, ashsih ahe’i? ci aa a theinop man vun, Manmyo khuo ah, Zum(Office) khat hongin, tua sungah, Thukan di’ngin Mikaang te-in a muonpen Minam makaiite mi (8) thukan di’ngin ateel vuhi. Tua thukn, Minam Makai te-in (1947, April 19 – 24) kaalsung, thukanna nei-in, British Mikaang kumpite tungah, amuna bangvun apuoh (report) kia vuhi. Tua bang aa amaa-haw mu-na leh a thupuoh (report) na tu’ngtawn in, Kawlgam in suotatna anga thei pan ahi hi. Tua thukan te lah ah, na ki pawlpi teng tawh gop-in, “ZOGAMSUNG THU MAKAI” (CHIN POLITICLA LEADERS) te lah ah, “Zo Minam Ni, Golden Jubilee Pawibawl ni cieng aa, PA’TAWI-NA a kipie di’ngte a dangnei aa bang teng ahi hi. CHIN POLITICAL LEADERS ZO MINAM NI, GOLDEN JUBILEE PAWI BAWL NI CIENG AA, PA’ TAWI-NA A KI PIE DING TEN. Representation of The Masses for Rees William Commission for Frontier Areas Committee of Enquiry (1947 – April, 19 – 24) U Lien Kho Mang – Tedim (Phaitu) U Vawmthu Moung – Kanpetlet Capt. Mang Tung Nung – Tedim Subedar Thang Za Kai – Tedim Headman Thawng Hang – Tedim U Thang Kho Kai – Tedim U On Kho Mang – Tedim U Let Suoh – Tedim Pu Lien Kho Mang in tambang aa, Kawlgam suotat nadi’ng aa, Mikaang (Bristish) te ii muon leh suon, gam makai khat aa a na opthei na thete thamlo, Khawmtung gambup, Zo Minam Ni( Chin National Day) apien khiet nadi’ng aa, a vaihawmpi Capt. Mang Tung Nung te tawh kithuoton in, mapanton nate nanei hi. 1948 February (20) ni ciengin, “ Zo Minam Ni” (Chin National Day) ki kipsah in, Zogam buppi Democracy nga hi, “The Cin Hills Regulation Acts” deihna tawh ki-Uhna “Feudalism” Uhpi ki-Uhna ahi, “Sietung Siepheei, Salieng Samal, Tuatha Khaaltha, peih di’ngte a tawpni, Nidang Gambup ki-Uhna ahi” Hausa,za ciengin, Uhpite, Vuondahte, Maangpite, Menzite” cibang aa ki-Uhna te zosie atawpni, a deihdeih in, Tedim gamah, Hau Cin Khup, Pum Za Mang te ii Siekaih a tawpni ahi hi. Ih Zo gam ah, Democracy tawh ki-Uh thei na-di’ngin, “ Chin Special Division Acts” kibawl in, tua ki-Uhna tawh, ki-uh tosuoh hi. Zo mite suotatna a nga thei nadi’ng aa, a lamkaii aa, Zo Minam Ni kibawlna pan aa Phaitu khuo ah Pu Lien Kho Mang angtun ni’n, Khuo leh Tui, kilungdam luo ahi manin, Hausapa Pu Lien Kho Mang inn ah, khuopi tuipi te in, lungdamin zu leh sa tawh pawi kibawl hi. Tua pawi ki bawlna ah, Laphuo siempa Pu Neng Laang in, Pu Lien Kho Mang @ Thawng Khen Thang Pa, tambang in, La natap hi. Theibagn se’n aa cinth le’lsiem, khaw-mazap siel-lo zu’nba’ng, tu’n hingzo pan e, tu’n hingzo pan e; Tu’n hinzo pan, va’ngkhuo guol aw, cinthu le’lsiem ga-mung ba’ng, khauhma civai e, khuahma civai e. 1945 kum tawplam Japan gaal ven patlam in, Mangkaang galkap a lamsamh pawlkat Pu Lien Kho Mang in India gam, Imphal ( Phaipi Khuo) British Army Head Quarters munah a vapuohpieh na va’ngin, Mang Kaang (British) kimpi te’n, Minphatna a peih ba’nvuah, 1954 kum hun ciengin, Minphat Va’ngpiehna ci-in, Sai Thau Lawng Khat leh Ngun naa’m sau khat zong, napie uh ahi manin, tua Saaithau leh, Ngun naa’m sau kinga ni’n, lung dampina pawi kibawlin, tua pawi sungah, atupa Pu Thang Doh Lien @ Doh Kaii ( LienZaw) in, tam bangin, phatna La, na phuo hi. Theibang se’n aa, guol hiembang-gawi, gawilungtunglo, naa’mtem-hiem ne’lkaai, naa’mtem-hiem ne’lkaai; Gawi lungunglo, hauhta min pauhna, lungdeih suoi ne’lkaa, lungeih suoi ne’lkaai. Pu Lien Kho Mang vaihawm siemna tawh, Phaitu khuo in Zothau tampi a kinga la la zong, Pu Doh Kaii in, tam bangin La naphuo lai hi. Thawng Khen Thang pa, ziingvai banghawm, seim ee kawlcieng thang, deih teng pom tai e, deihteng pom tai e; Nang Za Mang zing, vaibang hawm-in, zaangkhen khawlcieng in, vai-mang lai zuon e, vaimang lai zuon e. Kawlgam in suotatna aki ngazaw hunsung ahi; 1948 – 1955 sung, Pu Lien Kho Mang in Hausa se’msuoh hi. Tua hun sungpen, Phah-Sah-Pah-Lah hunsung ahi aa, U Nuh in, Kumpi (Prime Minister) asep hun-sungzong ahi hi. Tua hunlai in, Khuo (4)/Khuo(5) khaw’h khat in kikoih aa, tua khaw’h khat pen Circle Chairman khat in n a uh hi. Pu Lien Kho Mang in, Phaitu pan Luntah, Khamzaang, Gelmuol, Khuomun te na-Uh hi. 1951 kum, Phaitu –Tonzaang Mawtaw lam kala’i pen 1953 kum ciengin kizo aa, tua lampi pen Lien Kho Mang lampi na kici hi. 1946 kumpe’h aa kihong, Zalai tan (4) Sa’ng ( Private Primary School) kinga pan hi. 1953 kum ciengin, Kumpi ta’n (40 sa’ng (State Primary School) kinga pan hi.1949 kum aa kipan, 1956 kum ciengdong, Manglai tan’n (7) sa’ng (PrivateMiddle School) ki hong kia leuleu hi. Tua kimsung ma-in UNICEF (United Nation’s Children’s Foundation) pan hu-na TUIZAWL kinga hi. 1996 kum, Pa Thang Lien Kap (Tung Nung) in, Hausa asep hunsung in,(Affilated Middle School) na kinga hi. 1998 kum, Pa Khup Kho Pau ( Mann Tuong) in, Hausa a sep hunsung in, Tuisawm luipan, Hydro Electric Power kinga hi. Tonzaang khuo bup tawh kibangin, Phaitu khuo in, Mei kinga hi. Mei nataang hi. NB: “Ciemte di’ng aa kilawm, Hausa a dangzong omlai di’ng hi. Hizong leh Laigielpa theiteng ahiaa, a kisam lai a op leh, laibu bawlkia ciengin, a kim aa I bawlzawh na di’ngin ei panpi ciet tavun, ci’n kang thu’m hi.
Lasak leh Laphuahsiam Cin Bawi
Minpi leh beh : Hau Za Cin Kipgen @Cin Bawi Kham khua : Tedim/ Lailui Tulian omna : Melbourne Australia Suahni : 11/04/1994 Lai Pilna : Diploma Of Sound Production Pianna Tuun leh Zua min : Pa Gin Tul Thang/ Nu Langh Deih Vung Sanggam Laizom te min : Lia Niang Muan Kim Ukna (Hobbies) : Tukpeng Kimawl LST Mun : Paunak 3:5-6 GZC Q1. Lasak leh music lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Lasak bang in hong uksak tualeh Ladawng/Album/Mv bangzah bawlkhin, Nong genthei ding hiam? CB-1. Lasak leh music ka neutung pan uk. Kum14-15 kiim ka phak lai, Biakiin sung ah music kitum ging kazak ciang ka lungsim ong la mahmah haih man, acoustic guitar sin tuapan ki pan. La pen ka release sa leh release nailoh 38 kiim gelh khin. Mini Album khat nei. MV pen 9 kiim kizaih khin. GZC Q2. Na La/Music/Note te e nang ii idea ngiat tawh nagelh vive maw, Na music/laphuah/na lasak lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? CB-2: Kala teng khempeuh music arrangement, a tum hi taleh, a vocal hi a hi zong a vek in kei idea tawh ka bawl vive himah ei. GZC Q3. Na vocal effect zat leh na la aw (harmony / Melody) te mahmah zong tuampah ngiat, hidan la bawl baih hetlo ding cileng la at la lep (music arrangment) ciang haksat na tuak gei hiam? CB-3: Haksatna bel tam lua. Khat vei hih a na piang pahpah lo ahih man, ngai kikkik, a hoihlo teng puahpha kikkik in, a la mahmah tawh zong a kituak ding aw (vocal) zon kul ahih man baih hetlo mah hi. Ahi zong I uk na mah in ong zo veve. GZC Q4. Zomi sung mang movie, ahi zongin minam dangte lak ah kihel pha ding leh mangla vasak pihthei, va tumpih theiding artist/musician ih neih na angtang hiam? CB-4: I minam sung ah hidan mipil misiam te I neih khak angtang mahmah ing. Topan a maban te uh hong gual zawh pih semsem tahen. GZC Q5. Mailam hun ah na tup le ngim in bang, Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? CB-5: Mai lam ah Zomi te a ding lahoih tampi gelh zawh ding pen ka ngimna pi hi. I music tum te thapiak siam deuh leng ki khangno thei pan ding hi. GZC Q6. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. CB-6: Interview pawl khat ah kagen zel mah bang in, tuhun ciang minam khangto te I theihnop leh a Artists te uh en ziau leng a khantoh dan uh tampi ki theih ahih man, I artist te thapiak siam in, pah tawi ni. Tua pen I minam mahmah zong I laptoh na hipah hi. Nuamna leh dahna te ah ahi a, minam pawi ahi zong in mun khat pepeuh ah music tum thei te leh lasa thei telo in piang theilo I hih man in, music zong profession khat ahih na tawh ki zui in, I music tum te, I lasa te tha pia siam ni. Lettama (carpenter) khat in biakinn ah ahih a, I inn ah ahi zong in nasem ding in I sap ciang sum kipia buang a, music tum ten zong a hun neih khempeuh uh tawh sin ngekngek a mipi mai ah ong sepkhiat te uh mangngilh kei leng ki khangto pan ding hi. Lungdam. GZC Tanute: Manlah, buai pipi mahtawh na hun manpha hong khenkhia teta nahih manin nang sangsang in koh lungdam zaw ung. Mailam ah na tup leh ngimna, nasinna, nasep, na kalsuanna hong lamzang toto laita in maw! Gin Hau Khup 6) Finance Secretary:Pa Laang Lam Pau Joint Finance Secretary: Pa Peter Sian Khan Thang Assistant Finance Secretary: Nu Teresa Ling Nuam 7) Northern Germany Regional Secretary: Tg. Peter Lam Methodius 8) Central Germany Regional Secretary: Pa Pius Khup Lam Khai 9) Southern Germany Regional Secretary: Pa Edward Thang Zomi Innkuan Germany Ngiimna Bulpite Germany gam sunga om Zomite ki pumkhatin na sepkhop nang Zongeina le Zopau, Zolai kepcing nang Leitung mun tuamtuama om Zomite tawh ki kumkhawmin Zogam le Zomi khantoh nanga nasepkhop nang Biakna khat le khat ki kumkhawma, maban patkhawp theih nang. Zomi Innkuan Germany tawh kisai Theihhuai Thute 1) Zomi Innkuan Germany December 25, 2003 ni in Rüdesheim khua, Hessen pan ki phuankhia hi 2) Zomi Innkuan Germany a nihveina Kimuhkhopna le Panmun kisehna November 13, 2004 ni in Bad Arolsen, Hessen ah kinei hi. 3) Zomi Innkuan Germany min tawh a masa pen Zomi Nampi Ni (Zomi National Day) February 19, 2005 ni in Hamburg ah ki bawl hi. A bawlna mun: Pa Peter Sian Khan Thang leh Tg. Peter Lam Methodius Inn, Jordan Str. 8, 20535 Hamburg. 4) Zomi Innkuan Germany min tawh a masa pen Khuado Pawi October 8, 2005 ni in Rüdesheim am Rhein khua ah kibawl. A bawlna mun: Pa Laang Lam Pau Inn, Am Eibinger Tor, 65385 Rüdesheim am Rhein, Hessen 5) Zomi Innkuan Germany in German kumpi ciaptehna e.V. December 19, 2008 ni in Amtsgericht Frankfurt am Main pan ngah hi.
Zomi Association Australia (Inc)
2007 kum, April 01 masiah Australia-a Zomite adiak-in Melbourne-a tein kipawlkhopna minvawhlian bangmah neilo himahtaleh ahunhun-in Pu. Maang Za Suan-in munnuam tuamtuam; tuipipiau ahi-a mualdawn leh tuibeem-ah ahizong-in Zomite kithuahkhopna neihpih zeel-hi. 2007 kumpatlam-in Zomi Kipawlna minvawhkhat neihding alunggulh mahmah Zokhai-in ama&#8217; hihtheihsun-in upate leh khangualte hopih kawikawi-a, Melbourne bek hilo Australia gambup ahuamding Zomi Kipawlna lunggulh mahmah uhhi.Tuahunlaai-in kipawlna alunggulhleh athapia Pu. Nang Khan Khup-in Zokhai&#8217; Adelaide hawhnading lamsaap sik-in sumtang mahmah tawh panpih-a, Adelaide-a Zomi omteng-tawh holimna kaal-khatsung va-nei thei hi. Tuasung-in Melbourne-ah taangpi kimuhkhop nading adiak-in Adelaide Zomite&#8217; hong hawh theih ding hunkhat ki-sehkhol pah-a, tua-tawh kituak ding-in Melbourne Zomi ahitheizah zaaksakna kinei thei-hi. Tua kimuhkhop nading geelna tungtawn-in Adelaide-a Zomite&#8217; honghawh uh-a, amau teng leh Melbourne-a Zomi ahitheizahin kimuhkhopna thukupna kinei thei-hi. Tua kimuhkhopna anuai-abang ahihi: Nimit: 01 April 2007 Hun: Nikaai nai 4 &#8211; 7 2009-07-15 Mun: Youth Hall (Life Ministry Centre) Hunzatzia: Hunzeekpi: Pu. T. Zokhai (East MELB) Hunpat Thungen: Pu. Sian Khan Thang (ADL) Hunkhaak Thungen: Pu. Kim Cin (West MELB) Thusung Mimalteng: Pi. Ciang Za Dim Pu. Maang Za Mung Pu. Sian Khan Thang Pi. Ciin Vung Tg.
