Haimual 1897 Pu Do Reh Loa Khupno Haimual 1894 Pu Chong Thula Chalthleng Haimual 1894 Pu Chong Vela Chalthleng Haimual 1894 Pu Tha Kapa Chalthleng Haimual 1894 NB . Tuidil khuasat Pupite leh sawtlo aa a tungthuah teng a kician in kitel zo nawnlo hi. Editor. A tuung in Tuidil khua pen “Va-ki kot khua” kici hi. Banghang in kici hiam cihleh tua a tun masakna mun gei ah ‘Va-ki kot lui’ kici khat a luang hi. Tua luino gei-ah khua sat uh ahih manin tua luino min mah vawhin ‘Va-ki kot khua’ a na ci masa phot uhi. Tua Va-ki kot khuamun panin simlam furlong khat kiim ding ah ‘Bual’ golpi khat om hi. ‘Bual’ pen Mizo pau in “Dil” kici aa, Bualtui pen “Diltui” ci uh hi. A sawtsawt ciangin tua Bualtui min zang in, a khjua uh ‘Va-ki Kot khua’ pen ‘Tuidil khua’ ci in a laih uh hi. 1956 kum dong Tuidil pen Falam Township ah om aa, 1956 panin Tedim Myone ah kiguang in Myone sunga khua te Circle (Oh suh) in a kikhen ciangin Tuidil, Old Haimual leh New Haimual te Circle (Oh suh) khat in kikoih in Tuidil Oh suh kici hi. Tu laitak in inn 80 val uh a, mimal 200 val a om uh hi. Tuidil Khua ah Tapidaw a tunna Tuidil khua Biakna lam thu ah khua satzawh kum 50 val huam sungah Biakna pawlpi khatbeek om nailo hi. 1912 kum ciang in Tuidil ah Pu Thakhenga in Pasian thu na um in, Tuidil khua sung pan Tapidaw suak masapen ahi hi. Thu um zong om to zel ahih manin 1914 kum in biakinn a lam uh hi. Hih biakinn pen Hualngo gama Biakinn masapen hi ci in Upa Ralthatsuma in gen hi. (Hualngo khua leh tui, laimai 311, para 1). Tapidaw te leh hausa te kikal ah kilemlohna nasia tak in hong om hi. Hausa te in Tapidaw te ii Sunday ni pen thupi simsak lo in, Tapidaw te in zong Lo-hual acih uh lo-saap pen kumsim in innsim in a kipia pen a pia nuam kei uh hi. Tua ciangin 1918 kum in Falam DC zum ah hausa te in report a piak uh ciangin Tuibual leh Rih ah Lo-hual (Tual biak nading Lo saap) pia ding acih ciangin Tapidaw ten zong apia uh hi. Tapidaw te leh lawki lai te pen unau sanggam khat ahih hangun nopni dahni, zehtan Nipi tan leh Lo saap cihte tungtang ah kibang thei nawnlo uh ahih manin biakinn nangawn kikhak sak hi. Tua ciangin tapidaw te pen hausa te thupiakna bangin khua sung pan a taikhiat loh uh phamawh ta hi. Tua ciangin Pu Tha Khenga a kipan tapidaw suak masa mi 14 te zong khua dang ahi Ngente, Bukphir, Zimte, Zimpi ah a taikhia uh hi. Tapidaw te taikhiat ni pen March 17, 1924 ni in kiciamteh hi. Tua sung teng mah in Pu Za Bil te innkuan pen Tuidil ah hong tung uh hi. Pu Za Bil ii pa Pu Za Dun pen Piantit pulnatna hangin Ukpite leh Tangpite-in na hawlkhia uh a, Falam gam Khuanglung; Ruasih khua-ah tawl khat a ten khit ciang in Hualngo gam Tuidil khua-ah a lal tosuak ahi hi. Amau pen Tapidaw hi sa in Tuidil tung uh ahih manin Tuidil a tun ciangin tua hun laitak aa hausa ahi Pu Tson Suma in Pu Za Bil te Tapidaw ahih manin a hawl khia hi. Tua ciangin a tate teng leh a unau teng tawh Mizo gam Khuanglam khua-ah a lalsawm uh hi. Tua ciangin Ukpipa Pu Thang Tin Lian in a pianna apu ahi PuZa Bil te pen Mizo gam ah a lalkhiat ding a phalloh manin Dampi gam a ngah sak hi. Tua ciangin 1930 kumin Pu Za Bil te Tuidil pan paikhia in Dampi khua a sat uh hi. Tapidaw suahna hangin khua pan a, hawlkhiatna, innmun logam teng taanna, khua thak sat-a, khua kipna laipi a ngah theih ciangin Pu Za Bil in nakpi takin lungdam lua ahih manin, a nuai aa bangin la a phuak hi. Zei an e, kan suallo, khuazing Tialnu in taan aw, Ka biak lurpi Sanlun dir aw, ka chhung-ah. Lal lian rim nam pa, i vang, i thluang dang cham chu, Chumrual-in run aw, hren-ah, khawnu nawl in. La i cih nopna: Kampau, mukpau a khial hi kei ungh, ka Pasian aw, Leitung, Leinuai-a Thuneite aw, hing gum ta un. Tunglam panin ka kimkot-ah, dai hong kaih ta un. Ukpi gimnam te hang a, mun dang ka zot buangin, An bemdim-a kigual-in, hong kimkotna dingin, Hong siampa in thupha hong pia ta hen. Tua banga Tapidaw te a kihawlkhiat kawmkal ah hausapa Pu Tson Suma uu pa ahi Pu Lalkhuma leh a tapa Pu Darsela te tapidaw a suak hi. Tua panin hausa innkuan sung pan tapidaw hong om ciangin tapidaw te suakta deuh uh a, ABM pawlpi suak in, hong pawlcing kik uh hi. 1948, 1962 kum te ah Zogam bup Tuiphum khawmpi te Tuidil ah kibawl in, sangmang Rev. O.Nelson topate zong na pai uh hi. 1969 kum ciangin pawldang ah tai gai uh ahih manin ABM pawlpi a bei hi. 1953 kum in Methodist pawlpi na om in, 1955 kum in RCM pawlpi kiphut in, 1979 kum in UPC pawlpi a om hi. ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Tuitawh Khua
Khua thu atomkim: Khua min : Tuitawh Inn phazah : 90 Veng : Khualai, khua khung, khua taw, kongzang, haizanglui veng Sang : Basic Middle School Mi phazah : 700s Beh omzah : Sukte, Tangpua, Tunglut, Malneu, Suankhup, Vangaw, Zahlang Pawlpi : Tuiphum, RC, Laipian Kivaakna : Singtaang vaimim kho, sumbuk sai, leilet nei om Tuitawh Khuasatna thu Tuitawh khua ah a kiten ma in Tuitawh gam sungah khua munlui na om kawikawi zo hi. Tua khua munlui te pen Selphei, Tangh Gal, Dimzang, Khuamun leh Kuahmual cihte ahi hi. Pu Khan Hang (Sukte) a tangval lai in Baalzang khua, Losau gam (tu aa Phaileng khua khung) ah na teeng masa hi. Sa uuk khat ahih manin Laaitui gam lamah sabeng dingin a kuankhia zel hi. Laaitui gam Musiil a cihna mun panin Khuailui aa khuai leng a galmuh hi. Tua khuai lunggulh ahih manin a va delh leh Khuailui keendang aa khuaikai a mu pah hi. Tua khuai kaina mun tawh akinai pen Selphei ah khua a sat sawm pah hi. Pu Khan Hang in Dimpi hausa Gualnam te Pu Pau Suang (Laaitui khuasatpa)’ uu nu Pi Kam Ciin tawh Losau ah hong kiteng in tapa 3 a neihzawh ciangin a gam a khua dingin, amah makai in Pu Lian Khai (ZahLangh), Pu Zing Vial (Tangpua), Pu Tun Kham (Tunglut), Pu Hong Khaat (Malneu) te tawh a gam hawisa Shelphei ah khua a sat hi. Gamkip khuakip a suahtheih nadingin khuakip a neisa a sanggam te ahi Heilei hausa Pu Khan Hau leh Kaptel hausa Pu Thuam Thawng te tungah hekzia tatzia ding anuai aa bangin la tawh na dong hi. Lamtui tong dot zua Hau leh Thawng kamkei aw, lai ah koi ci bang kong hei diam aw. Suangdai mualpi, cilcik leh bukpi bukta, pang ding pi aw koi ci bel a hing diam aw. Selphei khua a ten lai un gamzai mahmah ahih manin gamkip khat asuah theih nadingin Falam ukpipa Pu Con Bik tungah a nuai aa van teng tawh gam a ngen hi. Sialtal &#8211; zabo 1 Thau (Holland) &#8211; lawng 1 Sazuksaphelhkeu &#8211; seu 1 Khipi &#8211; gui 5 (Khipi gui 5 teng; Suangbem khipi gui khat Meitei khipi gui khat Do Huai pa khi gui khat Khamkhi gui khat Khipi tang khat Hih atunga van teng tawh a nget uh ciangin Pu Con Bik lungkim mahmah ahih manin gam khen dingin a sawltakpi Pu Tei Heng paisak pah in, gamkip aa ciaptehna in Daktal khat a pia hi. (Pu Con Bik in khua ngen, gam ngen peuhmah Daktal leh Teipi a piak nakleh asang, apia cihna ahi hi.) Hibang in Pu Con Bik in gam apiak ciangin Pu Khan Hang zong lungdam lua ahih manin hih la na phuak hi. Kamkei bang hang, khuai bang sawk ding, dimtui tanggual ngai ing e. Dimtui aw zangtui aw e, do lai ah siallum aw e. Pu Khan Hang ih cih pen Pu Khan Lam(Sukte) leh Pi Hen Giak ten tapa 4 a neih lakah a neupen ahi hi. Pi Kam Ciin (Laaitui khuasat, Gualnam te Pu Pau Suang’ unu) tawh kiteng in tapa 4 nei hi. Pu Khan Hang in Selphei ah aten lai in Sialkop na go man aa Selphei ah teksih hi. (Selphei khua mun pen tuhun ciangin Suangdai in kilo hi) Selphei khua pen ni suakbaih, nitum baih ahih manin daam in, vot mahmah hi. Tua manin Pu Khan Hang a sihzawh ciangin a tapa upen Pu Pau Khua Vungh in Selphei pan tai 2 bang a gamlatna Tangh Gal kicihna mun ah na kituahphei uh hi. Selphei khua a satpih pupi teng mah in na zuipah uh hi. Pu Pau Khua Vungh in pil leh tei thuah ahih manin amah beel in inn hong kibehlaplap hi. Innmun ding leh tuinek ding hong kicing nawnlo ahihmanin Tangh Gal ah kum tampi sung aten khit ciangun innkhat zong kisit lo in 1883 kum ciangin tu aa Tuitawh khua a satphei leuleu uh hi. Tuitawh khuasat masa makai teng; Pu Pau Khua Vungh (Sukte) &#8211; Hausa Pu Dongh Vial (Malneu) &#8211; Tulpi (Siampi) Pu Ging Tel (Malneu) &#8211; Khuangtum, Lang khen Pu Zing Sut (Vang aw) &#8211; Siksek Pu Dong Luai(Malneu) &#8211; Tangko Pu Lian Khai (Zahlangh) Pu Zing Vial (Tangpua) Pu Tun Kham (Tunglut) Pu Hong Khaat (Malneu) Pu Suah Kham (Malneu) Pu Gin Neng (Malneu) Sukte te pen nauzaw innluah ahih manin Tuitawh khua pen Pu Pau Khua Vungh in a innluah ding a tapaneu pen Pu Khaw Kim Pau min tawh a sat ahi hi. Pu Pau Khua Vungh in hausa sem pah in, kum 3 a tenzawh 1888 ciangin a hausa tavuan khempeuh pen a tapaneu pen Khaw Kim Pau lah neulai ahih manin a tapa upen ahi Pu Hang Kam ap in, Ngalbual khua zuan aa, Tuitawh khua a nusia hi. Pu Pau Khua Vungh’ la; Vang khua sai bang ka sat kum in, gual hong lenpih omlo e. Laigil tuibang hong dim ciangin khuai bang hang nuam tam tah e. Pu Khaw Kim Pau hong tangval ciangin a uu pa Pu Hang Kam in hausa tahuan ap aa 1892-1900 sung a sepkhit ciangin Khaw Kim Pau in khanglai in hong si ahih manin Hang Kam mah in 1900-1912 dong hausa a semkik hi. Hang Kam sih ciangin a tapa Vungh Za Dal in 1912-1926 sung sem hi. A sih ciangin a naupa Kam Khan Khup in maban zomthei nailo ahihmanin Lian Za Dal in 1926-1942 sung a sem hi. Kam Khan Khup hong khangcin ciangin kumpi sungah paltan tum a, ahizongin hausa sem dingin Tedim vuandokpa’ letmat tawh a kinget ciangin hong ciah in, 1942-1948 dong hausa sem hi. 1948 pan Kawlgam in suahtakna a kingah ciangin mipi’ teel te in hausa sem toto uh hi. Tuitawh khua ah Tapidaw a tunna Tuitawh khua ah pupa ngeina dawi biakna kibia in, kum 112 sung lawki sungah om uh hi. 1947 kumin RCM biakna hong tung in, 1945 kuma ABM ana tangsuah ahi Pu Thawng Khen Pau pen 1948 April 14 ni in Rev. Thang Ngin in a innkuan un innphiatna neihsak aa Tuiphum pawlpi hong om hi. Tedim gam ah 1973-74 kimin Kha khanlawhna hong om ciangin khua tuamtuam ahzong pawlpi hong ding kawikawi hi. Tedim ah khanlawhna hangin EBC pawlpi hong pian ciangin tua lai ah Sia Thang Go Khai (Tu in SAT, Rtd) zong a piangthak masa leh EBC suak masa khat nahi hi. Tedim EBC sung panin buaina hong om in, Sia Hau Lian Kham in EBC pan AG pawlpi hong din ciangin Sia Thang Go Khai leh alawm te in EBC mah ah na omsuak uh hi. 1975 kum in Sia Thang Go Khai in ama veina tawh Kaptel EBC te Tuitawh ah sam hi. Sia Khup Khan Tung makai in khangno pawlkhat a pai uh hi. Sia Thang Go Khai in Sia Thang Sian Mung (Tu in TEO, Rtd) zawn in Thanglian’ lolui ciang na dawn in, tua ah thungen khawm uh hi. Sia Thang Sian Mung ten ah zin tungsak uh a, Gospel te in Gupna thu a gen uh leh Tuitawh khuami 500 val lakah khangno 3 (Sia Thang Go Khai, Sia Thang Sian Mung, Sm Cing Ngaih Lun (Tu in Midwife, Rtd) te in thu a ngai bek uh hi. Tuitawh khua ah Gupna thu a tangko masapen in Kaptel te ahi hi. 1976 January kha in Sia Cin Lang makai in Phaiza khua panin music leh lasiam te Gospel pai uh hi. Guitar siam, lasa siam te in la a sak uh ciangin khua mite kikhawm nuam mahmah napi, a kikhawm ngamlo mi 10 bangin inn pua lam panin thu a ngai uh hi. 1976 May kha ciangin Sia Thang Go Khai leh Sia Thang Sian Mung te in Leilum panin Sia Lian Khup te Gospel pai dingin sam uh a, Gospel 3 vei neihna ahi hi. Tuitawh Khua Lawki a beina thu Kum tampi khit ciangin Laaitui EBC pawlpi te in 1983 &#8211; 84 pan kipan Tuitawh ah Gospel pai in Pasian thu a tangko zel uh hi. Tuitawh khua ah Lawki tamlai mahmah ahih manin Lawki abei nading in Dr. H. Gin En Cin in nakpi takin (Harvest Camp) min tawh nasem hi. Harvest camp pupi Sia Gin En Cin makai in 12-18, August 1997 sung in Pa Khai Suan inn ah kiphual in nitaksim gupkhiatna thu tangkona leh inn vak aa gupkhiatna thu genna kinei hi. Tua tunga pai te; H. Gin En Cin (Makaipi) Sia Kam Go Lian (Laaitui Khawk sia) Sia Sian Za Lal@Zogam Lalpu Sia Thang Sian Khai@TSKhai Syama Esther Cingsan Syama Pum Khawm Niang Sia Thang Za Khup@Sia Tawngpi Sia Kham Khan Mung (Ciau pawlpisia) Sia Pum Za Sai (Lunmual) Lia Lian Don Cing (Laaitui) Lia Cing Sian Go (Laaitui) Khua sunga Lawki te kiangah innvak in gupnathu genpih uh hi. Tua banah Lawki sungah amah bek a omlai Pu Dal Khan Langh kiangah hawh in Tapidaw suah ding a zol uh hi. 14.8.1997 (Thursday) ni in Lawki mang Pu Dal Khan Langh te inn kiphiat in, 16.8.1997 Saturday ni’n U Hau Kap te inn kiphiat leuleu hi. Pasian’ deihna om bangin Tuitawh khua ah Lawki hong beithei takpi aa, 1997 August 17 (Nipi ni) in Lawki beina Gualzawhna Mualsuang kiphuh hi. ~~~~~~~~~~~
Keybord tumsiam Khen Biak Muan
Minpi le beh : Khen Biak Muan (Suante beh) Kham khua : Lunmual Tulian omna : Tahan, Kalaymyo Suahni : 20/10/1993 Lai pilna : Bachelor of Music Pianna Tuun leh Zua min : &#8211; Awi Lun Cing (Nu) &#8211; Thang Za Suan (Pa) Sanggam Laizom te min : &#8211; Pau Lam Thang &#8211; Tual Khan Lian &#8211; Cing Lam Kim &#8211; Cing Tawi Dim &#8211; Lun Sian Nem &#8211; Cin Muan Sang &#8211; Mang Hoih Vung &#8211; Pasian thupha tawh unau 8 ka pha uh a, tua lakpan kei a 4 na hi ing. Ukna (Hobbies) : Music, Laisim, Bawlungsuih LST Mun : Efesa 1:4, Late 50:15 GZC Q1. Laphuah/Music lam na kidaih zawh a sawt ta na. Nong genthei ding hiam? KBM:- Hong gen thei mah ning ei – Music pen ka neu lai kum 10 ka phak a kipan uk in ka na sin toto a, kum 15 ka phak ciang Band tawh tum na kipan ing. Pasian in thupha hong pia in tuni dong mah Music tum in, hilh in nuntak khuasa in na om ing. GZC Q2. Zomi sung mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? KBM:- Angtang huai sa mahmah ing, Ih market zong hong zaizaw pah ding hi. Zo la bek hilo kawl la mangla ih sak theih ding khangthak ten hanciam toto lai ni ci-in tha hongpia nuam ing. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh ngei hiam, Na music tum/laphuah/lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? KBM:- Topa thupha tawh tu ciangciang a ka tum sa te a tam zaw kei idea vive hizaw in a vek in hoih sa ing, a hi zongin tu sunglakpan Itna (Muannu Buansing) sak mah thangah pen leh hoih sa pen ing. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? KBM:- Zomi te pen a tam zaw music talent kinei tek hi, a hih hang in phiatlann kitawn nuam den in hun bei/tha bei/sum bei a sin taktak ding ki utlo in practice ding ki thadah mahmah hi. Tua pen music ah thuk i lut zawhlohna leh minam dang te ih phak zawhlohna khiahna lianpi khat a hihi. Tua ahih man in Music uk khangthak te kong hanthotnop in khuatual siam tawh lungkim hetlo in music sanghoih (Music Education) mantak a kihilhna sang mah ah kah tangtang ding hanciam ni. Music sin na ding ih sum te paingam in siamsin na ah zong ih hun/thatang/lungsim te pia in lungduai in kuhkal tak a ih sin tohtoh a ih hanciam nak leh khangto lo in ih om kei ding hi. GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. Aw..kammal hoih ka sak mahmah khat hong luikhia nuam mah ing ei. KBM:- Dr. Cin Do Kham kammal a hi “A guallelte lamto ding, a gual zote pahtawi ding” a cih pen thuhoih mahmah hi in, Zomi te’n hih kammal nuntak pih leng lunggulh huai ka sa mahmah hi. Zomi te in a guallel mite lamto cih thadah kituancil beh zaw hi, A gual zo te sungpan pahtawi nop tuam kinei in pahtawi noploh mah kinei se hi. A ma dawk sunsun leh a lawhcing sunsun te ki lungdampih ding cih thadah facebook khawng pan kiko ngekngek thei mawk hi. Hih pen I thumuhzia a toiluat man a hihi. Tua hi in Zomi te tu a sang ih khantoh zawk theihna dingin khat leh khat I matutna, I lawhcin na leh I gualzawhnate kilungdampih a, ki ciapteh sak ding hanciam in kalsuan ni ci-in hih teng tawh ka laigelh hong khup hi ning. Laisim mimal kim tungah Topa’n thupha hong pia ta hen. Hih bang a interview dotna ah kei bang lel nong phawk khak uh lungdam mahmah ing, GZC tanu tapa te tungah lungdam hong ko phapha ing. Topa’n GZC innkuan thupha hongpia ta hen. Lungdam! GZC tanu te : Koh lungdam zaw kan ungh e, kahun geel sa uh hong picinh nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep, nabawl khatpeuh ah Zomi te a laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzang toto laita in. Na Zomi pihte in hong angtang lua ungh maw. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Video &#038; Photographer Tg. Pass Tuang
Min pi: David. Pau Sian Tuang Bawmkhai Sukzo suan Bawmkhai ( Sb ) Kham khua: Tonzang (Tedim ah suak) Suahni: 12th Oct 1995 Lai Pilna: &#8211; Bachelor of Law (2012 ~2017) University of Kalay, Myanmar &#8211; Diploma of Christian Ministry (2017~2018) Full Gospel Bible Training Center &#8211; Myanmar &#8211; Bachelor of Arts in Theology (~ 2014) Timothy Bible School and Seminary &#8211; Tedim, ChinState Tulaitak Field Supervisor Position tawh na kasep laitak hi. Pianna Tuun leh Zua min: &#8211; SK.Zen Lam Don (Nu) &#8211; SB.Langh Hau Lian ( Pa) Pianpih laizom te min: Pianpih u numei khat le pasal khat mithum lak ah a nautum pen ka hihi. Ka pianpih laizom te min in; 1.Nu Mary.Man Ngaih Nem( Staff Nurse &#8211; Falam General Hospital partner of Tedim ) + Pa Nang Thawn Khai ( Deputy staff officer of Rural Department Tedim )- Gamvai in tawlnga. Amau nih sungpan Pasian&#8217;piak tanumei thum: i). Esther.Cing Sian Muang ( Kum 7 leh kha 6 ) ii). Rebecca.Don Sian Itt Lian ( Kum 5 leh kha 6 ) iii). Elizabeth.Hau Khan Nuam ( Kum 1 leh kha 3 ) 2. Tg.Joseph.Pau Sian Khai ( Site Development Executive &#8211; MGACompany ) Ukna (Hobbies): Magic Tricks, Acting, Directing Script writing, Composing, Photography Videography LST Mun: Late 23 bup Hih LST mun bulphuh inzong ka hihtheihzah uhtawh Pasian&#8217; ading ministry khat part-time in ka nei uh hi. Amasa pen in GZC te tung ka lungdam mahmah hi. Bangmah Professional nailo kei lel nong phawk khak uh leh man ( Value ) nong neihsakna uh hang in ka lungdamna khitui ka nul hi. GZC Q1. Manzaih lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Bang in hong uksak hiam, Pass Production koi dan a hong piang khia cih nong gen thei ding hiam? PT~ Man leh video zaihlam pen kum 12 ka phak hunpawl MP4 ( Digital Camera MP4 Player ) Zogam ah hong langg mahmah hunpan ki pan ka uk khat leh nasep ka kipatna khat hong suak hi. Bang in hong uksak : ~ Amasa in Pasian in hongpiak kivakna khat hi cih ka kitel hi. Anihna ah kapa&#8217; sisan hang hi khadinghi. Ka pa pen Zomi movie masa lam &#8221; Tui buasa ki luak kik theilo &#8221; leh &#8221; Gii bang khen kheini &#8221; hih movie te ah Actor na sem a, Siamnel lam tawh kisai a uk mahmah khatzong a hihi. Pass Production hong piangkhiat na: ~ Amasa in Tuang Video Company ka kici hi ( Ka tan 4 lai pawl hikhading hi ) ahih hang in ka lungsim ah a ombek hipan in bangmah khutsung lah theihding a om naikei hi. Tua bang tawh sangkah hun hong bei toto in, laisinkum tan 7-8 hun ciang in ka lawm te khat in MP4 hong nei a, sang tuah hun khawng leh sang khakni cih bang te ah ama MP4 tawh maann leh video zaih ka ki sin toto a, Kilaina Video tomto khawng ka bawl uh hi. Hih laimun ah ka gen ka Lawm ( Pa Dal Khat Khai ) in 12th Oct 2022 ka Suahni lian in Falam ah hong nusia hi. Amah zong kaphawk mahmah hi. Kawlgam laitan tan giat ka sin laitak hun mah in, ka lawm te khat ( Hong nusia khin Sangpui ) in Passtuang cih min hong vawh ciang in, kamin a lai malding ka ngaihsun pah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a awsuah pen ei Zomi sung ah aom ngeilo awsuah leh minthak khat ahih man in manglai tawh hileh cih ka ngaihsut na kawmtawh Pasian&#8217; sung ah na khempeuh ki &#8221; Pass &#8221; khin zo hi cih bulphuhna tawh Passtuang ci&#8217;n ka min mal ka kivawh a Zomi sung ah Pass cihtawh min sap anei masa penzong hiding in ka ki um hi . (Tu lam ciang in Pau Sian tawh min ki phuak khempeuh in Pass cih zang pian ta ahih man hi ) Tua bang pilsin hun ka nawk kawmkawm, ka tan kua kum ciang in Ka lawm Pau Za Mung (အထက &#8211; ၁ ဒုကျောင်းအုပ် tapa ) in Digital Camera khat sang ah hongpua simtheizel ahih man in, tuatawh ka lawmte mannzaih in ka sangsum ding kei leh kei in ka thalawh kawmkawm to hi. Ka tansawm dongmah tuabang in ka zomto a khat veivei sang nai laploh lawh zel ka hih man in satzong ka tuak zelzel hi. Sangkhak hun sung in, ka ukna te zuihding mah hi cih lungtup tawh mann leh Video ka zaih zelzel a, akum cian nawn pak keng&#8230;ka innkhang te ahi Pa KhamLian te&#8217; Digital Camera neukhat tawh video tomno &#8221; Ni bang tum lo mihing te&#8217; nu&#8217;n na &#8221; cih thulu tawh veng naupang te li leh nga kaikhawm in min 45 kim tangding asau movie tomnokhat ka bawlkhia uh hi. Video edit dan, export dan leh camera setting, video setting cihte theinailo kahih man in camera ka kawmna Pa KhamLian sang gampa&#8217; tapa UKhai kiang a sun azan tua video edit leh export ka bawl sak a, tua ka video khui uhpen ka veng uh Myoma Khuado Hall kim a om maingap zawdeuh teng kiang ah DVD khui ka zuak uh a, ka ngahsun sum uhtawh Mamee Chinsat peuh ka na ke lingleng zen uh hi. 2014 kum ciang in &#8221; Zuunni Zogam &#8221; cih thulu tawh ladawng 15 a kihel MV Album khat ka hawmkhia uh a, tuamun ah Pass Production Copyright kei mah in ka la hi. Hih Album sung ah Zomi Ironbird cih pasal no mithum ka movie masa ah zong hong kihel amau te zong lasaklam ah ka makaih khia hi. Pass Production cihtawh ka sepsawm masakpen Videography lam hizaw pian a, Siamnel lam tawh kisai sintheihna sang khat neizo ding cihzong ka ngimna hikawm pian hi. ( Tuni dong bel semzo naikeng ) Pass Production Photography lam ah ahih leh camera ka neihloh ban ah phone gina zong kanei kei a, Tang.Thang Sian Muan ( Ka beh leh ka neulawm in) ama zatlui Honor Phone khat hong pia in, tuatawh ka muh bangbang ka pumzaih gawpgawp hi. Passiography cih tawh Mobile Photography lam ka kipan a, ahih hang in ka khutma te ka deih bang zolo hi. Na kasep kawm in phone thak khat kei hanciam tawmtawh ka lei a tua phone Camera zong hoihzaw ahih man in ka lawm te&#8217;n nang phone tawh mann siang cihtawh a Story vuah a postding khop uh ka zaih kawmkawm in ka mannzaih sa te hoih in hoihta keileh Pass Production or Passtuang cih watermark or logo koihding cih ka khensat hi. Camera kawm in ka lawm te Prewedding leh mann tuamtuam te ka zaih a tua hunpan kipan in Pass Production mintawh deihtak Watermark zang khia in Page zong ka bawl hi. Tuapan in damdam in Pass Production ci in mi&#8217;n hong ki theih bawl a, ahizong in tua ka Production minsang in &#8221; Passtuang &#8221; ka mimal mi&#8217;n in hong kilim theihzaw hi ( tuni dong ). GZC Q2. Zomi pawi picing Zomi Namni/Khuado/Sialsawm etc te a manzaih dingin hong ki cial ngei na, minam dang ii pawi ( Festival ) picing te leh Cele, Model, Magazine minthang a ding na zaih sak ngei hiam? PT~ Zomi..etc&#8230; te ah zaihding in Official in hong kicial lian omlo hi. Pawlpi min leh kipawlna khatpeuh tang in bel zaihsak pawlkhat nei ingh. Atamzaw Solo Protaint, Event, Documentary, MV, Family Photo, Newborn Photo leh Birthday, Aniversary cihte kazaih tamzaw hi. GZC Q3. Zomi manzaih uk leh siam tampi tak a om tei hang nang zah in a Professional ding tawm, ka manzaih sa te koicih leng bit ding cih lungsim nei mel omlo, Hi ciang dong na tun theihna dingin haksat na phu kha hiam, kua in tha hong pia cih nong gen thei tam? Kei leh kei bel Professional in kimu nai kei ingh banghang hiam cihleh dotna 2na ah ka tangthu kong gen daudau sam hang hun sawtpi khatding mah Pasian&#8217; hongpiak hih ka talent pen ka mitcip sak kha hi.Tua ahih man in tuni dongmah tuibuak kik in, sinkawm zaihkawm cihbang in ka kalsuan hi. Tua bang hita semah leng GZC tanu te in ka mann zaihte mukha in na lung uh hong kimsak ahih khakman maw thei keng kei lel nong phawk khak uh Pasian&#8217; tung leh GZC tanu te&#8217; tung ka lungdam mahmah hi. Haksatna te : Theihthak khat nei in zaih sin nuam mah leng Camera leh supplies neilo ka hih man in Camera te kawm tawm in zaih cihdan in kalsuan ka hih na tawh mi&#8217; mai et mahmah zong hak satna khat mah ahi hi.A uk asiam sa te mahmah pawlkhat inzong amau&#8217; a dem bawlnuam hongsa ahitam hong ki pawlpih nuam bekthamlo van leh na khat hong kawm nuamlo mi pawlkhat zong om in, mipih te mahmah pawlkhat inzong tha hong pianuam lo ahih man in ka lung akiat hun tam mahmah hi. Tua bang hun ciangin ka thubul let Late23 in ka tha hong khauhsak kikzel hi. Sumlam tawh kisai hamsatna: Mann pong khat or video khatpeuh ka zaihding ciang Camera akipan van leh na a tuamtuam te kawm a zaih kahih man in Client te ahuam in sum theinkhat bang ka ngetna ah kei ading khat veivei tul 20000 &#8211; 30000 bangbek acian hun tampi om a, hunbeina leh datsi man tawh khat veivei hong ki zawi mel lo thei hi. A ban ah sumtawm bei nuam mann or video khat lah deih veve cihbang mi te in sum theinkhat ka ngetna ah 80000 bang bektawh hong dekthei zel uh a, amau lung gulhna hihsak zawhloh na leh man mawh na tawh kituak kha hi zenzen leng keisang sum tam ala zaw Kawlpi lam ah ahizong / midang te kiang zuan in ava kizaih uh ka muh ciang, na kasak ngeungau mahmah hun omthei zel hi. Sumtawm abeinuam tebek kei hongzuan cih khat veivei lungkiatna hong om zeuhzeuh thei zel hi. Tutung GZC in hih bang in nong pi bawlzah un kei ka hih na tualsung ah na gol zolo zong ka hi khading a, ahih kei leh ka mimal in hong ki neumuh na omzong hikha ding cih hamsatna tuamtuam te ka neitheizel mahmah hi. MV lamtawh kisai ah Project hong ki ap cil a kihona atuam, project man khitciang in atuam cih bang dan ka tuakna ban ah khat veivei Pasian&#8217; na nasepna cini hong ki cihziauhziauh leh mann video zaihsa sumpiakding hamsa hong sakik pawlkhat om ahih man in tualam ah zong ka lungsimpen a ngei abat kikpak nading hong hamsa mahmah hi. ( A nehno mikhat ka hihman hi ) Tha hongpia : Tha hongpia den pen ka thubul let LST mun 23 ahihi. Pasian&#8217; hongpiak ahihmah bang in ka lungkiatciang Pasian in akammal mah tawh tha hong pia kikhi. Tua ban ah muh theihloh ka sung a om ka Ukna leh ka innkuanpih te mahmah inzong tha hongpia uh hi. Ka big fan pen ka innkuan pih teng ahih man in ka lung kiat hamsa ka sak hun aom ciang LST sim thu ka nget khit ban ah amau te en in kei leh kei tha ka san toto kik zel hi. Ka pa in hibang a hong ki pahtawibawl ding lunggulh mahmah ahih man in kum khat bekbek hong dampih lai hi leh amahzong lungdamna khitui nul hamtang ding in ka um hi. Tua ban ah mimal in JuzzPiang Photography &#8211; Malaysia, amah pen ka inn gal vengte uh lah hi in, ka U khatzonglah ahihi. Mann lam tawh kisai ahizong, camera lamtawh kisai ahizong in ka telloh ka theihnop khatpeuh aom ciang apilna le asiamna te it sit hetlo in hong hilh hong makaih den in tha hong pia den a deihsakna tawh hong makaih mahmah khat ahi hi. Tha hongpiak na kam mal te sung pan &#8221; Ke&#8217;n basic pilna van leh na neikeng na cihsang in, ka neih bangbang tawh ka Creative idea te bangci lah khiatding cih ngaihsun zaw in &#8221; cih kammal in tuni dong tha hong piapia lai hi. GZC Q4. Nangmah bangin Zomi manzaih siam leh video zaih siam te na hanthot nop a omna, manzaih zia idea na muh suah thak na hop (share) nop khatpeuh ki ngah. PT~ Hanthotna: Photography Videography lam ah akipan cil te in kei zong MP4 tawh akipan khia ka hih man in, lungkia lotak in hong lak khia un! Hong semkhia un! Hong hanciam un! Na theihnop khatpeuh aomleh zong kei theihzah hong gending hi ingh cih hong hanthawn nuam ingh Ka hanciam nop leh ka lung gulh mahmah khat in Zomi te ih kam mal ciing ahi &#8221; Thu leh La &#8221; ahih man in, tu hunciang &#8221; Thu leh La&#8221; te muh theih, et theih, sim theih, ngaih theih hun hong hita ahih man in, Hih Digital Social Media hun ah &#8221; Zomi Siamnel Kipawlna &#8221; alianpi khat nei zo in ki hualkhawm leng nuam mahmah ding hi. Khangthak tampizong ki panpih theiding inzong lam en ingh Ka muh na te: Ukna anei mi khatpeuh ih pattah leh ih makaihding kisam sa mahmah ingh. Hih lam tawh kisai in bel kei tuak khak thu hong hawmsawn kik leng; MV Actor ka sepsakzel pawlkhat te in datsi manzong hong pia lo bek tham lo nik leh puan silh khat beek hong leisak ngam lo uh hi. Ka gen nopna in; ih uk leh ih sep pen bel atam man pikhat ahih na ziak in kei mahmah inzong mi pawlkhat huh ngen in kazaih zong om hi. Ahih hang in ahitheizah panpihna kapia hi. Tua in mikhat ki pahtawi na le man (value) ih ki neihsakna ahihi. Hongpaiding ih mailam hun ah hilam nasep asem Producer lam pan a hizong Client lam pan ih hizong Zomi Siamnel lam a uk ( la, movie&#8230;etc ) te in hun, sum zong ih piak ngam zekding kisam kasa mahmah hi. ( တန်ရာတန်​ကြေး) ih sup ngam ih piak ngam kei leh &#8221; Siamnel &#8221; tawh kisai atel cianlo ih hi khazaw ding a, mi khat ii ukna le ki vakna te man nei ih sakloh manzong hikhading hi. Hih ukna ah sum tawmbei ding ahih hang Quality hoihding cih ngaihsutna leh tua bang bek a ut ki tamlua kasa hi. Musician te a hizong Siamnel lam a uk, hih lam tawh kisai asemnuam khatpeuh in Quality ih deihzah in beiding akilawm na leh abeihuai te ah zong ih beingam ding kisam mahmah hihang. Client lampan inzong Cameraman khat in a suplawh or behind ah bang ci hamsatna leh ပေးဆက်မှု nei cih ih telsiamding kisam kasa mahmah hi. Mann pen zaih photphot cih bangdan ziau kingahlo ahih man in, mann kizaih nuam na pi in sum neilo ih hih leh ki huh nget bawlzaw leng nuamzaw hi cihzong kong behlap nuam hi cih atom in kei mimal muhna hong share kik nuam ingh (Azadah aomdingzong kei mimal muhna hi) Manzaih zia idea bel a hunhun in aki update leh trend zui a kizaih ahih man in hici leh hici zawdeuh leh cihbang ka gending tam ka thei kei hi. Keizong mailam ah Idea thak ahih loh hang tam akimu kha nailo kasawm khat in Minature photography hi. Hih lam a zaihsiam leh idea nei khangthak, mann azaih sate in zong hanciam ni cih hong hawmsawn nuam ingh. A tawpna ah Pasian&#8217; in hongpia in zong hong lakik ziau theih ahih man in ih siamna te khat kimciat kisakpih kha keini! GZC Q5. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam hun ah thu le laa khatpeuh ah ki khangto theiding? PT~ Mimal khat khensat na te ki thupi simsakna leh sangsiam theihna lungsim kinei kim leh hoihding in ka um hi. Ih Phualva pen Logo, puan leh vanzat te tungbek ah hilo in, ih lungtang sung ah zong omkim zoding hanciam ni. Minam vai ah ahizonh beh leh phung thu ah ahi zong akin zolo hi lam aki valo te khatpeuh inzong ih Zongeina te thupi lo ahih kei leh hih bang te thupi kei cihpen personal isuue in nei in hih ninam vai leh khua le tui vai akin leh thupi asa mi te langpang bawl keini. Ih Zongeina te akemcing nuam leh a zeksak te inzong tuabang thu leh la ah hong kinpih loh a uklo, aki valo te minam a itlo, khua leh tui a khual lo te cihdan &#8221; Ciap teh na &#8221; ki piapah ziauziau kei ni cih kei mimal muhna hi. Hih bang in ki telsiam na leh ki sangsiam na nei leng hanciam akul lo khangtohna ki neithei ding hi ka lam en hi. GZC Q6. Man/Video zaih ( Photography/Videography ) tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. PT~ Thu khupna ah ka motto ciding maw in Late 23 &#8221; Let&#8217;s Make Happy &#8221; ahih man in; ih nu&#8217;ntakna sung ah sihna lim guam ih nawkzel hang in lono na ah hong lumsak in hong makaih ding ih biak Pasian ih nai ah aom gige lam ki phawkni. Ih masuan khatpeuh bangzah tak in lungkiat huai in ih lungzing mah taleh na khempeuh a lungdam huai ding in ih hei theihding, ih kalsuan theihding ih nu&#8217;ntak hunsung hanciam in mi khatpeuh alungdam nading ih bawltheih keilehzong a nawngkaiding in ih om khakloh ding ih hanciam kawm in lungdamna thu sang lo in tangko keileng hih leitung ah ih nu&#8217;ntak sung ih sep khempeuh amawkna hiding a, van ah ih ki saktheih pih ding bangmah a omkei khading hi. Ih hih theihna te khempeuh Pasian&#8217; ading in ih kiphalzah tek zek khawm ni. Lungdam! Fashion Designer Monica Khawm
Minpi le beh : Monica Vung Khawm Niang Kham khua : Saalzaang, Tonzaang Township. Tulian omna : Kawlpi ( Kalay Myo ) Suahni : 24th Feb 1998 Lai Pilna : B.A (Eng) tawh sang man khin maw. Pianna Tuun leh Zua min : &#8211; Cecilia Vung Nuam Cing ( Nu ) &#8211; Peter Thang Hau Mang ( Pa ) Sanggam Laizom te min : &#8211; Unau Sang gam 5 pha ung kei pen a li na hing a min te uh bel hong gen kim nawn kei ning maw. Ukna (Hobbies): Reading, Gardening leh Watching movies. LST mun : Late 28:7 Topa, ka hatna le ka lum hi a, amah ka muang hi. Tua ahih manin kei hong kihuh a, lungdamin ka diang a, ka lasakna tawh ama tungah lungdamna ka ko hi. GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, Designer lam na kidiah zawh a sawt ta na. Bang in designer hong uk sak hiam? MK- A masa pen in kei pen fashion designer ka hih hang ko ZoZam team limtak a run zawh na ding in puan ka khui kei hi. Puan khui zong ka sin ngai kei hi. A hi hang kei pen kaneu pan puan khui tawh ong vaak ka nu leh ka pa khut pan khang khía ka hih man in puan khui dan, design suaih dan, fabric lam, color concept lam ka uk ma ma hi. Pasian ong piak thupha tawh bang dan design tawh bang dan color ki lawm ding. Bang dan fabric zang leng hoih pen ding cih ka telsiam a, ka neu pan nau milim puan te ka nu te ka pa te kiang dong aa khui in ka zuak ngại hi . Ong ki theih pan na pen tu aa ka page ZoZam pen ka run ciang ong ki thei hin ka page pen October, 2016 pan ka sang kah kawm a ka bawl hi. GZC Q2. Zomi pawi tuamtuam te ah Zolia, Zotaang kidemna te ah nangmah design sa puan te a kizang ngei hiam? Midang, namdang ta ding na bawl sak gei hiam? MK- Zomi pawi tuam tuam te ah zolia te aa ding a hi zong in, mipi te pawi a silh ding a hi zong in, lam na ah group a ding a hi zong in ong ki vai khak zel a pawi khawng ciang ka hih sak zel hi. Zo puan bek hi lo in kawl gam ah om ka hi manin kawl Acheik te, Batik cih dan te khawng zong ka bawl zel aa mo nu te, mo liah te, pawi sim ding te a ding in zong kawl puan tuam tuam zong ka bawl sak zel hi. GZC Q3. Kawlgam puan Company te a ding design na bawl sak gei hiam ? Fashion Designer khat nahih na ah haksatna na phu kha gei hiam? MK- Kawl gam puan company te a ding design bawl sak ngại nai kei ing. Mailan hun ciang sin to to, phụ to to ding in ka ki zop zawh nang hạnciam ciam ing. Fashion designer khat i hih leh fashion industry khat business khat i run leh tulai tak kawl gam ah a tamzaw in a tuak haksatna a masa pen leh a thu pi pen copyright hi. Tua thu kei thuak na tung tawn pan ong gen nuam pen ing. En design khat , collection khat pen i team tawh ki kum ngek ngek in kilung tuak a i bawl khiat ding pen a sum zong, a hun zong, i lungsim i tha tang zong tampi pi a ki pia khía a hi a, tua nung ah story te zong a omlai hi. Tua pen ong ki dawn vat sak a ong ki ngen lo a ong ki zat sak ciang ong kineu muh tawh ki bang ka sa a ka thuak lah ma ma hi. Tua copyright vai tawh zong kei lam pan limtak ka let zawh nang in a hanciam ciam lai hing. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah thu leh la khatpeuh a kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? MK- Zomi te pen a tamzaw ei leh ei a ki gen sia ih tam mahmah lai hi. Mi i et sang ei leh ei ki en masa leng, I khantoh nang lunggulh in nei zaw leng, Online ah zong a diak diak tulai khangnó pawl khat TikTok te en a i lam lam sang mipil misiam te follow bawl a inspiring hih thei leng, I om na tek ah mi dan thei siam a ki lawm a ki tuak a I gam tat, I kal suan theih nang hamciam leng, mi lampi phụk sa khat a baih sa a tawn lo ding in ei leh ei ii idea tawh phụ tang tang ding in creativity a hoih sem sem nang han ciam leng Gual zo a ki khang to ding hi cin ka um hi. GZC Q5. Fashion Design tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. MK- Fashion design tawh a kisai lo gen nop pen leitung ah a thu pi pen pilna leh a sia, a pha telsiam na hi. A diak diak in Khangno te ei uk na tawh kizui in pilna te zong a, sin a, siam ciat nín la i minam a khantoh nang in hạnciam ciat ni. Tu aa teng kei tel zah tawh kong gen khiat zo zah hin cei leh maw. Hi dan a thu ong dong a thu phulaak thei ding a ong vai hăwm sak GZC page tung ah zong lung dam mah mah ing. I vẹk pi in i bịak Topa pasian in thupha ong pia kim hẹn la mipi a dg, lei tung a ding mi manpha te ong suak sak ta hẹn cin thu ong nget sak ing. Lung dam. GZC Tanute: Manlah, buai pipi mahtawh na hun manpha hong khenkhia teta nahih manin nang sangsang in koh lungdam zaw ung. Mailam ah nasinna, nasep, na kalsuanna ding te ah hong lamzang toto lai in maw.
Maanzaih Siam Kim Mang (Ever Zomi)
Min pi leh beh: Gin Kim Mang ( Ever Zomi ) Beh : Buansing Kham khua: Heilei Khua Suahni : October 29, 1992 Lai Pilna : B.A (English) Pianna Tuun leh Zua min: &#8211; Ngun Dong ( Nu ) &#8211; Dai Lian Kap ( Pa ) Pianpih laizom te min: -Tg. Bawi Lian Khup -Tg. Thang Hau Lian Kim -Tg. Luan Za Mung Ukna (Hobbies): Manzaih/Video zaih, Graphic Design, khualzin LST Mun: Paunak 16:3 Na geelnate khempeuh Topa ap in; tua hileh na geelna bangin tangtung ding hi. GZC Q1. Manzaih lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Bang in hong uksak hiam, EverZomi Photography koi dan a hong piang khia cih nong gen thei ding hiam? KM- 2014 Kum ka birthday ah ka Nu leh Pa in Nikon DSLR Camera khat hong leisak uh in tua camera tawh Zogam mun tuamtuam ka paipai na ah Zogam hoihna limlakte ka zaih kawikawi na pan Manzaih(Photography) lungno a vei toto in kithei ing. Ever Zomi cih pen ka college kum khatna 2009 kum Graphic Design lam uk ka hih manin ka design bawlte ah suan dingin kei leh kei ka kipiak tawm minsel hin, Manzaih lam ka uk toh ciang zong tua minsel mah a zangto suak hing. GZC Q2. Zomi pawi picing Zomi Namni/Khuado/Sialsawm etc te a manzaih dingin hong ki cial ngei na, minam dang ii pawi ( Festival ) picing te leh Cele, Model, Magazine minthang a ding na zaih sak ngei hiam? KM- Zomi Nam Ni, Khuado Pawipi, State level Khuado Pawipi cihte a tam zaw kuama cialloh ka ukna tawh kizui in zaih zel ing. 2019 Kum April 25-26 ni Kale Khuapi, ZBCM huang sungah akibawl A 3 veina Zomi Guitar Festival ah manzaih dingin ka lawm Abraham Kim tawh vaisai ten hong cial ngei uh hi. Tu ciangciang minam dang te pawi bel ka zaihsak om nai kei. 2019 Kum March 16-17 ni Yangon Khuapi, Myanmar Covention Center ah a kibawl Chin State Investment And Product Fair ah ka manzaihte pawlkhat lahna hong neihsak uh hi. Tua lo Zingsol Magazine leh Zomi Siamsin Magazine cihte ah zong ka manzaihte Cover dingin hong zatsak ngei hi. Myanmar gambup media minthang 7DayNews Journal , The Voice, Eleven Media, The Sun Rays leh printed media pawlkhat ah zong Photo News dingin hong zatsak ngei uh hi. GZC Q3. Zomi manzaih uk leh siam tampi tak a om tei hang a Professional ding tawm, ka manzaih sa te koicih leng bit ding, logo koih ham tang ning cih lungsim nei mel omlo, a mawk zaihzaih pong ki tam, Hi ciang dong na tun theihna dingin haksat na phu kha hiam, kua in tha hong pia cih nong gen thei tam? KM- I manzaih sa limlakte ahih theih nakleh logo suang hamtang zo leng 100% bit inteh i cih ngam samloh hang a zaih/limlak neite lam pan i kidaltheihna lian pen hiding in um ing. Khat veivei phone tawh i zaih ziauh pawlkhat i manlang nop ciang logo suan ding i mangngilh hun aih kei leh i thadah hun zong om thei mah ei. Haksatna tampite lakah manzaih lam i uk ciang camera cih bek tawh hong kingah nawnlo lens tuamtuam a tom/a sau, Tripod, SD Card, Filter, Camera Bag, Edit nading computer cihte a kipan a kisam na tam lua mahmah. Kei bang Manzaih(Photography) sung pan Landscape Photography lam uk phadiak ka hih manin tua view tuamtuam zaih bek tawh lah a tunga i deih/i kisapte ki neizo lo ding dinmun hi. Tua hin 2017 Kum pan sum tawh a kicial Prewedding zaih lam zong na thuahto ing. Deih/kisap khempeuh i lei zawh pah loh hang nak dan tawm hong nuamzaw deuh hi. Man hoihtak zaih theih nang a kisam van leh na, sum leh paai a kipan na khempeuh hong panpih tha hong pia pen ka nungah ka innkuanpihte hi. Tedim Khuapi ah manzaih ka uk pih ka lawm Abraham Kim, Thaw Thawn leh VK Mung te in zong manzaih tawh kisai theihloh/theihnopte zong/kikum khawm zel ka hih manun ka theihna hong khang sak mahmah banah amaute panpihna tampi zong kihel hi. GZC Q4. Nangmah bangin Zomi manzaih siam leh video zaih siam te na hanthot nop a omna, manzaih zia idea na muh suah thak na hop (share) nop khatpeuh ki ngah. KM- Camera hoih/van hoih neileng bek limlak hoih akingah pah hi tuan loin camera nunga minu/mipa(behind the camera) ii siamna(skill) tungah kinga zaw hi. Camera hoih/van hoih i neih pah nailoh hang lungkia lo in i neih bangbang tawh a hoih pen a zaih theih sawm ding cih kei mimal muhzia hi. I uk takpi ahih nakleh i sinna khawl bawl lo a, a thakthak sinin ki update toto ni. GZC Q5. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam hun ah thu le laa khatpeuh ah ki khangto theiding? KM- Mimal khat ciatin khantoh nopna lungsim nei photphot leng a bucing in ki khangto in um ing ei. GZC Q6. Man/Video zaih ( Photography/Videography ) tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. KM- GZC tanute tungah lungdam mahmah ing. GZC Dam sawt hen&#8230;! GZC Tanute: Manlah, buai pipi mahtawh na hun manpha hong khenkhia teta nahih manin nang sangsang in koh lungdam zaw ung. Mailam ah nasinna, nasep, na kalsuanna ding te ah hong lamzang toto lai in maw.
Taekwondo siam Nau Sing
Minpi: Khup Suan Sing Gualnam @ NauSing Pianna leh khankhiat na: Kahgen khua, Tedim ah khangkhia. Pilna (laitan): Tedim sangpi ah kah, Tan10 ciang bek kah in phi kha lo aa khawl kha. Pian/suah kum : 1995 ( Tun kum 27 phata ). Pianna Tuun leh Zua min: &#8211; Niang Khan Vung &#8211; Khen Khan Nang (Gualnam) Pianpih laizom te min: Ko Unau 8 pha , Pasal 5 leh numei 3 lak ah kei a Nautum nihna. Ukna ( Hobbies ): Guitar/ Ball/ Lasak/ Sabeng. LST mun: Paunak 3:5 &#8211; Na lungsim khempeuh tawh Topa muang inla, nang’ theihna suang kei in. GZC Q1. Martial Arts (TKD) kum bangzah na phak pan sin in ki pan na hia&#8221; na Master te kua te koi khua ah Training cih nong gen thei ding hiam? NS- Taekwondo siamna ka sin na munpen mun nih hi in 1na ah ka U pi nihna Philip Mang Lam Pau (Taekwondo 1stDan) in tan3 ka kah aa kipan ka tan10 dong ong hilh to in a kum in gen ding cileng kum7val . Nihna ah Yangon Taekwondo Club)(YTC) Master Soe Moe Lwin kiang ah Black Belt (1stDan) ka ngah dong sin in 2ndDan zong test khin in tulaitak 2nd Dan certificate ka ngak laitak hi . GZC Q2. Taekwondo sang hong cih zong na za ungh. Koi khua ah sang hong? NS- Taekwondo sang pen Kawlpi ah hong ing. sangmin pen &#8220;Kalay myo Taekwondo Club ( KTC) cih min tawh Martial Arts sang inn na hong ing .. GZC Q3. Taekwondo Martial Arts sang na hon na-hang leh na ngimna tawm nong gen thei tam? NS- Hi hong gen thei mah ning. Ka ngimna om mah ei&#8221; No.1 na ah, Tu hun ciang ei zomi sungah Exercise bawl aa Martial Arts ki sin ki tam nai het lo hi, Hih siamna te sin in siam mahmah leng guihtheih, khamtheih ki zang nuam nonlo in ei leh ei Self Defence na dingin a hoih mahmah khat hi. No. 2 na ah, Mai lam ah &#8220;ei zomi te sung ah Taekwondo siam tampi ong kibeh lap in siamna siam tampi i om ding pen ka lunggulh hi. Siam na nei leng&#8217; mi hehpih na-itna ki nei zaw a hih man in khangno ten sin huai mahmah hi. No. 3 na ah, Khangno te a mau leh a mau kimuanngamna nei in amau leh amau a kikep kidal zawh na ding (adiak in numei te) ki sam zaw lai hi. GZC Q4. Zomi sungah Martial Arts siam lakpan sia (sifu) na theih khak a om hiam, nong gen thei tam? NS- Om mah ei, Ka zahtak mahmah leh ka et teh mahmah a hi. (1) The first Zomi Kungfu Action movie Director a hi , Master Laizom Kampu Tulsa USA. (2) Khai Za Siam @ KhaiBoih (Taekwondo) Myanmar player Exile movie Actor). (3) Philip Mang Lam Pau (Taekwondo 1stDan ) ka Master taktak cileng ki khial lo ding.. Tualo a dang ka lawh vat theihloh dang tampi te zong zahtak mah mah ing . GZC Q5. Taekwondo kitupna / kidemna khong na kihel ngei hiam? NS- Taekwondo kidemna pen Club leh club kidemna te ah kei level/ kei weight ah bel a khatna la den zaw ing Chin State min tawh Naypyidaw ah ka kidemna ah bel khatna la zo keng, GZC Q6. Na lunggulh ngiat teng nonggen thei ding hiam? NS- Ukna ka hauh lak ah a lian nih nei ing. 1. Taekwondo 2. Zomi Movie zaih ding 3. Taekwondo sang hongding. NAU SING cih Facebook page 3-leh Nau Sing official cih YouTube channel nei ing GZC Q7. Mai lam Future plan geel kholhna na nei hiam? NS- Future plan ah: 1.Taekwondo sang minthang suaksak zawh na ding. 2.Famous contents creator khat suak in YouTube, Facebook page leh social media platform tuamtuam pan income hoih neih zawh na ding. 3. Action actor khat suak in USA-ISTAR video production ,THANG MUNG FLIM te tawh movie kizaih zawh na ding hanciam nuam ing. GZC Q8. Zomi zogam hoih na ding in bang ki sam nasa pen aa?? NS- Ei zomi te ih khangtoh theih na ding in&#8217; ki pumkhat photphot in IT na ki khah khia zo leng hong nuam mahmah ding hi. Zomi te ki pumkhat na ding in online pan fake account zangh in minam a khenkham online zuaukhem tampi te thugen umlo in thuman a thei nuam ten a pualam ah kan tel in hileng kisiatna tampi omlo tuam ding hi. Lungdam. GZC Tanute: Manlah, buai pipi mahtawh na hun manpha hong khenkhia teta nahih manin nang sangsang in koh lungdam zaw ung. Zomi lasiam Siamah DS Cingpi

Khat le khat i background leh i hihna kibanglo in kitelkhialhna tamthei cih ka tuahkhak thu tungtawng in hong gen ing. Lungdam. Lai Siangtho bulphuh:- Mark 10:27 Jesuh in amaute enin, “Mihingte adingin hi zo lo mah hi; ahi zongin Pasian adingin ahi mawh thu hi lo hi; Pasian adingin na khempeuh hithei hi,” a ci hi. GZC Q1. Lasak, la taih ( practice ) sung hita leh stage tung haksat na tuak gei hiam? Sm CS. Tha ong pia leh ong pahtah:- ka Pa in ong pantahin ka Nu in thu ong nget sak den. Stage tung ah haksat na bel van ( sound system ) te a lem mel loh ciang cih loh haksat na om kei. GZC Q3. La na phuak, nagelh gei hiam, Na music/laphuah/na lasak lakpan hoih nasak pen in bang la? Mailam hun ah Zomi te koici kalsuan leng music sung hita leh ih minam sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? Sm CS. Music sung leh minam sung ah ki pum khat na ding bel :- Pasian zahtak in khat leh khat kitel siamna ki thu mang diamdiamna, ki niamkhiatna, itna taktak anei te sungah khantoh na omhi ci in mu ing. Limlak/kineih siam Ciciin
Minpi le beh : Cing Sian Ciin Hatlang Kham khua : Muizawl Tulian omna : Tulsa, OK Suahni : October 21 Lai Pilna : Bachelor of Science in Business Administration (Management) Pianna Tuun leh Zua min: &#8211; Vung Suan Lun ( Nu ) &#8211; Nung Lian Thang ( Pa ) Sanggam Laizom te min: -Haw Hawm -Di Dim -Esther Siam Innkuanpa min: Ngin Sian Mung Sukte Pasian piak tano : Cing Sian Hung Ukna (Hobbies): Lam, Lasak, Moh Bawl (Baking) LST Mun: John 14:1 (English version in ong su kha phadiak) GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, Zomi movie, short movie maw khatpeuh ah na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Bangin hong uk sak, cih nong genthei ding hiam? CC- Zomi movie ah ka kihel tuma kum 4 lai hi. Kineih lam bel uk lua lo. Aih hang ka neulai movie te dan aa kei guak kineih thei zel. Kap dan khawng ki sin sin. A uk dan ka hia le ci aa ki dong ing. GZC Q2. Zomi sungah kineihsiam/limlak siam mikang movie dong ah kihel thei le Zomi lasiam mangla, kawlla siamtak a sa thei ih neih na angtang hiam? CC- Ang tang mah mah ing. Khangthak ah tampi ong ki behlap lai ding zong ka lunggulh ngiat hi. GZC Q3. Movie bangzah ah kihel kha, movie shooting ciang haksatna na tuak gei hiam? CC- Movie pen SiaDoKhup’ “SIANMANG HAWMTEL” ah ki hel kha ing. Tua zong Pasian Maipha hang hi. Movie zaih teh hak sat na tampi mu ing. Tua khit aa ki pan Movie ka et sim a sem te tel siam ngiat ing. Nai 2 sung khawng i et theih na ding a gim a tawl tam mah mah om hi. Ko ki zaih lai bang vuk ah kizaih pen minutes tom no ahih hang ka zaih un khuadam mah mah hi. Kei khuadam sa pha diak kaih ciang aa ling gawp ing. Tua te zong bel အမှတ်တရ khat hi. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah movie hita leh music sungah kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? CC- I khangto na ding Zomi te ki panpih ngiat ding ki sam sa ing. A siam te lam to ding. I siam na a tuam tek Topa ong piak hi in a kisam bang bang in ki pan pih ngiat le hang kipum khat in khangto ding hi hang. GZC Q5. Movie tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. CC- Hih bangin nong interview na hangin lung dam ing. Hih lai ong sim sak peuh tung ah tung lung dam ing. Tha kong piak nop khat pen bang bang i sep na ah Topa ap ni. Movie ah Cingno mun ka ngah na zong Topa maipha hang hi. Mi dang a hoih tam pi om, a siam tam pi om. Ahi zong Topa’n kei ong tel cih pen kei aa ding thupha tak tak hi. Topa minthang sem sem ta hen! Fashion Designer Doe Dongh
Minpi le beh- Sian Khan Dongh / Phiamphu (Min neu Doe Dongh) Kham khua: Kapteel, Chin State, Myanmar Tulian omna: Yangon, Myanmar Suahni: 25, Jan, 1985 Lai Pilna: Bachelor of Business Administration Pianna Tuun leh Zua min: &#8211; Cing Man Niang (Nu) &#8211; Paam Za Nang (Pa) Sanggam Laizom te min: -Awi Lian Vung -Zam Deih Piang -Pau Khan Mang -Do Zam Cin Ukna (Hobbies): Travel, Video edit Leh MV Director LST Mun : Jeremiah 33:3 GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, Designer lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Bang in designer hong uk sak hiam? Doe Dongh- Designer lam ah ka ki diah zawh tu’n kum 9 bang cing zo ta. Ka neu lai in ka nu in puan khui tawh hong pan tah to a hih man in, Ka nu’ hong gamh piak hi ci-in na sang ing. GZC Q2. Doe Dongh- Zomi te’ pawi lian pi ih neih a hi KHUADOPAWI, SIALSAWM, TANGHMAI PAWI LEH ZOMINAMNI cih te’ ah silh ding hong ki vai khak leh tha hong ki pia tek bek tham lo in, Zolia, Zotaang ki dem na a hi zong in, MC sem te’ a hih zong in, Pan mun ma kai te ding a hih zong in, Musician leh singer te’ in zong hong silh leh tha hong pia uh hi. GZC Q3. Puan Company te a ding design na bawl sak gei hiam? Fashion Designer khat nahih na ah tuciang ciang haksatna na tuak gei hiam? Puan hong ki order in sum hong ki pia lo leh puan hong ki la lo cih te’ ah haksa ka sak mah mah hi. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah thu leh la khatpeuh a kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? Doe Dongh- Zomi te’ khat leh khat ki pan pih leh tha ki pia ciat leng, kipum khat in ih khan toh ding lam en ing. GZC Q5. Fashion Design tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. Doe Dongh- Zomi te’ ih khangtoh theih na ding ka lunggulh hong gen ning. Ih movie neih te’ sung ah ki neih siam te’ “Academy award” cih dan pia zo leng hoih sa ing. (a ki pia khin zong om, zom to zo lai leng lunggulh lai ing) Bang hang hiam cih leh pahtawi na ih piak ciang in khangno te’n mai lam ah movie tam pi pi ki zaih toto zawh nang han ciam na leh lunggulhna hong nei ding un lamen ing. Tua ban ah Musician lam zong “Award” pia zo leng ut lai ing. Gentehna in- Khaudopawi or ZOMINAMNi cih te’ ah “Singer Award” leh “Music Award” cih dan in pia leng khangthak tampi in phat tuam na ih ngah ding in lamen ing. (a ki pia sa zong om, zom to to lai leng lunggulh ing) Lungdam GZC Tangbang dam sawt hen !!!! Pasian hong piak tanu 2 le tapa 1 nei ung GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, lasak le music lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Album/Mv bangzah bawlkhin, Nong genthei ding hiam? Pasian min phat a lungsim khempeuh pia a Pasian biak thupi ka sak penpen a hihi. Tuni dong Khamtung ih Gam leh zang gam ah gospel ka pai zelzel hi. Pasian min phat na la te phuak in sa in USA, Australia, Europe gam, Malaysia, India gam dang te ah ka zin kawi kawi hi. La ka phuah pen a dawng pha zah sim ngei lian keng. GZC Q2. Movie Director Thang Mung
Minpi le beh: Thang Sut Mung, Hatzaw Kham khua: New Darkhai Tulian omna: Lansing, Michigan Suah kum: 1992 Lai Pilna : B.Th, Associate Degree in applied Science, Digital Media Specialist Pianna Tuun leh Zua min: &#8211; Dim Cin Niang ( Nu ) &#8211; Rev. Dr. Peter Khen Laizom sanggam te min: Nu. Cing Hoih Zo Nu. Dim Muan Lun Swanson Pa. Nang Sawm Deih Tuang Tg. Paul Sian Sang Lia. Ciin Sian Mawi Tg. Kap Sian Zo Tg. Thang Sian Lian Ukna (Hobbies): Limlak bawlna (Filmmaking), Tukpeng suihna (soccer), Guitar tum leh lasak. LST Mun : Late 91 GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, Movie Director, Executive Producer le movie tawh a ki nahvawh limlim lam nong kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Bang in movie/film lam hong uksak hiam? TM- Kei pen kaneu lai Yangon, Mingalardong ah Mission semin kapa in hongom pih laitak in movie uk mahmah khat kahih manin. hunawng kaneih sunsun niangtui saiah movie etna in hunka beihi Sum neihloh banah, kawlgam haksat na dinmun panin, movie bawlding cihpen sunmang, zanmang nangawna in matngamlo, kawmkal ah gamsung buaina tuamtuam hangin USA ah refugee tungtawn Topan ong tunpih hi. India ah Laisiangtho sang kum nih kazawhkhit ciangin, Apostolic Biblical Theological Seminary (ABTS) ah ( B.Th) degree ngahin USA ka tunkhit ciang hotel room hahding, Ramada Inn ah nasep kaki pat masak napen mun ahihi. Kum 18 kakum cingkhin tain mangpau manglai siamlo, tuaban ah unau nih leh thum Topa in hong pia in, ukna veina te kasinnop kazonnop hangin, full-time tawh nasep leh, innkuan et leh, pilna zonding zom mengmeng zolo in ka om hi. A hih hang kapa in tha hongpia in ESL pen Lansing Community College ah hong kahsak laitak in Indianapolis ah Mission vai tawh kapa in tawmvei sung hong ompih a, Amazon warehouse ah sum thalawh in, ka inn kuan pih ka vak hi. Indianapolis Amazon ah na kasep theih nading GED kasin khitteh, Diploma ngah ing. Inn kuan van kawm enkawm leh, Lansing City, aom Anneli tawh kingai in, Topa thupha tawh 2013 kum in pumkhat suahna kanei uha, tapa KHEN ZA KHUP leh tanu NIIANG SAN KIM tanih kanei uhhi. Kapa in, Mission nasep kum hongcing leh, Lansing City ah kituah kik nuamding ihih teh Lansing ah, nazi tawh naom khol unla kozong hongdam paiding hiungh hongcih ciangin Lasing ah 2013 kum in kazuan kik hi. Kazi tawh Refugee Development Center ah kasem khawm uha, interpreter nasep semin, Refugee Development Center ah seasonal position dinmun ah Topa thupha tawh katungsiahte pahtaak naleh deihsak natawh, full-time employee leh Interpreter coordinator position panmun, khathum sungin hongpia uhhi. Refugee zum ah nasem kawm, sangkah kawm, inn vai vankawm buaina leh haksat na in hong vuk ahih manin huisan hun hongtam mahmah, haksa vangik puakawm sain khitui muallaam hun zong hongom hi. Haksat nate hong kithuap luatteh fulltime in, sangkahzo lo kahih manin kumnih sunga, sang kaman zawhding kumli sung sang kakah kha hi. Sang kaman ding ciangin, kasang aten internship nasem ding hongci uha, News 6 ah internship nasep ngah in, Internship pan company tuamtuam te a ding commercial bawlna lamah nasep lianpi Topa in hong semsak hi. Tua kawm kalah kanasep na Refugee Development Center hongkhang to semsem in, City of Lansing, Federal School Impact Grants, leh DHS Health Department te tawh na semkhawm in tutorial videos tampi produce thei ahih manin nasep hongtam mahmah a, project teng khem peuh ading zong vaihawm in, producer, creative content director, leh editor lamah avek piin kasem hi. Ni khat, sang zom zawding maw movie lam zuisuak zawding cih khentat theilo, kaom laitak in homeground te tawh thu kanget khopuh leh, Sangvai pen Cybersecurity kahnuam si, ahih hang lah video bawl, kauk penlah kalung simsung ah thaamden den. Nitak khat hunla in thu kanget leh movie bawlding Topa tungah awkhat kazak pen kahih theihzah tawpa sem nai loin plan B computer lam paiding cihpen haivai, Plan A hanciam photin cih Khasiangtho in kathunget pih homegroup te tungtawn pan movie bawlding khentat in cih kangah ciangin, SIN LAI GUH LING BANG DO cih movie bawlkhia in, Pasian hong deihsak na om hiding hiven mipi ten hongdeih sakin thahongpia uh ahih manin, EXILE ZOMI movie nihna ciangdong release theiding in Topa in alimci lawhcin namual hongsuah pih ta hi. GZC Q2. Zomi movie bangzah bawl khin, midang, namdang ta kigawm in bangzah. Namdang ta ding Director/Producer nasem gei hiam? TM- Directing leh producing lamtawh kisai bel ka nasep na REFUGEE DEVELOPMENT CENTER, FEDERAL SCHOOL IMPACT GRANTS, CITY of LANSING, leh DHS HEALTH and HUMAN SERVICES te kipawl natawh video tamveipi kabawl khiakhin zouh a, Narrative short film projects zong tampi tak kabawl zokhin hi. Tua ahih manin feature length film lian pen SIN LAI GUH LING BANG DO leh EXILE Pasian in thupha hongpiak na tungtawn in,mailam ah feature length film bekbek bawlsuak ding kasawm hi. GZC Q3. Hiciang na tun na dingin hamsatna le haksatna bangzah vei tuak gei? Mikang te lak a kihel Zomi limcing/kineihsiam ineih khak na angtang hiam? TM- Haksat na tampi katuak na sungah mangpau,manglai kasiamloh man in katheih dingzah, ka muh dingzah, thei kha lo, mukhalo haksatna, Sang kakah ciang,Zi leh ta family life leh nasep na balance naah zong haksat na tuakkha ing. Hollywood te tawh kidem ding cihpen million dollar budget kizeek zo nailo ahih manin,depression lutna tampi ommah taleh, ka nasep nalui pan aa ka leadership experience, a hi zong frugal/indie production experience te leh akua maciat hong thunget pihna tungtawn a lawhcing kahihi. A masa in ka feature length film masa pen SIN LAI GUH LING BANG DO movie ahih manin kipak mahmah leh ki angtang sak mahmah ing. Kalawm te pawlkhat in 56 million (Kawlte) market a ding banghang hihsawm zawlo nahi hiam cih dotna khawng hongnei hi. Zomi te kaitna leh kavei na tawh ZOMI movie mah hih masa nuaming ciin,executive decision kahih na tawh, ZOMI limcing/kineihsiam,mikang ten muhnop asak, lamdang asak etlawm asak nate uh kangaih sut ciangin, angtang kisa mahmah ing. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah movie hita leh music lam kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? TM- Kumpi za leh Siampi zangah ZOMI pilte ihihi, Thupha ngah ZOMI te ihih man in,Pasian leh ZOMI makai te tungah thupha ngenleng ZOMI te khantoh na hong kizom suakding hi GZC Q5. Movie tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. Kagen pakding theikeng. Hih danaa nong thapiak naleh nong lunggulh nauh, angtang kisa mah mah ing KA THU KHUP NA : 1. Kapu in Van leh Lei kikal aom Khuapi te luahding in thupha hongpiak,alaitah na kammal ahihi 2. Siampi,Kumpi zangah a mi makai suakding kapa hong thupha piakna ahihi 3. Keima nuntaakna sungah aom ngeilo omsak ding ka nasep ahihi Kipat ngam sepngam na in lawhcin na hongpia hi. Tha hongpia GZC | Zompiedia leh mimal khempeuh tungah lungdam mahmah ing. GZC Tanute: Manlah, buai kawmkawm pi mahtawh na hun manpha hong khenkhia teta nahih manin nang sangsang in koh lungdam zaw ung. Mailam ah nasinna, nasep, na kalsuanna ding te ah hong lamzang toto in maw. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Kineihsiam Sm. Lu Lun (Cingno)
Amah pen Zomi limlak/limcing/kineihsiam ih neih te lakpan a minthang vangvang Cingno ci a kithei &#8221; Ngaih ang lai ah&#8221; leh &#8220;Ngaih ang lai mah&#8221; kah limlak siam Sm. Lu Lun hi. Min pi: Go Deih Lun(Hatzaw) Kham khua: Mualpi Tulai tak omna: Zangkong Suahni: 17-1-1980 Lai pilna: Tansawm ong Tuun le Zua min: &#8211; Zir Mawii ( Nu ) &#8211; Khup Suan Gin ( Pa ) Pian pih sang gam te: 1.Zam Sian Thang 2.Lal Vul Liani, 3.Za Hlei Thanga 4.Nang Van Lian 5.Niang Deih Huai Ukna (Hobbies): Lasak leh limlak LST mun: Psalms (103) bup GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, Zomi movie lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Movie bangzah ah kihel kha le bangzah bawl khin, Nong genthei ding hiam? DL- Movie ki zaih zawh ong sawtpian tamah ei,(2003) kum hi.Movie nih ah ki helkha ing.&#8221;Ngaih ang lai ah&#8221; leh &#8220;Ngaih ang lai mah&#8221; cihte hi. GZC Q2. Zomi sungah nangmah bangin mikang te movie ah kihel thei le Zomi lasiam mangla, kawlla siamtak a sa thei ih neih na angtang hiam? DL- Angtan huai sa mahmah ing. GZC Q3. Movie script nang ii idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na movie shooting ciang haksatna na tuak gei hiam? DL- Movie script gelh ngei keng. Movie kizaih ciang hatsat nate pen ka khatvei sepna ahih ciang in,midan in kisin khawlhna cihbang omlo ahih man in atungteng pen baih keimah ei. A hih hang kasep kawmkawm in Topa&#8217;n siamna hongpia hi leh kilawm sa ing. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah movie hita leh music sungah kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? DL- Amasa pen in ngimna leh veina cihte kisam sa masa sapen ing,tua khit ciang khat leh khat itna leh deihsak na tawh lung kituak in mapang Khawm thei hileng khangto lua ding hi hang. GZC Q5. Movie tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. DL- Zomi te pen mi namdang te tawh teh na in namneu ibat hang,anungta Pasian bia te ihih man in koikoi ah i om zong in Topa&#8217;n alam dang in alap sangte leh Pasian maipha amu te ihi lam pen namdang te in zong hong tel mahmah ta uh hi. Tua ahih man in i hamphat na te Mang ngilh kei ni, ki it diam diam ni SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Lasiam JK Sang
Minpi- Pau Sawm Sang Jasuan (Kawng) Kham khua &#8211; Ngente Tulian om na &#8211; Kei Lian bel tun Yangon ah om ing, Nu leh pa te bel khua ah (Saw Bwa Ye Shin ) ah om uh. Suah ni &#8211; 25.3.1990 Lai pil na &#8211; kumpi ဘွဲ့ ( BA) major bel (Psychology and social behaviour) Pianna tuun leh zua min: &#8211; Nu Cing Khen Dim (Nu) &#8211; Khual Za Lian (Pa) Sanggam lai zom te min: 1. Ka u pi pa (Rev . Pau Thawn Dal) 2. Ka u nu min ( Chung lian mawi) 3 kei bel aneu pen hing Uk na : La sak, Singsuih nasep, kimawl na le movies et. LST mun: Late 33:4 GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, lasak le music lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Album/Mv bangzah bawlkhin, Nong genthei ding hiam? JS- Music leh Lalam ka ki pat bel 2009 pawl pan hi. Kum 13 kiim hi ta aki pat zawh Album lian in bel ( Album 3 na thoh in ) 1. ကျွန်​တော်ချစ်တဲ့သူမှာချစ်သူရှိတယ်(1 album) 2. Coming Home (2 album) 3. NANG BEK (3 ALBUM) 3 bel zola hi Ka thoh sa MV pen 23 kim hin teh GZC Q2. Zomi sung mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? JS- Zomi ka hih angtang mah mah ing GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang ii idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na music/laphuah/na lasak lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? JS- Ka la te kei sak lim lim bel music note bel kei thoh himah kei deih dan a (arrangement ) ka hih hi. Tulai tak ka la lak ah bel mi pii in zong ong nget theih zel (လူ​ဟောင်းကြီး) la kei zong na sasa ing Tuu sung. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? JS- Zomi te ki gen siasia lo in tha ki pia leng Ih sang gam kachin te bang amau kachin la bek Sa in nungta ရုပ်တည် zo mawk uh hi. Ei zola lian bek sak tawh ei pen ki ရုပ်တည် zotam, cih zong ka lungsim ah om peuh mah. Kei produce la te ki sap na tam pi om ding a Ka late hoihloh na cinloh na a om leh zong Kei ma ki cinloh na hang ahih manin mipih ten ong telsiam in tha nong piak veve na dingun ong thum nuam ing. GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. JS- Tua dan om tuan kei, Lungdam Topa thupha GZC Tanute: Manlah, buai pipi mahtawh na hun hong pia nahih manin koh lungdam zaw ung. Mailam ah nasep, na kalsuanna ding te ah hong lamzang toto in maw. Pu En Khan Nang
Min pi: Pu En Khan Nang Beh min: Nau Lak Khua: Ngawsing khua Tu Lian omna: Tulsa Oklahoma Suah ni- 01/08/1947 Lai pil na- Tan 10 ong Tuun le Zua min: &#8211; Suan Za Cing ( Nu ) &#8211; Son Za Lang ( Pa ) Sang gam lai zom te min: 1. En Za Vung 2. Dim Ngaih Cing 3. Dai Khan Mung 4. Niang Ngaih Lun 5. Gin Do Kham 6. Nang Suan Gin Ukna- Music LST mun: Late 150:6 &#8211; Husang thei khempeuh in, Topa phat un. Topa phat un. GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, lasak le music lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Album/Mv bangzah bawlkhin, Nong genthei ding hiam? EN- Kum 12 ka phak a ka la phuah tawh Phaiza khua lakidem na ah Nguasing khua in a 1 na ngah ngei ung. Tua ci leng ka neu tung pan a Music a uk hi ing ei. GZC Q2. Zomi sung mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? EN- Ang tang mah ing. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang ii idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na music/laphuah/na lasak lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? EN- Ka tang val lai Tahan khua a Tonic solfa leh Lung tui ( staff notes) School pan degree ngah ngei ing. Tua School pen Gam dang te hon hi. Tahan tui phum ah sau vei sim sim la ma kai sem ngei ing. Ka tun tun na ah Tonic solfa leh lung tui zong hilh thei zelzel ing. La phuah te hoih sa kim ing. Show bawl ngei keng. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? EN- Ih vek a hanciam ding kisam sa lai ing ei. GZC Q5. Music lam leh gam vai te ah a kua mah ciat in Pasian mah number 1 ah koih kawm in ham ciam tek leng ci ing ei. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Lasiam madawk Sia Mungtawng
Min pi: Khup Sian Mung Buan Sing (Mung Tawng) Kham khua: Khaw bem Suah ni: Aug-15-1957 Pil na: Tan(10) Tulian omna: Tulsa-USA Pianna Tuun le Zua min: &#8211; Niang En Cing ( Nu ) &#8211; Tual Cin ( Pa ) Sanggam teng -Gin Khan Kap -Cin Lam Thawn -Langh Khan Kim -Huai Man Niang -Niang Khan Lun -Lian Ngaih Mang Zi le Ta: 1981 kum in ပန်းချီကျော်ကျော်ဥိး U nu Ciin Nuam Cing tawh pumkhat suakin Pasian hong piak tapa 1 le tanu 3 nei ing: 1.Cing Sian Lun ( tanu ) 2.Cin Lam Tuang ( tapa ) 3.Vung Tawi Lian ( tanu ) 4.Cing Ngaih Lian ( tanu ) Tulian in tu (3) nei ing, Nasep: Tulsa khua ah (MCC) pawl pi ah huhsia sem ing. July 17, 2020 kum in ka innkuan nu in leitung nusia in Topa kiang hong naciah san ta hi. Ukna (Hobbies): -La sak -Lim suaih -Mawtaw bawl LST Mun: Paunak-3:27. GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, lasak le music lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Album/Mv bangzah bawlkhin, Nong genthei ding hiam? SMT- Lalam ka kipat cil pen (1970) kum pawl hi. Mangla sak tawh Yangon ah kum(10) sung Hotel lianpi te sung night club ah la na sa ngei ing. USA leh England သံ ရုံး te ah zong kum tampi mah ဧည့်ခံ ပွဲ te ah la na sa zel ing Iron Cross ten zong ong sam thei zel in mangla va sa zel ing. GZC Q2. Zomi sung mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? SMT- Mangla -ကုလားla- Mexicanla honpi khat ka sak theih US gam ka tun khit ciang ong nuam sim tham ahih manin, angtang mahmah ing GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang ii idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na music/laphuah/na lasak lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? SMT- Album bawl la phuak pawl hi kei ing in Show bel (1979) June (20) ni in Lamka khua college sangh pi ah (Drum) tum kawm in mangla dawng (30) kasa hi -(1980) Nakzang lei hon pawi. 1981 Tedim ah နိုင်ငံတော် အလံ ကြိုဆိုပွဲ cih te pawl, 1993-1994 ဖါးကန့် ah kum nih kizom a ka lasak teng leh ရန်ကုန် khua pi sung a ka la sak teng khong bek mah hi in teh . GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? SMT- Kei muhna pan ei Zomi te music lam ah ki khangto sa lua ing, Kawlpi a music festival te ka etciang kawlgam ah music lam ah world standard a ban sim thamta hi hang ci in ang tang mahmah ing. GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. SMT- Music tawh kisai khawl lo gennop pen (1990) kum pawl in နိုင် ငံ ကျော် စာ ရေး ဆရာ ပုပါးကိုကိုဇော် (ကောလ်ထန်မောအာ) in director sem in ရုပ် ရှင် ong zite&#8217; (အချစ်စစ်ပွဲ)ဇတ်ကား ah အဓိ ကဇတ် ဆောင် in ki hel napi ing in tua ရုပ်ရှင် pen ဆင်ဆာ လွတ် lo ahih manin kilak thei nawnlo hi. Lasak pih band minte: 1979 &#8211; India Fisher Band 1980 &#8211; Salai M Band 1981 &#8211; Lia le Taang Band 1994-94 &#8211; Victoria Band Lungdam kohna Hibang in GZC te in lam et loh pi in nong phawk khak uh leh thu dot na nong neih pih uh lung dam mahmah ing, Ka lunglen, ka Thanem na teng zong mangngilh tuam ing, (GZC)te Topan ong Lawh cing sak semsem ta hen. Lungdam. GZC tanu te : Amen! Lasiam Thawnpi Samte
Min pi: Suan lam Thawn (Thawnpi St &#8211; Samte) Kham khua: Tuikhiang Tulian omna: Chicago Suahni: May,10,1988 Lai pilna: Tansawm Pianna Tuun le Zua min: &#8211; Cing Khan Huai (Nu) &#8211; Kham Ngaih Do (Pa) Pianpih sang gam te: &#8211; Dim Boih -Bawipi St -David Kiim -Cyimung Ukna ( Hobbies ): Lasak , laphuak, laisim , Lai Siangtho mun: Isaiah 41:10 GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, lasak le music lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Album/Mv bangzah bawlkhin, Nong genthei ding hiam? TP- Music pen neutung pan uk cihding hi tan 3 kakah pawlin kanu lasak leh guitar siam te tumsak nop kholloh aw taitai thei tepawl tawh ki delhdelh thei zel ing, hehe. Tualo pen 2004 kumin Sia Thawn Kham khiang ah guitar leh solfa nasin ing 2008 ciang Zomi idol kadem leh Top 3 nangah ing tuapan a kician in music lam lutzaw deuh suakve maw sawtlua nai samkei ei Album pen akician in 2 na bawl ing TUUNNU HONG ITNA leh THUNDER OF ZOMI CD, DVD tawh hawmung tualo kakhum cip khat uhzong album khat omven spotify, pandora cih te pawlah phih khia veve kikhum cipsam kei. GZC Q2. Zomi sungah nangmah bangin mangla len minam dangte ii la vasak pih thei le va tumpih thei ding ih neih na angtang hiam? TP- Angtang mah ing GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang ii idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na music/laphuah/na lasak lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? TP- Ka la te pen laaw/mal kei phuah tawm (Owntune) vive hi musicpen album masa leh nihna (Steven) idea tam, tua ka Album thak dingvuah bel (Kip Thang Chian Chian ) idea tam lasung pan hoih sakpen cihbel omkei avek pi mahin hoih kasak vive hi. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? TP- Tha kipiak siam in khatleh khat kipah tawi siamleng. GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. TP: Omvat kei ei, Zomi Celebrity leh laisim mimalkim tha hongpia khempeuh navek navek pi tungvuah lungdam mahmah ei Spotify, pandora, itune leh online tuamtuam ah Thunder of Zomi (ToZ) late na ngaih sak zelvo MV zong youtube pan kien theiin ciai. Mangla sak siam Pu Pum Za Dal
Minpi le beh: Pum Za Dal Ngaihte (Hau tual) Tulian omna: Tonzang No.13, Pinlong wards (3 ) Boyoke road, Kalaymyo Suahni : Aug 4 1950 Lai pilna: Tan 10 (High School) Tuun leh Zua min: &#8211; Vial Ngaih Cing ( Nu ) &#8211; Go Cin ( Pa ) &#8211; 1981 kum in U Aung Min leh Nu Sian Za Cing&#8217;te tanu Sianu Nian Zam Cing tawh kiteng in ta pasal 7 leh ta numei 2 nei hi. Pasian piak a tate : 1. Tg. Cin Zam Lian Mung ( Hong nusia khin ) 2. Lia Cing Khawl Dim 3. Lia Cing Lian Lun 4. Pa Aung Tung Mang 5. Tg. Dal Sian Suang 6. Tg. Kham Cin Mang 7. Tg. Zam Sian Kip 8. Tg. Thang Mun Lian 9. Tg. Mung Kim Khai Sang gam Laizomte min: 1. Nu Niang Go Cing ( Hong nusia khin ) 2. Hu Don Khaw Ciin ( Hong nusia khin ) 3. Pum Za Dal 4. Go Lam Ciin (Ygn. Yankin) 5. Nu Niang Khan Suan ( Hong nusia khin ) 6. Nu Vung Zam Mang ( Hong nusia khin ) 7. Pum Khan Mung ( Neu tung a hong nusia ) 8. Dai Khan Niang ( Japan ah om) 9. Lia Dim Ngaih Lun ( Hong nusia khin ) 10. Lia Dim Ngaih Lian ( Hong nusia khin ) 11. Lia En Lian Cing ( Hong nusia khin ) 12. Lia Ciin Lam Man ( Hong nusia khin ) Ukna (Hobbies): -Guitar tum -La sak -Mang Laam -Foot ball Lai Siangtho bulphuh: Paunak 3: 5-6 Na lungsim khempeh tawh Topa muang in la, nangtheihna suang kei in. Na hihna khempeuh ah amah phawk in. Tua hi leh lampi man amah in hong lak ding hi. GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, lasak le music lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Album/Mv bangzah bawlkhin, Nong genthei ding hiam? PD: Neu tung ka tan 3 kum pan tudong mah hi e. Album / MV lam tuam a om vet lo himai, Ka khan lai un bel Pawi om na khempeuh ah hong kisam himai. A diak diak in &#8216; Tahan Mizo &#8216; te lak bang ah ka pai teh a nupi papi te nangawn in, Pum Za Dal hong hawh aih leh mangla sa sak unla, Ak gawh un hong ci keei uh hi ee. GZC Q2. Zomi sungah nangmah bangin mangla len minam dangte ii la vasak pih thei le va tumpih thei ding ih neih na angtang hiam? PD:- Ang tang peuh mah tham ingh ee. Nuam mahmah ingh. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang ii idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na music/laphuah/na lasak lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? PD:- La, music, note ka gelh a omlo himai ei, La zong a phuak theilo hizaw ingh. &#8220;Music, bang pen mikang band &#8216; The Shadows &#8216; leh &#8216; The Ventures &#8216; te instrumental a tum te uh a &#8216;original bang a ka tum theih teh ka lung a kim mahmah hi. la zong a original bang aa kasak theih ding hanciam in sa leng ka lung a kim pha diak hi. Note en theilo kahih man in &#8221; hearing &#8221; pan bek hi aa, a hih lian a hanciam hing. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? PD:- Zomi te ih omna ciat ah group mah tawh dijg zo leng hoihsa peen ing. A diakdiak in Kawlgam bang hun hoih, hun nuam hileh group vive mah tawh ding in kum khat in khat vei beek &#8216;Talent Show&#8217; entertaiment bawl zo den leng ki khangto in ki pumkhat na om thei ding hi ci in um ingh. GZC Q5. Music tawh a ki sailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ung. PD:- Gen nop tampi tak lak ah a diakdiak in no tulai tak aa tuipi gal aa om u leh naute khempeuh in na vai puak neihna khempeuh uah ih biak Pasian in hong panpih tawntung henla, cidam, lung nuam tak aa thu ih ki zaak theih den aa ih ki pahtawi, ih ki uap theih den na ding mah lunggulh peen ingh. Kei bang mah pi cing ngap lo khat hih bang aa nong pi bawl na uh, nak pi tak in nuam pha diak ingh, ih biak Pasian tung ah lungdam na ko tawn tung ning, Nuam mah mah ingh. Ka Lungdam. GZC tanu te : Amen! Koh lungdam zaw kan ungh e, kahun geel sa uh hong picinh nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep, nabawl khatpeuh ah Zomi te a laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzang toto laita in. Na Zomi pihte in hong angtang lua ungh maw. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page

GZC in nong phawk khak zenzen uh lungdam huai sa ing, i minam sung hong puahpha henla na hoih tampi semkhia ding in Toupan vualzawlta hen. GZC tanu te : Amen! Zomi lasiam Sm. San Lun
Min: &#8211; Vial San Lun ( Hangsawk) Khua lui- Tuitum Tulian omna- Atlanta (USA) Suahni- May 14,1978 Lai pilna- B.A.B.S, B.A (Psycho), M.div Pianna Tuun le Zua min: &#8211; Don Khaw Hau ( Nu ) &#8211; Dr. H Gin En Cin ( Pa ) Pianpih Sangam teng: 1. Tual Sian Sum 2. Vial San Lun ( Kei) 3. Niang Muan Kim 4. Thang Pil Mung 5. Man Kop Dim 6. Thang Lem Kim Ukna ( Hobbies ): Lasak, ki mawl, khualzin le one by one gup khiatna thugen LST Bulphuh: 1Thes 5:16-22, &#8220;Na Lungnuam tawntung un; thu na ngen den un, hih in Christ Zeisu sungah note ading Pasian deihna a hi man in a piang khempeuh ah lungdam na ko un. Tua Kha meikuang na mitsak kei un; genkholhna thute na simmawhbawl kei un. Na khempeuh sittel un. A hoihte kiplet un. Siatna nam peuhmah na peel un&#8221; &#8211; Zech 4:6 &#8220;Thahatna hang hi lo, vangliatna hang zong hi loin keima Kha hang bek tawh na ma na tung zo ding hi, thahat pen TOPA in ci hi.&#8221; GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, lasak le music lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Album/Mv bangzah bawlkhin, Nong genthei ding hiam? SL- 1. Tan 4 ka phak a ki pan lasa, action song te makaih cih teng pan ki pan to ingh. Eimi mipi lak ka din taktak Tedim sangpi kum 50 cin pawipi 1998, Studio kalut masak Jan 2000. 2. Single album (3) 3. Mv pen ka ngaih sut theih pak 70 kiim ahi tam maw GZC Q2. Zomi sung mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? SL- Angtang mah mah kawm in lungdam pih mahmah ing. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang ii idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na music/laphuah/na lasak lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? SL- La phuah bel ka talent hilo hiam phuak nai lo hi phot aih hang lamal bel at nei kawmkawm zel ingh English la aw la in amal kei at suak ve. Notes bel ka lasak ding te chord at zel cih loh kei idea tawh om nai buang kei ei. Ka phuah lian a hih loh hang a mal ka at lak ah ka album masa aa Lamdang Itna mah hoih sa le Topa’n adeihna om aa hong piak ngiat la tua deih pen ingh. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? SL- Pasian kiang pan hong pai itna mah bul phuh in khat le khat ki it na tawh kalsuan khawm ni. Ih muhna te zaisak in, mi masa ten khangthakte makaih to in, khangthakte’n mi masa( Uzawte) te zahtak siam leng tua zong ih khantoh na ding tawh tang (key)lak aa khat ai kha tam cih kei ngaih sut na hi. GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. SL- Leitung khantohzia tawh ki tuak in tu lai khangthakte in a tumte ai zong, asa te ai zong aphuak te ai zong, uk man cih tawh hi lo in, hih ka uk na pen Pasian hong piak talent aih man in hoihtak phungvuh ning ci aa gina tak aa sin to in hanciam to leng tua ka deihsak na khangthak music a ukte tung ah gen nuam lai ing. Tua le kei lel tak GZC in nong phawk man ùn lungdam le angtang mahmah ingh. Topa’ ih minam sung ah hi bang ki lapsang na te hong phungvuh sak hen la, mailam na geel na te uh Topa’n Aminthan na ding in hong gual zawh pih ta hen maw. GZC tanu te : Amen! Lasiam Khuppi (Doron band)
Minpi: Thang Sian Sawm Khup (Khup pi) Beh : Naulak Suahni: 13 Nay Khamkhua: Tuimui, Tonzang Tulai tak omna: Yangon Lai Pilna: Graduate (Dagon University) Sanggam Laizom te min: -Unau 10 pha in ah, pasal 5 le numei 5 lian hise ung, kei aneu lampan a thumna hi ing Pianna Tuun leh Zua min : &#8211; Nu Cing Dim ( Nu ) -Rev. Dr. Thawng Za Mung ( Pa ) Ukna (Hobbies): Lasak, Music, Video zaih le Editing Kammal hoih: Topa in nang a ding a hoihzaw hong geelkholh sak hi. GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, Laphuah/Lasak lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Album/Mv bangzah bawlkhin, Nong genthei ding hiam? KP:- Ka neulai in guitar tum na uk in, tan 8 pan lawmte la uk pawlkhat tawh kikhol kha in a lasak sim uh guitar va tumsak theu zel e, guitar kei i professional line ding hilo hi cih ka tel takteh lasak lam kihei in ah, pawi khatpeuh omleh lasa pahpah in, kum 2019 ciang lakhui bawl ding geelna neu in, kum 2010 ciang PTL ah sum omvetlo pi hita seleh kipan khia ing, kum 2013 ciang lakhui masa pen kawlla solo &#8221; Lube Atutube &#8221; cih a hawmkhia zo suak ing. Album bel kawlla MV khui khat leh Zola khui khat suak ve. GZC Q2. Zomi sungah nangmah bangin kawlla, mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? KP:- Antang mahmah ing, Kei ii ngaihsutna bangin a pai thei ding hileh khangthak te kawlgam om a hiphial zongin, koikoi a ih om zongin mangla mah hanciam in ah, mangla khui khong thuh zo leng cih pen ka lungsim ah lunggulh mahmah ing. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na lasak/laphuah/ lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? KP:- Kei ii idea tawh ka phuah dawng 3 sang tamzaw peuhmah dinghi. Ka lasak khitteng lakpan tua hoihzaw deuh cih ding omtuan kei, avek a ka deih vive hipah hi. GZC Q4. Koici kalsuan leng mailam ei Zomite music sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? KP:- Australia lam USA lam khong ah a om khangno te ka hanthot nop ah Zola bel sa ni, Zomi ihih na ah Zolai pen a kipai theilo mangngilh sawmlo ding, a khatna in koih hamtang ding, Zola khitteh Kawlla, Kawlla bek thamlo Mangla, mangte lak a thuphauh ngiat leng min hong thei dingin ah i gil vah baihzaw inteh maw, tua hileh ki khangto ngiat ding, amah ei ii nasep na mi ii hong theihna pen tanzai lua kikhai lua e maw. GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. KP:- Pasian theilo a minthanna, hauhna le pilna cihte pen a mawkna pi hilel hi. Ih nasep khatpeuh ah Pasian phawk kawmin, Pasian mah masa sak den leng, ih tuah bangbang apuak na zangkhai zaw deuh hi. Lungdam GZC tanu te : Koh lungdam zaw kan ungh e, kahun geel sa uh hong picinh nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep, nabawl khatpeuh ah Zomi te a laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzang toto laita in.
