Theory Khualpu
Minpi : Zam Suan Khual Beh : Ngaih Te (Vang Aw) Khamkhua : Vang Teh Tulian omna : Yangon, Myanmar Suahni : 4.12.1991 Laitan : B.D.S (Dentist) 2013 Pianna Tuun le Zua: &#8211; Zen Man Cing ( Nu ) &#8211; Siapi Thang Do Langh ( Pa ) Sanggam Laizom: &#8211; U Lun &#8211; Nau Nem &#8211; Nau Mang &#8211; Nau San &#8211; Nau Hau &#8211; Nau Tung Hobbies : Dentistry, Singing, Music Production LST Mun : Late 13:6 (Nong hehpihna kicing ahih manin, TOPA, la kong sak ding hi) GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, lasak le music lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Album/Mv bangzah bawlkhin, Nong genthei ding hiam? KP- Earphone tawh a detail tak a langaih pen ka university, 2nd year kah kum 2008 in mandalay ah mp3 player popular mahmah laitak hunin mp3 tawh la ngaih ka kipan a, tua pan ki pan in la in ka lungsim nakpi tak in hong la mahmah in, hun ngah sim phial in lasak theih na ding ka vaihawm zel hi. &#8211; 2008 kum in internet sai ah pai zel in international la minthang tuamtuam te download in la ngaih tawh ka ki diah hi. &#8211; 2012 kum in Zomi Siamsin Kipawlna-Mandalay i&#8217; vaihawm CD album &#8220;Hong Ciah Kik Ning&#8221; Album sung ah single dawng nih tawh na ki hel thei ing. &#8211; 2013 kum in Pasian&#8217; hehpihna le sanggam te&#8217; panpih na tawh B.D.S (Dentist) graduate thei in, tua khit teh nute pate&#8217; omna kawlpi ah tawmvei tawlnga in tua zawh a sawtlo in yangon ah &#8216;dental clinic&#8217; ni le thum ah na sep pai kawikawi kawm in, hun ngah bang in Solo Album &#8220;Phat In Bia In&#8217; kipan khia thei a, 2014 kum sung mah in Myanmar, Malaysia, US mun pawl khat ah hawm khia thei ing. &#8211; 2016 kum in &#8220;Lung Kia Ken&#8221; cih la MV tawh Doron Band tawh vik khawm thei ziahziah, u Khup Pi Doron i&#8217; hong makaih na tawh Doron Band tawh &#8216;Lung Kia Ken&#8217; la tung tawn pan ki thei to suak in, tu ciang dong la bawl ding a om ciang mi&#8217; sang in hamphatna tampi ngah ka hih manin angtang ing. &#8211; 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020 kum sung teng ahun zui la khum ding le kei&#8217; sum pek khat zong a bei kil kel lo ding Topa&#8217;n hong vaihawm pih toto a, ka ukna (hobby) sung ah hong kha in ka khangno hun ka ut bang in hong zeek sak i biak Topa&#8217; tung ah lungdam ka ko hi. &#8211; 2016 &#8211; 2020 sung DORON tawh ka bawl khop theih la min te ahih leh:- (1) Lung Kia Ken (2) Nangma&#8217; Tel Sinthu Hi (3) Nunnop Khuado (4) Lawm It (5) Topa Zawngkhal Lo (6) Suang Manpha Sang Manpha Zaw (7) Hong Thaksuah Ta Hen hiteng ahi hi. Mailam ading Topa&#8217;n hun hoih hoih piak lai leh zom tohtoh ding zong lunggulh lai ing. MV ngaihna ding playlist : https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLrihYRjGBroJaLEK0Bz8v9d7uTwa2HAfS GZC Q2. Zomi sung mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? KP- Minam dang te&#8217; lak ah musician leh mangla a sa/a siam ahi mipih pawlkhat mu kha zel mah ing. Zomi sungah mai lam ah tampi pi hong om semsem leh ka lunggulh ah khangthak momno te hong hanciam in nule pa te&#8217;n zong tha i piak tek ding, i panpih tek ding hoih ka sa hi. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang ii idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na music/laphuah/na lasak lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? KP- Ka la phuah pawl khat a om na sung pan&#8217;n ka khum khak sunsun ahi &#8220;Till Now &#8211; အခုချိန်ထိ&#8221; leh &#8220;My Life &#8211; ကိုယ့်ရဲ့ဘ၀&#8221; tua gel kei&#8217; mimal in tha ngah ing hehehe. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. La khui Album (Burmese + ethnics) ka tum lim lim 200 bel pha inteh ( Single in a tuamtuam tum sak zong pawlkhat om ). GZC Q2. Zomi sung mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? MB: Zomi artist khat hihnaa tawh zomi sungah sep theih bek hilo a , mangkang te leh minam dang tuamtuam te lak ah kihel zawh pen ih minam pih te a ding a pasian ong piak thupha khat hi ci in ngaihsun ing. (Nuikawm sa in) Ahi zong in mipi ong theihpih zaw deuh la a hih leh bel &#8211; 1. ဘယ်သူလဲ ? &#8211; နောနော် ( အိပ်မက်ထဲကလူ Album ) 2. သတိရတယ် &#8211; BIGBAG ( Anger Management Album ) cihte hi . GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? MB: Mai lam music sung ki pum khat nang pen ka gen dan ding thei vat keng . GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. MB: Khat veivei ciang A ZAK NOP LOH HANG i hih na bangbang in ki DEIH SAK NA TAWH thu kihilh zong kisam kasa hi . &#8211; Lung dam . Minpi le beh : Thang Za Khup Buansing &#8211; Also known as Kyaw Khine Kham khua : Keizang/Cingpikot Tulian omna : Lamka Manipur, India Suahni : 18/04/1976 Lai Pilna : 12 standard,B.Th Pianna Tuun leh Zua min : &#8211; Sing Niangh ( Nu ) &#8211; Khai Za Nang ( Pa ) Sanggam Laizom te min : &#8211; Nu Cingh Lian Zam &#8211; Nu Ciin En Cing &#8211; Nu Hau Lun Niang &#8211; Nu Man Khan Nem Ukna (Hobbies) : &#8211; Music, kimawlna leh anhuan /mehhuan LST Mun : Johan 15:16 &#8211; Note in kei na hong teel kei uh a, ahi zongin keimah in note ka hong teel a, note va pai-in a kimang tawntung ding gah a gah dingin ka hong seh hi. Tua ahih manin keima min suangin Pa kiangah na nget peuhpeuh uh hong pia ding hi. GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, Laphuah/Lasak/Music sung na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Album/Mv bangzah bawlkhin/tumkhin, Nong genthei ding hiam? KK &#8211; 1988 kum pan Rhythm sin na ki pan ing. Biakna lasak ka kipat 1990 kum hi.La gelh/ la phuak zong ka tan 8 kum in na ki pan ing. Single Album Vontawi Zaideih Vol 1 melmuh tongsan in na bawl ing. Music ka tum sak album ka tumsak sate Zomite la leh nam dangte la aki gawm khui 200 val in teh.A dawng in bel dawng 500 val kha in teh. GZC Q2. Zomi sung mangla, kawlla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? KK &#8211; Angtang mah ing. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na lasak/laphuah/ lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? KK &#8211; La khui ka tum khempeuh kei kia idea hi tangpi hi. La pawlkhatte arrangement hoihtak ka gelh om a, pawlkhat bel sial tum suk lel ing. Ka phuah leh sak ngiat pan in Et teh huai pen Tuunnu la in ka lungsim hong sukha pen hi. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? KK &#8211; A neu alian khat leh khat ki pahtawi siam in Itna tawh ki pantah thei leng kipumkhat na in hong ompih ding hi.Khantohna bel Pasian a belte/amuangte khangto sa ing. GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. KK &#8211; Aw, gennop tampite lak pan 1st. Thutak(the truth) lenkip ni . 2nd. Pasian a khatna ah koih in,Innkuan pihte anihna ,midangte a thumna ah koih thei leng ki khangto kim ding in um ing. 3rd: ka khupna dingin: – no whining ( tautau/maumau lo ding.) – no justifications( dik ki tangsak lo ding) – no giving up (lungkia lo ding) – be accountable (vaipuakna nei den ding) – no excuses (paulap/suanlam nei lo ding) Lungdam ing. Leitung bup Zomi Siamna tuamtuam beite a pahtawi a lamto GZC te I biak Pasian in thupha hong pia in hong makaih den hen! GZC tanu te : Koh lungdam zaw kan ungh e, kahun geel sa uh hong picinh nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep, nabawl khatpeuh ah Zomi te a laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzang toto laita in. Na Zomi pihte in hong angtang lua ungh maw. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Lead Guitar tumsiam Jacob Mungta
Minpi le beh : Thang Lam Mung (Naulak) Kham khua : Anlangh Tulian omna : USA,Atlanta Suahni : Khuado Kha ,1979 Pianna Tuun leh Zua min : &#8211; Cin Ngaih Dim (Hatlangh) ( Nu ) &#8211; Tun Khaw Nang (Naulak) ( Pa ) Sanggam Laizom te min : &#8211; Tuan Go Mang, -Luan Khat Man, -Cing En Niang, -Dim Suan Nuam, -Kei (anau pen). *Ukna (Hobbies) : La ngaih, Lai sim, Pasian thu ngaih, Inn puah, Movie et. LST Mun : Kahla 3:24, Rom 12:12, John 3:16 GZC 1 : Hong dongpah saisai nung, Music lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta hia?. JMT: Music lam kadiah cil pen, Kaneu tung pan cihtheih hi. Ahang in kaneu lai-in, ka Pano Pr. Do Za Thang (Kimpu Seven’ pa) in Classical Guitar zaknoptak a tum’ka ngaih na pan, Music ukna sisan hong om in, tuni ciang, Music sungah akidiah to suak hi-ing. Tua bek tham lo-in, ka nu in ka neulai-in, “na Pa pen Khamtung gam ah “Guitar anei masa pen hi” cih hong gen ( a thu kician bel kan nawn keng ) ngei hi. GZC 2: Album/Mv bangzah tumkhin, Nong genthei ding hiam? JMT: Album ah ka kihel masak cil na pen, Malaysia ah Zomi sung pan akibawl masa penpen, “Lametna Ni” Album sungah Bass Guitar na tum ing. Tua hun sung mah in, ka inn ah hong giak ZCF Canaan pawlpi khangno teng tawh kikupna pan aa hong piangkhia ahi, Zomi sungah amasa pen“Evangelistic Live Worship”cih, Sia David Suum makaih na tawh kibawklkhia aa, tua lai ah, Lead Guitar pen Kei leh BJ Langhno in alangtuak na tum ung. Tua lo bel, dawng khat, dawng nih katum na zong, pawlkhat om. GZC 3: Zomi sung minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? JMT: Angtang mah ing. Nidang in ih Zomi sungah Music lam hong pankhia masa U Lam Cin te leh Lengtong Band te khit ah ih Zomi Music ban kizom lo ding hong bang hi. Tua khit ciang, Kawlpi pan in, Nyi Nyi Khine, Kyaw Khine (Khuppu) te, Zangkong pan, Zen Lian cih te in Zomi Music maban hong zom to uh hi. Tua khit ciang in, E Tuang leh Muang Muang, Khualtawng (Amen), Deihpi cih (ka phawkpak teng) bang in, ahunzui-in, Zomi Guitarist hong kizom to hi. Tua khit tawlkhat sung bang, Zomi sung ah Musician hong kizom nawn mel lo tawh kibang hi. Malaysia pan in, Sia BJ Langhno leh Ke’n maban hong zomto in, tua pan in, tuni ciang dong, lamet loh zah dong in,Topa’n, hong kibehlap sak aa, kei’aituam dan in ngaihsun in, Zomi khangthak Musician tampi hong piankhiat kamuh teh, angtang in, kakipak mahmah hi. Tuhun ciang in, Minam dang te la atumsak thei ding leh, minamdang la asa thei ding, Zomi te ki om tham ta ahihman in, ka angtang mahmah hi. GZC 4: La/Music nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na music tum/laphuah lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? JMT: La phuah pawlkhat bel nei mah hiveng in, mipi’ mai aa luikhiat ding zah in, a hoihlua om salo kahihman in, hici koih lai phot ingh. Music bel mailam ah bawl sawm mahmah ingh. GZC 5: Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music sung kipum khat in ki khangto thei ding? JMT : Zomi Music akhantoh theih nading leh kipumkhat theih nading in, amindawk masa te in, khangthak te deihsak na tawh pantah in, Khangthak te’n zong, mi masa te zahtak bawl in, akisap leh thudong in, kiniamkhiatna tawh hanciam tek lehang, Zomi Muisc khangto ding hi cih, kei mimal muhna hi. GZC 6: Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. JMT: “Kei nangawn” hong phawk kha aa, hici bang in, holim na nong neihpih uh, kipak mahmah ingh. GZC :- Koh lungdam zaw kan ungh, a ki geelsa hunte hong picin nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep khatpeuh ah Zomi te a laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzang toto laita in. Na Zomi pihte in hong angtang ung maw. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Malaysia pan Rappers ZVAAMMAK9
Na kipawl na min uh : ZVAAMMAK9 Na mintek uh le khamkhua: &#8211; Melhoih Sang (Zozang), &#8211; Hau Sian (Valvuum), &#8211; Mc Gj (Lailui) &#8211; Hau Suum Lian(Suangpi) &#8211; Tuanbawi (Zozang) &#8211; Mini Pusi (Tonzang) Tulai tak na omna uh: Tulai tak Malaysia GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, rap le music lam na kidiah zawh uh asawt ta na. Koi dan a na groupmin uh hong piang khia. Bang in hong uk sak? cih nong gen thei uh tam? ZVMK9 :- Rap la cih bel ka neu tung uh pan ka uk uh hi. A la ngaih nop sa hi ngiat. Malaysia pan ko rap la uk teng ki mu khawm in group khat tawh din ding ki thu kim in (Z VAAM MAK 9) min hg piang khia hi. GZC Q2. Album/Mv bangzah bawlkhin, Na lakhui bawlsa sung uh pan hoih nasak pen in bangla? ZVMK9:- Album pen nih bawl khin ung.2017 ah (DUALLO ZOMI ALBUM) ,2020 (Z RAP ZUNG ALBUM).MV pen ka album masa uh(DUALLO ZOMI)ah a vek in zaih ung, tua lo dang personal in ka bawl uh bel dawng 15 khawng hin teh. Ka la uh a vek in hoih sa in lung kim ung, ka deih deuh uh bel, ka group la uh a hi, &#8220;DUALLO ZOMI&#8221; leh &#8220;DAII&#8221;. Personal MV ah bel LAI TAI, 67 RAP KAM ,NA PANG BUUK, LAI LUNG MUANG KHA ING tua teng hoih sa pen ung. GZC Q3. Zomi sung mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding musician ih neih na angtang uh hiam?La/Music/La aw noh ii idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei uh hiam? ZVMK9:- Ei mi sung ah tua dan misician thupi ih neih ang tang leh ki pak pih mah mah ung. Tua ciang la a hih leh ka siam loh uh hang ka uk na uh bul phuh in,copy pa lo ko idea ngiat tawh ka hih uh hi in, music a hih leh ko group sung pan ka Siapi pa uh (Mc Gj) in a bawl ngiat a hih man in(Own tune) vive hi. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music sung kipum khat in ki khangto theiding? ZVMK9:- Ei Zomi te Music sung ah ih uk na dan tek thupit bawl in kal suan kawm leh, ki tot na a hi lo,ih khan toh na ding in, khat leh khat ki dem bawl leng, ki khang to in um ung GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh uh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. ZVMK9:- GZC ta nu te in ko bang lel nong phawk khak uh lungdam ung, mai lam na maban vuah ih biak Pasian in thupha hg pia sem sem ta hen. GZC:- Amen, koh lungdam zaw kan ung, mailam ah nasep, nabawl na te uhleh na ngimna te ah hong lamzang toto laita un. Zomi in hong ki angtang hi. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page

Ki it in, Ki thapia in, hi leng hisang khangto zaw mahmah ding hi hang. Ka Lumgdam. Zomi lead guitar tumsiam Sia Langh No
Minpi: Khai Sian Langh Kham khua: :Phaiza Suahni: May 14,1976 Pilna: Tan 10 Pianna Tuun le Zua: &#8211; Cing Ngaih Dim. &#8211; Cin Go Thang ( Pa ) Sanggam te min: Nu Ciang Khan Cing. Nu Uap Khan Lun. Pa Cin Za Khai. Nu Khai Zam Niang. Unau 5. Ukna: Music leh Tangthu gelh LST mun: Ka piangthak na John 3:16. Ka bulphuh: Late 37:5 GZC Q1. Lasak/Music sung na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Nong genthei ding hiam? B JL: Music sungah; Kum 1990 pan music siam te state show bawlna ah kihel ta ing. GZC Q2. Zomi sung kawlla, mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? BJL: Minam dang te la basal pih theih va tumpih thei pen angtang mahmah ing. &#8211; Naungek khat in Ann hong nek theih ciang a Khantohna ki mu a,lam hong pai theih teh mi tawh hong ki Khawl thei uh hi. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na lasak/laphuah/ lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? BJL: Music note, La khum sak te Keima idea vive hi zaw in,lasa ngei lo.la ka phuah lakpan,”ka lungmuanna Topa “a cih hoih sa pen ing. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music lam ki khangto theiding? BJL: Zomi music khantoh na dingin,copy lasa ding, copy music tumzaw ding. Mite tum theih bangbang tum thei ding. Chitsanmaung in Mangkang te tum theih banga tum thei ahih man a, mi a ban suak ahi hi. Idea pen ih siam ciang ong lut pan a,ih siam na dingin,mangla music hoih te etteh a tum ding kisam hi. Gentehna: Hotel California la bang Zola tawh sa kik ding hi leh Tua music tum thei ding,kibang sak ding. GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. BJL: Ka gennop thupi pen ah, Pasian zahtak masa ding.Ih talent pen mah Tupna nei ding,a kikal hamsatna te thuak tinten ding. &#8211; Gensiat na leh lungkiatna pen ih thuak ding hi a,ih zat ding hilo hi. Ka lungdam. GZC :- Nang sang koh lungdam zawkan ungh, hungeel sa hong picinh nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep, nabawl khatpeuh ah Zomi te a laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzangh toto laita in. Na Zomi pihte in hong angtang ungh ey maw. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Tg. Sing Mun Thang
Pa min &#8211; Pa Gin Deih Sian Za Tuang Nu min &#8211; Nu Vung Lam Suan Suah ni &#8211; 27-1-2003 (Laaitui) Pianpih sanggamte: Nu Ning Sawn Tawi (USA) Tg Gin Sawm Khan Lam Tg Sing Mun Thang Tg Thang Khan Lal Tan 10 All D ngah theih nadinga laisimzia Sia, Siamahte lamhilhnate zuihna tawh, ngimna kician nei in lungkia lo leh hanciam takpi in lai sim. Khangthak sangnaupangte hanthot nop A gualzosa mite ciing (copy) lo zaw in ei gualzawh nading lampi ei mahin phuak tawmin tua dan aa ih phuaktawmna ah a gualzo sate kiangah ngaihsutna hoih tuamtuamte ngen leng hoih ding hi. Tua zawh teh lai ih hanciamna ah Pasian mah tawh kop in lungkia ngei loin ngimna kician tawh hanciam takpi lehang gualzo ding hi hang. Tate gualzawh nadinga Nu leh Pa, innkuanpihte lampan panpihzia A masa in sangkah nadinga a kisam sumlehpaai lamah hon panpih ka pate teng, Thungetna leh a dang ih gen theihloh na tampite ah hon panpih tawntung ka nu, ka innkuanpihte leh a dang a kuamah peuhte tungah lungdam ko masa ing. Nu leh pa in ih tate’ pilsin nading ahih nakleh ih neih ih lam ih bei phial zongin lungsiit lo takin pilna ih sinsak ding kisam sa ing. Tua zawh teh ih taten pilna a sin laitak, a lungsim uh leh a pumpi uh a nawngkaisak thei ding thu nawngkai tuamtuamte a omloh nading zong kidop taak mahmah hi. Ka nuntakna ah ka bulphuh LST Jeremiah 33:3 Kei nong sap leh kong dawngkik dinga na theihngei nai loh, a ki-imcip thu lianpite kong gen ding hi. Haksat hun leh lungkiat hun cianga ka thalakzia Haksatna tuakin ka lung a kiat ciangin lawmlehgualte kiang peuhah kinga loin thungetna tawh tha la in hanciam ingh. A haksaat hun teh ih tup ih sawm nate hoihtak ngaihsun kikleng lungkiat nading thu omlo phial hi. Pianna vangkhua ading ka lungdeih sinthu Ih khua Laaitui a khantoh theih nading inah makaite in thumaan taka na hon sepnate uh ei mipite’n lung kituak taka ih zuihsiam ding thupi sa ing. Tua lo ih khua ih tui, inn leh lo, sumlehpaai khawng a hau leh mimal phazah a tam khawng bek hilo in pilna lam leh siamna lam tuamtuamte ah ih khantoh zawh semsem nadingin zong hanciam ding hoih sa ingh. Tulaitak siam sinna: University of Medicine, Magway (12/2019, Foundation Year)

Rev. Nung Khan Mang

Dr. Lian Sian Sing, M.B., BS
Pamin &#8211; Pa Pum Za Kam (Gualnam) Numin &#8211; Nu Ning Khawm Mang (Gualnam-Luisuk) Suah ni &#8211; 12 Feb 1985 ni’n suak Unau &#8211; Pianpih unau 7 lakpan a u bel Innkuanpih 1.5.2010 ni in Nu Dim Sian Cing (Naulak) tawh kitengin tanu 1 leh tapa 3 nei in, Pasian hon piak inn nuamah ka om uh hi. Ka tate; Lia Mang Tawi Lun Tg. Kam Tung Pau Tg Hau Lam Mang Tg Mang Van Sang Siam sinna leh nasep lutcilna Tan lang pan tan sawm dong St. Mary Sangpi (No. 3 High School, Kalaymyo) ah pilsinna ka nei hi. 2000-01 laisim kumin tan 10 laihuanna ah Maths le Science (Bio, Physics le Eco) Distinctions nih ngahin gualzawhna ka ngah hi. Mark gawm 371 tawh Magway Medical sangpi ah ka lut thei hi. Kum 3 khit ciangin Yangon ah kituah suk in University of Medicine &#8211; 2 ah ka zom thei hi. 2007 kumin M.B.B.S. ka ngah hi. 2008 sang man ciangin NGO khat ahi MERLIN ah nasep interview ka lut aa, Pasian hehpihna tawh nasep ngahin Malaria project asem dingin Thantlang, Chin State ah Project officer za tawh nasep ka lut hi. Pasian lamlahna leh Major Khup Cin Pau (Rtd)’ tanu Dr. Ciin deihsakna tawh 2009 kum sung mahin Vietnam gam Hanoi khuapi ah zunkhum lam tawh kisai conference khat ah Dr. Hau Mang le Dr. Thang tawh ka pai thei uh hi. Gamdang tunna MERLIN ah a sawtlo in Thantlang Township makai panmun Team leader ngah ding lametna om mah taseleh, thasum $275 nusia-in, nasep pan khawl nading lai khia-in, nasep a tangzai zawding ngimna tawh Yangon ah ka paisuk hi. Norway lam pai nading ka siau masa aa, a paisate a omsuak tam khin mahmah ahih manin Visa ngah loin, cih nading theihloh laaitakin Lawm Thang Za Khai le ka nau Kip Thangte tungtawnin Malaysia lam pai ding ka khentat hi. U Thang Khan Sawm@Sawmno hon vaihawmsakna tawh Singapore lam tawnin Malaysia lam ka zuan uh hi. Gam leh nam ading nasepna Malaysia ah om sungin Minam aading nasepna ci-in Z.A.M. ah Volunteer le Medical officer dingin ka kipia hi. Z.A.M. min tawh UNHCR te tungah Grant siau-in Zomi Corner min tawh Rm 12,000 ka ngah uh hi. Tua grant sum tawh Zomi Corner Computer sai le sammet sai ka kipan thei uh hi. Refugee community tampi lakpan grant a kingah masa bel ahih manin angtang huai kasa hi. Tuikhiang khuami Pa Zamdal deihsakna tawh Klinik Patel Kim ah nasep siau in, ni 3 sung tawntung sum ngahlo in ama geiah atu bek dingin ka kipan hi. Malay leh Sen pau kamkhat zong apau thei vetlo khat in, Malay le Sen te kilak theihna Clinic ah kum 3 bang a sem man ka hi hi. Sum pek khat zong ngahlohna pan Malay ah ni tha a tambel pawl ding zah dongin Pasian lapsangna ka ngah hi. Ni tha Rm 500 ka ngah ni zong om ngei aa, a tawmbel Rm 180 nisimin ka ngah hi. Topa hoihna bek ahi hi. Australia gam tunna UN zum aa nasem Hakha-te Akhun acih ka lawmnu’ lawmte khatin Australia hon deihsakna hangin Australia lam ngim-in ka nei uh hi. Australia gam Adelaide ah khua a satsa Pa Thang Sian Dal@Dalta te’ deihsakna tawh 26 Feb. 2013 in Australia ka tung uh hi. Ka mangngilh theihloh interview khat ahihleh, Officer te-in gamteel nadingin interview hon sap ciangin ‘Gam pen kiteel theilo hi, ahih hangin unau sanggam na neih uhleh address hon pia un’ ci se hi. A tello te-in, ‘Ko Australia pai nuam ung’ acih ciangin officer te-in gam kiteel theilo hi, ci-in amau deihna pia ziau hi. Ko ahihleh, ‘ka sanggamte Australia ah om hi’ ci-in address pia in deihna mah ka teel veve uh hi. Australia tun zawh kum 4 khit, 19 July 2017 ni-in gammi suahna ngahin 2017 December tha sungin Kawlgam ah innkuan-in it le ngaih teng tawh kimu dingin ka ciah uh hi. Kawlgam ka ciah uh ciangin Kawlgam le Australia a kibatlohna pawlkhat ka mu hi. Kawlgam ah Kumpite zawngin mipite hau thei uh aa, Australia ah kumpite hau in, mipite zong cimawh lua tuanlo hi. Australia gamah misi nangawn kithupisakin Than te kilipkhap lo-in kilim kep mahmah aa kituahtuah lo hi. Kawlgam ahihleh misi cih thadah mihing nangawn sum neikei leng kithupi simlo hi. Australia ah mizawngte ading kumpi huhna om aa, kisimmawhna omlo hi. Kawlgam ah sum ih neih keileh, nuntak a haksa mahmah ding dinmun ahi hi. Bangbang ahizong itna ngeina le thukhualna ah Kawlgam kaankaan om nailo hi. Pu Kam Za Thang (B.E (Civil)
Pa min &#8211; Pu Thawng Khua Pau Nu min &#8211; Pi Ciin Ngaih Kim Suah ni &#8211; 7.2.1950 Zilehta- Nu Cherry Thian Kyin Hung (Khuasak) tawh 1982 kumin kitengin tanu 2 nei uh hi. A tate; 1. Nu Esther Kim San Lun + U Saw Min Kyaw 2. Nu Kam Thian Huai + Mr. Byn Beakyum Siam sinna 1955 – 1963 dong Laaitui Private sangah tan 7 dong kah hi. 1965-66 sung No.1, BEHS, Tedim Sangpi ah tan 8 kah hi. Tan 9 leh Tan 10, Yangon ah kah a, 1969 kumin tan 10, 2D (Chemistry, Mathematics) tawh ong hi. 1969 – 1976 sung Rangoon Institute of Technology – I (RIT), Insein ah kah in 1977 kumin B.E.(Civil) ngah hi. Hun beisa thu leh Tulaitak: (Hih thu tawh, 3.12.1994 ni a Pasian gam, a zuansa ka pa phawkna in hih thute ciamteh in a tomin ka pulaak hi.) Kei pen, ka leitung Nu leh Pa sung panin, 7.2.1950 ni in Laaitui khua ah ka piang hi. Ka khang tangthu ka et ciang in, Lai Siangtho bu sunga khang simnate tawh ka et kaak ciang, Pu Abraham khang pan Pu David kumpipa khangdong, khang 14, Pu David kumpipa khang pan Pu Jeconiah hun ciang ahi Babylon gamah saltanhna hun dong khang 14 ci-in Matthew 1:2-17 munah kiciamteh, kimu thei ahihman, kei leh ka innkuanpihte tungah thupha hong pia ih biak Pa Pasian min ka phat hi. Ka neulai-in ka nu leh pa in, ka pil luat ding hong deih manin, a neih peuhpeuh zuak in pilna hong sinsak hi. 1955 pan 1963 ciangdong Laaitui Private Tan 7 sangah pilna ka sin a, 1965-1966 kumin, Tedim No. 1 Tansawm sangah sang ka kah hi. Tua panin Tan 8 ka on khit ciang, 1966 kum June tha sung in, Rangoon ah sangkah dingin ka pai hi. Tan 10, 1969 kum Distinction 2 (Chemsitry Maths) tawh No 2. SHS, Bahan panin ka ong a, minphatna Medal khat leh Parker Pen ahoih mahmah khat tawh sang panin pahtawina hong pia uh hi. Rangoon Institute of Technology, Insein ah, kum 1969 pan 1976 bei dong laisin in ka om a, tua pan ka manh zawh ciang, kumpi leh kumpi sunglo nasepna zumte ah na ka sem hi. Ih biak Pa Pasian huhna tawh, leitung vial 4 vei bang kimkot in, a nuaia gamte, kipawlnate leh nasepna zumte ah na kasem hi. Nasepna 1977–78 : Engineer Supervisor (Yangon City Development Committee, Myanmar) 1978 &#8211; 83 : Project Engineer (Construction Engineers’ Cooperative, Rangoon) 1983- 84 : Project Engineer (Hyundai Construction Company, Rangoon) 1983 &#8211; 84 : Project Engineer (People’s Resettlement Board, Rangoon) 1984–87 : ProjectEngineer(UNICEF’sWATSON,Rangoon) &#8211; UNICEF huhna tawh Tedim khuabup ading Sialtangtui laksak hi. &#8211; Lailo khua ah UNICEF huhna tawh tui pia hi. &#8211; Saizang khua ah UNICEF huhna tawh tui pia hi. &#8211; Laaitui khua ah zong UNICEF huhna tawh tui pia a, tu dongin UNICEF tui kici hi. 1988– 92 : Sub-Project Manager (ILO /UNV/UNDP) nasepna tawh Sierra Leone, West Africa ah a innkuan un om hi. 1993 -94 : Road Project Engineer nasepna tawh Cambodia ah om hi. 1994 –95 : Project Consultant (UNDP, Yangon) 1995–97 : NationalInfrastructureConsultant(UNHCR,ProjectinRakhine)nasepnaahProject Engineer za tawh Rakhine gam, Maungtaw khua ah Sanginn, Zato, Lampi leh tui ngah nading a kipan, tuilamte bawlsak hi. 1997-2001 :NationalProfessionalProject(UNESCO,UNOPS/UNDPProject-Myanmar)nuaiah Consultant sem in, Shan gam saklam, Kawlgam laizang tui haksana munte leh Irrawady gamkuam tengah Sanginn-te puahsak in, Tui haksate tui laksak hi. 2001-2011 : United Nations Peacekeeping Mission, Sudan nuaiaa Water Sanitation Project ah Chief Engineer za tawh Sudan gamah kum 10 val sem hi. Leitungbup kipawlna UNO te ii Ulian za nei mi 1000 a ciaptehna sungah khat in kihel hi. Hi banga ciaptehna ngahna pen Zomite lak genloh Khamtung gam bupah a kihelzo amah bek ahi hi. 2011 kumin a nasepna pan tawlnga in, a zi leh a tate tawh Singapore ah teeng uh hi. Hong nusiatna 2012 May tha in stroke hon ngah in, Singapore Changi Hospital ah kum 3 bang kibawl in, hong damkik hi. 2015 kumin stroke hon ngah kik in, tua pan Kawlgam lamah ciah in, theihtawp in kibawl hi. Topa’ gelnasa om bangin 3.7.2018 (Tue) ni, zingsang 6:40 hun in a omna Yangon khuapi, a lupna tung pan hon nusia hi.
Pu Zel Za Dal

Zomi guitar tumsiam Khai Kam
Min pi : Khai Kam Sing (Exit) Khua lui : Laai Tui Tulian omna khua leh gam : Yangon Pianna Tuun leh Zua min : &#8211; Zam Khan Niang ( Nu ) &#8211; Lam Za Mung ( Pa ) Pianpih Laizom : 1. Niang Luai Mang 2. Ning Dot Nuam @Magaret 3. En Van Thang 4. Khai Kam Sing 5. Kam Za Hong Tulai tak tumna Band Believe, EXIT, Hello, The Guest, TABERNACLE leh Shakinah. Ukna (Hobbies) : &#8211; Lai sim (reading), -Lai gelh (writing), -Lim suaih (Drawing) leh -Boxing. LST tang leh dawng na thangah na: Johan 16:13 Tua ahih manin thuman hong lak ding Kha Siangtho hong tun ciangin thu khempeuh a manin hong hilh ding hi. Ama ngaihsuttawm thu hong gending hilo a, ama tungah a kigen thute le a hong tung ding thute a hong gen ding ahi hi. GZC Q1. Music sung na kidiah zawh asawt ta na KK: Ka tan 10 ong kum pa ki pan. GZC Q2. Zomi sung kawlla, mangla minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? KK: Angtang mahmah ingh GZC Q3. Music nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh ngei hiam, Na music tumsa te lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla KK: Kua mah theih khawl loh in La pawl khat nagelh ngei mah ing. Ka music tum sa teng zong a tam het kei hang hoih sa leh thangah gai ingh. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music lam ki khangto theiding KK: &#8220;Life is the process of learning&#8221; cih mah bangin, ih hutawp dongh sin sawm zo den leng ki khangto zawdeuh in um ingh. Lungdam. GZC :- Koh lungdam zawkan ungh, hun geel sa hong picin nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep, nabawl khatpeuh ah Zomi te laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzangh toto laita in. Na Zomi pihte in hong angtang lua ungh ey maw. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Zomi lasiam &#8220;Vai&#8221;
Min pi: Vai Suan Lian Kham Khua: Tonzang Suahni: Oct 8th, 1986 Pilna: BSc ( Geology) Tulaitak omna: Tulsa. OK . USA Pianna Tuun le Zua: &#8211; Sm Sian Lun Niang ( Nu ) &#8211; Rev. Suan Khen Mung ( CMBC) ( Pa ) Pianpih Laizom: &#8211; Ka Nau numei: Lia Go San Lun &#8211; Ka Nau Pasal: Pa Pau Cin Khup(GMI) &#8211; Azi Nu Man Zen Niiang(GMI) Ukna: La phuah , La Sak LST Mun: 1Peter5:6u GZC Q1. Musicsung na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Nong genthei ding hiam? VAI: Neu lai bel Biakinn ah Choir ding zel, Tan 9 pawl pan bel solo la sak,la phuah lam uk tatak pan. GZC Q2. Zomi sung kawlla, mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? VAI: Angtang pih mah ing. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na lasak/laphuah/ lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? VAI: Inn ( Ka Nu Inn) GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music lam ki khangto theiding? VAI: Khang toh na ding bel hih hi cih gen thei lian keng, Kei muhna ah, Music bel a ciang tan omlo ei ii phuak zawh, bawl zawh na tantan in a tang zai mahmah khat in mu ing, tua aihciang a La ih phuah ih bawl ciang ei leh ei zong kiciang tan lo in ih feeling dandan in bawl khiat zawh ding hoih sa ing, gentehna hi dan music style om ngei lo cih sang, a om nai lo music style, lamal a ki pan music siam te tawh bawl khawm in hih khia zo leng a ki khang to tam ci in mu ing. GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. VAI: Lungdam ing, Kei bang album khat zong bawl zo nailo, la zong ka khum dawng nga val pha nai lo ding. Inn la lian bek mah tawh hong ki thei hi in, tuni ciang dong tha hong pia pia lai, a kua ma peuh tung ah lungdam mahmah ing cih hong gen nuam ing. GZC :- Koh lungdam zawkan ungh e, kahun geel uh hong picinh nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep, nabawl khatpeuh ah Zomi te a laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzangh toto laita in. Na Zomi pihte in hong angtang lua ungh maw. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Zomi lasiam &#8221; Nu Toih &#8220;
Min pi &#8211; Awi Nuam Cing ( Nu Toih ) Kham khua- Suang Zang / Zang Tui Suah ni- September 14,1988 Pil na- BA(Religion), Diploma of music Pian na Tun leh zua: &#8211; Man Za Niang (Nu ) &#8211; Thawng Za Hau ( Pa ) Sanggam laizom te min: 1.Dai Do Thang 2.Thang Khan Mang 3.Kham Khan Suan 4.Hau Sian Dim 5.Go Sian Huai 6.Kap Suan Mang 7.Awi Nuam Cing (Kei) Ukna- Lasak leh Meh bawl. LST Mun: Nahum 1:7 GZC Q1. Lasak/Music lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Nong genthei ding hiam? NT: 2008 pan hi. GZC Q2. Zomi sung kawlla, mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? NT: Nak ang tan huai lua ee.. tam pi pi ong om lai ding lung gulh leh lam en mah mah ingh. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na lasak/laphuah/ lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? NT: La phuak ki cian nei ngei keng.. Tua lam talent nei keng. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music lam ki khangto theiding? NT: Zomi ten Ih hih na ah Topa ma sak in pil na tawh thuah in hi leng Ih siam na te ong muang tuang Zo in um ingh.. pil na tawh Ih thuah ding ki sam sa ingh.. ( Tu hun ciang tual siam ) in ong tang zai zo tak tak nawn Kei. Note &#8211; kei mi mal muh na GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. NT: Gen nop khatpeuh ahih leh Kei leltak nong phawk uh Ka lungdam.. mailam ah hih page ong dau pai semsem lai un.. Lungdam mahmah ingh.. Rapsiam Totti Mung (Eye Zomi)
Min pi : Totti Mung Kham khua : Tedim Suahni : December 9 Pilna : Park University ah BA kah laitak Pianna Tuun leh Zua min : &#8211; Cing Sian Ngai ( Nu ) &#8211; Thang Khan Cin ( Pa ) Pianpih Laizom te min : &#8211; Pa Thang Piang &#8211; Nu Zo No &#8211; Lia Cing Khek &#8211; Tg Jay Kim (EYEZOMI) &#8211; Tg Sian Tuang (EYEZOMI) Ukna (Hobbies) : Bawlung suih LST Mun : JOSHUA 1:9 GZC Q1. Lasak/Music sung na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Nong genthei ding hiam? TM: Lasak/Music bel ka neu tung pek pan ka uk mahmah khat hi. A hih zong in 2011 khawng ciang in ko leh ko theih na neilo, siam na nei lo, mi mal kim han ciam na bek tawh la bawl ki pan ung. Neu mahmah lai ka hih man un ka siam loh uh hang hong ki pak ta mahmah hi. GZC Q2. Zomi sung kawlla, mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? TM: Ang tang huai sa mahmah ing. Mai lam ah zong Zomi te mi liang ko tung ah om ding in zong lam en ing. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na lasak/laphuah/ lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? TM: Lamal bel a tam zaw kei phuak vive hi. A hih hang ka group vua ki huh theih na tek ah ki huh ngei ngai. Ka la sak teng lak pan “Hong Mang Ngilh In” leh “Hong Thum Ing” mah hoih sa penpen ing. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music lam ki khangto theiding? TM: Ei Zomi te zong ki khang to zaw deuh ta. Tua lak ah a mai dawk deuh 2/3 nei ih hih man in zong ang tang huai sa mahmah ing. Ei Zomi te music lam ih khang toh na ding pen ei leh ei ih han ciam kul ding ci khat in mu ing. Tuhun ciang la bawl ding zong baih mahmah hi, a hih hang in baih ta ci in bawl gawp kei leng hoih sa ing. La dawng khat bekbek hun tam pi piak sawm in, hoih ta ei na cih ciang ngai kik kik lai in, na puah phat ding tam pi hong om lai ding hi. Na han ciam na zahzah a gah mu kik ham tang ding hi teh cih tawh tha hong pia nuam ing. GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. TM: Na mai ah lung kiat na ding bang zah bang za a om phial zong, nung kik lo a mai nawt den in. Hak sat na om kei leh gual zawh na omlo hi. Na hoih khat pen a baih in ki ngah pah lo hi, tua a hih man in citak tak in mai nawt lecin ni khat ni ciang tang tung veve ding hi teh cih tawh mi mal kim tha hong pia nuam ing. Lung dam. GZC :- Lungdam lua ung, kahun geel uh hong picinh nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep, nabawl khatpeuh ah Zomi te a laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzangh toto laita in. Hibang lasak dan namtuam tuam nong pat uh Zomi pihte na ki angtang tuam lua hi. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page

Minpi – Thang Lung Muan Khua lui – Bungpilon Suahni – 10th October 1990 (Documents ah 10th October 1993) Pilna – BA (Pol.) Amah in mi thumante kilingsak ngei lo ding hi.&#8221; GZC Q1. Dotna hong dong hipah ung, Music sung na kidiah zawh asawt ta na? BM : Laaphuah / Laasak pen neutung pan kipan Sunday School, Biak Inn te ah kihel in, kidemna te ahzong na kihelto….. Aihang, Mipi lak ah kongsak taktak bel 2009 pan hi. GZC Q2. Zomi sung kawlla, mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? BM : Zomi sung a Kawlla, Mangla, leh minam dangte laa sakpihthei leh tumpihthei ineihpen Pasian thupha taktak in kamu a, aangtang huai sa mahmah ingh…. GZC Q3. BM : Laa pen kasak leh saknailoh tawh 14 bang kaphuakta hi… Kasak te lakpan Zogam laa ah ZOTATE GIBANG KHEN ZONG leh Zawl Laa ah KHUAMBANG KIPNI cihte kalungkim hi….. Adangte zong veina leh iitna taktawh kaphuak hi in, hoihsa tek ingh. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music lam ki khangto theiding? BM : Zomi te in, music lam a ih khantohna diing in Laaphuak te in Laamal hoihtak, beklo A Aw (tune) hoih lehpen Atum siam kihau mahmahta ahihman in khantohna omding hi…. Kacihna, a Laa Aw hoihlo pi pen muibun thei lo hi. Ban ah, Music tum zong nidang hun bang hinawnlo in Basic petmah tawh, kipan in… Staff notation mah tawh siamta ihihman in, tuamah bulphuh to lehang leitung level kibaan dinghi. Tuaban ah a kisam, Kipahtawi, kilapsang pen Zomite isiam nailoh thu hi. Kigensisat sang a Kilapsang isiam teh kikhangto dinghi. GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. BM : Music tawh kisailo ah, keipen Zomi a iit mahmah kahih mahbang in, Zomi te ih omna ih tenna atuam dungzui in awkaih, kampau tuam thei hi… Tuate pe Zomi te pau hi ci a ihsantheih a, Zomi sung kideidanna, kiciziatna, kikhentuamna te paikhia a, Unification Lungsim ineih a Kawlgam-Vaigam, Tuipigal a om Zomite ih pankhawm uh kalunggulh hi. Zolia Lasiam Rody Za Lien Sing
Min pi : Rody Za Lien Sing Khua lui : Mualnuam Suahni : 28th October Pilna : &#8211; MA in Political Science, Delhi University. &#8211; MA Social Work in Children and Families, Tata Institute of Social Sciences, Mumbai. Pianna Tuun leh Zua min: &#8211; Nu Lalsanhim ( Nu ) &#8211; Dr. Rev. Enn Za Sian Sanggam Laizom te min: -El Dim Sian Niang -Daniel Kap Za Thang -Hermon Hauh Thang Hlun Ukna (Hobbies): Lasak, la ngaih, movie et, meh bawl leh naupang te kiang nasep. LST Mun: “Om hithiat unla, Pasian ka hihna thei un” – Late 46:10 GZC Q1. Laphuah/Lasak lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Nong genthei ding hiam? Rody:- Lasak lian pen ka neu tung pan a uk khat hi ing. Mipi mai ah ka sak masak pen ka theihkhialh keileh kum 9 ka hihlai hi. Tua khit ka sangkahna/college te ah choir (lapawl)te ah kihel in, biakinn ah zong solo na sa to to ing. Studio lut a recording bawl ding pen ka lunggulh masak pen leh tup masak pen zong na hikei, ahihang Pasian in lampi hong na bawlsak to to in mu ing, ka nuntakna ka etkik ciang in. GZC Q2. Zomi sung kawlla, mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? Rody:- Thupi sa mah ing, talent hoih pipi I neih uh. Tu amah bangin namdang ten zong ei laa hong sak sak uh pen thupi sa ing..Gentehna in kei theih tan ah Sia CK Khai phuah Maipha leh Tai Tampi pen Mizo lasiam Vanlalsailova leh Sharon Kings in sa kha, tualo ‘Kha Siangtho’ Sia Kim Pau I phuah mangla in zong kisa in thei ing. Adang zong tampi omkha in teh. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na lasak/laphuah/ lkpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? Rody:- La bel phuak ngei keng. Ahizong tua ka la release nunung, ‘Zion Lathak’ kici pen ka sanggampa Mungno Shoute tawh idea ki share khawm a a la kaih leh arrangement ka bawl uh hi. Ka lasak te bel a vek in hoihsa khin ing. Ahizongin mite deih deuh a ka theih bel Jesu Hi, Tai Tampi,Lungzuan Christmas leh Itna Langaih cih te hi. Tunai a audio ki release thak ‘Itna Anglum’ zong tulaitak ka nuntakna tawh kituak sa ing! GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music lam ki khangto theiding? Rody:- Kei ngaihsutna ah bel midang te I bat sawm luat ciangin man theilo hi. Midangte hih hoih/siamna/idea te etteh theih, aihang amau va hih sawm tuan kei leng. GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. Lungdam Rody:- Lungdam mahmah ing hibanga interview nong bawl uh. I minam sunga lasate na pahtawina uh hi in mu ing. Mailam hunah zong hong zomto zel un. Ka thupil deih penpen (favourite quote) tawh hong zo ning. Manglai in ‘Be kind, for everyone you meet is fighting a battle you know nothing about’ kici. ‘Mi khempeuh tungah itna I lah ding, a tuah uh haksatna ki theihpih khinlo ahihmanin’ cih hi ei. Midang te adingin na hoih I bawlsak kei zongin na sia tun kei ni cih pen ka hihtheih tan a ka zuih sawm hi. Zui thei ciat leng ut ing! SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page

Rev Dam Suan Mung (D.D)

A pa nusiat in a nu gil sungah kha li bek pha pan hi. Anu nusiat ciang zong kum 9 pha pan aa, tagah te lak ah tagah lubawk ka hi hi. A u sia Hau pi kum 16 le a u nu kum 12 pha pan uh hi. 1.11.1974 ni-in zeisuh khazih ka gum pa leh ka topa in sangin gup ngah kitel cianna zawhang 1:12 tung tawn in kangah hi. 1976 kum ciang kha siang tho sungah ki phumna ahi kam tuam pau kangah leuleu hi. Hih kamtuam pau pen luka 24:49 sung a Pasian hong kamciam hi a, kangah ni akipan kha mangthang veina hong khang pah hi. Ka nuntakna ah Pasian hong geelsak na ka tel semsem ciangin, Pasian in ama nasem dingin hong sapna ka tel leuleu hi. 1976 kum A.G.T.I kah kim lai Pasian sapna bangin hunbit in ka kipiaa a, 1977 February khain A.G.T.I sangpan ka tawp hi. 1977JunekhacianginTedim gam Thuklai khua ah Senior Pastor dingin ka pai hi. Kum 2 kasep khit ciangin Pasian gelna om sa bang mahin kei ading ahoih penpen sayama Vung Za Niang tawh 4.8.1979 ni-in Rev Suak Za Go in pumkhat hong suak sak hi. Pasian lamlah na bangin 1980 kumin Southern Asian Bible College ah kakah hi. Kum 2 ka zawh teh sayama Niang sam dingin kaciah hi. Pastport neilo, sum neilo, hong huh ding neilo upna khat bek tawh ka tung kik uh hi. Kum 3 na kumin Pasian in Vision hong pia aa, “Kawlgam pen Zeisu Topa a bulphuh gam suak ding hi”. Tua khit teh kawlgam khuapi yangon ah Pawlpi phut ding, “Zeisu Topa bek muang aa, kha siang tho tawh aki dim Pawlpi mi tul sawm nei ding” cih ngah leuleu hi. Tua zawh teh “Mi phuh sa Pawlpi kem lo ding Pawlpi thak ngiat phut tawm ding” tua makaih ding cih ahi hi.1984 kum siate nupa SABC sang pan degree ngahin hongciah aa, Pasian piak Vision te 1987 kum ciang genkhia pan hi. 13.9.1987 ni-in Pasian lamlahna om bangin yangon khuapi sung Daw Zam Cing te inn bulphuh in “Full Gospel Assembly” Pawlpi kipan hi. Mi a tawm hangin kikhop sial in nalamdang piang aa, cina te dam, dawi hencip te suak ta, kha sungah suahtakna kingah hi. Pawlpi kalsuan zia: (1) Kha thak nikhat ni pan ni sawm ni dong 9:00 AM-4:00 PM dong antan thunget nei hi. (2) Full Gospel Bible Traning Centre 1996 pan kihong aa, 2016 kum ciang 20 cin lungdam kiko hi. (3) State/Division (10) sungah sangmang 36 kipuak khia in, Pawlpi kiphut hi. (4) Pawlpi innphazah (31.8.2017) ciang inn 898 leh Pawlpi mimal 15644 pha khin hi. (5) Yangon Division sung myone (25) sungah evangelist sia (53) leh Laisiangtho sangnaupang te kithuah in lungdamna thu gen uh hi.(6) Full Gospel Assembly Yangon Pawlpi ah khasum sang hunbit sia (93) om hi.(7) Full Gospel Assembly Pawlpi America, Australia, Singapore, Malaysia gamah om hi. Tanu tapa te: (1) Lia Dim San Lun, Bachelor of Science in Nursing (2) Tg Vung Suan Khai,Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering, (3) Zam Sian Mung, Bachelor of Science in Business Management, Bachelor of Science in Business Administration.
Rev. Dr. Do Suan Mung (D.D)
Pa Thawng Khaw Tuan leh Nu Nuam Ngaih Cing te sungpan April21, 1955 (Thursday)ni-in Tedim khua ah suak hi. Unau numei pasal kua lakah angana ahi hi. 1961 kumin Zomi Baptist Academy (ZBA) sangah sangkah kipan a, tua sangah tan nih ciang kah hi. A tan nih kumin a khan sungah a khat na ngah ahih manin Lai Siangtho Thak bu khat kipia a, laipilna tawh kisai-in a ngah masak pen pahtawina ahi hi. Tan thum panin tan sawm dong State High School (1) ah pilnasin hi. A tan giat kumin English distinction tawh zo ahih manin Nu leh Pa leh Siate kipawlna pan Dictionary bu khat kipia hi. Tan kua leh tan sawm ah Luyechun ngah hi. A tan sawm kumin Physics distinction tawh ong hi. Mandalay Arts and Science University ah Chemistry major tawh pilna sin beh a, 1977 March kha in B.Sc ngah hi.American gam a om San Francisco Baptist Theoloical Seminary ah 1981 pan 1985 ciang Lai Siangtho sinin, 1985 kumin M.Div ngah hi. Hih Lai Siangtho sangah a kah sungin sang board pana kipia ‘thuhilh siampen pahtawina’ (Spurgeon Award) leh University of Massachusetts pana kibawl gambup Greek siam kidemnate ah paitawina sang (High Honors) ngah ngei hi. 1986 kumin Kawl gam ah hon ciah kik- a, September 1, 1986 ni-in Tedim khua ah Faith Baptist Bible College phuan hi. February 22, 1987 ni-in Leilum EBC kumcin khawmpi panin tuiphum sia (Ordination) kipia hi. Pasian nasepna ah gual zawhna tuamtuam te hangin America gam, Pennsylvania State, Clarks Summit khua a om Baptist Bible College and Seminary panin May 12, 2000 ni-in Doctor of Divinity (D.D) kipia hi. August 11, 2003 ni- in Yangon ah Faith Baptist Theological Seminary phuan hi. Tedim le Yangon a om Lai Siangtho sang nih te ah siapi asep kawmin EBC gambup kipawlna ah zong president panmun kum sawm tang bang sem khin hi. May24, 1986 ni-in a zi Niiang Ngaih Ciin tawh Topa sungah pumkhat suahna nei uh-a Pasian thupha tanu khat Lydia Cing San lun leh tapa thum, David Tuan Sian Sang, John Hang Muan Lian, Daniel Thang Lam Kim te nei uh hi, Tu Laitakin Yangon ah teeng uh hi. Laibu bawlte:(1) Tapidaw Pawlpi leh a upna taangthu &#8230; &#8230; &#8230;2005,(2) Puak kawikawi theih Laisiangtho sang &#8230; &#8230; &#8230;2011, (3) Tapidaw Pawlpi leh a upna taangthu (kawllai)(4) Rev Dr Do Suan Mung thuhilhna te Volume I &#8230; &#8230; &#8230;2014.
Rev Dr Go Za Kham (D.D)
Pu Kam Zam leh Pi Cing Za Huai te sung panin 15.4.1930 ni-in Tonzang khua ah suak hi. Nu Ngan Fung tawh 7.7.1957 ni-in kiteeng uha, tapa (6) leh tanu (1) nei uh hi. 1944 kumin tui kiphum hi. 1968 kumin piangthak gupngah kitel hi. 5.2.1978 ni-in tuiphum sia ordination) kipia hi. 1949-52 kum Tedim sangmang pa Rev F.ONelson phuat Laisiangtho sangkah a, Dip.Th ngah hi. 1991 kum Faith Baptist Bible College of Seminary pan Honorary Doctor of Divinity (D.D) kipia hi. Pasian nasep na: Tedim gam tuiphum pawlpi sungah vakkawn sia Rev Tun Za Langh tawh kum 2 sung sem hi. Kum khat sung lung vakna editor sem hi. 1954-1968 dong SDA sungah Pastor sem hi. 1962 kum Oswald J.Smith gelth, “The Salvation of God” tungtawn in hehpihna bek tawh gupna kingah lam tel hi. 1974 kum ciangin E.B.C pawlpi phut masa te lak ah kihel hi. Tuni dongin makai pi sem hi. 1985 kumin US ah kisam in States 27 ah hawhsak kawikawi a, pawlpi 300 val ah thugen sak uh hi. A ma mission tawh thuhilh sia 38 khahkhia hi. Dr. Ngul Khaw Pau (SDA-DD)
Tonzang Tedim Kalemyo khuapi Pu Dong Zam (Chongluai) leh Pi Ning Man te sung panin 14.2.1929 kumin Tonzang myo ah suak hi. Sanggam unau 12 lak pan 4 na hi a, Nu Ciin Ngaih Man tawh kiteeng in tapa 5 leh tanu 5 nei uh hi. 1936 kumin Tonzang ah sangkah kipan hi. 1940-42 kumsung Tedim ah sang zom leuleu hi. 1953-55, 59-62 sung MTC –SDA Mission, Myaungmya khua ah LST siang kah kik hi. Rev. Dr. Kam Khaw Thang ( D.D )
Sia Kam Khaw Thang pen Tuithang khua mi Pa Sim Tung Nung (Sukte) leh Nu Ciin Za Dim ta hi a, 17.10.1927 ni-in Tuithang khua Tedim myone ah suak hi.SiaThangangeklaiinanuinsihsanin,apainazi kik Nu Zen Niang tawh kiteeng a, tapa 6 leh tanu 3 nei kik hi. 4.5.1957 ni-in Siamah Niang Khan Ciin Rev Cin Khaw Gin tanu tawh kiteeng in tapa 8 leh tanu 1 nei uh hi. A zi in 12.10.2010 in hong nusia hi. Sangkah na: -KG pan tan 4 dong SPS Tonzang ah 1937-1941 dong kah hi. Rev Vial Nang ten om hi. &#8211; Tan 5 pen SMS Tedim ah 1941-1942 sung kah hi. Bawda ah om hi.-Tan 6 pen SMS Tedim ah 1945- 1947 sung kah in tan 6 zo hi.-Diploma of Theology Tedim Bible 1947-1950 dong kahin 22.10.1950 ni-in Letmat piakna ngei ah sangnaupang 20 in Letmat sang hi.-B.Th, MIT Insein ah 1952-1956 sung Mang Laisiangtho sang kah leuleu hi.-D.D, 15.2.2000 kumin Evangelical Bible Seminary in Doctor of Divinity pia hi.- FDCS 16.3.2003 kum in Fellow of Distinguished Christian Service, MBC, MIT pan pia hi. Nasep na: 11.6.1956 ni-in Hakha Bible School ah Sangsia sep kipan hi. 1.3.1957 ni panin TBA General Secretary sep kipan hi.1961-1982 Holy Bible (Tedim pau tawh) kum 21 sung vilvel tei hi. 1950-2005 dong kum (55) sung laibu tei leh a bawl te bu (55) pha hi.Pahtawina laipi bekbek Pawlpi tuamtuam leh kipawlna tuamtuam pan (75) kipia hi. Tanu tapa te: (1) Pa Nung Khan Kham + Nu San San Lwin (Kawl te)(2) Pa Gin Sian Pau + Nu Man Za Lun (3) Pa Do Suan Lian + Nu Cing Hau Mang(4) Pa Thang Suan Khup + Nu Niing Ngaih Lam(5) Pa Dim Thawn Mang + Nu Niang Go Vung (6) Lia Man Zam Niang(7) Pa Taang Cin Thawn + Nu Ciin Suan Lun (8) Pa Thang Tual Khai + Nu Yu Yu Win San. Laphuak leh lasiam Sia Stephen Mang
Min pi: Gin Lal Mang ( Stephen Mang ) Kham khua: Pangmual (Cikha Myone) Suahni: March 13, 1976 Pilna: M Div Pianna Tuun leh Zua min : -Niang Khaw Cing -Pa Ngai Za Thang Sanggam Laizom te min : -Cin Sian Thang -Rev Vungh Suan Lian -Lam Han Khup -Zam Don Cing -Gin Lal Mang ( Self ) Ukna (Hobbies) : La, Music, Laisim LST Mun : Late 23 bup GZC Q1. Laphuak/Lasak/Music sung na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Nong genthei ding hiam? Dawnna: Kum 15 kiim a kipan music turn biakinn khawngah, alem na munmun ah turn, lasak lian taktak bel ka pianthak ciang lasak kipanpan ing, kum 19 ka phakin Piangthak in LST sangkah in tua a kipan lasa ngam pan ing. Kum 20 ka phak ciangin, hong nusia khin Rev Dr Zogam Lalpu in lakhum dingin hong zawn a Ebenezer no 7 ah la dawng 2 na sa ing. Laphuah pen kum 2000 khit a kipan tarn phuah pan ing. GZC Q2. Zomi sung kawlla, mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? Dawnna: Angtang lua kisa, ih gambup music/la tawh influence zo semsem lai leeng ut ing. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na lasak/laphuah/ lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? Dawnna: Ka laphuah te kei idea vive hi, copy late bel thutuam ci ni. Ka laphuah lak pan ahoihpen cih danin gen thei tuan kei mai ing, ama mun panin hoih sa gai ing. Ahih hang “Penpen Tuunnu” cih la in bel mi nuntakna tarn sukkhak pen leh kilawm sa ing, ka phuah, ka record a kipan tuni dong, na laphuah in hong sukha lua, kikhelna in na nei ing, cih a kipan tuni dong za toto lai ing. “Nute Ni” hong tun sim in Biakinn ah adiak in India a i mipihten na sa den lai uh hi. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music lam ki khangto theiding? Dawnna: Hanciamna kisam sa ing, tu a sang ih khantoh zawk theih nadingin, hanciam, ei thu in kan kawikawi music sang akah zolo ten zong online panin pilna ngah theih nading tamlua ta hi. Hanciam in hi peuh leeng khamtung khuano khat panin zong Master dong ngah zawh nading pilna kikhuat khia thei lua hi. Hanciam ni! GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. Dawnna: Gennop bel tamlua, ahihhang khat hong gen ning. Zomite kithapiakna kisam sa ing. Mikhat in laibu a bawl leh leisak pah ziahziah leeng hong bawl kikkik zo ding hi. Music album khat a bawl leh leisak pah siausiau leeng hong bawlkik nuam pah ding hi. Album bawl thak khat, i-meltheih ahikei zongin lungdampihna laikhak cihte ciing leeng hoih sa mahmah ing. Hibang interview na ah kei nong hel khak manun angtang kisa ing. GZC :- Lungdam lua ei maw, kahun geelte uh hong picinh nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep, nabawl khatpeuh ah Zomi te a laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzangh toto laita in. Na Zomi pihte in hong angtang lua ungh. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Lasiam Lian Naulak
Minpi: Ngul Min Lian ( Lian Naulak, Minmin ) Suahni : 23rd February 1991 Pianna: Imphal ( Tonzang mi ) Pianna Tuun leh Zua : -Sian Kim Changsan ( Nu ) -Lian Khan Suan Naulak ( Pa ) •Lyricist ( Den ciang cise ken laphuak pa ) •Founder/Principal Golden Harvest School, Mizoram. ( Pa Nasep ) •Graduate ( Pa lai pilna ) Khamkhua : Tonzang, Kansau. Pianpih sanggam u leh nau : -Pasal thum le numei khat -Uzaw pasal khat le nauzaw pasal khat -Nautum in numei hi Khankhiatna Khua te : -Aizawl, Lamka, Phai leh Delhi. Pilsinna leh Sangkahna : -Graduate ( India ) -St Paul Institute ( India ) -Blue Star Academy ( India ) Ukna ( Hobbies ) : -Lasak leh La ngaih. -Music lam tawh kisai limlim. Laisiangtho bulphuh : •Late 118:8 √ Mi i muan sangin Topa belh ding hoihzaw hi. Nasepna leh mapan na, kihel khakna te : -Minam sung, Pawlpi sung, Kipawlna sung te ah hong kisapna bangin kihel zelzel. -Minam sung, Pawlpi sung leh Kipawlna tuam tuam te ah hong kisawl nakpeuh leh niallo in hong kisawlna bang asem dingin man sa in om gige ing. Nasep: -Tulian in bel Full time Vocal Performer dan himai ing, Hong kisapna khatpeuh ah lasa in Hotel/Cafe, Private Party/Function te ah pai koikoi ing. -Nasep leh Music kisai khawm theilo ahih manin ka nasep khawl bawl mai ing. Tualo hun paisa in bel BPO ah nasem ing, kum giat kiim ka sep zawh teh GGS Infosolution Pvt Ltd ah Night Shift Manager zaa dong nalen man ing. Tupna leh Ngimna : -Ka tup leh ka lunggulh lianpen ahih leh Gupna kician ngah a Vantung gamlut ding. -Tua lo leitung thu ah keima mimal Music sang (Production) leh Jam Pad hong ding ka ngimna ahi hi. Zomi nam vai na muhna leh nadeih sakna : -Tu ciangciang kei muhna panin Pasian hong Itna leh hong na makaihna hangin i minam Zomi te ki khangto mahmah ta hi, sim le mal, suah le tum i omna tek ah mihau, mipil, misiam zong kitam ta, mailam hun ah tuhun sang zong hong tamsem lai dingin Zomi khangthak ten hanciam ni. Leitungbup minam vai khatpeuh a kisai ciang “Sak leh Khang” ki cici nawn keini, makaih zaa iplah luatna te tawpsan ta ni, tavuan hong kiguan/ki piak khak keileh zong lungdam dan a siam ding, a kiniam khiat thei ding, ma abung khawm thei siausiau dingin a nungta Vanglian Pasian in i milip lungsim sungah thu hong gen henla, khat tek tung thupha hong pia ta hen, tua hihleh i minam hong cidam pan ding hi. Na la phuah zah le na lasak zah? -Avek pi gawmin dawng 30 kiim pha ta. -Kei laphuah hileh mi la hitaleh kasak tampian in azah lian gen thei lian kei mai ing. La album na bawl zah : -Album lian bel bawl zo nailo, hanciam laitak (Sponsored ding zong). -Single EP dan bel dawng 4 hi. -Ei Zola 2 leh mangla 2. Show leh Concert te ah nakihel zah : -Competition dan Show ah khatvei, Concert/Function/Private Party dan bel ngavei tualeh Live Solo/Duo dan in Hotel/Cafe ah bel 100 kiim phata ding hi. Gamdang na zin nasa Gamte : -Kawlgam, India, Nepal, Bangkok. Zomi sung ah laphuak siam nasak mi3 : 1. Pauno (Lengtong) 2. Thawn Kham 3. Stephen Mang GZC Q1. Music sung na kidiah zawh asawt ta na, Tualeh tulian in na band ah kua in music hong tumsak hiam? LN : Sawt veve cihding hi, kum 17-18 kiim kaphak in na kipan ta ing, midang khempeuh sang kaneu lawmte leh ka sangkah pih lawmte bekin ka music uklam hong telpih zaw ding uhhi. Tulaitak ka music tum dingin Micky Fitt , Moses Lall leh Vickey hi tualo in a kisap hun in Khupboih a dangsiah bel khatpeuh alem penpen tawh laih koikoi cihdan hi. GZC Q.2 A zenzen in gamthum Zomi kipawlna tuamtuam te pan sapna ngah lecin na kihel thei uh tam? LN : Aw i minam (Zomi) in tuabang a ka bandte hong kisam ahih leh bel kihel theihna ding lampi ka hanciam uh hong kulve. Kei bel a kihel thei dingin man tawntung ing. GZC Q3. A tawpna pen dingin nagennop khatpeuh Zomi musiciante thapiaknop na neihleh? LN : Kei bang peuh gen kua in a umding leh hong mang ding zong hisam lo aihteh maw, aih hang nong dotna bangun tawm hong dawng hi ning, Zomi Daily leh Laibusaal tungtawn in ka na gen ngeisa mah bangin ei i idea (theihna), ei i bawl ngiat music ahi, mi i music maw, mi i late copy lo in minthang sawm hamtang leng cih akuama peuh kong deihsak leh kong hanthawn nuam hi. Tua banah ka gennop khat omlai tua in ahih leh ka showte ah kala te sangbel ei Zokam pau musiciante mah deihsak masa zaw tawntung na pi ing in a nawng kai kik leuleu khatbel eipawl vanzat (Music Instrument) drum set/kit cihbang a lakpak nading hamsa mahmah hi, eima neihsa ahilo mi a ih kawm,zatnuam hang na lemding maw lemlo ding cih ki genkhol theilo hi, midang in zong na kawmin na zang thei ahih manin, ei pawl a neilo vive kihi in ah i ki deihsak mahmah, i ki angvan nop hang piang theilo hong suakhi. Lungdam. GZC: Lungdam ei maw, kahun geelte uh hong picin nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep, nabawl khatpeuh ah Zomi te a laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzang toto laita in. Na Zomi pihte in hong angtang lua ungh maw. LN : AMEN! No te zong tua bang mahin mi madawk zawh deuhte bektham loin midangte a thapia zo tawntung ding leh a interview zo semsem dingin hong lamzang to un maw. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Guitar Tumsiam Mg Muang (Born Naked)
Minpi: CIN SIAN MUANG ( Mg Muang ) Khua lui: Pianna khua pen Ngente, Thalmual mi Suahni: December 4,1979 Lai Pilna: BLA in Music, MA Education ( Andrew University) Pianna Tuun leh Zua min: -Nu. Luan Khan Dim -Pa. Vungh Do Thang leh Sanggam Laizom te min: -Vung Khan Nuam @ Nuamboih (singer) -Niang Ngaih Khawm -Zen Nuam Lun -Vungh Than Kim -Cin Sawm Piang -Cing Suan Lian -Kap Lian Cing -Pau Sian Khual Ukna ( Hobbies): -Listening music, lai at, la phuah, laibu sim, football kimawl, teaching music, guitar puah LST bulphuh: -Matt 6:33, -John 3:16, -Psalm 1:1-4, -Philippians 4:1 GZC Q1. Laphuah/Music lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Nong genthei ding hiam? MG: 2000 pan music tawh nasep kipan ingh. Tua aa kipan tuni dong mah ka nasep pi pen hi. Kum 14 ka phak pan la phuah kisin ingh. Lasak bel ka neu tung pan ka uk khat hi. Guitar tum ka uk zah mah in lasak uk ingh 2003 ciang bang la naksak mahmah ingh. Tua khit bel guitar lam bek nak tum zaw in lasak khawl san pianpian ingh a hih hang ka nasep profession khat a hih man choir makaih na cih dan leh sang ah music hilh na ah sak loh phamawh a hihman khawlbawl thei tuan keng. Professionally in bel lasa lo hizaw ingh. &#8212;&#8212;- GZC Q2. Zomi sungah nangmah bangin kawlla, mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? MG: Angtang peuhmah ingh. A hihhang eila eipau paisan liangh leh sa thei nawnlo or sa nuamlo cihdan te bel kipuah phat huaisa ingh. A kisapna na ah a hunzui in kizat theih ding thupi leh hanciam huai pen sa ingh. &#8212;&#8212;- GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na musictum/laphuah/ lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? MG: Ka late a tamzaw kei original hi. Ka kipat cil lam in bel copy ka sak zong om leh translation la bawl zong dawng 10 kiim bang om veve. Pasian tawh ka kizopna ong tha hatsak den khat, ka la phuah te sung pan mi tampi ong deihpih khat bel “ Topa Muang in” a cih ka u Nuamboih sak pen. Tualo a dang khat album thak ka bawl sung pan “ Ka Topa’n hong za” cih te 2 &#8212;&#8212;- GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music lam ki khangto theiding? MG: Music lam I khantoh nop leh -Innsung ah music standard nei te tampi naupang te zak ding in hong den ding. Music instrument a sawk theih ding uh koih sak ding. A siatsak vua leh zong a dang leisak kik ding khoih saksak ding toys tang in zangh zo le uh instrument khat pepeuh ong siam lel ding uh hi. Kum tawm lai naupang te music education kician sinsak ding. -Music theory gina tak sinsak ding. Cimphawng tum bek tawh ki khuasuak zolo in, a bul abal mah aa kan vilvel zo te mah belhcian dawl zawdeuh hamtang. -Nu le pa ten music sin pen kivak na ding bek I sak khak pah loh ding thupi hi. Kivak na ding bek I ngaihsut pen a met ne nuam bek himawk a hihman tua ngaihsut na pen paikhia masa ding thupi hi. Music pen educational learning a hih lam nu le pa ten a pomsiam kisam hi. Pawlpi in khangno te music lam ah pantah zo leng. Music zahtak siam sak leng: gtn, Biakna ah a kilawm lo Music te pen biakinn ah ong tum loh nang uh counselling piak kisam. Secular life a hih leh lah Khua makai ten a kiva leh a hanciam pih tak te thapia in sinsak in a siam uh teh khuasung naupang te hawmsawn kik sak ding etc. Lai bang bawl ngiat ding in goal kician neisak ding.. baih het lo kha thei a hih hang khantoh nop leh I tuacih kisam ding.. &#8212;&#8212;- GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. MG: Leitung khantoh tawh kizui in Zomi te living standard zong khangto ta a hih teh pupa thukhual na leh cihtakna I khahsuah loh ding thupi. Makai a sem ding khat pepeuh in ei tawm vei nopsak pak ding lunggulh na hang in khua le tui in gentheih lawh phamawh asa lo te I hih loh ding khang thak te ong hanthawn nuam ingh. Jazz music pu Scofield in na khat peuh na siam nop leh nai 10,000 practice kisam ci hi. Cihtak na leh kuhkal na kisam hi. Shortcut tawh master cih bang siamna khat peuh sinna ah omlo theilo hi. GZC ten kei bang lel ngaihsut na thu sun khuan nong piak uh ka lungdam. &#8212;&#8212;- GZC :- Kohzong lungdam lua ey maw, kahun geelte uh hong picinh nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep, nabawl khatpeuh ah Zomi te a laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzangh toto laita in. Na Zomi pihte in hong angtang lua ungh ei maw. SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Zomi lasiam &#8220;Tungpu&#8221;
Minpi: Mang Lian Tung ( Defy Tung Pu ) Kham khua : Lom Zang ရွာ (Ton Zang မြို့) Tulian omna : South Okalar Township, Yangon, Myanmar Suahni : July 3, 1988 Pilna : University of Medicine Yangon (2)Second_Year ( ကျောင်းအပြီးနားဝါသ­နာရည်မှန်းချက်အတွက် စွန့်လွှတ်) Pianna Tuun leh Zua min : Pa &#8211; Sian Khan Thang Nu &#8211; Man Go Vung Sanggam Laizom te min : 1. No Cing 2. Khup Pi (Thang Tung Khup) 3. Tung Pu (me myself) 4. Huai Nu (No Sian Huai) 5. Ki Kim (Kap Kim Thaung) 6. Nuam Nu (Man Nuam Kim) Ukna (Hobbies) : တေးရေး၊ တေးဆို၊ စာပေ ။ *LST Mun : ရောမ 12:21 အဆိုးအားဖြင့် အရှုံးမခံနှင့်။ အကောင်းအားဖြင့် အဆိုးကိုနိုင်လော့။ GZC Q1. Hong dongpah saisai nung, Laphuah/Lasak lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Nong genthei ding hiam? TP: &#8211; 2004, 2005 pawl (tann 9, tann 10 pawl ki pan)_around 16 years cing vak iiyaw tun. GZC Q2. Zomi sung nang mah bangin kawlla hitaleh mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? TP: &#8211; Dotna tel khol lo (question) But, let me guess and try to answer. Ang tang pih ing. Eila zong sa theiding min ang hatciang zong amau deihna bang late i sak theihna in gualtung tuanna hi. GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na lasak/laphuah/ lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? TP: &#8211; Yes, Own(own tunes, own…… ) ” ယုံကြည်ရာ ” ma hi lo dia. Instruments bel tum lo, tua zawh ciang, kei ma ii band(Deficiency) bek tawh bek laa sah ing)_gam dang gam tuam pan, hong ki hat leh bel, han ciam in နားလည်မှု tawh sa theih zel ing. GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music lam ki khangto theiding? TP: &#8211; ဝမ်းစာဖြည့်ခြင်း + ကြိုးစားခြင်း + လေ့လာမှတ်သားခြင်း(co­ntinuous learning) GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. TP: &#8211; God is everything and Music is the present to human beings. Ih Minam leh ka Pawlpi Itna tawh Sepkhiatna te: Nasepna mun tawh ki tuakin nasepna khat peuhpeuh a kimu theih ding leh, ih nung sangah ih mite a dingin na hoih nusiat ding ka lunggulh hi. Ka omna mun hong luah dingte in nuam tak-aa a om theih dingin ka deihna lian pen hi. Tua mah bangin Pasian in hong ompihna tawh a nuai-a bang ka nung sang a dingin na hoih nusiat ing ci-in ka ciamteh hi, ih mipih te’n hong muhna tuam kha thei mai ding. 1. 2002 kumin, Tedim, Myomah venga UPCM Biakinn pi huang mai-a leitang awng 10ft x 113 ft, teng Pawlpi aa dingin khazai zumpi Falam ah ka na ngen hi. Falam nihvei pha in 2002 kum-a ngetna 2005 kumin na kia hi. Tedim aa, UPCM Biakinn huang ki beh lapin Pawlpi-in phattuam pih hi. 2. Northern District ah Secretary kasep kum 1998 a kipan, Biakinn ding hanciam pih in, Pasian panpihna tawh, Tedim khua, Myomah vengah, First floor: 63ft x 18ft underground-1; Second floor: 63ft x 54ft underground-2; Third floor: 63ft x 36ft; Fourth floor: 63ft x 12ft, Biakinnpi khat Pasian in hong lamsak hi. Second floor underground-2 panin a tung khum ciang, ft.35 pha-in, nipi kal masa, Dec, 2009 kumin lutna kinei thei hi. 3. Kalay District-2 Zomite innteekna gam phelnih asuah zawh kum 9 a phak khitna munah kilemna bawl (peace maker) dingin vaipuakna 2008 kumin hong kipia aa, Pasian in 2010 kumin gual zawhna hong pia hi. Khennih aa om District gam khat tu-in pumkhat suakin office kihong kik thei hi. 4. Ka pianna khua, Buanli-ah tui tha tawh mei ngah theihna dingin sum le pai zonna ahi aa, nasepna bawlna ahi zongin makaih in Pasian panpihna tawh, 2010 kum panin Electric mei kizangh thei-in, tu ni dong kizangh lai hi.5. 2014 kum pan kipan kawlpi buda galah 18ft x 45ft Biakinn khat ka lam laitak hi. 2016 kum sungin zawh ding ka lamen hi. 6. General Mission Director of UPCM panin, Evangelist 10 te huhna ding vaihawm sak in Pasian gam nasepna kaneih laitak hi.

Tonzang gam, Saipimual khua pan in 1984 September 12 ni in Rev. En Za Kap (Tombing) (L) le Nu Niang Go Cing (Siahliap) (L) te sung pan ka piang hi. Unau numei nih leh pasal thum pha in anihna hi. Apu GinZaCin(Tombing (L) in a khua vuah Hausa asep laitakin piang ka hih man in Cin Khaw Mung ci in phuak hi. 1987 kum in Tahan ah lalsuk in tuni ciang teng hi. 1996 May 12 ni in Jesuh gumpa in sang a, Pasian na sem ding cih khensatna tawh Laisiangtho sang kah hi. 2000 January kha in Emmanuel Bible College, Lamka, Manipur, India ah Laisiangtho sang kah ki pan hi. A sang kah sung in gilkialna, hamsatna tampi banah, 2001 August 24 ni in a Pu in ong nusia cih a zakciang in dah mahmah hi. 2002 June kha in Bangalore ah sangkah na maban zom ding in pai kik a, Calvin Theological College ah kum khat kah hi. Sum le paai, pau le ham a kipan hamsatna tampi phukha hi. 2003 June kha apat 2009 March kha ciang Berean Baptist Bible College Seminary ah kah in B.Th, B.Div, M.Div le M.Th. degree te ngah hi. 2006 March kha in B.Th zo in, innlam ciah nuam a sum neih loh na hangin ciah zolo hi. B.Div. kah kum 2006 December 7 ni in a pa in emial khak a, a nu sih gen ahih manin khitui nap tui tawh om hi. B.Th. zawh khit phet in ciah zo leh a nu tawh ki mu man ding cih bekbek ngaihsun hi. Thanem pipi in B.Div zom a, Piano tum in sang sum kisik tawm hi. M.Div. a man khit ciangin a siapi pa huhna tawh innah ciah zo hi. Bangalore ah kum guk sung khatvei bek ciah hi. Inn a tun ciangin a pa zong dam lo ahih manin mel theih te in a sang zom loin a pa a khoi zawk ding kho uh hi. Apai na sang zop zawk ding tha pia hi. A pa in Lai Siang tho bu lain, “Isaiah26:12,Topa aw, kote tung ah mavanna hong pia in. Kote’ matut zawhna khempeuh nangmah in na hong sepsakna hanga hi hi hi.” simsak hi. Tua khit ciangin apaina lutungah khut ngain thupha apia hi.A pa kiangah Pasian&#8217; nasep ken na zom ning, cih pen a kiho tawpna kammal hi. Ka sangkah sungin na sih leh zong kilungnuam sak in, na maban a zom dingin sang kah ka hi hi, ci-in a pa vaikhak hi. Apa&#8217; lunggulhna bangin sang zom kik hi. M.Th a kah kum 2008 August 6 ni-in apa in nusia hi, ci-in phone ki set hi. Tua kawmkalah khitui naptui mah tawh a sang zom teitei hi. Topa in 2009 March kha in M.Th. zawh pih hi. July 11, 2009 ni in a u pasal in nu sia leuleu hi. Pasian in hong taisan ahi tam ci-in tamveipi ngaihsun hi. Aih hang Topa’n nusia lo in tonpih, makaih na nisim in phawksak veve hi (Kahla 3:21- 25). 2010 kum pan in Kawlpi Lai Siangtho sang thum ah lai hilh hi. November 20,2011 in a pi in nusia leuleu hi. A nuntakna sungah haksatna, dah na, kahna, lungkham nate in tuihual bangin nawk den in ki ngaihsun hi. Pa Pau Khen Kap (Naulak) le Nu Zen Suan Cing(Gualnam) te tanu neu pen ahi Lia. Lian Ngaih Nem B.Sc tawh May 12, 2012 in ka kiteng uh hi. Guahzuk khit ciangin ni a hong taan tawh ki bang hi. Tapa khat nei uh hi. Yemyung Graduate University ah,Ph.D asin laitak hi. Anuntakna sungah ka thalakna kammal in, AGUALZO TE LUNGKIA NGEILO, A LUNGKIA TE GUALZO NGEILO, hih kammal ahi hi.

Daw Ciin Muan Khai
Dr Mang Cin Pau leh Pi Vung Kho Huai te sung pan 10.7.1989 ni-in suak hi. Sangkah na: -Tan lang pan tan thum ciang Shan state Moe Hnin khua ah kah hi.-Tan li pan tan nga ciang Yangon Division Dalah myone ah kah hi.-2005 kumin BEHS No.5 Botataung pan tan 10, 2D (Maths, Chem) tawh zo hi.-2006-2009 National Management ah kah a, Bachelor of Business in Management (BBM). -2009 kum sung Diploma in Accounting leh Diploma in Management Accounting (LCCI-Uk).-2009-12 Master of Business Administration kah a, Thesis Topic “Marketing Activities of Myananda Purified Drinking Water Factory” at hi.-2012 pan Kanbawza Bank Limited ah Manager, Human Resources Department ah sem hi. Thubul phuh: Mate 6:33 “Pasian amasa penin koih peuh leng, adang khempeuh damdamin hong pai ding hi”, cih ahi hi.(1) Kawl ten hongsim mawhloh nading puansilh nikteen akipan lai leh pilna lamah Zo hai ( ) hong cih loh nading amau te demin ka hanciam den hi. (2) A nungta Pasian aum abia te ih hih lam hong theih nadingin nuntakna tawh kalak tawntung hi.(3) Dr Mangpi pen a pa hia, minam a it leh Zolai a it mahmah khat ahih manin a min zong kawl min pia lo in zo min mah pia ngiat hi. Sihzang lai leh Sihzang pau theih ding hanciam hi.(4) A tup a ngim bup penin ei generation hun ciang kawl te influent ding ci hi. Ei ma nuntak dan kawl ten hong muh ciang anung ta Pasian muthei pan ding hi ci hi. Pasian in hong laptoh na pen midang te Pasian amuh theih nading ahi hi. Kum 25 apha pan nungakno khat in Pasian zahtak in ki niamkhiat in Pasian maipha azon manin Pasian in kawl te lakah a lamdang tak in hong laptoh sak hi.

Lian Za Dal in ordination pia hi. 2005-2008 Pinlong Baptist Church ah Associate Pastor sem hi. Kumpi sawlna tawh 1961 kum in India gam Eltras Dum ah kha thum kah sak hi. Tan lang tan sawm dong a khatna ta ngah hi. Tan 5 pan tan 10 dong scholarship ngah hi. 1997 kumin Malaysia, Singapore, Thailand te ah kumpi vai in pai hi. H.E. Hau Do Suan
Pianna leh Sangkahna: Pa Khai Za Dal leh Nu Luan Zen te suan le khak 5 lakah upen ahi hi. Cingpikot khua ah November 1,1954 in suak hi. Meiktila (Tatmadaw Children’ High School) ah tan 4 ciang kah hi. Tan 5-7 Cingpikot khua SMS ah, tan 8-10 Tedim ah kah a, Mandalay SHS-3 pan tan 10 zo hi. Tan 7 leh tan 8 a sin lai-in Luzinchun (outstanding student) in kitel hi. Mandalay Arts and Science University (MASU) pan 1977 kumin B.A (History) zo hi. 1994 kumin National University of Singapore pan MPP (Master in Public Policy) zo hi. Kumpi nasep kipatna: 1979 kumin Ministry o Foreign Affairs- MOFA ah lai- at neu (LDC) tawh nasep kipan hi. 1981-83 sung Ministry of Education ah Deputy Minister Dr.Maung Maung Aye I PSO sem hi. 1983 kum September kha in PSC exam ong in MOFA ah Third Secretary in zakhang to hi. Panmun leh nasepna: 1984 a kipan leitung gam mun tuamtuam (Newyork, Geneva, Canberra, Beijingle Kunming) a om kawlgam palai zumte (Myanmar Missions to UN le Embassy le Consulate General) ah panmun tuamtuam sem kawikawi hi. 2011 kum May 25 ni-in MOFA, Political Department ah DG (Director General) ngah hi. 2013 April kha-in kumpi in Ambassador to Canada (Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary) panmun pia a, Canada ah Kawlgam kumpi palai a sep laitak ahi hi. Pasian panpihna tawh nasep a lut pan tuni ciang dawl (Promotion) 10 val kantan to-in zakhang a, “Kua mah`n hong makhelh nai lo hi” ci hi. Innkuan:Daw Nwe NewAye (Nu Cingh San Niang) tawh kiteng in, tapa Dal Sian Mung le tanu Zen Sian Hung nei hi.

Pu Gin Za Cin(Vuandok)

India gam Poona ah wireless kha 4 sin hi. Culutta khua ah huih lukhu tawh tuahdan sin hi. Pu Hau Ko Pau
Pu Thawng Lian leh Pi Cing Kho Kam te tapa upen hi a, 18.11.1938 ni-in Thuklai ah suak hi. 1956 kumin Thuklai sang panin tan 10, 1st attempt tawh a ong masapen hi a, nasia kisa tek peuh mah hi. Amah pen kimawlma kin mahmah a, 1960 kumin Yangon University Tennis tournament ah halfblue leh fullblue kha khat a zawh man in Special halfblue kipia hi. 1961 kumin Rangoon University Pingpong 1st ngah hi. 1984 Myanmar Tennis Federation te ii above 45 years, Kawlgam bup Tennis kidemna ah 1st ngah hi. Tua bek tham loin a pension lakzawh ciangin zong 60 kidem na ah 1st ngah hi. 1961 kumin B.A degree ngah in, kumpi nasem in lut a, Deputy Commissioner dong khang hi.1999 kumin, kum 60 cin pension la hi. Pension a lak zawh ciangin B.Min., M.Min., D.Min degree te la beh in 2009-2012 dong Antioh Mission International Bible College Kalaymyo ah Principal sem hi. Thuklai Lunmun tuu, Pu On Cin tanu Sm Vung Za Huai (Nursing Sister) tawh kiteeng a, tapa 2 leh tanu 1 nei uh hi. Kalemyo Nyagpyintha ward ah teeng hi. Pasian nasepna: (1) Matupi AG biakinn mun leitang kapiak beh hi.(2) Hakha khua AG Laisiangtho sanginn mun acre khat dektak kapia hi. (3) Hakha khua RCM biakinn mun ding leitang kapia hi. (4) Hakha khua UPC biakinn mun ding leitang kapia hi.(5) Tedim gam leh ka tuntunna ah mizawng leh meigong te inn mun kapia hi.
Pu Lian Ko Zam
