Menzi Pu Thawng Do Zam
Pu Thawng Za Khen leh Pi Man Khaw Hau te tapa hi a, 15.10.1932 kumin Mawlaik ah suak hi. 26.6.1959 kumin Pu Pau Cin Hau tanu Daw Cing Ngaih Niang tawh kiteng a, tapa 3 leh tanu 5 neih hi. Sangkahna: SPS Mualbeem ah 1948-49 kum Tan 4 zo hi. SHS Tedim ah 1949-53 kum Tan 10 zo hi. RASU panin 1955-59 kum B.A degree ngah hi. 1961kumKawlgambupahVuandokdinglai vuan na ah a nihna ngah. 1961 kum Vuandok nasep sin na leh ki-uk dan sin in kum bei hi. Nasepna: 1959- 1960 SHS Hakha khuapi ah S.A.T sem hi. 1962-1965 Falam leh Tedim ah Vuandok sem hi.1965- 1980 Paletwa, Matupi, Falam, Machianbaw, Waingmaw, Myaungmya Vuandok sem kawikawi hi.1980- 1985BasseinkhuapiahMangpizangahhi. 1986 1989 Taunggyi khuapiah Mangpi za mah tawh sem hi.1989-1992 Chin State Hakha ah Menzi za tawh sem hi. 15.10.1992 kumin kumcing pension tawh tawp hi. 7.12.1996ni-in Topa Pasian kiangah hongciah san hi.
Menzi Pu Tual Khaw Mang
Pu Thawng Za Khup A.T.M leh Pi Tel Za Kai te tapa hi a, Saizang khua ah June 9,1935 in suak hi. A zi Nu Cing Go Niang tawh tanu 3 leh tapa 2 nei uh hi. Sangkahna: 1940 kumin Saizang khua ah Zolai sangkah hi. 1945 Tedim ah kahin Tan IV dong zo a, 1953-54 Tedim ah kahin Tan X zo hi. 1954-55 Rangoon University kah a, 1958-59 kumin B.A zo hi. 1959- 1961 in B.L part I part II zo hi. Nasepna: 1960-61 kumin Rangoon University English Language Literature Department ah Tutor sem hi. January 1961 in Chin Civil Service (Junior B r a n c h ) ah lutin, Pedu Divison ah nasepsinin ATO sem hi. 1 9 6 2 &#8211; 63 in Matupi Myo-ok sem hi. 1963 kum pan 1965 kipat dong, Yamethin ah Vuandok sem hi. 1965-68 sung Maymyo ah District Treasury Officer sem hi.1968-71 sung Amarapura ah Vuandol sem hi. 1972-76 Mawlaik ah Vuandok sem hi. Vuandok a senate ah Special Power Magistrate ngah hi.1976-84 in Tedim Council zum ah sem a, tua ciangin Sagaing Division ah za khangin piang hi.1988 Kawlgam buai hun zawh ciang District te ah ki om sak kik a, Kale District ah Mangpi sem hi. 1991 kumin za khang leuleu in Putao District ah Mangpi mah sem hi.1993 kum za khangin Zogam khuapi Hakha ah Menzi sem hi.1995 bei kuan ciang, Yangon General Administration zumpi Home Ministry ah Director in kituah hi. June 9,1995 kum ciangin pension la hi. A pension lak zawh a sawt loin U.S.A, Hawaii tuikulh-a Haggai Institute ahAdvanced Leadership Seminar kah hi. A nihveina Council hunin Pyine Council ah telcing hi. 1972 kum gam ki-uk nang Upadi kibawl hunin Hakha Myone ah Ohkathah sem hi. A khatveina Council kitel hun ciangin zong kitel Ohkathat mah sem hi. A nihveina leh a thumveina Council kitelnate ah Tedim Myone pan kitelna thuvanpi sem hi.A neu-a kipanin a nasepna hun sungah a mipihte leh a gam a lei ading deihsakna nei hi. Tedim Sialtang tui-a kipan Zo gam, Tedim gam mun tuamtuam ah cidamna tawh kituak tui neek dingte hong kibawlsakna, ama’ hanciamna hang ahi hi. Tua thupah Topa Pasian in apha- in na thuk-in Lawki bu panin piangthak hi. A pa Ukpi Thawng Za Khup a sih ciangin a han ken ding, Mawlaik gam ah sai kap a, hih la na phuah hi.(a) Mi’n sang lian a phuk-a leh gualtung a tuanna hi e,(b) Len sum kai-a sang ka kap aw, zua vaang ka ngaih man hi e. na ci hi. A sai betna ah Kumpi Timber Board te sai vivezangahimanin, (a) Pu pa phaksap sang sul zuihna zang vuisai simsal ci’ng e,(b) Sang deih sumlu ka puakna aw, khumtuinu vuisai hi e. ci-in la na phuak hi. Minphatna: Public Good Service Medal 7.6.2011 ni-in Tedim inn pi pan leitung nusia hi.
Pu Thawng Cin Thang
Pu Do Tual leh Pi Pum Kho Man te tapa hi a, April 16,1914 in Saizang khua ah suak hi. A zi Nu Niang Kho Mang hi a, a sih ciangin anau nu Cing Lun Niang tawh kiteng uh a, a ki gawmin tanu 5 leh tapa 4 nei uh hi. Sangkahna: 1921-24 dong Tedim khua Kumpi Kawllai sangah Tan I pan Tan IV sin hi. 1923-1930 dong Tedim khua, Anglo-Vernacular Middle School ah Tan IV pan Tan VII dong sin hi. 1930-33 dong Sagaing khua, Manglai/Kawllai kumpi sangah Tan VIII pan kah a, Tan X Additional English tawh zo hi. 1933-41 dong Yangon University Teacher Training College ah kah hi. Nasepna: 1933-36 dong Falam ah Apprentice Clerk sem hi. 1936-39 dong Chin Hills District, Falam ah Sub-Inspector of Schools sep leh, Falam sangpi ah JAT tawh thuah hi. 1939-41 dong Yangon University Teacher‘s Training Collegea kah sung University Training Corps ah kum nih bit lut hi.1941 May kha a kipan Tedim gam Pyinya-uk leh Galkap lam, gam-ukna lam leh mipi kikal ah Civil Affairs Officer sem hi. 1942 kumin Japan galdo na‘ngin Western Chin Levies phuankhia a, Company Commander tavuan sem hi. Tua huna kipanin Allied Forces te leh Civil Administration kawmin, Political Liaison Officer, Treasury Officer, Quartermaster, Intelligence Officer, leh Interpreting Officer te sem kawm hi. 1943 kumin Assistant Divisional Education Officer za kipia ahi hang, sangte kikhak khin ahih manin gam- ukna lam (Civil Administration) ah hunbit in sem hi. Tedim Vuandok leh Levies Galkap ukpi nasep a thuahkhawm Kelly tawh gal mai teng ah pai kawikawi hi. 1944 March kha-in, Mangkang Galkapte Tedim-Tonzang-Imphal lam ah nungkik a, Tedim a nusiat ni-in, Vuandok Kelly tawh gal gam lam a hi, Saizang/Kaptel lam manawhin gal guk tawh Japan te do nang vaihawm dingin leh pai a, Saizang leh Phaileng khua kikal giahbuk ah a u, Ukpi Thawng Za Khup tawh Japan te do kik nang kam kikumin, a kivaikhak khit ciangin Manipur gun kantanin Kaptel,Heilei,Suangzang,Saek, Khuakhing, Lennupa gam suangah phualsat uh hi. Tua huna a phuah la: (a) Huihkhi lang dang seino gual aw, ciin ho neem tuang nusia‘ng e, (b) A gal pan mitmei suan ing e, ka sial lum tawh hei ing e. Tua Lennupa gam sungah Sukte Independent Army phuan hi. 1944 June kha-in, Japan (CDA) te phualpi Kaptel sim uh a, a vekin hingmat-in Aizawl khua ah puak hi. Kaptel khua ah S.I.A (Sukte Independent Army) mi belap a, September 11,1944 ni-in Manipur gun kantanin Mualbeem khua la hi. Tua laiah C.D.A makai Pu ZaBiak zong hingmat in, Imphal ah puak hi. Mualbeem khua a gualzawhna leh galsim lai nadingte vaihawmna pawi ah Sia Sing Lian in Pu Thawng Cin Thang pahtawina la phuak hi. (a) Gual in taitai hong ci ding a, dam dildialin hei ing e. (b) Suktui lunmang hawmsiam komin, sul ah ong hei kik ing e.October 14,1944 ni-in England kumpi in Pu Thawng Cin Thang pen ABRO Commissio No.1446, Staff Lieutenant za pia a, gal vai leh gam-ukna vai tawh thuah khawm hi. Sukte Independent Army makai sungah a kihel, Pu sing Lian leh Pu Suang lian te sawl in, Sihzang makai Pu Vum Ko Hau leh Pu Awn Ngin te tawh kimusakin, Japan Galkapte do nang vai-hawm khawm uh hi.1945 kum sungin Burma Frontier Service ah Vuandok za kipia a, 1945-46 sung Tedim, Falam leh Hakha gamte ah Vuandok sem hi.1947 kumin Panglong thukimna letmat thuh dingin, gam makaite ngaihsutna pia hi. Supreme Council of United Hill People kipawlna ah Khamtung mi Upa 6 sungah khat-in kihel hi. Kawlgam ( tajccHOya&#8217;) bawlna ah Zomi buppi in Deputy Counsellor tel a, a san loh ciangin, Deputy Councellor ( tBuHay;t m Sd) tavuan kisemsak veve hi.1947 kum April kha-a Maymyo a kibawl Rees William’s Frontier Areas Committee of Enquiry ah Advisor sem hi.1947 kum sung mahin Kayah gam sung Sawbwa a si khat tangin panmunlen ding a telsak commission mi 3 lakah khat in kihel hi. Bogyoke Aung San makaihna tawh Soronto Villa Rehabilitatian Conference, 1947 ah upa khat in kihel hi.1947 kum sung Kawlgam suahtakna ngah ciang ki-uk nang sepkholhnate ah Zo Zum nasep ding gel kholhna ah Atuanvuan (Additional Secretary) za tawh makai sem hi. January 4,1948 suahtakna ngah huna kipan, Zo Zumpi ah Atuanvuan (Secretary) sem hi. January 4, 1949 in Thiripyanchi Minphatna ngah hi.1948 pan 1954 sung Zo Zumpi Atuanvuan, Ministry of Home Affairs ah OSD, Hantharwaddy District OSD leh ADC (Additional District Commissioner) nasepnate sem hi. 1954 kum panin Zogam- Falam Mangpi sem hi. Mangpi a sep sungin, Zomite lunggulh pen ahi, Thau Licence leh Dol Licence tampi piakhia hi. 1958 kum pan, Zogam Menzi sem hi. Caretaker Govt. hun sungin, thau khempeuh kikhawm ding cih thu a om ciangin, “Keima’ piaksa hi; Zomite in hih thau te tawh kumpi langpang ngei lo ding ci-in tavuan ka la hi,” a cih manin thau kikhawm nawn lo hi. Zogam Menzi nasep leh Session Judge tavuan sem khawm hi.1964 kumin Zomi kumpi langpang dinga kithawite amah-mah in zol kik zo hi. 1966 kum June kha in Mandalay Commissioner, 1969 kumin Kachin Pyine ah Menzi, 1972 kumin Home Ministry ah Govt. Servants Screening Board ah upa sem hi. April 16, 1974 ni-in pension la hi. January 18, 1986 in Yangon ah hong nusia hi. Tenna: Yangon.
Captain Lian Za Khai
1938 kumin galkap katum hi. Galkap sungah boxing, Judo hong kisin sak hi. Kamsiat na tawh khua a kizi tawh ka kikhen uh hi. Ceylone (Srilanka) ah Parachute Jumping Training Course kakah hi. 1945 November in Havilder Sergeant (Santhum) kangah hi. 1945 kum in (zinihna) Hiang Tam khua Lia Cing Khaw Hau tawh ka kiteeng hi. 12.2.1947 ciang Sergeant Major kangah hi. Ka lawmnu Cing Khaw Hau tung ka lungkim zo nawnlo ahih manin Lia Don Za Vung (zithumna) tawh ka kiteeng hi. 29.41950 (OTS) ka man ciang Second Lieutenant (Bawkkhat) kangah hi. (Zi lina) Sialnah khua Muang Za Man tawh 1950 in ka kiteeng uh hi. 1946 kum ka pan hong nusiat ciangin kazi kawlgam ah ka tonpih theih manin buaina om nawn lo hi. 20.4.1955 Lieutenant (Bawknih) ka ngah hi. 20.3.1960 Captain (Bawkthum) kangah hi. Tate: (1) Ciin Khan Niang 9.5.1953 Lashio Myo suak hi. (2) Vung Khan Cing 8.8.1955 Lashio Myo, (3) Kam Khan Thang 18.8.1960 MeikThila Myo, (4) Kap Lian Mang (Mg Khine) 17.8.1962 MeikThila Myo, (5) Thang Lian Hang 8.8.1966 Myinyan Myo29.7.1971 kumin kumcing pension tawh 56th Regiment Battalion Myinyan panin ka tawlnga hi. Nasep thupite: (1) Za kampau sung pan Zola (Pupala) tam phuak pen ding leh phuak siam in kigen hi. (2) Parachute (Huih lukhu) tawh Zomi sungah a tuak masa pawl hi. (3) Leitung galpi nihna (Second World War) hoihtak at thei ahih man ki pahtawi hi. (4) Kamsiatna tawh Zomi sungah zi tamnei pen dingin kigen hi. (5) Kachin State (Seinlon) myo ah Township Security, Administration Committee President sem hi. Captain Lian Za Khai in General Nyi Win Tonzang hong pai a a phuah: 1. (a) Pa Aungsan leh I pu Naywin lung kituak zing vai hawmna na cih gual deih luatlatzi mabang pang aw ee. (b) Mabang pan ee, Pyithaungsuh ah u leh nau, susiallit mu vuadah tawh gam mawng sing bang i ki kawi nuam ee (1954). 2. (a) Phaidim thauthe, nonel Ciincing, Luanvung zotang bang na dam hiam aw, (b) Luanvung zotang bang a dam leh, Neisok bawk mual ka kal zo diam vang ngaihno nel aw(1944). 3.(a) A zat the ma paisan miade, sitthe vuanda, lungkia mai tang ee. (b) Seih ma piat neh, tange chin doh, tawtaw cia mah, piau lengme then de, 4. (a) Maymyo paltan, gualgen vanthang, siam bang sin ding kei va tum veng ee, (b) Siam bang sin ding keivatumvengnuasiazoheisanatulloaw. 1948 kum Pu Cin Kho Mang (Lomzang) phuah: 1. (a) Bogyoke Aungsan, tang bang khan a, tabang lotlatyee, koi pan na mu maw. (b) Tabang lotlatyee koi pan na mu maw? Yangon pan piang Phalam tung to ta, Tedim pan mu ee. 2. (a) Lunmang tong koh, Lotlatyee pawi, mi za zing sum, bang ki tuah na Pyidawtha nuam ee. (b)Pyi dawtha nuam independent ah Bamalumeo tutet pa dawh mee.

Captain K.A Khup Za Thang

Bo. Khai Za Kham
Pu Thual Vum (Tawmging) Pi Ciin En te sung pan 6.10.1908 in Tonzang ah suak hi. Nu Chit Khem tawh kiteeng a, suan leh khak nei lo ahih man in a u pa tapa Vum Khaw Thang innluah ding in laa uh hi. Captain Mang Cin Pau
Pu Khen Za Thang (Suantak) leh Pi Mang Khaw Niang (Dopmul) sung pan 18.7.1942 in Gamngai ah suak hi. 1952-54 sung SPS sial thaw ah tan IV zo hi. 1954-59 SMS Gamngai ah tan VII Scholarship tawh ong hi. 1959-62 SHS Tedim School Leaving Certificate (SLC) ong hi. 1965-66 Palik Menzi zum ah L.D.C lai at neu sem hi. Tua pan phunggyi ah kah in, 3rd Batch Police Officer (Palik bo) ngah hi. 1967-74 Phonggyi Central Training mun ah sem hi. 1974-82 Tonzang, Tibual, Falam Palik zum te ah Bawk khat tawh sem hi. 1982-87 Falam pan Hakha ah Bawknih tawh piang in Myone zemu kipia hi. 1988-93 Bawkthum tawh Mandalay Division Asihtaung Myone mu sem hi. 1993-95 Mandalay Division Tashi Myone ah Myone muu tawh piang hi. 3.1.1995 nasep kum 29 ciangin, Tashi panin pension laa hi. (1) Niang Lam Nuam Cing B.A 2nd years (History), YCF, Yangon. Director. Captain Thang Gin Hang
Pu Lam Khup (Taithul) leh Pi Thang Ngai (Kunhen) te sung pan 1913 kumin Khuadai khuaah suak hi. 18.3.1933 2nd BurmaRifles, Maymyo ah galkap tum hi. 18.3.1934 sannih ngah hi. 1939 kum Jemadar (Bawkkhat) ngah hi. 10.6.1946 Subedar (Bawknih), 10.1.1942 Captain (Bawkthum) ngah hi. 1938, Maymyo Tuiphum Pawlpi ah Karen Pastor khat in Tuiphum hi. Galkap hunsung: 1940 2nd Burma Rifles Batallion Maymyo pan Henzada khua ah Japan gal nang dingin Company khat tawh ki pai sak hi. 1941 ama uk Company te tawh hong nungkik uh aa, Kawlpi hong tung hi.1942 khamtung ah Chin Levy kiphuan aa, Tedim leh Nakzang kikal Chin Levy te makaih dingin tavuan kipia hi. Tedim, Tonzang, Cikha mawtaw lampi a ki tawh ciang Tonzang gam Sial Ciam camp ah galkap te ration a uk in om hi. Thaangzang khua Pu Suak En leh Pi Than Cing te tanu Nu Cing Za Don tawh kiteeng aa, Rev. Vial Nang in let that hi. A tate: Rev. Khup Lian Mang; Nu Ngai Khan Cing; Nu Cing Lian Vung; Pa En Khan Thawn; Nu Niang Ngaih Ciin te ahi hi. 1934 Mangkang Bu ten (Animal Transport) Company khat phuan ding in Maymyo ah tavuan pia hi.1949 Kalemyo ah Zo Galkap 4th Chin Battalion kiphuan aa, tua lai ah makai khat in pang hi. 18.1.1957 Kalemyo 4th Chin Battalion panin pension laa hi. 3.6.1957 kawlpi paisuk, Kawlpi pan Tedim hong ciah toh phatzang lampi ah a ma mawtaw pi tawh accident in hong nusia aa, Tedim innpi ah kigui hi. Gamngai kual ading Shield pi khat pia ahih man in minthang mahmah hi.
Captain Kam Cin Hang
Pu Do Za Kham (Taithul) leh Pi Niangh Khaw Hau (Sukte) ta upen hi aa, 1.7.1914 in Bumzang khua ah suak hi. 1933 kumin Galkap lut a, 1959 kumin Medical pension tawh tawlnga hi. Zaa khang toto in Zato lakah Captain ngah masa pen kici hi. Galkap sung pan (Bawknih) a ngah khit 11.6.1947) in Tonzang khua a teeng Pu Thang Cin Kham (Sukte), Pi Cing Za Lun (Sukte) te tanu upen Nu Niang Khan Man tawh Rev. Vial Nang in kiten na pia hi. Tanu nih leh tapa nga nei uh hi. 1949 kum Nyaung Le Bin 2nd Burma Rifles a om sung Kayin gal kipan a, amau Battalion hanciamna tawh Kayin Tapong ten lazo lo hi. 1949 kum One Emergency (4th Chin) Kawlpi ah a phuankhia te lakah makai in kihel hi. 4th Chin Battalion a om sung Pyinmana gam sung a gal kuan na ah gamsai gol mahmah khat man hi. 4th Chin Lt.Col Tun Aung khutnuai a om lai Shwe Bo gamah gal te phualpi luhzo in, kiho theih na set, lai bu bawlna set leh Van manpha tampi laksak zo hi. 1955 kumin Col Dal Za Kam tawh Zangkong Galkap zumpi ah pai-in Zogam pan Galkap thak kaihkhop ding General Ne Win tawh va kikum uh hi. 1958 kum February kha Patheinkyi gal kido na ah a taklam khuk thau tang in kha a hihman in 1959 in pension tawh tawp hi. Khua leh tui ading hanciamna: (1) 1964-1985 Tedim Myoma veng ah Hausa sem hi.(2) 1970- 1988 Tedim Myoma veng ah Tamah ah Vice Chairman sem. (3) 1964-1985 Tedim No.1 High School, PTA kipawlna ah makai pawl in om hi. (4) 1964 kum Thual Zen gal, 1968 kum Lushei gal, 1977 kum Khaimalin gal te ah kumpite tawh khut kilen in mapang hi. (5) 1968 Lushei galin galten man a, a pistol matsak in amah khah kik hi. (6)1982 Tedim sialtangtui laak na ah, Merlin Shaw leh a tapa Khup Khan Thang tawh kithuah den hi.(7) 1984 Zalui mei Project kipat cil lai in Engineer masa pen tawh sem khawm hi. (8) 1972-73 Tedim gam Khanlawh hun sungin Gup ngah kitel cian na ngah hi. (9) 1974 pan Gupna thu gen khempeuh a ma king tung lo omlo phial ding hi. (10) 1975 EBC Pawlpi hitaleh 1979 AG Pawlpi hitaleh a ma inn nuai Biak piak na in kizang hi. (11) 7.10.1992 in Topa kiang hong ciah san ta hi.

Captain Hau Cin Mung

CaptainCinLianThang
Pu Pum Za Nang (Gualnam) leh Pi Cing Zen Thang te sung panin 3.10.1964 in Saizang khua ah suak hi. Pa Thawng Do Lian leh Nu Zo Khan Man te tanu Nu Ning Lam Vung tawh 12.4.1989 in kiteeng hi. Tapa khat leh tanu nih nei uh hi. W.K.H. Subeder Maj. Thawng Za Kai

Kumpi nasep kawmin M.Sc (Surgery) zong sin beh lai hi. Tapa 1 leh tanu 5 leh tuu 5 te nusia hi.

Lt. Col. Khai Mun Mang

Lt.Col.Thang Suan Khai
Suante beh, Suanman khang 14 na, Suangpi khua Hausa Pa Ngin Thang leh Nu Ngul Cing te sung pan unau numei pasal 9 lak pan aa, a 3 na hi in 6.3.1948 ni-in Suangpi khua ah suak hi. Sangkahna: 1995 kumin Suangpi khua pan tai 4 aki gamla Phunom sangah nisim in khe tawh ni leh in tan khat kah kipan in 1961 kumin Phunom SMS pan in tan 6 zo. 1961-1962 kumin Gamngai High School pan tan 8 zo. 1963-1965 kumin Tedim sangpi panin tan 10 zo. 1965-1971 kumin Yangon Art Science University panin B.A (Law) LLB, HGP degree ngah hi. Sang kah pat a kipan degree ngah dong ciang Pasian thupha tawh lai kiat cih athei ngeilo khat ahi hi. Galkap sung nasep nate: (1) Mualtung mi leh Christian te sung pan galkap Bu suah ding ahamsat mahmah hun sungin (No 43 –OTS) kah aa 20.3.1972 kumin galkap Bu bawkkhat ngah hi. (2) 1973 kumin Duh Bo/ Tat Suh Hmu asep laitakin pan gamkuan in ah Shan) ah galte tawh nakpi takin kidona ah amah zong liam in galkap zatopi ah kipuak gam Maizan pah hi. Ahi zongin tua aliamna te damsiang kik in agalkap nasepna maban te hoihtakin zom suak to thei hi. Anutak sungin kumpi te piak minphatna leh pahtawina medal 7 ngah hi. (3) Monyua khuapi pen ding akibawl hun sungin pa ii thupiakna tungtawnin 1991 pan 1997 ciang semin thu leh vai khempeuh makai in sem hi. (4) Tua hun laitakin State/Region sungah thukhenna lamah thu lian nei pen ahi tawh ah 1992- 1997 ciang 1998-2000 ciang sem hi. (5) Kawlgam kumpi te ii sawlna tawh in Kawlgam leh Thai/ China gamgi te tawh kisai committee meeting gamdang ah 3 vei leh Kawlgam sungah 3 vei kihel hi. (6) Galkap lam tawh kisai khat ahihna dung zui in Military Officer tawh kisai in cihtakna tawh kuhkal taka a nasem khat hi. Tua hi aa Military Officer te Law tawh kisai training apiakna ah training piak siam mahmah khat in aciapteh uh ahi hi. Tu laitak aa galkap sung aa asem lai leh atungsiah galkap ulian atam zaw in thei in hong it sak mahmah tek uh hi. Tu laitak aa asem U Tun Tun Oo bang galkap sungah sanggam bang naubang aa aki thuahpih khat ahi hi. (7) Khamtung mi te sung pan galkap mangpi te ahi te tawh kithuah in nasem khawm uh hi. Pasian thu tawh kisai: (1) Christian khat hi in Zeisu Christ bek mah nuntak pih ding khensat na nei tawntung hi. Nasepna ah aseppih agalkap ulian (a pu te) in it in nasepna lamah zong galkap lam tawh kisai Military Law zong muang mahmah hi. Ahi zongin tua hunin mualtung mi ban ah Christian thu um khat ahih na hangin etcik na leh ngah ding aa kilawm hamphatna pawlkhat te angah khak loh phial ding hangin thuak siam mahmah in Pasian thu tawh kiheh nem tawntung in thumlo taulo in anasep te citak in sem tawntung hi. (2) Monyua khuapi ah Roman Catholic biakinn huangpi mei hong kat ciangin mei kang tawh kisai lamah zong professional aa nasem siamkhat ahih manin kumpi thukhun ahi Law ( ) tawh kisai thupiang tuamtuam te om tase leh Bishop A. U Than Aung (Mandalay) tawh sanggam unau bangin thu hoih pen apian theih nadingin thu kikum tawntung in ahanciam tawpin panpih kinken hi. Hih nasep khopna pen amakhang sungah alungkim mahmah Pasian nasepna liankhat hi ci-in genthei zelzel hi. Tua hun laitakin amah pen ah asep laitak ahi hi. (3) asep sungin leh sungah Zomi, Chin te sum bawlna lam ahi zong, thu tuamtuam te tawh thongkia te leh laa tuamtuam tawh buaina anei mi tampi tak Palik zum leh thukhen zum atung tea ma huh theih zahzah in huhna pia hi. (4) huang sung a Baptist Church ii founder khat leh makai khat dingin Pasian in hong zatsak hi. Taunggyi Chin Baptist Church zong ah anuntak sung Pawlpi makai sem hi. (5) Monyua Baptist Church leh Chindwin Baptist Mission (Monyua Headquater) ah hunbit Pasian nasem te ahi Rev Khai Za Dal, Rev Pa Hre, Rev Tin Aung Shwe te tawh pawlpi upa pi te ahi (Pa Tual Go Pau-Trade Dept), (Lt.Col Tual Do Dal, ), (Pa Thawng Kho Zam, Manager, Idimitsu Company, Monyua), Pa Chin Hla Aung, Pa Ngun Hu te tawh khut kilen khawmin biakinn lam nading leh Mission nasep nading te ah hanciam takin mapang khawm hi. Monyua Baptist Church pen Rev. Dr. Carson Cin Khen Tuang makaihna tawh ana kiphut khinsa hi in Chindwin Baptist Mission Center pen Kalewa pan Monyua ah akituah hunsan laitak ahi hi. (6) Khitui Gospel team te Suangpi khua kong pai theih nading uh abulpi in Monyua aa om Lt. Col Khai Tawng in Monyua pan a hong ngetna tungtawn hipen hi ci-in sia Langh DoKhupinpulakhi. Khakhanlawhnanakpitakpiangkhiahi. (7)Apiannakhuaphawktawntunghi. Aneu akipan akhan khiat pih ahi Suangpi Youth Organization (SYO) leh khuano Youth Organization (KYA-Sport) te thapia tawntung hi. Tu laitak a Suangpi Baptist Church te ii azum innpi ding aa, akisam sikkang khempeuh Pasian min in piakhia hi. Innkuan pihte: Suangpi khua ex. Capt Ngul Za Thang Pi Ngul Ciang te ii tapa leh tanu 8 lak pan tanu khat aneih sun Nu Dim Go Cing (ex. Blue Staff, Nurse) tawh June, 1978 kumin Suangpi khua ah kiteeng uh aa tapa 3 leh tu 3 nei hi. Amah pen unau pasal sung ah a upen ahih mah bangin a sanggam pasal te ahi Pa Nang Za Khup Pa Piang Suan Mung (UNICEF Health Nutrition Officer) leh Tg Khai Thawn Thang te degree ngah sak in nasep zong guan tek uh hi. Leitung hong nusia: Amah pen ah asep laitakin gilsung lam tawh kisai natna hangin Yangon galkap zatopi panin 16.6.2004 in leitung hong nusia in 19.6.2004 ni-in galkap ulian te ngeina tawh zahtak piakna aneih khit ciangin Yangon-Tedim Baptist Church pawlpi te makaihna tawh Yangon Yewai han ah kivui hi.
Lt. Col. Tual Do Dal
Pu Son Lang leh Pi Ning Za Hau te tapa hi a, 1.12.1934 ni-in Saizang khua ah suak hi. A zi Nu Lian Khan Vung hi a, tanu 3 leh tapa 1 nei uh hi. Sangkahna: Govt. Galkap zumpi ah (Assistant Adjutant General) a sep sungin ni dang a pension vai a kum a kha a sawt te a manlang a, a thoh theih nadingin Defence Service Council Orders and Council Instruction (DSCO leh DSCI) khel theih teng khel nadingin a tungsiah ulian te lamlahna leh hanciampihna tawh semkhia hi. A manlang thei penpente kha 1 in mansak a, a ziakaite pawl khat 4 sungin mansak hi. Ama pension a thoh ciangin kha2 sungin mansiang a, a angtang mahmah hi.1995 in kum cing pension la hi. Cing Ngaih LunB.Sc (Botany) Saizang khua siahsuah a, Pu Tual Do Dal laphuah: (a) Saitui pupa, zinin siam ci, tu aa ei khan, sian in siam ta ee, (b) Zin aw nang khan, mei bang theng ta, sim lei len kuam dang va zuan ve aw. (a) Endih ve ni, Saitui gual aw, zangni suak leh solkha liap ta ee, (b) Zangni suak leh solkha liapta, Sianmang hong ee, zingleng liapta ee. (a) Ka sanggah hang, ka belh limsing bang lian ee, sanggah lo bang gual lai ga bang, laam ing ee. (b) Ga bang laam in kimpih gualsing na veng ee, lam bang pak ding tun le zua mel mu lang ee. (a) Tukawl tawi siam bang sin ding ci, puvom aw gual lai va bang laam veng e, (b) Hawmtel pak bang nong tawina, khau bang zom ding na sawm han lung ciam hi&#8217;ng ee.

Lt. Col. Pau Khan Thang

Lt.Col. Lian Cin Zam, Zeya Kyaw Htin

Burma Frontier Force, Myitkyina Battalion ah ama’ Coy. tawh piang hi. 20.5.1942 in amah leh a Coy.buppi Japanten man uh a, Mandalay Kumpi huang sungah kem uh hi. Ama vaihawm siamna tawh Japan te in khah khia hi.16.7.1942 pan Western Chin Levy ah sem hi. Mangkang galkapte tawh India gam ah nung kik khawmin 2nd Buregt, The Burma Rifles (Special Force) ah sem hi. 1.9.1944 ni-in ABRO Commission 2/Lt. ngah hi.1.3.1945 in Tedim pan Lt. ngah a, 1.4.1945 in Capt. ngah in,29.4.1946 in Major 2/i.c C.O ngah hi. 22.12.1947 in Lt.Col. ngah a, 3rd Chin Rifles ah CO sem hi. Thaupi teng galte khut sung tung leh Kawlgam tangthu atuam khat hi thei ding hi. 1.5.1949 panin Pegu Front ah Lion Force uk a, gam makaite tawh kitel khialhna nasia takin om in buai dektak hi. 5.3.1951 pan Staff College kah a ‘A’grade tawh ong hi. 1952 in 15th Buregt Hmawbi ah phuan a, C.O.. sem hi. Phyu ah a piat a kipan gam sung gal simna tuamtuam ah makai hi. Lt.Col. Lian Cin Zam a thei ngei Mikang, Mivom a Kawl a Zo in a ciim, a pilna, a lungduaina, a thu manna, a thukhualna, leh a kiniamkhiatna te zahtakin amah it ciat uh hi. Kawlgam adingin Commanding Officer muan pen khat ahi hi. Minphatna: 4.1.1957 ni-in Zeya Kyaw Htin ngah hi. A Sihna: 4.8.1957 ni-in Mingalardon galkap zatopi ah leitung nusia hi. A luang vanleng tawh Zogam ah kipua a, 19.4.1958 ni-in a pianna khua Mualbeem ah Zo ngeina in kivui in amah itna in sai, sakol, sial, lawi leh bawng te kawsah in kikeng sak hi.

Minphatnate: 1954 in Zeya Kyaw Htin cih Minphatna ngah hi.1986 Naing Ngant Gonyi First Class ngah hi. Rev. Langh Khan Hau in Colnelpa a phuah: (a) Namcih zatam, tongdot zuapa Sian in ni bang awi hi ee, (b) Namcih vontawi, taang ki tawi lai-ah nang bang kekkek omlo ee. (a) Pupa satsa Dimtui vangkhua, giabang zuunna MKK foundation, na geel cing sa&#8217;ng ee (b) Lengvan siangpan puvon ngaihte&#8217;n hong zo vevua, Dimtui tual tawh etlawm sa&#8217;ng ee.
Col. Dal Za Kam
Ukpi Pu Do Tual leh Pi Pum Kho Man te tapa hi a, April 1,1916 in Saizang khua ah suak hi. A zi Nu Man Kaih Niang tawh tanu 2 leh tapa 2 nei uh hi. Sangkahna: 1933 in A/V Middle School Tedim ah kahin zo hi. Tan VII a sim kumin Tapidaw suak a tui kiphum pah hi. Nasepna: 1936 kumin galkap tum hi. Galkap course tuamtuamte a kahna ah sang zawh mahmah ahi manin 1939 in Jemadar (Gevernor’s Commission) ngah hi. Kawlgam sung bek hilo, India gam Bangalore ah High Level Education Course leh Deradun ah Motor Transport Officer Training School te ah kah hi. 1941-43 Western Chin Levies ah Adjutant sem hi. India gam Kitchener College (Officers’Training School) ah kipuak a, 1944 in A.B.R.O Commission, Lt. ngah hi. Captain a ngah zawh ciangin Tedim a kihong thak 2nd Chin Rifles ah sem hi. Tedim hong tun zawh a sawt loin Major in za khang hi. 1947 kumin 2nd Chin Rifles Mingalardon ah 2/IC a sep laitakin Salisbury Wiltshire, U.K ah Senior Officer Training Course kah hi. Hong tun kik ciangin Lt.Col. ngah a 2nd Chin Rifles mah ah C.O.. sem hi. 1948 in Colonel ngah a, No.1 Light Infantry Brigade ah Brigade Commander sem hi. Pegu ah Brigade Commander leh Pegu Commissioner tawh thuah hi. Zomi sung pan Colonel ngah masa pen ahi hi.1951 in galkap sung pan pension la hi. Tua zawh ciangin Bawdwin No.1 Mining Corporation ah Chief-time keeper sem hi. 1975 pan pension la hi. A siamna leh a kikhaina: Tan VII a sin sungin galkap manglian suah nading mang man khol hi. Pasian gam thu zong mang in man hi. 1952 in “My Conviction” ci-in laibu khat bawl hi. Sukte gam te (Leitawhtan khang siah) galkap a lut theih nadingin Tedim Vuandok zum ah lai-at huh a sep sungin Recruiting Officer tungah gen a galkap lut theih nang ngahsak hi.Galpi Nihna sungin Japante’n a khiantan Zomi buleh nautang 50 bang hon khia hi. Homalin pan Tamu, Tonzang, Tedimah paipih a, gilsan natna leh pulnatna tawh a si ding te nangawn nusia loin tonpihin tunpih hi. A khan lai-in kanteh kan hat mahmah a, Kawlgam galkap record ah sau veipi, a dem zo om lo hi. Bawlung siamin minthang a kawlgam galkap bawlung team ah kihel hi. India A.B.R.O. Commission a om sungin Japan te in Zogam la a, ciah thei lo ahi manin la phuak hi. (a)Thei bang sen-a zalmang a mat, tu in pai bang pom ing e; (b)Phamsa tuun leh zua cih lai a, zen zen aw, hingkhen ciin leh tuai aw e. A thubulphuh: “Mi khat leh khat kihehpihna, kikhual-kakna leh kizahtakna, thumanna leh kuhkalna”. A thubulphuh a phuah la,(a)Taang laizom bang namcih kong huai, ka tongdam a kha hiam aw;(b)Phung lian hi’ng ci’n, tang tam gual aw, cik in kong sial ngei hiam aw. 8.9.1977 ni-in No.2 B.M.H. Yangon pan hong nusia ta hi.
Major General Tuang Za Khai
Khuasak khua ah July 1, 1927 ni-in Pu Khan Lian leh Pi Liang Cingh te sung pan piang hi. A zi Nu Tual Dim tawh tanu khat leh tapa nih nei hi. Sangkahna: Government Vernacular Primary School, Khuasak ah kah masa a tua pan Tedim, Anglo Vernacular Middle School ah zomin Galpi Nihna kipatin Tan VI zo hi. Khuasak Private Middle School ah Tan VII zo hi. Tua sang Thuklai ah kituah a, Tan VIII leh IX Thuklai ah kah hi. 1946 kum Tan IX a sin laitakin Yangon ah piangsuk a, 1947 in Cushing High School pan SLC leh Matric zo khawm hi. 1950 kumin I.A (Sr) a phi dek laitak in Galkap Bu (OTS) No.3,Maymyo ah kah hi. Nasepna: September,1950 in 2/Lt ngah a,1951 in Lt.,1953 in Capt., 1963 in Major, 1966 in Lt. Col., 1973 in Colonel, 1980 in Brigadier General leh 1984 in Major General ngah hi. 1985 ciangin Council of Peoples’ Inspector Member sem a, 1988 dong sem hi. January 1986 in Galkap pension la hi. Kumpi nasep Galkap kum 35 sung a sepna ah, Platoon Commander, Unit Intelligence Officer, Unit Education Officer, Coy Commander, Adjt; Staff Capt. A/G. 2 i/c Bn.CO; EO-LID; Dy. Comdr; Dy.Comdr-Regional Command, L.I.D –Comdr., Comdr.- Regional Command leh Quarter Master General te sem hi. Hih Galkap senate bek hi loin Western Chin Levies ah zong nasia takin sem hi. Japante hong uk sungin kamphen sem hi. Siyin Independence Army ah sem a, Sukte Independence Army tawh kipawl in gam adingin sem hi. Minphatna: Naingngant Gon-yi First Class ngah hi. Gam leh lei adingin gualzo takin a sep zawh ciangin Galkap lui kipawlna Phualpi ah 1988 panin Secretary sem hi. Biakna lamah zong ahih theih zahin kihel a, YSBC ah khantawn Upa sem hi. 11.11.1995 kumin Topa kiangah hong ciah san ta hi. Tatateng: (1)Pa Kam Do Dal + Nu Cingh Za Uap (2) Nu Cingh Thian Uap + Pa Mang Hen Dal (M.P) (3)Pa Khan Lian Khup + Nu Khin Khin Hlaing. A zi Nu Tual Dim @Daw Myint Myint Khaing pen gaam kek mangkang kumpi a do makai Bo Khai Kam&#8217;tapa Captain Ngin Zam (OB.BGM)leh Daw Khai Cinghte&#8217; tanu ahi hi. Mangkang kumpi in 1939 pan1945 sungin (1) Burmastar (2) Burmar Star(3)Victory medalte zong pia hi. Zomi bup galkap sungah a lian penpen hi. 1988 pan 1995 hong nusiat dong galkap pension zum ah gambup lai-at (central head quater) General Secretary sem hi.

A nasep hun sung 1978 kumin Tedim khua kim Gam makai (council win) in hitaleh kum 1979-1982 kikal teng Tedim khua kim Pituh Council ah tavuan kipia hi. Golf kimawl siam mahmah in kimawlna a om sim in 1st ahih kei leh 2nd ngah den hi. Sanggamte: (1) Zen Za Cing + Zam Nang (Naulak),(2) Suan Za Kam + Zen Khan Lun (Kawlte), (3) Ciin Za Huai + Thuam Cin Thang (Gualnam),(4) Zam Khen Pau + Pum Luan Cing (Hatlang),(5) Nang Khan Dim + Eng Za Gin (Samte), (6) Hau Khaw Gin + Uap Khawl (Naulak) Tanu tapate: Nu Nem Deih Cin (Kawlte), Thawng Lam Cin, Cing Man Niang, Dim Nem Cing, Thawng Khat Tuang, Pau Suan, Ngin Mang, Biak Lian Dim te ahi hi.

Lecturer sem hi. 1990- 1992 in Mandalay University ah Tutor leh 1993 pan tudong Kalay College ah Registrar sem hi. Gualzawhna: 1969-72 in Awarded Research Grant ngah hi. Vongmual ah Peasants’ Central Library phuankhia hi. 1995 in State Peace and Tranquility Medal ngah hi. Rev. Sukte. T. Hau Go
20.10.1920 lailui khua ah suak hi. Apa Tual Hang leh a NuAwnNiangtetangalakah aneupen hi. 1926 pan Tonzang, Phunom, Tedim ah kahin 1931 in sang ong ahi manin Ngun Medal ngah hi. Manglai Tan IV pan VII dong Tedim ah kahin Scholarship ngah hi. Tan VIII leh IX Falam ah, Tan X Sagaing ah kahin Kawllai Distinction tawh zo hi. Sagaing ah a kah sungin Backward Area Stipend ngah hi. 1938-42 Judson College ah kah a, Government Collegiate Scholarship ngah hi. Zo man loin Japan gal hong tung a, 1944 kumin Madras Christian College ah zomin 1946 in B.A (Hons), 1948 in M.A ngah hi.1948 in Mission Scholarship tawh USA ah kah a, 1950 kumin M.R.E. tawh hong ciah hi. Biakna lam sepnate: Madras pan hong ciah ma-in H.N.C Stevenson in Frontier Area Service a sem dingin kham khol hi. Yangon hongtung ciangin Dr. Hla Bu in Professor dingin zol hi. Rev. Arthur Shwe Taw in zong BBC Secretary sem dingin nazol leuleu hi. A mite lakah sephuai zaw sa ahih manin tua te khempeuh sanglo hi. Tuakhit phetin lai khat na lak uh a, “Hau Go in Pasian na asep leh keima aituam sum panin kum khat $600 in ka huh ding hi,” cihna Cope Tonu lai na hi hi. USA a pai ciangin Cope Tonu kiangah, “Nang bang ci nuntaka kei tua bang a hong huh thei na hi hiam?” ci-a adot ciangin, “Cope Topa in Khamtung ah sang en dingin khual a zin ciangin Kumpi te in DA,TA pia uh a, tua te zang loin ka kholkhol sung pan ua kong piak hi. Tu-in nang alang zang inla alang na zi in zang hen,” ci-in khensak hi. February 1953 in Tedim Baptist Association, Falam Baptist Association, Hakha Baptist Association te phuatpihin 1953 March kha in Zomi Baptist Convention makai in phuan a ZBC GS masa pen sem pah hi. July kha in Zomi Baptist Bible School pankhia a, tu-in Zomi Theological College suak ta hi. 1955 kumin Khuangsai Baptist Association phuatpih hi. Sanglama sepnate: 1946-48 leh 1951-56 sung Zo Education Board president sem hi. 1948 in Thu kithuahna patsak hi. 1956 in Laizo pau in Zomi Christian Thu kizakna patsak hi. 1960-64 Zomi Baptist Academy ah Principal sem hi.1957-59 1964-76 sung College sia sem hi. Kum thum val zato lum a, Tedim mite ading a deihsakna bei loin a zato lupna tung panin Xristian la, Tedim kam ci-in teikhia hi. Pu Ngul Lang leh Pi Ning Zen tanu upa pen Nu Luan Za Cing tawh 2.4.1947 ni-in kiteeng a tanu 4, tapa 4, leh tuu 7 nei uh hi. March 1, 1996 ni-in Yangon ah leitung nusia hi. Tenna: Bld 10, Rm 1, Lanthit Yeiktha, Lanmadaw Tsp. Yangon. Sia Gin Thian Pum
Pu Za Ngin leh Pi Suan Kho Cing te sung panin 3.3.1938 ni-in Thuklai khua ah suak hi. 1959 kum BA.Ed, 1960 B.Ed man hi. Dolluang khua Rev Thang Ngin tanu Nu Nuam Zam Cing tawh kiteeng a, ta 3 nei uh hi. Nasepna: 1960-61 S.A.T Thuklai,1962-68 Middle Head Laizo, 1970-80 High School Head, 1989-98 State Education Officer Inspection/Admin tawh pension laa hi. His hobbies: He has proficiency in writing and had contributed many appealing articles in English to the Guardian Monthly- the only national English Magazine in Burma. He has a keen spirit in sports especially in tennis. Was awarded ahalf- blue colour certificate in tennis by the Rangoon University Tennis Club in 1958. Won many prizes in table tennis while staying at the Rangoon University as a student. Just before the advent of the Revolutionary Government, won a foreign state scholarship under the sponsorship of Britist Council to study in the United Kingdom for a diploma course in education, but unfortunately all foreign scholarship schemes were suspended owing to subsequent political change in the country. Promoted Assistant State Education Officer (Inspetor), Chin State. Married Daw Nuam Zam Cing, dauhter of Rev. Thang Gin of Dolluang and got two sons and one daugter. His dauter is a midwife, his youngest son is attending the government teachnical Institute, Mandalay pursuing a course in Mechanical Engineering and the middle son is a theological student.

Zangkong Zomi Siamsin Kipawlna phuankhia: 1965 kumin RASU panin Zangkong Zomi Siamsin kipawlna aphuankhia, sangnaupang 8, te lak ah khat ahi hi. Zo minam puan design bawl: A lungkim mahmah, a angtangpih asep khiat: Zangkong Zomi Siamsin Kipawlna ah 1965 kumin Cultural Committee Chairman sem hi. Zo minam puan kinei lo in ahaksatna amuh ciangin tuhun tawh kituak ding, angeina lui lah kemcing dingin tualpuan leh nik atualin design bawl hi. Ih Zo puan te original design leh characters teng kanpha kikin Tedim kiim aa khua neute ah zong kawikawi-in a hoih a etlawm dingin lempha in tualpuan leh nik design athakin bawl hi. Ama bawl design tua huna hong uk Chin Usi (Chin Affairs Council)-te thukimna la-in Zomi National Dress dingin kikipsakhi. Tua a kipanin Zominam puan leh nikte hoih takin tuni dong aneiih hihi. 1967kumin RangoonUniversity All Chin Student Union ah President sem hi. Zomi dangte tawh ngaihsutna kituak lohnate khui kikin kilawmtaak nading hanciam tawntung hi. 1972-74 Eye Post Graduate akah laitakin Gen. Ne Win-in Zomi kumpi nasem ulian 40 thu om lopi-in politics tawh kisai-in, A che khan upadi a kibawl hun sungteng, akepcingte lak ah kihelin kum nih val asawt khit ciangin, Pu Chin Sian Thang, Pu Lian Uk, Pu No Zam, Capt. Hei Er leh Bohmu Kyin-te tawh Mandalay pan ong suakta uh hi. 100 KW Hydro Power: A nupa un, mei bek hi lo anhuanna, puansawpna, heater leh cottage industries, lettama, anhum gawina nasepna a kizang thei ding KW100 Hydro Power tha Kapteel khuapiauhaa, 2012 kum December 27, ni-in kihongin, Chin State bupah khua phelep thatawh tua bang akizat masakpeenna khua ahi hi. Tu laitakin Chin State, Zogam mualtungmi khempeuh, Cikha dawn pan Paletwa khuataw dong leh Zaang Zomi, Asho Zomite tawh ivekpi-in “ ‘Zo people-Zomi’ kici minam khat ihi hi” ci-in i identity i san theih nading advocacy a neih laitak ahi hi. I minam min Chin pen, khat, midangte ong sapna hi aa ei leh ei Chin akici om lo, nih, ahi thei lo thu tanglai khanglui upna, “Chinlung kici kuahawm pan piang i hih manin Chin kici”, cih leh thum,‘Chin ong kipia khial hi aa, Zo hizaw’ci-in Chin mi nong pia Mangkang kumpi-in akisikna thugenkhiakhinzohi.Tuabanah,Sen mipil, Mangkang mipilte, Kawl mipilte leh ei Zomi mipilte-in zong Zomi ihihna thu aciapteh thute kaikhawmin sakmi khangmi-in i pom theih ciat nadingin lai at-in kihawm khia zeel hi. Chinmi akici, i sanggamte tampi amau zong “Zo hi ung” akicite tawh khut kilen khawmin ahanciam laitak uh ahi hi. Ni khat ni ciangin i vekpi-in Zomi ihihna i saan theih nading ngiimna lianpi khat ahi hi. Zi neihna: Dr. Khin May Si ( Maisie Dong MB,BS. Rgn, FRCGP , Sydney) tawh 5.11.1985 in kiteeng uha, tapa 1 leh tanu 1 nei uh hi. Tate : Tapa, Thual Mun Pau, (Min Dong), B.E, University of New South Wales, Sydney. Pu Dr. Hau Za Chin Pau 24.7.1978; Pi Niang Khaw Vung 2.5.2006 ni in hong nusia uh hi.
Dr.Sian Za Kam
Tedim gam laitui khua Hatlangh beh Pu Kham Za En leh Pi Gin Niang (Gualnam) te ta 9 lak ah a thumna leh ta pasal upa pen hi. 1940 December 12 ni-in suak hi. Tedim High School ah a sangkah lai-in laipil mahmah ahih manin Yangon Central State Model High School (tu-in Basic Education High School (1) Latha), Pre-Medical Class ah Kumpi scholarship tawh 1956-58 sung kah hi. 1958 March in Matriculation Examination a sang zawh manin Yangon University ah Second Year ISc Part (B) pan kah zomto pah hi. Manglai (English) siam hi. 1969 kumin Rangoon Institute of Medicine (1) pan MB,BS zo-in DP TM 1973 in zawh beh lai hi. High School sangkah lai pek a kipanin lungsim a picingsa, a muanhuai ngiat khat ahi hi.1969 panin Assistant Township Medicine Officer za tawh Chin State Mindat, Tedim, Paletwa leh Tamu khuate ah; 1988 a kipanin Township Health Officer za tawh Mawlamyaing (Moulmein) leh Myitkyina ah; 1991 in State Health Officer in zakhang in Chin State, Hakha ah; 1994-1998 ciang Magway Division leh 1998-2000 dong Karen State Health Officer semin pension la hi. Pasian zahtak mahmah ahih manin Kumpi nasepna tuamtuam ah Pasian in a mazangin daupai sak hi. A diakdiak in ama mai-ah Zogam State Health Officer a sem ngei Doctor lianpipi mi nga takin a sep sung mahun hanmual hong liamsan citciat ciangun, a kilipkhap phial za munah hong tut teh Pasian in a tumdang takin cidamna leh lawh cinna thupha piain, Zogam pan Nurse leh Midwife Training kah ding mi 300 valkum li sungin a kuankhiatsak zawh pen Kawlgam leh Zogam Cidamna lamah a sem Zomi khat lawhcinna tangthu lianpi-in a kiciamteh den ding hi. Kumpi nasep sung Singapore, Indonisia, India, Nepal, Srilanka gamte ah kha li sung ta Primary Health Care cih thulu tawh in kawikawi hi. December 9,2011 ni-in Yewah han ah limtak in kivui hi. A zi tegel leh tanu tapa 11, tute 6 nusia hi.Tanu tapate: (1) En Za Tuang (2) Niang Zom Mang, (3) Dim San Nuam, (4) Ciang Thawng Cing, (5) Vung Lam Man, (6) En Zo Mang, (7) Khual Kam Kei, (8) Niang Gawm Cing, (9) En Lun Cing, (10) Vung Sian Kim leh (11) Niang Mun Cing te ahi uh hi.

Kam Cin Dal, Suantak

Tuimui Khua
Tuimui khua thu a kaikhawm, a gelh masa pen Pa En Cin Mang (1989 November) ahi hi. Sia Thawng Mung leh khangnote pawl khatin na kan leuleu uh a,a bu-in a kibawlkhia, kihawm khia lo hih tuak hi. Gospel centenary hun lai-in, 1972 kum lai-a ka thu kaihkhopsate leh Tuimui khua satna thu ka kannop manin, Tuimui Khua leh Gospel,&#8221; ci-in laibu neu khat (part &#8211; II)) bu 20O ka hawmkhia hi. Pu Mang Cin Pau in &#8220;Tuimui Limlangh&#8221; (2015) ci-in laibu khat hong bawlkhia hi. Ahi zongin hih zong Pu Mang ahih kei leh a bawlpih alawm te&#8217;n i khuatangthu thukkan mel lo, a theihna ciang bek mah uh hong bawl khiat uh hidingin ka um Tu tungin ahih leh tuate ma-in khang khat/nih hun lai-a kipan in khuasat cil taktak panin thuman tawh lahna teci (prove/ evidence) tawh kong pan hi. Tuimui khua kici pen khua min hoih mahmah khat ahi hi Bang hang hiam i cih leh khuasat ding ciangin tuinek ding mah kingaihsun masa pen hi. Kammal ah zong, &#8220;Khua leh Tui&#8221; ciin kikhen thei ngeilo a, lakam ah zong ngabang lenna Dimtuivangkhua, mimbang pianna Cimtui vangkhua kici tawntung hi. Dimtui i cih ciangin Tedim cihna hi; Saitui pen Saizang: Cimtui pen Cimnuai, Haitui pen Haiciin leh Muitui pen Tuimui cih bangin i zang hi. Nuntakna ciktui pen Lai Siangtho sungah zong gentehna tampi tawh kizang cih i mu hi. Tui tawh a nin khempeuh kisiangsak thei hi. Tuimui khua gei-a om sihkhuk tui namtui sa uh a, sihnamtui pan Tuimui khua min piang hi ci-in kiciamteh hi. Ni dangin Dapzal khualzinte in tua sihnamtui gei-ah sunmeh ding huanin sunsiah ne uh a, &#8220;Tui a va hmui em ve,&#8221; kici uh a, tua panin &#8220;Tui Mui&#8221; khua min hong piang hi zong kici hi. &#8220;Tu a meh nam namtui na e,&#8221; A muinam na za hiam?&#8221;, &#8220;I mehkan, i siikan mui na za hiam? A muinam danin limtuak si e, ki ci thei a, minam dangte&#8217; pau hi tuan loin eipau mah i zat mah ahi hi. Lenmui gim namtui-in, Lenmui i nek cingin i sunga hong cina sak thei lungno pawlkhat sisak ahih manin, Lenmui pen mihingte adingin zatui hoih mahmah khat ahi hi. Khuamui, Khuamuikuan, Muikung, Muigah, Muimin lim mahmah hi. &#8220;Mui&#8221; cih pen a hoih a pha lam genna ahi hi. Ni dangin Selbung khua ten tua sihnamtui kuam teng lo na kho ngei uh a, tua lozau pen Tuimui lozau na cipah uh hi. Sihnamtui panin Tuimui gam, Tuimui khua, Tuimui lozau, Tuimui Lui, Tuimui tang, Tuimui khuatual pau piang ahi hi. Tui siang, Tui namtui, Tuimui cih khawng I sutsut leh Bible sunga II Kings (Kumpite Nihna) 2:21-22 sunga Jerico khua gei-a tuisia kamsang Elisha in siansuah in thupha pia a, tuihoih, tui manpha a suahsak thute ka phawk hi. Tuimui khua cih khua min a kiphuah ma-in Sa-beng leh lo nei in giahden-a om masa Pu Suan Awn leh Pu Suah Khualte unau kum bangzah hiam sabeng kawm in na om khin uh hi. Tua Sihnamtui gei-a gamla lo ah Ai-nah phah a giahbuk sat in, giahbuknei uh a, Tuimui khua cih kiphuak hikha ding hi. Amau pen Tedimm lam Suangphei khua panin a hong peemto ahi uh hi. Mualpi innpipa Pu Go Kho Thang tawh a khan lai uh kituak a, a tapa Pu Sum Kam leh Pu Awn Tunte khan lai kituak hi. Tuimui Khua Mun (Location) Tuimui khua pen a tangpi-in, Manipur Lamka District leh Mizo gam Sialkal Tang kikal ah om hi. Tuimui Vumpi 1656mtrs (4965) pan Vumpi neu tua pan Mikang buh lei vum khang lam-a mualdung pai suk, Suangdawhciang, Siikmual, Samual suahna (Leicial mualbawk nuai), Vaupak phungah Sakvum, Tuipi maitang pan 4450 a san&#8217; na mual ah Tuimui khua kiphah in, inn a tamzaw ni-ong lamah om hi. A gal leitaw-nitumna (South West) ah Galkhuamun kici khuamunlui mual neuzaw khat om lai hi. Khuamun hoih in khua hun zong khuakhal ciangin lum lua lo, Phalbi ciangin zong vot lua lo in om a, khaici zong hoih mahmah hi. Gamgite Selbung tawh gamgi (boundary) Saklam leilu lamah (North) Vumpi, Tuimui Vumpi nuai nitumna lam (West) panin gamgi mual, tua panin Takmual, gamgi lui zui-in Tuimang lui dong hi. Vumpi nuai nisuahna lam (East) ah Saza ken, Kenlui zuisuk in, Lingthuk khuataw pan-a hong luang suk Tuimui lui dong hi. Vaivet tawh gamgi &#8211; Nisuahna lam (East) Tuimui lui naak panin Neng Do Pau&#8217; mual pha lo deuhin Vaivet tawh gamgi Tuimui lui zuisuk in leitaw lam (South) khang lamah Tuimang lui tawh kituah hi. Vaikhawtang (India) tawh gamgi: Nitumna lam (West) ah Tuimang lui zui sukin Vaikhawtang tawh kigamgi a, Vanzau tawh saulo kigi in Tuimang lui mah zui suak lai a, Selbung tawh nitumna lam gamgi lui-ah kituah kik hi. A lompi in gen leng Tuimui lui leh Tuimang lui kikal, Tuimui Vumpi nisuahna lam leh ni tumna lam ah kikhen tansuk a, kician mahmah hi. Vumpi pen saklam a neu zaw lam pen Selbung gam hia, atamzawa lian zaw lam Tuimui gam hizaw hi. Pu Vaiphei te leh Pu Thahdo tenTuimui khua Vumpi nuai nisuah na lam ah Khua nasat in kum bangzah hiam na om khin uh hi, tuní dongin a tenna inn munlui te kimu thei lai hi 1877: Pu Suang Awn leh Pu Suah Khualte unau gam en ding leh sabeng kawm in Tuimui gam na tung uh hi. 1879-1882: Tuimui (Vatbuk lui) ah Hausa vaihawm na kipan ta hi. (Pu Kim Khaw Thang Mualsuang tungah kigelh hi.) 1885: Pu Awn Tunte pata tengin Vaivet gamah Tuibuak khua sat uh hi. 1888: Tuibuak khua panin Mauvom khua kisat ci-in kiciamteh hi. (Innpite ciaptehna ah 1897). Tuimui khua-ah ki-om suak gige loin, khua lui lamah taisan zel, va puah kik zel uh hih tuak hi. Lo buk belh in beel lai uh-a, mi tam nai lo hihtuak uh hi. 1891-1898 : Galkhua-munah Pu Awn Tun Tawmging in Hausa vaihawmna kipan kikta hi. Tua hun ciangin Tawmging behte bek hi nawn lo-in, Hatlang beh, Buansing beh, Phaipi beh, Lang-el beh, Thomte beh, leh Tangpua behte kihel ta uh hi. (Hih lai ah Thomte ka telsak khak hangin Pu Kam Za Mang Guite tawh hong kizui toto uh amau tel kha nai lo ding uh hi.). 1898-1901: Tuimui Khua-taw Theitheekzang ah kiteng hi. Tua panin tu-a i tenna ah kisuan to ta hi.(Pu Awn Tun 1828-1902 = 75 years) 1923: Pu Thang Kim Saipimual khua-ah kisuan kik hi. 1925 in Tuimui hong tung kik hi. 1922-1956: Pu Awn Tun tapa Pu Kim Khaw Thang Tawmging in Hausa sem hi. 1850 kum pawl a kipanin Zogam ah Pawi gal, Meitei gal leh Tualgal tamin samat galmat kidem in, a hat, siahkaihna kituh uh hi. Sumbawl Mikang gamkeek kumpite hong khangto in, Zogam hong luah khit uh ciangin amau vaihawmna leh asapsuk, a saptoh uh ciangin nuamsa lo, lung muangthei lo, amau tawh kigamlat theihna ci-in na kikhin na pem uh a, Pu Go Khaw Thang Mualpi ah na kikhin in, tua pan a sawtlo in tapa Pu Sum Kam in Sial bu, Tonglon Lamka District ah innpi a tuah khit, 1892 Kum in Mualpi ah Innpi ngakin om hi. Tua a pann a tapa Pu Kam Za Mang in Hanship pek ah innpi a tuah leuleu hi. Tua ahih manin gal muanna leh lung muanna zong in 1877 hun pawlin Kam Hau mite 2000 val ding bang Mizoram leh Manipur gam lamah kilal kipem in, khuathak na sat kawikawi uh a, a bawng abawng, a beh a phungin na kizui ngeingai uh hi ci-in Mangkangte in na ciamteh uh hi. Sanggam Thahdote leh Vaipheite na taito masa uh a, tuate sulnung zui-in Pu Awn Tun&#8217; pa Pu Suah Khual Tawmging leh Pu Suang Awn Tawmgingte unau zong a tenna uh Suangphei pan gam thak mun thak zongin na zinkhia uh hi. 1877-78 kum sungin Kam Hau&#8217; mite inn 2000 bang Meitei gam leh Mizo gam-ah lalto uh a, tuate sulnung kizui toto hi kha ding hi. ((Alexander Mackenzie laibu The North East Frontier of India (Delhi,2001), a kibawl masak kum 1884-page-171 ah kigelh hi.) (a) Tuizum mangkang kil bang hong khang, Zo ta kuam zin bang hong ling a, pianna gam lei ke&#8217;n lah phal si&#8217;nge. (b) Pianna gamlei i Zo (gamzang) naamtem, lal ka nawh san si in zel a, ngaliam vontawi tang kalau, kalau lo lai e. Ipu I pa te in mikang gamkeek kumpi ten a do ngekngek uh hi. Pu Suah Khual in sawt ompih loin, a sanggam leh a tate khia-lah in Suangphei leh Tuimui Lobuk kikal kawm in kileh niloh uh hi. Tua ten Vaiphei, Thahdote nung hong zuito uh hih tuak hi. Tuimui Vumpi nuai nisuahna lam (ni-ong lam) ah Vaiphei leh Thadote teenna khua mun lui khat zong om hi. Pu Kam Za Mang Guite in Hanship khua-ah innpi sem in, hong tutphah uh ciangin khua lui lam veh kawm in Ngalzang, Tualkhiang, leh Haiciin khuate hong sat uh hi. Tua hun lai-in Khualui ahi &#8220;Galkhuamun&#8221; ah Pu Awn Tun Tawmging in Hausa sem in, vaihawmna na pan khin ta hi. Tua hun lai-in Hausa khuasatte bek mah in Khuamual na nei uh a, Khuataw ciangah Pu Tawmgingte mual na om takpi hi. Hih mual leh galmual sak nung-a Pu Tawnmgingte mual in thudik thuman ahihna kuamah sel theih loh leh kuamah dem zawh loh hi ci-in hong hilhcian hi. Phuahtawm bawltawm zong hi beek loin na suahna pianma a thu gilte thuman tawh lahna (evidence) ahi hi. Pu Suah Khual leh Pu Awn Tunte pata zong om den gige zo tuan lo uh a, Pu En Tual (Pu Awn Tun zi Pi Cing Ning san8gampa) leh Pu Ngah Khaw Thang (Pu Suang Awn tanu/Pu Thang Kim sanggam nu&#8217; pasal)-te mi bangzah hiam tawh hong paito kik uh a, hong tun kik uh ciangin hong pawlcing ta uh a, Tuimui khua-ah hong om suak ta uh hi. Unau pata, sunghta putute khuasatna, thu neihna ahih manin Lawki leh Tapidaw suak cilte&#8217; kal ah kideidanna thuakhaksa uh zong na hi kha ding hi. Tua ahih manin Pu En Tual zong Tapidaw ahih manin, &#8220;Tapidawte phungkhente,&#8221; c i taitai uh a, a thuakna leh a vau nate uh hangin Selam khua Pu Lian Vum tawh sat in na taikhia a, thamloh in Kawl Tuimui ci-in khuathak na sat lawh lai hi. Lawki ngeina tawh Tapidaw nuntak zia hong kibang nawn loin tual biakna, zehtan sawlbante bek hi loin Tapidawte pen Nipi Ni a tangtha leh taiban cihte pai nuam nawn lo, zuhai tawi-in zuphung saphung ah tukhawm holim khawm cihte om thei nawn lo-in u le nau kal ah ki-itna a kiam tawh kibang hi. Tapidaw suak masa te pen Hausa vaihawmte in zong a khua a khua ah na sim mawh, na huaciat uh a, Sia Vial Nang zong Tonzang innpi pa in dawite neklup dingin Kadang ciklak ah na hawlkhia in teng sak hi. Pasian in thupha pia in tama sak lo a, tua Kadang kiim teng ah Sanginn (School), Zato inn (Hospital) leh mun thupi pen suak ta hi. Ukpite, innpi ten Tapidawte a bawlsiat luat manun Tungtuang khua pan Pu Thang Nokte inn 8 ukpipa&#8217;n na hawlkhia uh a, Nahnuai ah galtai teng va kituah kha uh hi. Pu Awn Tunte pata in zong Tuimui khuasatna lah nusia ngam zo tatak loin 1885 kum in Vaivet gam Tuibuak khua thak na sat uh a, tua ah zong kum(6) phial tang bang bek om in, Tuimui mah ah tung kik zel uh hi. Tuimui lam zuan lo teng pawlkhat in Mauvom khua na sat uh hi. Kum 1903 a kipanin Tuimui khua pen Guite-te vaihawmna, hausa thuneihna hong suak ta a, pu Mang Za Thang in hausa hong sem hi. Tuimui khua pen Mizoram leh Manipur gamte kikal a om Meitei gungal khuate lak-ah School leh Health Centre om masakna pen khua hi a, Tonzang Gungal ah mipil misiam masa a khankhiatna khua ahi hi. Rev. J. H. Cope in Zolai hong bawlsak ding lai-in zong Tonzang innpipa tawh hausate a kaihkhop lai-in zong Tuimui Hausapa Pu Mang Za Thang na sam a, kamdot pen leh thulak pen in na zang uh hi. Khuakiim khuapamte etten en zahtak khua minthang masa khat ahi hi. Kum1975 ma ciangciangin khua kiim khua pamte sangin kumpi nasem, mipil misiam kitam zaw lai hi. A mite mahmah zong kamnem in zindo siam uh a, an nek tuidawn hoih man hiam, khua hun hoih man hiam a mel uh zong hoih diak hi. Tuimuite melhoihte, kamsiamte, zindo siamte hong kici ngiat hi. Tuimui Youth Organization ((T Y.O.) cih hong om a, Tuimui khangnote pattah leh makailh masa pen Dai Khan Kham, Lian Za Kham leh Lian Khan Thangte pawl ahi hi. Khangnote pu Mang Cin Paute&#8217; inntual ah hong kaikhawm in la hong sinpih, tangthu tomnono hong gen pih in, khuasung lampi leh luituite hong puahpih hong hahsiangpih uh hi. Tuimui khua leh Gospel cih Laibu a gelh TK. Suan Tawmging a tangval cil lai 1975 kum pawlin inn 130-150 bang kipha a, khua sung vaisai na khat pepeuh ah kithutuak in nuam thei mahmah hi. Tua hun-a kipanin khuangtum a lenkhop lasak hong kipan kik ahi hi. Tua hun lai-in khua kiim khua paamte Tedim lam hiam, Lamka lam hiam ah a zin na uh-ah, &#8220;Kua khuate na hi vua? ci-in kidong leh, &#8220;Tuimui, na kici thei zen sam uh hi. Tuimui pen minthang minhoih vangvang mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Tuimuite mipil misiam tam, palik galkap, kumpi nasem zong tam in khua dang te&#8217; n zong hong zahtak uh hi. Tuimui VUMPI: Vumpi pen tuipi maitang pan 1656 Mtr (4965) sang a, a tung vum pen lo cingkhat cia in zai a, suangpi lian mahmah khat om hi. Tua suangpi tung vum-ah a kuak khat om a, tui tam lo kicing den hi. Tua tui khut tawh thaikang in paisan leng a zingciang tui na vung kik zelin kang ngei lo hi. February 06, 2018 Tuesday ni-in Pa Cin Suan Thang, leh Pa Go Sian Khualte tawh ka va kah toh uh leh tui na kicing nawn lo hi. Tui om loh Tui kicin nawn loh pen kum 2/3 bang sawt ta ci-in gen uh hi. Vumpi nuai a dangah cik/nawng khat zong om hi. Ni dangin tua Vumpi ah dawite om a, Hausapi Kawl a dawite tawh kikawm kihawh thei zel kici hi. Tua Tuimui Vumpi pen Tuimui khuasat cil ten na bia uh hi. Tuimui Vumpi nisuah na lamah ni dangin Thahdo/Vaipheite teenna khua mun luite tu dongin kimu thei lai hi. Tuimui khua pan 3 km val deuh kigamla hi. Tua Vumpi hangin Tuimui leh Selbung te khuahun leh guahtui hoih in, gam leh lei hoih a, an zong khua-kiimte sangin pal zaw hi. Khua munnuam leh gamhoih ahih manin Paite/ Dapzal, Teizang leh Guite beh nam tuamtuamte Tedim Suangphei khualam pan a hong pai khiate na om khawm uh ahih manun Zomite lak panin pau hoih pen khat, sak leh khang kigawmtuah pau hoih mahmah khat hong piang khia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kim le pamte khua tualpau pen leiba siikna dingin hoih, Mi tawh kitot kiselna dingin hoih ci-in kigen a, Tuimui khua tualpau leh awsuah pen damlo nat vehna dingin a hoih pen in kigen hi. 1999 kum Kawlpi (Kaley) kava hawh in Tea Hotel ah ka lawmpa Zam Khan (USA) tawh ka va tut uh leh ka gei vua mi thum tukhawm ten, &#8220;Guai&#8230; ei Tedim mite pau zat dingin Tedim tualpau leh Tonzang tualpaute sangin Tuimuite pau hoihsa pen ing,&#8221; ci-in kikum uh a, ken hong thei uh hiam ci-a ka damdot leh hong na theikha kilkel lo uh hi. Ka lungsim sungah Mizoram tawh a kinai hangin Mizo pau la lo, Paite pau lah la khin lo, Tonzang Tedimte Awsuah lah kila khin lo, Mauvom, Kansau lamte awsuah lah kila kha lo ci-in ka lung a kim mahmah hi. Tham loin Sia Do Khup leh Sia Lang En Pau in a flim bawl nate uh ka et, ka ngaih ciangin Tuimui pau Tuimui aw suah limzat phadiak uh hi. TENNA MUNLUI TE LEH A HUN (a) Vatbuk lui ah 1879-1882 kikal kiteng hi. (b) Galkhua munah kum 1891-1898 ciang kiteng hi. (c) Khuataw Theithek zangah 1898-1901 ciang kiteng hi. TUIMUI HAUSATE TANGTHU Pu Awn Tun (1879-1882; 1891-1898): (Pu Awn Tun Tawmging pen lo nei-in a giahden a om masa pen Pu Suah Khual ta ahi hi). Pu Suang Awn pen tek/upa ta a, hausa upate thudotpi in om hi. Pu Suah Khual in a Lobuk panin Suangphei lam-ah a ciah kik lai- in a tate leh a sanggampate a hu-ngaihna in nunghei kawmin pianna khua lui lam leh khua thak kawmtuah niloh hih tuak hi. Khanglui upa ten &#8220;Tuinak ngak masa, mual a khawl masa kizahtak,&#8221; a cih mah bangun Mangkang thunei ten zong khuasat a om masate na zahtak in, Pu Mang Za Thang&#8217; maban zom dingin Pu Tawmgingte mah Hausa vaihawm dingin na pia veve uh hi. Mikangte pen hai het lo uh, thukan siam mahmah uh hi. Mite khasiatsak ding zong deih vet lo uh a, mi hazat deihsak tuam zong nei vet lo uh hi. Ahite ahi mah in, a dik lote a dik lo mahin na ciamteh cinten uh hi. Japan gal zawh nangawn a thupiang, khua kisat kumte i theih i kan zawh loh hangin Mikang ten Japan gal ma-a khua phazah, inn phazah, mi phazah na record khin dimdem uh hi. Pu Mang Za Thang (1903-1921/38)18yrs:A vaihawm pihte -Awn Tun Tawmging (Hausapa thudotpi), Pu Vum Cin, Pu Vum Gin. (Innpite thuneihna tawh Pu Guite in Hausa sep theina ding thu hong ngah uh manin Pu Mang Za Thang Guite zong Haiciin khua panin hong pai ahi hi.) Khuasat a om masa, thunung ma thei ci-in zahtakna pia in, thu dotpi leh amah huh dingin Pu Awn Tun Tawmging Asst. Chief of Tuimui village in na koih ngiat hi. Pu Thawn Hang (1939-1947): A vaihawmpihte &#8211; Pu Kim Khaw Thang, Pu Vang Tual, Pu Zen Thawng, Pu Vung Tual, Pu Thawn Hang in zong a pa dinmun ah hong tut teh thudotpi leh ama nuai-a thunei pen dingin Pu Kim Khaw Thang Tawmging mah hong koih leuleu hi. Pu Kim Khaw Thang (1947-1953): A vaihawmpihte &#8211; Pu Vang Tual, Pu Zen Thawng, Pu Vung Tual, Pu Lang Khaw Gin. Pu Guite hauhsakna hong om thei nawn loh teh khuasat ahi Pu Tawmgingte vaihawmna mah ah hong tung kik nawn veve hi. Pu Khual Khan Tual (1954-1958): A vaihawmpihte &#8211; Pu Vung Tual, Pu Tual Za Nang, Pu Tun Za Cin, Pu En Za Neng. (Pu Khual Khan Tual Tawmging pen Tuimui khuasuak Police Officer masa pen hi a, Tawmging innkuan sung pan khang khia ahi hi.) Pu Gin Khaw Thang (1959-1963): A vaihawmpihte &#8211; Pu Vung Tual, Pu Zen Thawng. REMARKSBY TOURING OFFICERS Circle No. 8G.V.P. No. 383/20T. of 1949 Kim Kim Kho Thang, son of Awn Tun, is elected as Headman for Tui Mui Village. The other Councillors duly elected are 1.Thawn Hang 2) Vung Tual 3) Zen Thawng 4) Lang Kho Gin Sd-xxXXXX Asst. Rsani Tiddim Tuciangin Gal-aih,Sa-aih ding om nawnlo, tua bang hun in hong khengta a, pilna, Siamna, hauhnate ki ai-ta hi. 1885 kumin Pu Suang Awn leh Pu Awn Tun Tawmgingte in Vaivet gam ah Tuibuak khua sat hi. Tuibuak khua a sat kumin a tate nih damlo in sihkhat in si uha, Pu Awn Tun in hih a nuai a la na phuak hi. a) Mawngbang pemna Phaiphek limbuk, vonkop sai bang ka lapna. b) Vonkop saibang kalap ni&#8217;n ee, Ciin leh Tuai teng ngai ing ee. 1) Tuimui khua-a mual masa upa pen Pu Tawmgingte&#8217; mual, khuataw mual-ah hih a nuai-a bangin Laipian (Pau Cin Hau) Lai-in, &#8220;Pu Suang Cin Tawmging in a sih in Sial 5 keng hi. A sim thei ten na sim ta un, ci-in Pu Thuam Go (Pu Awn Kho Hau pa) in na gelh hi. Pu Suang Cin pen Pu Thual Kho Gin&#8217; naupa ahi hi. (Thual Kho Gin pen Gin Go Pau Pu ahi hi). Tua mualsuang pen khuataw &#8220;Kanciang&#8217; a a omna panin Pa Gin Go Pau&#8217; inn ah lato in kem lai hi. Khuataw cianga Pu Tawmgingte&#8217; mual ah suangtung bek hi loin, Singgil tungah zong galmat samat teng lim gelh in, na ciamteh uh hi. Tua a samat simna mual singgil pen mi pawlkhat in tem tawh satsak uh a, Pu Thangkim heh lua, khasia lua in hih bangin la na phuak hi. (a) Pheiphungnem banzal i ngakna, namtem hiam na tawi lo aw. (b) Namtem hiam tawi paal kisa ten, Tulsing om muang, dawn lai na lawh awl ve aw. (a) Khuamual tulsing saibang baan ten kumsawt a muang zo diam aw. (b) Zua sangkap leh puvon lalthah, sang nancin tuanna hi e&#8230; ci-in khitui nulkawm khasia takin la na paih hi. (2). Tuimui khua galmual-a om, &#8220;Tawmging zikpi Pu Kim Khua Thang mual ah, &#8220;Ka pa Awn Tun in Tuimui khua ah 1879 pan 1882 kum sung Hausa Upa nasem hi,&#8221; ci-in kigelh hi. Galkhua munlui ah a ten lai-in, Hanpi zong nei-in, khuataw kanciangah mual na bawl uh a, tu-a i tenna ah a kisuantoh ciangin galmualsak nung a kici pen Pu Awn Tun mual a kici ci pen khangthak thu theician lo ten, &#8220;Galmualsak nung, Peuh na ci mawk uh hi. Pu Awn Tun mualte lamsak ah kiphut a, lamkhang ah a tapa Pu Kim Khaw Thang mual kiphut ngiat ni. (d) KHUA MUAL I CIH Khua mual kici pen khua nawl mun nuam, khua pan gamla lo, khawlmun nuam khat hi a, khua cih ah mun nih mun thum bangah om thei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tenna Zogam pen mual leh guam tawh kidim a, innmun ding leh khawl tawldamna ding i tawhzang tangtang kul hi. A mun tawh zel loin a baihsa om lo a, mualsuang dawhna ding i tawhtam i tawhzang ngekngek kul hi. A poimawh a kisapna ahih leh: Lokuan ding, gamkuankhia dingte leh khualzinkhia dingte kingakna mun ahi hi. Khua lut ding ciangin gim leh tawlna, lungsim ngaihsut buainate tawldam sakna nutsiatna mun in zang hi. I pui pate khuamual panin lungnuam, tawldam takin khua sung inn sung na lut uh hi. Inn ah a nutsiat uh a taneu laite, puteek piteekte a lunghimawhna, inn a lunghimawhnate a beisakna a nutsiatna mun uh ahi hi. Khuamual ah mualsuang kiphut kidawh in, khangtangthu sutna leh ciaptehna khat zong ahi hi. Galmat samat, gawh leh luup, ton le aih simna ciaptehna khat zong ahi hi. Hong nusiasa a paisa it le ngaih teng min ciaptehna phawkna mun khat zong ahi hi. Galmat, samat ciang leh Khuado pawi khuai lak cianga kidawnna kimuakna mun poimawh mahmah khat zong ahi hi. Khuamual panin laamsa/phittumsa in kilut hi. Samualsuahna a lem lohna munte panin Khuamual kizuan kizang in sa kimualsuah hamtang hi. a) Khuamual lumsuang ngaihteng sialna, vangkhuanuam leh galdon honuam teng sialna hi e. b) Galdot honuam teng ka sialna, pupa khangui kasutna hi e. Pu Awn Tun&#8217; Tawmging La: (a) Ka paipai a ka zuizui, mal gam tuanglam nunnuam e. (b) Muitui kulkhuk in nei tang e, Sial a cih dong hong ing e. Hih ka pu&#8217; la pen siamtak leh lawptakin ka saksak ciangin ka pa&#8217; khanlai dong ka neu lai-in sial ka hauh dan uh ka mitkha ah hong lang hi. Nitak lamin sialte hong ciah ciangun sial khum in ka unau un ka buai theih mahmah uh a, khat veivei ka sialte uh kikal ah om kha ka hih manin lau-in ka awng zakzak thei zel hi. Tua cianginka u Pau in, &#8220;I sialte mi&#8217; sial tawh kibang lo a, a zual theihtheih uh tawh lau ding hilo hi,&#8221; ci-in hong tai thei zel hi. Ka inn nuai uh lah khuk tantan buannawi pha-in nam heha hi. Sial cing dingin ka kuan ciangin ka sial lawngte uh a gin&#8217; danin ka muh ma-in ka thei hi. Sial cin pen nuam kasa mahmah hi. A neupen pawl ka hih manin vasa kapna ding sailungtang hualin ka buai thei mahmah hi. Nitak ka tun ciangin sun a ka aisa sawkte, ka vasa matte leh aigiacilte pua thei ka hih manin ka meh uh lim thei mahmah bilbel hi. Ka pa&#8217;n, &#8220;Sial cin zong hong haksa ta ahih manin zuak ni-in, inntung khuhna dingin sikkang (tin roof) lei ni, ci-in hong zuak hong zuak a, sial nga khawng ka zuak khit uh ciang in innsing leh sikkang ka lei uh hi. Tua hun lai-in sialpi khat K350 /K 450 khawngin ka zuak uh hi. Ka pa&#8217;n a zu kamnam ciangin khat veivei, &#8220;Tuga, temga tawi a, sial mei a ka luai sikkang tawh innlam Tuimuikhua ah kei hi&#8217;ng ei,&#8221; ci-in kisialpih thei zel CI V- VII ka hih lai-in Tuimui khua thu tawh kisai ka kan lai- in khatvei Sikkang inn nei teng ka sim tohtoh leh khasum sang kumpi nasem lo, sumbawl sum zong a diang khia lo dingin innnuai-a sial khawisa zuak, tuga, heiga tawi a inn lam zo pen ka pa bek mah a na hi a, ka pa kisialhna zong man kasa mahmah hi. PU KIM KHAW THANG&#8217; MUAL A KIGELHTE TAWMBING ZIIKPI KIM KHAW THANG 1879-1882 kum a kipanin ka Pa Awn Tun in Tuimui khua sung vaihawm kipan hi. Kum 1922 a kipanin Kim Khaw Thang in Tuimui khua sung vaihawm kipan a, 1956 dong sem hi. A u Ning Go tawh a khan lai-in Zo ngeina zui-in, gal, sahang, sai, vom, vaphual, sakol leh taang aih hi. Sa-ik 50 vei man hi. Ni 7-2-1968, 8:00 PM in a it teng nusia hi cih teng kigelh hi. A pa&#8217; pu Awn Tun mual leh Pu Kim Khaw Thang&#8217; mualte Galmual sak nung a kicihna mun ah kiphut hi. (e) Tuimui khua le Tuimui lui Tuimui khua leh Tuimui lui cih pen a masa zaw ding ka gel ciangin Tuimui khua a kisat khit ciangin a khuataw a lui luang pen Tuimui lui min kipia hi dingin ka um hi. Mikang gamkek kumpi te in Zogam hong tutphah khit uh ciang in India leh Kawlgam tawh hong uk khawm uha, gamgi zong hong bawl pah uh hi. Tua hunlai a kipan Tuimui lui, Tuimang lui leh tu-a Vaivet te khua gei a Pu Awn Tun te pata in a khuasat ahi &#8220;Tuibuak&#8221; khua zong a na om khin hi. Tuimang khua pen Tuimang lui tapin khua min kiphuak hi cih laigelhna ah ka sim kha ngei hi. (Tuimang innkuan US). Alaungphaya kumpi a sihkhit ciangin a tapa Budawphaya in kumpi sem a, 1813 kum ciangin Meitei gam uk dingin Majit Singh koih in, Assam gam uk pi dingin Chandrakan Singh a koih hi. Mahabanola hong khan ciangin zong Assam gam ukpi dingin Chanrakan Singh mah koih hi. 1831 kumin Kawlgam kumpi leh India kumpi tangmi Capt. Grant leh Lt. Pembatonte Kindat khua ah kikupna nei uha, tua a kipan-in Kale-Kabaw (Kawlpi leh Tamu) gam teng Kawl kumpi in ngah hi. AD 1850 kum in Chandrakirti Singh in Meitei gam uk hi. 1877 pawl in Col. Johnston in gamgi tawh kisai na buaipih a, 1894 kum bul in Chin Hills political officer ahi Mr. B.S. Carey in India leh Kawlgam gamgi hong khen sak hi. (&#8220;Migration of the Sukte into Manipur&#8221;). Hih gamgi khen nate ka sim ciangin tua hun lai pek in zong Tuimui lui, Tuimang lui leh Tuibuak khua te a na om khin a ci nuam, hong tel sak nuam kahi hi. Tua hia Selbung khua sat leh Vumpi nuai nisuah na lam Tuimui gam ah Vaiphei, Thahdo te ten hun pen ki gamla lo mah ding hi. A peemto, a lalto, a paito a kizui khawm toto, a kidelh toto mah hi ding uh hi. Pu Suah Khual leh Pu Suang Awn bang hun a Tuinmui gam hong tung cih akigen theih lianloh hangin Pu Kim Khaw Thang in, ka pa Awn Tun in 1879 kum a kipan Tuimui khua Hausa vai hawmna na pan ta hi ci a mualsuang tung aa a gelh pen khiallo ding hi. Tuimui lui pen Lingthuk te khuataw pan in hong luang suk a Tuimang lui tawh kituah in gamgi lui hong suak hi. Source : Tuimui khua leh Gospel Laibul bawl : Thawng Khan Suan (T.K.Suan Tawmging) Thawng Khan Suan tangtho tom A suah ni : November 9, 1953 A pa min : Kim Za Cin A nu min : Khup Za Niang (Hatlang) A zi min : Cing Khan Nuam (Tangpua) A tate min; 1) Mary Niang Lian Vung 2) Ciin Muan Kim 3) Cin Sian Sum 4) Esther Vung Huai Cing Nasep : India Army Assam Regiment (1976-1988) Pahtawi Award 8 ngah. Tawmging Beh Pu Awn Tun te pen NK. Nang pianna pupi te a hihna Tuumang khuasat lakah a kihel ka pu Phut Dam zi pen Pi Ngai Niang hi a, pu Ngai Niang pianna pen Pu Suah Khual tate Pu Awn Tun zi Pi Cing Ning Pi Khoi Khawl pasal Thuam Khaat (Langel) Pi Ngai Niang pasal Pu Phut Dam (Neihkhup, Tuimang) Pi Pha Dim pasal El Cin (Guite) Pi Ngai Niang leh pu Phut Dam in tapa khat nei a, a min Tun Khaw Thawng a hi hi. Tun Khaw Thawng ka pa Thawng Zam mintap a hi hi. 1917 kum in Pu Tun Khaw Thawng pen France pai a, a tun ciangin Tuimui a pu Awn Tun tapa Pu Kim Khaw Thang in sial khat pia a, a sial si hi. A pu sialpiak a sih ciangin Pu Tun Khaw Thawng in la khat phuak hi. a) Pu Von sawmsial ka huang khiat aw, mei bang mit e, nu tun ngaih sial lua sang e. b) Nu Tun ngaihsial sianmang sinthu Setang kal na ngai ing e. Tuimui khua a ka pu Awn Tun te tangthu pen Pu TK. Suan gelh laibu Tuimui khua leh Gospel cih sungah ka muh manin ka lungdam mahmah hi. @NK. Nang
Tuilangh Khua
Ih Pu ih Pate in gal leh sate hangin khua na lal kawikawi, na kituah kawikawi uh ahih manin khuasatna leh a tun na teng ahun leh a mun a gamteng ih at masak ding kisam hi. AD 1400-1500 hun in “Ciimnuai” khua nasat uh hi. Pu Ciang Phut (Suante beh) in hausa sem hi. Inn 400 a phak laitak in khua mei-in kang hi. Tua banah gilsan natna, zavat natna tungin mi tampi si-uh hi. AD 1675-1750 hun pawl in Ciimnuai khua pan in “Kaalzang” khua sat in na teenguh hi. AD 1810-1880 hun ciangin “Phaileeng” khua nasat uh hi. Tua laitak in Pu Suum Pau (Sukte) in hausa sem hi. AD 1889-1890 hun pawl in Phaileeng khua Mikangte in hal in inn (40) kangtum hi. Tua panin tai-in “Omlui” tung hi. Mikangte in Omlui hal leuleu uh ahih manin AD1891 kumin Lailo khua taw “Singmual” khua nasat uh hi. Singmual khua ah Pu Son Kai (Gualnam) in hausa sem hi. Pu Zong Son (Suankhup beh) in Upa sem hi. Singmual khua ah kum 2 bang teengin 1450 hun a Pu Nit Lam khuasat na Man Lun, Man Tuang te teen na khua Khuangnung khua mui lui-ah AD1893- 1895 kum dong Khuangnung khua-ah na teenguh hi. Khuangnung khua panin Phaileeng kampau teng in a nuai a bangin khua nasat tek uh hi. 1895 kumin Pu Be Na (Thatmun beh) in makai-in Khuangnung panin “Lunmual khua ” nasat hi. 1896 kumi n Pu Lam Sa wm (G ualnam beh) makai -in Khuangnung panin “Phaileeng khua” nasat hi. 1896 kumin Pu Kho i Vum (Suankhup beh ) maka i-in Khuangnung panin “Tuilangh khua” nasat hi. 1904 kumin Pu Thang Tel (Samte beh) makai-in Khuangnung panin “Khuabem khua” nasat hi. 1928 kumin Pu Neng Thual (Suante beh) makai-in Khuangnung panin “Lalta khua” nasat hi. TUILANGH KHUASAT NA Nidang a kipan Pute Pate in, lokhawh singpuak,gankhawi nate bulphuh in na nungta uh a, teen na khuamun azon uh ciangin tui tam na, tui baihna, mun hoihna, leitanghoihna, bulphuh in na teenguh hi.Mun khempeuh pan a kimu kawikawi ciktui te khuat inna teengkhawm uh a, khua min dingin &#8220;Tuilangh&#8221; khua mahna phuak uh hi. Tonzang ukpi Pu Hau Cin Khup in Voktal tuk 5 meipakkhat tawh khua kipna hong pia in, Pu Khoi Vum(Suankhupbeh) in hausa sem hi. Tuilangh khuasat Pu Khoi Vum a zuiteng Pu Khoi Vum &#8212; Suankhup beh &#8211; Hausa Pupi Pu Hau Laang &#8212; Lianzaw beh &#8211; Upa Siampu Khup Cin &#8212; Phiamphu beh &#8211; Upa Sikseek Pu Son Kai &#8212;
