Pu Dam Khua Hau
Pu Ngul Langh (Suankhup) leh Pi Niang Zen te tapa upen hi a, 11.3.1930 kumin Tedim khua ah suak hi. 1956 kumin Yangon United Christian High School (Cushing) sang panin matric zo i. 1957 kum ciang Rangoon University ah kah a, 1961 kumin B.A zo hi. Suankhup beh sung panin B.A zo masa pen ahi hi. SHS Tedim sangpi ah Senior Assistant Teacher (SAT) sem hi. 1961 kumin Buddha Biakna gambup Biakna ki suak sak ding cih thu a gin ciangin Rangoon University sangnaupang te thukim lo a, “Rangoon University Minority Students Alliance” phuan a, Kachin mi Zauseng tawh kop in makai pi (President) sem hi. A nung ciangin Zauseng, KIA gam sung makai pi suak hi. 1964 kum April 9 ni-in sum buuk khempeuh kumpi neihsa aki suah sak ciang leh kumpi thukhun (Policy) mualtung mite mailam a dingin lam en om salo ahih manin kumpi laih ding vaihawm in India gam bel hi. India ah kumpi tung lungkim lo gam a ding a sum ngam teng kituah uh a, U Son Cin Lian (M.P), U Hrang Nawl (M.P), Lt Col.Son Kho Pau te tawh kopin kumpi tung huhna ngen uh hi. India kumpi in huh ding kamciam pia a, ahih hang “No sungah makai (president) khat hong kiteel un” acih ciangin makai ding a teel pa uh U Hrang Nawl muang zolo ahih manin hong kikhen uh hi. 1965 kum April kha ni 9 ni-in Kawl kumpi khut sungah ki ap kik (surrender) hi. Kumpi te’n avekpi in Falam thong ah keem uh hi. 1969 November 1 ni-in Falam thong panin amah khan kipia a, suahtakna ngah hi. Amah khan tang Dr. Sian Za Kham, Bo Kham Cin Pau leh Mangpi Kiam Si te hi. A thu asian ciang in Tedim ah om in Mang kam sinna sang hong hi. 1983 kum kipat lamin Khampat, Thahdo beh te in Manglai hilh dingin cial ahih manin vapai hi. 30.7.1983 niin Khampat khua ah Leitung nusia hi. Hong nusiat in kum (51) pha hi. Sanggam laizom numei 6 leh pasal 3 hi a, a upen S/m Luan Za Cing ahi hi. (1)Nu Luan Za Cing + Rev Hau Go (sukte)(2) Pa Dam Kho Hau + Nu Nian Kho Niang /Nu Cing Khan Vung /Nu Niang Khan Zam.(3) Nu Cing Khaw Vung + Bo Pau Khan Lal (Sukte)(4) Nu Hau Khan Niang + Lt Col. Zam Khan Thang (Buansing)(5) Nu Huai Kho Man + Sia Gin Khan Cin (Tangpua)(6) Nu Suan Ngaih Cing + Pa Phung Za Pau(7) S/m Lian Khan Ciin + Sia Pum Thang(9) Sia Zam Za Dal + Nu Niang Man Lian.
Pu Thual Zen (General)
General Pu Thual Zen pen Tedim khua gei Laamzang khua a piang hi a, a gol ciangin galkap tumin Sgt, santhum angah ciangin pension la in tawp hi. Sum bawl kipan a, sum tawm khat hong cih thei ta hi. 1962 kumin Democracy Party phiat mai in galkap kumpi in kawl gam adeih bangin hong uk hi. Gam mi khempeuh in thuak zolo haksa sa, nuam sa lo in ki om hi. 9.4.1964 ni-in galkap kumpi in sum buuk khempeuh hong laksak in, 18.5.1964 ni-in dangka 50 lai leh 100 lai si sak leuleu hi. Mi khempeuh kilung kimlo ahih manin kumpi suan khia dingin Sgt, Thual Zen (Laamzang), U Son Cin Lian (Tedim-Sezang), U Dam Kho Hau (Tedim), U Mang Khan Pau (Circle Chairman-Gelnual), U Tuah Za Lian te makai in India kumpi bel in India panin U Ral Mung (MP Hakha), U Hrang Nawl (MP Thlantang), Col. Son Kho Pau (Thuklai) te tawh va kigawm uh hi. India kumpi Lal Bahadur Shastri hi a, New Delhi ah kimu uh hi. India kumpi in huh nading kamciam pia a, no sungah makai pi hong kitel un ci-in a sawl ciang U Hrang Nawl a teel uh hi. Pawl khat in muang zolo ahih manin kikhen thang uh a, India kumpi in huh theilo hi. Col. Son Kho Pau makaih galkap sin Pakistan panin thau vui thau tang tawh hong ciah mi 30 te U Hrang Nawl in makaih in Rih, Hakha, Falam khua te luh hi. General Thual Zen in zong galkap 700 bang nei a, amah makai in Tedim luh ding sawm hi. Tedim luh ding tawh kisai in General Thual Zen leh Zozum te Lailo gam suang kua ah 17.7.1965 kimuh khopna bawl masa hi. Kumpi lam pan Col. Van Kulh, Lt Col. Put Pa, leh Menzi Thawng Cin Thang te kihel a, gal piang sak lo in na khawl uh leh mawh mai na kumpi in hongpia ding hi ci-in “Kamciam” pia in tua tawh kikap na omlo hi. Tuidil gamah a om sungin Laamzang khua te mah ahi Tedim Palik Sankhat Kai Zen makai in Thual Zen te pawl va delh uh hi. Thual Zen te’n lam phung ah pang uh a, makai pa mah kaplum pah in a dang palik te tai mang uh hi. A luang man ding a innkuan pih te sum tampi pia hi. Tua panin Pu Thual Zen pawl a pang galkam 30 te kiangah zing an ne hi. A zingciang in Senam ah giak in, tua pan Suaklu khua ah Palik te kiangah a kipawl hihang ci-in va ki-ap hi. India Palik te’n kem a, asawt ciangin kawlgam hong puak kik hi. Kawl kumpi in Mandalay thongpi ah koih a, tua pan General Thual Zen si hi.
Pu Tun Kho Pum (General)
Pu Hen Gin (Baite) leh Pi Vial Ngaih (Naulak) te sung pan 1929 October kha in Singgial khua ah suak hi. 1930 kum ciang Singgial khua pan India gamah lal to a, 1948 kum ciangin Panglian khua ah teeng hi. Sanggam unau 3 pha uh a, Pu Thang Za Tun, Pu Neng Suan leh amah a nautum pen General Tun Kho Pum ahi hi. Gen. Tun Kho Pum pen 1967 January 14 ni-in, MNF Lion Brigade Lt. Than Sei a makaih na tawh kiman hi a Tuiichang Camp ah koih in 1967 February 5 ni-in Zingsang nai 7:00 in MNF te’n thau tawh kaplum uh hi. Tuazawh kum 50 phial a sawt khit ciang adam lai a lawmte leh khanglai gam it makai te in Champhai District sungah aluang vaphong kik a, aguh sia teng singngat leh lamka kikal a khua Panglian khua ah gui kik uh hi. North East India a Political Movement ma sawn pawl, Chin Liberation Army (CLA/ CNLA) Founder President Gen. Tun Kho Pum sihzawh kum 50 khit ciang a kithuah pih CLA (Chin Liberation Army) society avei pawl in Lamka a community Hall huang sungah Mualsuang phuh ding geel in ground breaking ceremony a bawl lai un, GDA secretary ZRO Coordinator Hang Sian Thang in nasep kipat nading honna nei hi. A lawm te teek khin napin phawkna mualsuang phuh a sawm na thupi sa in Pu Gin Khen Pau in CLA society tungah ZRO Head Quarter tangin lungdam na gen hi.Pu Tun Kho Pum in Zomi leh Zogam a ding a nuntakna apiak na ah zahtakna sangpen kipia hi a, gam leh minam makai te’n etteh tak ahih na zong pulaak hi. Zomi te bek hilo, North East India a om mi khempeuh kigawm kik nading a, a ma pan lak na thupi mahmah hi cih hong pu laak hi. Rev Khen P Tombing in Pu Tun Kho Pum in Politics abul hon phuh sak a, khangthak te’n ama sul ih zuih ding thupi hi. Khangthak te’n ih minam ih gam puah ni ci-in hanthawn hi. PC Party in zong Pu Tun Kho Pum in alawm te tawh thu kikupna mun a, a zat zel uh community Hall huang ahih manin tua munah mualsuang phuh sawm na mun hong piakhia Health Minister tungah lungdamna ko hi. Zomi sung pan mipi hong makaih CLA Founder President mual hong liam san sa General Tun Kho Pum (Baite) phawk gige nading adam laiten sum vom Rs.lakh khat bei in Kolkatta ah a bawl sak uh Mualsuang Lamka khuapi Hiang tam vengah 30.6.2015 kiphut hi. ZRO President Thang Lian Pau (Guite) leh USA Zomi innkuan President Go Sawm Khup te kihel thei hi. Zinglam 11:30 in YPA General Headquater Hall ah General Tun Kho Pum phawkna lipkhap huai tak kibawl khit ciang ZRO president Thang Lian Pau M.P Thang So (Baite), Health Minister phung Za Thang (Tonsing), Parliamentary Secretary Vung Za Gin (Valte) MTDC Chairman T.Mang a (Vaiphei) MLA-Gin Suan Hau, DC pan Langh Khan Pau (Guite), Churachanpur Dc/IAS Lun Min Thang Haokip, te in a banban in thugen uh hi.
Pa Hau Kap Thang (Thangpaa)
Buangmual khua Pa Lian Cin Pau (Mantuang) leh Nu Ciin Khan Niang (Taithul) te sung panin 12.11.1969 kumin Tonzang gam Buangmual khua ah suak hi. Sanggam laizom pasal 7 leh numei 4 gawm 11 pha uh hi. Khuadai khua ni nungzui Lia Gen Lun Vung tawh kiteeng a, tapa 3 nei in, Tg Pau Khan Lian (Malaysia), Tg Khai Muan Thang (M.Div) Bangalore, leh Tg Khup Sian Muang te ahi hi. La pen ka neutung pan ka uk hi. Ka mak pa Sia Luut Sian Pau hong pattah masak hi. Tua zawh kei leh kei hanciam a kasin ngiat hi. Zola dawng 40 bek phuak pan ingh. Tu ciangciang Album khui li kabawl na hi. (1) “Zo sinlai ah na sang ee”(2) “Ki sik kik in”(3) “Kabar kah lay sa yah tae, Daw Aung San Su Kyi”(4) “Style sih mah, Star phyit mae”. Zomi ih hih manin Zola mah sa in, a tang zai thei dingin kawlla sak ding kong hanthawn nuam hi. Ei mi la siam te pen ih aw in mi ban mahmah h. min ih ngah pian tak ciang ki puk pahpah hi. Ih kawlgam ah Iron Cross te etteh tak sa ing. Stage tung lasa ding ka din ciang Thang Paa na hansan na ding dawnpak in hong ci uh a, ken thungen in kaki ap hi ci-in ka dawng hi. Topa hong gualzawh pihna zong Pasian kaneih man hi. Zu dawnlo zatep lo ka hih manin Pasian in ka thunget na hong dawng hin teh ci ingh.La tawh kisai in leitung bupah pasal ah Bryan Adam, numei ah Celine Dione (Because you love me) bang hoih sa lua ing. Kawlgam sungah kei deih pen Sai Hti Sai le Sai Sai Mose deih pen ingh. Pasian hehpih na tawh ka la te khui nih bang V.C Mang ii aw kaih leh ka aw na kituak aa, a man lah ama la aw te phaltak a hongpia ahih manin ka lungdam hi. Kawlgam ah Daw Aung San Su Kyi la aphuah masa pen pa “Halo, Halo Ha” ahih manin Zogam kawlgam leimong dongin Topan hong zatsak Zomi lasiam Thang Paa ahi hi. Thang Paa pen 1980-82 sung Buangmual ah Primary Assistant Teacher kasep lai ka sang naupang te khat hi a, pasal no te tawh kikhawl ngeilo in numei no bek tawh kikhawl in a lungnem mahmah khat hi. A neulai in nulehpa tawh RCM ah khauh mahmah a, zi aneih ciang apu tanu (Khuadai) tawh kiteeng in apu te ZBA Pawlpi ahih manin kham theih zanglo in mihoih suak in lawhcing hi
Pa Hang Lian Khup
Rev Mang Cin Thang (Taithul) leh Nu Cing Khan Mang @ Daw Nan Than Nyunt (Shante) sung panin 9.9.1960 in Kawlpi ah suak hi. Unau numei pasal kigawm (10) lak panin alina hi a, apapi Bo Kam Cin Hang Hang Lian Khup ahi hi. Biakna kin minam it: Apa Rev Mang Cin Thang in 1949 kum akiphut Kalay Baptist Church ah pastor sem ahih manin Pa Khup pen aneutung akipan chiristian biakna sung pan khangkhia, biakna akin, minam a it khat hi. Biakna tawh kisai pawi lian te leh minam tawh kisai khuado pawi, Zomi nam ni, akipan pawi lian khat peuh akibawlna na ah sumleh pai tawh thulehla tawh tha tang tawh ma apang den khat hi. Zi leh ta neihna: Pa Ling Kho Thang (Gualnam) leh Nu Ngiak Kho Zen (Zaniat) te tanu Lia Ciin Luan Niang tawh 21.11.1987 in nupa suak uh hi. Topan tanu tapa gawm 5 pia hi. (1) Tg Thang Sawm Siing, (2) Tg Thang Din Pau, (3) Lia Lian Ngaih Lun, (4) Lia Zen Lian Vung, (5) Tg Khai Sian Kim. Tulaitak in azi atate tawh Bogyoke lam lianpi dung, pinlong 5, kawlpi ah lungnuam takin teeng hi. Galilee AG pawlpi sungah om uh a, pawlpi upa muan pen khat in om hi. Nasep tuamtuam: (1) ZOFAP (Zomi Festival of Praise) Zomi bup Pasian phatna, HALLELUJAH laapi sakna pawipi ah apat pan atawp dong president semin lungkim in thangah mahmah hi. (2) Pawlpi biakinn lamthak te aphawk zahzah sumteng tawh huh kawikawi hi. (3) Pasian nasem (hunbit sia) cimawh zawdeuh asak khempeuh delhin huhna pia kawikawi hi. (4) Gam leh minam ading vaihawm na khat peuhpeuh ah kipia tawmin pantheihna khempeuh ah kihel hi.
Sia Gin Sian Pau (GS Pau) D. Litt
Pa Tuan Kho Kham (Tawmbing) leh Nu Luan Kho Hau (Bawmkhai) te sung pan 21.8.1958 in Pegu khua ah suak hi. Unau 3 pha uh a, amah a upen ahi hi. B.E.H.S No.1 Tedim tan lang pan tan 10 dong laisim hi. Laihat lamah kihel den ahih manin kumsim in pahtawina leh Stipend sang den hi. Tan 8 kumin kumpi laivuanna ah maths distinction tawh ong hi. Sang sung omzia hoih ahih man sia ten zong pakta hi. Sang sungah Pasian thu nak gen lua ahih manin warning kipia ngei hi.1978 kumin Manywa khua ah sum sazian lam (Acountant) tawh kisai pilna sin a, amadawk lamah kihel hi. Biakna sungah kihelna: 1974 kumin piangthak hi. 29.9.1974 ni-in Rev Hau Lian Kham in tuiphum hi. 1975-1977 sung EBC pawlpi ah hunlang Sunday school sia sem a, 1977-1980 sung AG pawlpi sungah hunlang Sunday school sia sem leuleu hi. 1975 kum pan kipan khua tuamtuam ah khe ngiat tawh gospel pai a, gupkhiatna thu tangko hi. Youth Camp bawl ding leh khangno thusinna pia dingin kisam kawikawi hi. Kumpi nasem ulian te kiang leh thonginn leh zato sungah zong lungdamna thu tangko hi. Khangno veideuh hi. Friday nitak sim khangno kipattahna Youth Fellowship ah pai in, khangno te hanthawn den hi. Tedim khuapi sung a om pilna sawm (Boarder) te ah zong hanthawn in paizelzel hi. Ama hih theih zahin pawl sung pawlpua ah inn vak thunget sakin paiden hi. Kumpi nasepna: 1997 July pan 1993 August dong kum 16 sung Township Co-operative Society ah sem hi. 1977-1979 sung vazuak, 1979-1981 sung voucher lai-at, 1982-1993 sung Accountant tavuan te sem hi. Akhut lam hoih in, maths kiva ahih manin Accountant tavuan kipia hi. 12.2.1988 kumin yangon khuapi ah kum 41 cinna Union Day ah zogam tang mi-in kah thei hi. Socialist kumpi hun sung Nainganzi (Politic) lamah zong kizol ngei napi, amah ut lo hi. Bethel pawlpi ah sepna: Pawlpi makai sia te deih naleh zotna tawh kizui in 1.7.1993 pan tuni ciang dong Bethel Assembly of God pawlpi ah hunbit pawlpi lai-at sem hi. Tu laitak pawlpi ‘Computer len a, lai nasep (Literature) lamah mapang hi. 1992 kum pan GS Pau cih min tawh laigelh kipan hi. Zolai tawh akihawm khia Malaysia Zingsol, Zangkong Awging, Khanlawhna hun, Lung vak na, Zolai zunna, Tangko, Tahan Awging, Zonu tongluan, Agape thuthang, Zomka, Laitai, Lungdamna Aw, leh Tedim thu kizakna lai, cih te ah laigelh zelzel hi. Zo lai tawh thului agelh kigawm (800) kiim phata hi. “Khami” cih laibu no khat leh “Khangno makai te theih ding kilawm thu pawlkhat: cih laibu Volume (10) ciang bawlngei hi.Kawllai tawh Grace News Letter, Zion News Letter, Banner of Salvation, Harvest Time cih te ah laigelh den hi. Kawllai tawh lai kagelh gawm (70) bang pha hi. Alaigelh sateng anam tawh kizui in gawmtuah in, laibu in bawlin hawmkhia ta hi. Pahtawina laipi leh sumtang (5) vei bang gamsung gampua pan hong kipia hi. A innkuan thu: 28.10.1983 ni-in Rev Suak Za Go in Thuklai khua Pu Pum Kam (Laiteng beh) leh Pi Huai Kho Cing (Tunngo beh) te tanu syamah Ngo Kang Cing B.Sc (Assistant Township Co-operative Officer) tawh kiteeng sak hi. Topa in amau nupa tungah tanu tapa gawm (5) pia a, avek in kumkhat tawh tan 10 ong kim in degree ngah kim uh hi. (1) Sia Kham Sian Khai B.A (Bible) ACM (Dip in music) M.Div, Yangon. (2) S/m Hau Sian Cing B.N.Sc (Generic), tan VIII kum Luyechun, Singapore. (3) S/m Hannah Cing Thian Nuam B.A (Bible), M.Div, Yangon. (4) S/m Cing Van Kim Tan 10 (4-D) ngah, B.N.Sc (Generic) M.A Theo) Tedim. (5) Tg Kam Pum Khai B.Tech (M.P) Kalay GTC.

Rev Thang Khawm Pau
Rev Thang Khawm Pau pen Pa J. Gin Za Tuang leh Nu Ging Khaw Don te ta upapen hi a, 15.12.1952 in Tedim khua ah suak hi. Pilna zonna tawh kisai in amasa in State High School, Tedim leh Mindat ah kah hi. 1972 kumin Mindat pan tan sawm ong a, tua kum mah panin Mandalay Arts Science University ah zom a, 1977 kumin B.A (Geography) degree ngah hi. Mandalay University ah asangkah lai-in University Christian Fellowship (UCF) ah hahkat mahmah in, Tedim EBC pawlpi ah zong khangno makai sema, tua te tungtawn in Pasian nasem ding sapna ngah hi. Tua panin kumpi sangkahna tawh lungkim zolo in, Berean Baptist College Seminary, Bangalore, India ah Lai Siangtho sangkah a, 1983 kumin B.D ngah hi. Sang azawh ciangin Tedim EBC pawlpi ah 1984-1988 dong kum 4 sung pastor sem hi. 1986 kum Faith Baptist Bible College Seminary akihon akipan tuciang dong Lai Siangtho sangsia sem hi. Tua pan Pasian lam honsakna tawh Master’s Seminary, Sun Valley, USA ah Lai Siangtho sang zom a, M.Div ngah hi. Tua pan hong kik tak teh lailam nasepna, sanglam nasepna leh gambup nasepna te kipan hi. 1997-2002 dong term nih sung EBC gambup ah General Secretary sem a, upa tintan phuankhia in, gambup computer vaihawm in, na tampi tak sem hi. Ama private nasepna tawh laibu, limsang upna, Pasian kamciam damna, upna laigil te bawlin mailam ah zong laibu hoih tampi bawl ding, tei ding ngimna nei hi. Tua banah tu laitak in ih zat Tedim labu thak hoih mahmah ama veina tawh hong bawlin EBC gambup ah hong piakhia hi. 2005 kum ciangin, pilna sinna sang Cornerstone-Children Academy phuan in sang naupang tampi te in pilna sin ziahziah uh hi. 1987 kumin azi Nu Ciin Lun Vung tawh kiteeng a, tapa 1 leh tanu 2 nei uh hi. (1) Lia Don Sian Nuam B.A (English) Pensacola Christian College, Florida Christian Education. (2) Tg Tuang Sian Hon Thang B.A (English) Pensacola Christian College, Florida, USA. (3) Lia Mang Sian Cing matric ong. Pensacola Christian College, Florida, USA.

Pa Tual Khan Mung

Pa Tual Khan Mung makaih na tawh Pawlpi thak hong pian ciang a maa makaih na tawh biakinn pi khat hong lam uh a, 13.9.1996 kumin D.C (4) Superintendent Rev. Dr. Khai Khan Suan in ap na nei hi. A nih vei na biakinn taih inn pi Pa Tual Khan Mung te innkuan kipiak na tawh hong lam kik uh a, 21.11.2011 kumin General Council, Vice Chairman Rev Go Za Nang in biakinn ap na neih sak hi. Biakinn tawk kisai: Pa Tual Khan Mung in Biakinn mun ding leitang 80’ X 50’ pia masa hi. Biakinn lam ciangin Pawlpi mite tha tawh piang zolo ahih manin anuai a bangin piakhia hi. (1) Pa Tual Khan Mung te innkuan panin 975,00000, (2) Pawlpi innkuan pan kidong sum ngah vekpi 55,90000.(3) Meltheih lawm leh gual Pawlpi dang pan 85,29000
Pa Ben Za Min (a) U Min Min
Khampat No(3) khua mi Pu Thang Kho Sei leh Pi Ngai Kho Hling te sung pan 2.8.1972 kumin Khampat Myo ah suak hi. Basic Education Primary School Khampat No(3) ah tan lang pan tan giat dong kah hi. BEHS Tamu Myo ah tan sawm dong kah a, innkuan nuntakna haksat luat na hangin sangkah zo nawnlo in sum zon ding hong kipan hi. Pianna Pa Thang Kho Sei piangthak masa pawl hi a, thaman la lo in lungdam na thu gen in vak kawikawi hi. Pianna Nu Ngai Kho Hling moh kan leh moh zuak tawh nungta uh hi.Ben Za Min hong gol ciangin nulehpa thupha piak na bangin sum zon hong kipan a, gam sung apiang singkung lopa teleh ganhing pan a piang savun, saki, saha te india gam pan kaikhawm in china gam dong puak hi. Pasian in thupha pia a, thuman citak in piangthak ahih manin damdam in hong hau toto hi. Piakkhiatna zong hat mahmah a, meigong tagah te, mizawng daipam te leh sangkah zolo te huh kawikawi hi. Biakinn lamsak in,(Gospel) zin tun na ding lamsak kawikawi hi. 2.5.1992 kumin Kammahzi khua Nu Hoih Za Lam tawh kiteeng a, Pasian in tapa 3 leh tanu 2 pia hi. Tg Sei Tin Thawng B.Sc (Chemistry), Tg Sei Do Sang 2nd Years (Engineering), Lia Hling Hlei Nem B.A (Myanmar)2nd Years, Lia Hling Neih Hoih grade X, Tg Sei Ki Thang grade VI te ahi hi. Sanggamte: (1) Nu Tin Nei Kim Sunday School Teacher (2) Pastor, Tawng Cin Kap (BRE) Demapur Bible College, India (3) Pastor, Uap Za Hling (B.Th) Bethel Bible College, Tedim. Tu laitak in Pasian lamlahna om bangin sum lei sum zuak na panin kihei leuleu a, gam leh lei ading deihsakna tawh (Chin Shwe May Co. Ltd) hong phuanin Director tavuan la hi. Adang tampi lak pan Grace AG Church 84’x30’15’ biakinn pi khat lamin Pawlpi mite leh Topa Pasian tungah lungdam tak in piakhia hi. Tel: 09402623245, 09257744559, 096478283.
Rev Thawng Do Thang
Zampi khua Pu Liing Khaw Thang (Gualnam zuisang) leh Pi Giak Khaw Zen te tapa 7 leh tanu 3 te lak ah a upen zom hi a, 3.8.1948 in Tonzang myone Zampi ah suak hi. 1964 kumin manglai tan 6 zo hi. 1965 kumin sum bawl kipan hi. 1968 kum ciang Bualkot khua ah lo khawh tawh sum zon kawmin Rev Thang Lian kiangah Meitei pau sin hi. 1973 kumin Imphal-Monywa dong khua thoh pua in tai 400 bang khe tawh pai hi. 1975 kumin Suangsang khua Pa Thang Khan Mang (Sukte) leh Nu Cing Za Lun te tanu upen Lia Man Khan Mang tawh kiteeng uh hi. 1976 kumin Zampi pan Kawlpi ah lal suk in Emmanuel Baptist Church aphut Upa 12 te lakah kihel hi. 1.1.1979 in Rev Man Cin Thang in tuiphum hi. 1984 kumin Kawlgam leh India gam vial 12 vei zin zo hi. Nasepna: (1) 1987 kumin Yangon Gualnam dong hu mi 5 tawh phuan uh hi.(2) 1987 Yangon ZNC Party phuaih na ah Treasurer sem hi.(3) 1994 kumin Rhema Bible College ah B.Th degree ngah hi.(4) 1.2.1993 ni-in Galilee AG Pawlpi phut hi. 2008 kumin ordination ngah hi.(5) 1995 kumin Kale AG Section No (2) zum 80’ x 60’ leitang leh sikkang dal 80 pia hi. Pasian nasepna: (1) 1986 kumin Tonsim ah tengin ZBC Pawlpi phut in zum inn ding mun khat leisak hi.(2) 2008-2010 kum Kalay AG Section No (2) ah Vice President.(3) 2011-2013 kum Kalay AG Section No (2) ah Treasurer.(4) 2014-2016 kum Kalay AG Section No (2) ah Superintendent DC-4 Treasurer. (5) Pa Liing Khaw Thang phawkna in Galilee AG Church 600000 val bei in biakinn khat lamsak hi. (6) Galilee AG Pawlpi senior pastor leh Pawlpi inn 350 te a makaih laitak hi. (7) Zampi khua Centenary Jubilee Magazine (1909-2009) Mualsuang tangthu bawl in sum bei khempeuh sik hi.(8) Pawlpi mi 139 tuiphum na pia hi. Nupa kop 8 pumkhat suaksak hi. Biakinn kong hon na 5 vei nei hi. Cope Centenary pawi Tedim ah hunzawh ni benediction pia hi. Sanggamte: (1) Pa Khaat Khan Sian + Nu Ciin Do Cing (2) Rev Thawng Do Thang + Nu Man Khan Mang (3) Pa Lut Do Sang + Nu Ngai Sian Cing (4) Nu Niangh Za Ngai + Pa Nang Khan Thang (5) Pa Cin Za Thang + Nu Zen Khan Mang (6) Pa Cin Za Kam + Nu Zen Ngaih Niangh (7) Rev Kam Khan Thang B.Th, B.D
Pu Thang Tuan
Mualpi khua Pu Kai Thuam (Songput) leh Pi Niang Am (Songput) te sung panin 7.6.1887 ni-in Saizang khua ah suak hi. Anu in kha 12 sung paai a suak zolo in Pu Tawn Neng zi-in mut khiat sak hi. Abeh ten “ki beh ten hang hi” ci-in mawh sak hi. Kum 13 aphak ciangin a pa Kai Thuam in 1990 kumin Saizang pan Mualpi satpih hi. Mualpi khua Nu Zel Zen (Hatzaw) tawh kiteeng a, tapa 4 leh tanu 6 nei uh hi. -Kam Hau uk sung Tonzang khua ah kawllai sangah tan 7 sin hi.-1917 kum galpi masa in Piancit kuan a, 1918 in cidam in hong tung kik hi. -1921 kum saklam (Lusuang) gal kuan leuleu a, gual zo in hong tung kik hi. -Leitung thu beh sung thu khat vei azak sa peuhmah mangngilh ngeilo hi. -Kaptel khua Pu Song Theu (malneu) tawh Piancit leh saklam lusuang gal kuan uh hi. -Saizang Songput beh te in sam a (14.11.1947-18.11.1948) khukhat sung thu gensak ngiatngiat hi. -1948-1964 kum sung Mualpi khua ah upa leh Hausa sem toto hi. -23.4.1955 kumin General Newin in Pu Thang Tuan SBBL-gun with 25 rounds pia hi. Midang tawh: (1) Song Theu in, lawm Thang Tuan aw Hau Cin Khup langpan ni kipha sak lua ci hi. Thang Tuan in Ei hi leeng ama sang khelzaw lai ding hihang ci-in ut lo hi. “Song Theu in Thang Tuan tawh ka kipawl sang Teipi hoih khat khun leng kipzaw vang” cihsan hi. (2) Song Theu in khat vei zol kik a, “Thang Tuan aw, Ei gel in sitni sem ni, khat Tazalu lam, khat Tazakhan lam pang ni sum tam hong pia zawzaw zosak ni” ci hi. Thang Tuan in ken sum sianglo deih keng ci leuleu hi. (3) Mualpi gam “Vomsem” kuam Pa Khup Za Mang leh Mualpi te kituh uh a, Pu Thang Tuan in Mualpi te tangin thugen in lungduai na leh thuman tawh agen ciangin Pum Za Mang te pata in pawlmat pah hi. (4) Tedim Vuandok Carey in Tedim khua ah a sagawh a hawm dingin Thang Tuan tel hi. Lamka leh Lennakot kikal galkapte anguai te uk dingin sawl hi. (5) Pum Za Mang in Japan galkap kumpi laikhak kikum dingin Thang Tuan nithumsung cial hi. (6) Shan gam ukpi Saw Shwe Thaik laikhak kikup pih dingin Pum Za Mang in Thang Tuan cial leuleu hi. Pu Thang Tuan in na gam “Gungal teng Capt, Mang Tung Nung ding sak in, Thah dou gam leh Zou gam teng Phaitu Pa Lian Khaw Mang ding sak in la, Siah langhawm tuak in” ci-in sawl hi. (7) Hausa (Ukpi pawl) in, thuhoih vaihawm Pawlpi (THVP) min phuak a, nautang pawl in, Khamtung suahtaak vaihawm Pawlpi (KSVP) Mang Tung Nung makai in hong phuah uh ciang Pum Za Mang lungkham a, Thang Tuan samin Tedim innpi ah ni giat sung thu ki kuppih hi. Pum Za Mang in Thang Tuan kiangah “Tuisawm sak Siah nang uk in kha sum Ks.60/ kong pia ding hi ci-in zol hi. (8) Thang Tuan thanem na ah Zo la kiphuah khempeuh aphuak pa/nu a khua thei napin aman Zo la dawng khat zong phuak theilo hi. (9) Kapteel Song put ten Pu Thang Tuan samin sagawh ziahziah in thu tampi adot lakah khat nalawm Song Theu in no Songput beh te Songput tungnung, Songput nuainung om uh the ci-in hong ko den hi ci-in dong hi. “Ka suah pan tuni dong Songput tungnung nuainung om nailo a, ahih hang tuni akipan in om ta ding hi” ci hi. Ahau zaw deuh teng Songput tungnung, azawng deuh teng Songput nuainung hi ding hi. (10) 1968 kumin Saizang inn mun lo gam gi vai buai na om a, Kapteel Song Theu akoh leh Mualpi Thang Tuan nadong un ci-in hong sam a, kum 70 hun lai a thu singnuai pai khenziau hi. 19.6.1974 ni-in hong sihsan ta hi.
Pu Song Theu
Pu Goih Zel leh Pi Ngai Vial te sung panin 1884 kumin Tedim gam Kapteel khua ah suak hi. Nu Dam Kho Don tawh kiteeng hi. Mangkang kumpi in 1885 kumin Zogam Thangmual hongtung in Zogam hong la ta hi. 9.10.1892 kumin Kapteel hausa Ukpi Thuam Thawng Sihzang Ukpi pawlkhat in Myouk pa leh alawmte a suam lupna tawh kizui in Kapteel khua kihal sak in, thau lawng 180 leh sum tang Rs.1000 kiliau sak hi. 1989 kumin kum 13 pha a, Tote (Hausa te) piak ding saphei saliang te beh papi te kaikhawm in pia nawnlo in nekpih ahih manin tua hun pan hausa te maipha ngah nawnlo in asawt na ciangin Kapteel panin ki hawlkhia hi. Kum 19 aphak ciangin mi 80 makaih in sik khua lampi vat uh hi. Kum 33 aphak 1917 kum ciang Piantit kuan in Mangkang kumpi in Ngun nam pia hi. Phasahpahlah kumpi in zong Ngun namkhat minphatna in pia hi. Pilly Babu, U Bakhin, Ahhuai leh Brundel te inn ah nasem in pau sin hi. Pilna deih in thupi sa a, Kapteel in sang ngah nading hanciam pah hi. Khua sung meltheih sungah lai thei om leh pahtawi nuam mahmah hi. Tan khat ong te pek khat, tan nih ong te peknih cih bangin hawm kawikawi hi. Kumpi nasem te leh College kah te hong ciahciang hawhpah in thu dongin ki kuppih pah hi. Pilna deih ahih manin a tapa Kalemyo ah sangkah sung ompih a, Vuandok suak in Vuandok Gin Za Cin leh a tupa Song Theu-Theu Mang Za Suan te ahi hi.Pu Song Theu pen pil bek lo in khelpil se hi. Tedim pan kawlpi apai ciangin van puak man sum pia nuamlo ahih manin mawtaw sungah ama van teng hakkol tawh puase hi. Sitni pil ahih manin Mangvom Mangkang dual tuanlo hi. 23.4.1971 ni-in Kapteel khua pan leitung nusia hi. Motto: (1) Mi poi mi hoihlo nuihsan deih lo hi. (2) Siktukilh tangkhat kia zong tawm in, man neisak hi.(3) Thuman lo a, gualzawh na ah meet na om kei ci hi.(4) Dawi biak na paai in, Laisiangtho leh labu zangin mi khempeuh it un.(5) Pasian in neek ding a, abawl khempeuh ne un ci hi.Pu Song Theu Capt Mang Tung Nung makaihna khamtung suahtak vaihawm Pawlpi (KSVP) ah mapang in asawt ciang CNO ah kilaih hi.
Pastor Nang Lam Thang
Bo Hang Kho Zam leh Nu Neam Za Vung sung pan10.8.1976 ni-in Tedim khua ah suak hi. Sanggam unau 7 lakah a neu pen hi. Tan lang pan tan sawm dong BESH Hakha ah kah a, 1991 kumin tan sawm ong hi. A neu aki pan Pasian lamah kinak piak mahmah in 1987 kumin gupngah kitel in piangthak a, tui zong kiphum pah hi. 1998 kum Full Gospel Assembly Pawlpi Laisiangtho sangah (FGBTC) ah Diploma letmat ngah hi.-1997 kumin Sagaing Division Mienmu khua FGA Pawlpi ah kha 6 sung sia sem hi. Tua sungin ni (21) sung antang in thungen hi.-1999 kumin Down Christian AG Pawlpi ah Youth Pastor kipia hi. -1999 kumin Yangon Section AG ah gambup Youth Secretary kipia hi. &#8211; Holy Land Prayer Garden apian nading leh thungetna inn lam nading in Pastor pa tawh khut kilen in mapang khawm uh hi.-1999 kum Holy Land Prayer Garden ah thunget na tawh kisai nasep na khempeuh ah thuvanpi sem hi.-1997-1999 dong Dagon University ah Psychology Major tawh kum 2 na ciang kah hi. -Holy Land Prayer Garden ah khamangthang te veina ngiat tawh (1.9.1999-10.10.1999) dong ni 40 sung antang in thungen hi. 15.10.1999 ni-in Topa kiang tawlnga hi.
Joshep Van Muang

Rev Vung Za Niang

Sanggam laizom pasal 2 leh numei 2 lakah a upen hi a, (1) Rev Vung Za Niang + Rev Dam Suan Mung, (2) Pa Siing Ngo (Peon), (3) Pa Thawm Mun Pau, (4) Sayamah Neam Khan Cing te hi. 1972 kumin Thuklai Baptist panin tuiphum na ngah hi.Nahnuai khua Rev Dam Suan Mung (Naulak) Thuklai Pastor tawh 4.8.1979 ni-in Thuklai AG Biakinn ah Rev Suak Za Go in pumkhat suak sak hi. Evan Langh Do Khup

A Dinmun thupitna: Evan Do Khup: “Hauhna leh Khansauna Thusim” laibu a panin a tawp dong keima khut mahmah tawh ka gelh hi a, Zogam khanlawh nading leh zomite innkuan sung hong nop theih nading in lunggulhna khitui taak keuhkeuh in, ka gelh lai ahi hi. Hih laibu pen laibu dang khat peuhpeuh panin kiteikhia hilo hi. A simkha khempeuh tungah ih kisapna zuiin Topa Kha Siangtho in hong lawng a, thupha hong piak nading in thu kong nget sak hi.

Mission sepna khua:-Vangteh, Tongsial, Pakzang, Muizawl, Laitui, Tuizang, Limkhai, Niangkung, Taungkung, Uhzian khua te ahi hi.-2013 kum panin Kanpetlet gamah Evangelist (Rev Paupu) khah hi.-Zogam, Kawlgam sung mun tuamtuam ah Crusade, Camp, thusinna te ah akicial kawikawi banah, India gam, Malaysia, Singapore, Australia leh US gamte ah zong kisam kawikawi hi.
Rev Job Nang Khaw Thawng
Pa Song Za Thang (Naulak) leh Nu En Sial Ning (Thangnawk) te sung panin 1.9.1961 kumin Tedim gam Gamlai khua ah suak hi. A nungta unau 4 lakah 3 na hi. Pa Go Khawm Thang, Pa Suan En Pau, Job Nang Khaw Thawng, Pa Pau Ngaih Thang hi. 1967 April sung cisa natna pan khe lang zaw in temh suak hi. 1.6.1969 ni-in SPS Gamlai ah tan 4 ciang kah a, 23.3.1986 ni-in Zomi Theological College (ZTC) pan Diploma in Theology ngah hi. 1.4.1986 ni pan Gamlai Sia khawk Tuiphum Pawlpi kipawlna (GTK,TBA) hun bit Pasian nasep kipan a, 1987 April dong sem hi. 1.5.1987 ni pan Tahan Tuiphum Pawlpi (KVBA) ah tuni dong sem hi. 17.10.1988 ni-in pumzaw natna ngah a, Tedim, Yangon zato lumin kum khat val sawt hi. 24.11.1989 ni-in zato pan Tahan tung kik in, nasep zom kik a, Wheel Chair leh Tri-Cycle zangin nungta hi. 6.5.1992 ni-in a pa Pu Song Za Thang (Kum 68) in Gamlai ah sihsan hi. Huhna te:15.12.1989 ni-in custom Pa Thang Khan Tuang in Sen gam pan peithum nei cycle khat lei sak hi. 30.3.1992 ni-in Rev. Dr. S Pau Khan En in vaihawnsak a, (UK) panin motor no khat ngah hi. 4.9.1995 ni-in David Thang Za Pau leh Carson Cin Khen Tuang in khut sawn cycle wheel chair khat ngah hi. 15.1.1997 ni-in Pa Len Cin Thang in (Pu Dai Cin) tapa tu a teen na inn mun 96’x48’ leisak in pia khong hi. 17.9.2005 ni-in Rev Zam King Mang vaihawm sak na tawh anu pa un Singapore leh Malaysia zin khawm thei hi. 13.7.2009 ni-in Rev. Dr. JM Ngul Khan Pau leh alawm te vaihawm sak na tawh peithum nei Tri Motor Cycle khat ngah hi. 27.9.2009 ni-in Nu Dim Don Cing leh Pa Tun Kap Thang te innkuan in khut sawn cycle letsong in pia hi. 6.1.2011 ni-in Rev. Dr. Go Cin Zam te unau in vaihawm sak in handphone khat leisak hi. 2.7.2006 ni-in TBC tagah kepna te bawl Aungbary mee No. 25612 tawh Motor Cycle 110 Pasian in letsong in pia hi. 1996 April 1-6 sung Pasian nasep kum 10 cin na Ministry Tin Jubilee limci takin Crusade tawh thuah in bawng 5, vok 2 go in mipi vaak hi. 1997 June kha in Vandaitui inn up na bek tawh lawm a, Nang Khaw Thawng (NKT) Nankattaih lam zo hi. 28.3.1998 ni-in “Vandaitui” inn thak ah lutna nei hi. 17.10.1998 ni-in “Damlo lap toh” nasepna (Handicap Uplift Ministry) phuan in damlo ta ding in nasep kipan hi. 2.4.1999 ni-in Chin Evangel Centenary Hakha panin Ordination ngah hi. 1.4.2004 ni-in Pa Dem Do Lian leh Nu Dim Khan Ngo te tanu Ruth Vum Ngaih Cing tawh pumkhat suak in, Rev. C.Tuang Khan Kap in letthat hi.1. Pahtawina laipi leh letsong (2011) kum ciang (29) ngah hi.2. Hun zatna, Tintan piakna, Crusade bawlna mun leh Pawlpi (2011) kum ciang (148) pha hi. 3. Vandaitui Literature Ministry panin Laibu bawlzah (2011) ciang bu (110) pha ta hi. 4. Thupha bawlna hang a lungdamna te anuai a bang ahi hi. (1) Tedim Laisiangtho bupi 200 val hawmkhia, Tin Jubilee ni-in bu 100 hawm kik hi. (2) Kawl Laisiangtho (NT) thuciam thak bu 200 val hawmkhia hi. (3) Pawlpi 10 val tungah nek khawm kuang guan ngiat hi.(4) Pastor 6 tungah (Siampi) puan tualpi guan hi.(5) Pawlpi 5 te tungah Pulpit, Pulpit tut na, sabuai no guan hi.(6) Pawlpi 2 te tungah Laikhetna (Type Writer) guan hi.(7) Pawlpi 3 te tungah meisopi (Geet Light) guan hi.(8) Pawlpi 10 val te tungah zattang zang laa bu guan hi.(9) Pawlpi kimkhat te a ding pakan, sikkeu, guan, zonsak hi.(10) Pawlpi 2 te tungah Guitor guan hi.(11) Pawlpi kimkhat biakinn sikkang guan, zonsak hi. (12) Laisiangtho sangkah 20 val huh, sponsor zonsak hi.(13) Pawlpi kimkhat Pawlpi tangthu laibu bawl sak, huh.(14) Tui haksa khua kimkhat tuizawl vaihawm sak, zon sak hi. (15) Upna kamciam bawlsak na tawh Pawlpi, Kipawlna, Tagah kepna, pawlkhat in inn mun, huangpi, Foundation, Motor dong neih lawh.(16) Zomi Handicap Uplift Ministry (Managing Director) zong ahi hi. Tu ciangciang damlo 245 te tawh kikhawl in huhna pia thei hi.
Rev, Khoi Lam Thang
Pa Neng Za K am (Buansing) leh Nu Ciin Niang te sung pan in 27.4.1962 ni in Maymyo, Pyin Oo Lwin ah suak hi. 11.9.1993 ni in Siama Siang Nem @Khin San May(Falam)tawh pum khat suak hi.- Tan ½ pan tan 7 … … SPS Cingpikot … 19681976.-Tan 8 pan tan 9 &#8230; SHS 4 Bhamo … 1976-1978.-Tan 10 … … SHS Tedim … 1978-1979. &#8211; Bachelor: Secular BA (Philosophy) Mandalay …1999,-Theology B. Pu Pau Suan
Pu Dong Thang leh Pi Vum Vungte ta hi a, 1875 kumin Khuasak ah suak hi. 1904 kum in Kayin Sia, Sya Shweyan tungtawh in Topa Jesuh gumpa in sangin 11.3.1905 kumin a zipi Kham Ciang tawh Rev.Dr. E.H.East in ak- awm tui cingah tuiphum hi. Rev. Thuam Hangte nupa tawh mihing 4 te Khamtung gambup ah Tapidaw suak masa bel in ki ciamteh hi. Saya Shweyan, Saya Thuam Hang tawh ahih theih zah in lungdamna thu na gen uh hi. 1923 kum pan in Sia nasepna pan tawl ngah hi. Sia Pau Suante 1.10.1900 kumin Pi Kham Ciang tawh ki teeng a, tapa 4 leh tanu 1 nei hi. A zi in a nusiat khit ciangin Pi Son Khaw Dim tawh kiteng kik a, tapa Vum Za Lian nei kik hi. 3.5.1951 ni in Topa tawh mang khawm hi.
Pu Thuam Hang
Pu Hang Suang leh Pi Hau Cingte tapa hi ,a 1866 kumin Khuasak khua ah suak hi. 1904 kumin Kayin Sia Sya Shweyan tung tawnin Topa Jesuh gumpa in sang a, 11.3.1905 ni in a zipi Dim Kho Cing tawh Rev Dr. E.H. East in Ak-awm tui cing ah tui phum hi. Kham tung gam bupah Tapidaw suak masa pen in kiciam teh hi. Saya Thuam Hang tapidaw hong suah ciangin Theizang khua ah mission in pai sak a, Theizang te in Tedim vuan dok pa tungah khia ahihmanin Khuasak ah ciah kik hi. Tua panin vakkawn sia evangelist ke seem sak hi. Pi Dim Kho Cing tawh kiteeng a, tapa 3 leh tanu 2 nei hi. Sia Suang Khaw Kam Nu, Man Za Cing pa Kham Za Cin leh Nu Khan Huai leh Rev. Mang Kho Pau te hi a, 1950 kumin topa tawh mang khawm hi.
Sia Thang Za Kam
Tonzang Lailui Tedim khua mi Pu Thawng Pau (Sukte) leh Pi Cing Za Niing te sung panin 1918 September kha in Tonzang ah suak hi. Sanggam unau 6 lakah a 5 na hi a, Pi Niang Za Dim tawh kiteeng in tapa 5 leh tanu 4 nei uh hi. Tonzang kumpi sangah tan 3 ciang kah hi. 1947 kumin Rev Nelson hilh Tedim kam tawh Laisiangtho sangah kah hi. Nasep nate: (1) 1938-43 kum sung Kam Hau gam ukpi zum, Tnozang khuaah lai at sem hi. (2) 1947-52 kum sung Tedim Tuiphum Pawlpi ah huhpa sia sem hi.(3) Tedim Concos Society ah Auditor sem hi. (4) 1958-59, 1960-61 kum sung Tedim kiim Tuiphum Pawli ah Chairman. (5) 1958,1960,1961 kumsung TBAEC ah Upa (Member) TBA Relief Committee ah Honorary Treasurer leh Member. (6) 1965-1966 kumsung Tedim Baptist Churches Union ah Founder Pastor. Nasepna leh ma panna: TKTP ah Chairman asep sungin Laisiangtho a pomzia leh a kalsuan zia tawh kisai kimuh khialhna tampi piang a, 1965 kum ciangin TBA panin kihawl khia hi. Tua panin Tedim Baptist Churches Union (TBCU) cih kial lap min tawh Pawlpi khat in ding hi. Hong nusiat zawh 1969 kum ciangin Pawlpi mite in Pawlpi min Thang Za Kam Baptist Church (TBC) ci-in laih hi. Biakna laibu tawh kisai in aniam pen gamtatna, pattahna, lamlak, hunzang ding te kiginna, biakbuk thu, Laisiangtho thak thu mapi, leh adang dang thu tuamtuam pawlkhat gelh hi.1960 kumin TBA Secretary Rev Kam Khaw Thang kiangah Tedim pau a, Laisiangtho thuciam lui teikhiat ding thu agen na tawh kizui in Rev Kam Khaw Thang in maban zomto in 1970 kumin Laisiangtho kingah hi. Sia Thang Za Kam in Pawlpi thak aphuh zawh asawt lo in 11.7.1966 niin leitung nusia hi. Thudin pih: Mihing vaipuak abulpi in Pasian zahtakna leh itna tawh athupiak te manding ahi hi. ( Thuhilhsia 12:13 ).
Pu Pau Cin Hau
Pu Khan Lian (Sukte) leh Pi Cing Zam te sung panin 1859 kum December kha in Tedim khua ah suak hi. Pu Khan Lian in tapa 8 nei a, Vum Kam, Khai Pau, Tual Hang, Pau Cin Hau, Thang Khaw Kam, Khai Za Dong, Vum Khaw Thang, Cin Khaw Hau te ahi hi. Pu Pau Cin Hau pen a 4 na, Rev Hau Go pano ahi hi. Pu Kam Hau Khan Sung Tedim ah teeng in, England te hong khan ciang Lailui ah galtai in teeng hi. A nung ciang Mualbem ah teeng hi. Aneu tung pan kum 15 sung tawntung kum zawn in dawi bia in ki thoih theih khempeuh tawh a ki thoih hang dam thei lo hi. Ni khat lungkia lua in, ki cim tak in amahmah thau tawh kikap lum dingin khua nawl ah paikhia hi. Khua nawl a tun ciang sakhi khat na tai a kap leh kha pah lian a, thau tang om nawn lo ahih manin amah kithat thei lo in sakhi mat tawh inn ciah kik hi.Tua khit a ki pan mangmu zel a, Pasian in “Van leh Lei a bawl Pasian keimah hong bia inla dam na hong ngen in, damna kong pia ding hi” ci hi. Pasian kiangah damna anget leh dam takpi hi. Midang tampi zong thunget sak a, mi tampi damna ngah hi. Tua hun laitak mah in Tedim ah Nuam Dim kici Kam Sang numei khat om hi. Pasian in Nuam Dim tungah, “Kathu a zek khia dingin Pau Cin Hau ka teel hi” ci-in gen hi. Tua bangin Lai Pian Biakna hong piang hi. A sawtlo in khamtung bupah gam kang bangin kizeel hi. A tapa upa pen Pasian tawh sakin, Pasian, Sian Khaw Cin na phuak hi. Zomi sungah Pasian min a tamh masa pen ahi hi. 1899 kumin Pasian in Pu Pau Cin Hau Zomi te zat ding lai Mangmuhna tawh musak hi. Tawlkhat sung Pasian in hilh in a mangmuhna te midang tung a hilh theih nadingin 1902 kum ciang sim theih dingin Lai tawh hong bawl hi. Lai hong mukhia ahih manin “Lai Pian Pa Pau Cin Hau” ci-in kithei hi. A tung lamin mal 1053 pha a, a bu in bu 6 suah hi. 1931 kum ciang puahpha kik a, mal 57 pha hi. Mal 57 sung pan mal 37 te (Lailung) hi in, mal 20 te (Dawngtawi) te ahi hi. Laidal tung leh suangpek tungah gelh in midang te na hilhsawn hi. 1922 kum lai lui pan Mualbem ah kituah hi. Sangmang te’n lai hong bawlsak ma in Pau Cin Hau lai bek kizang hi. Zogam bek hilo Manipur leh Lushei gam dong kizel hi. 1917 kum Piantit pai te in Pau Cin Hau laitawh kiho uh hi. 1931 kum mualtung thuhilh na, Mate Laisiang tho a lian 5 sung dal 500 khen uh hi. Pasian in 1899 kum ciang mangmuhna 7:2 tawh Laisin in sawl hi. Hih lai in kam khat mal khat hi a, bu guk in kikhen hi. Tuhun Lai Pian (Siangsawn) Pawlpi ah kilim zat hi. Bu khat na: Li Bu hi a, mal 168 pha hi. Bu nih na : Min Bu hi a, mal 7 pha hi.Bu thumna: Dongleng Bu hi a, mal 156 pha hi. Bu li n :Lun Sia Bu hi a, mal 246 pha hi. Bu ngl na: Thatuk Bu hi a, mal 146 pha hi.Bu guk na : Thuam Zung Bu hi a, mal 164 pha hi. 1948 kum December 28 ni-in Mualbem khua ah Leitung nuntakna nusia hi.
Rev Vial Nang
Tonzang khua Pu Thual Neng (Hautual) leh Pi Zel Ngem te sung panin 1893 kumin Tonzang myo ah suak hi. 1921 kum ciang Pi Dah Cing tawh kiteeng a, tapa 2 nei in a neulai in sihsuah hi. Azi Pi Dah Cing hongsih ciang zi kik in Pi Don Khaw Man la hi. Ta nei pih nawnlo hi. Sangkahna: (1) 1906 kum Tonzang sia Po Ku nitak sangah kawllai sim hi.(2) 1914 kum Tedim Zolai sangah tan 4 dong zo hi. (3) 1915 kum Mandalay ABM sangah manglai sangkah hi. (4) 1916-1918 sung Insein Laisiangtho sangah kum 3 na dong kah hi.(5) 1924-Galpi khat na Piantit pan ciah kik zawh ciang kum 4 na zo hi. Pawlpi nasepna: (1) 1924 kum pan sia Po Ku maban zomin tuiphum sia sem hi.(2) 1938 kum Cope Topa sih pan Rev Nelson hong tun dong Tedim ah Pastor sem.(3) 1942-1946 sung Rev Nelson te aciah sung sangmang te maban zom hi.(4) 1960 kum Tedim Cope Memorial Baptist Church thupha pia in honsak hi. (5) Cope Topa Zo Laisiangtho teikhiat pen a siamna zah siit lo in huh hi. Leitung lam nasep: (1) 1919-1921 sung Piantit pai lai in Mangkang kumpi galkap mawtaw hawlsak (Mesopotemia) ah, Zomi bupah mawtaw hawl masa penin ki ciamteh hi. (2) 1942-43 Japan galsung Tedim-Imphal mawtaw lam tawh na ah lambu neu sem hi. (3) 1949-1954 kum sung mipi deihna tawh Tonzang khua Hausa sem hi. Thu tuamtuam: (1) 1908 kumin Rev Po Ku in Tonzang khua kongpi lui ah tuiphum hi.(2) 1929 kumin ukpipa Pum Za Mang tapidaw (Baptist) Pawlpi ah tuiphum na pia hi.(3) 14.4.1999 kum a zi kik Pi Don Khaw Man asih teh gamh luah sawn Pa D.Go Khan Pau in Rev Vial Nang inn leh a huang teng khempeuh (T.T.B.A) piakhia hi.(4) 20.4.1960 ni-in Cope Memorial Baptist Church a honkhit ciang leitung nusiahi.

Pu Gin Kam Lian
Pu Kham Za Kam (Jasuan, Kawngte) leh Pi Sawm Cingte sung pan 30.6.1954 ni in Tedim ah suak hi. Lamzang khua Bo Kham Cin Pau leh Nu Don Khaw Ningte&#8217; tanu Nu Ciin Khawm Cing tawh 27.3.1980 ni in CMBC ah Rev Son Khaw Kham in pumkhat suahna pia hi. Tate: (1) Tg Kam Sian Mung, Dip. in Mobilization and International Advocacy, Chiangmai, (2) Lia Cing Sian Mang, B.A. (Hist.), BTh. B.D.+ Tg Gin Lian Thawn(USA), (3) Lia Niang San Lian Kim, Dip. in Nursing, (4) Lia Vung Tawi Cing, LLB, Levil (VI) American Center+ Sangkahna: Tan lang pan tan li, BEPS, Tedim, No.(2), tan nga pan tan sawm, SHS, No.(6), Botataung, BA(Hist.) Arts and Science University Yangon. Sanggamte: (1) Nu Ciin Khan Vung +Pa. SB. Khual Za Kham, (2) Pa Tun Za Thang + Nu Lian Khan Cing, (3) Nu Don Khen Niang +Pa Cin Sian Thang, (4) Nu Vung Khan Dim +Pa Ngul Khan Dal, (5) Pa Zel Khawm Thang + Nu Cing Lam Vung, (6)Nu Cing Ngaih Man + Pa Hang Za Thawn, (7)Pa Gin Kam Lian + Nu Ciin Khawm Cing, (8) Pa Vung Teng Suai + Nu Lian Khat Lun (USA). Nasepna: 24.10.1988 ni in kumpite phalna tawh Zomi National Congress party (ZNC) a phuan khiate lakah Commitee in khat in ki hel hi. Party min ZNC pan in ZCD ah ki laih to in tua pan za khangto in kiteel ding General Secretary din mun sem to hi. Gam leh minam ading mapan na-ah kumpi in tel khial a, 25.3.2001-29.8.2002 dong (Kha 18) sung kumpi kepna thuak hi. 2015 kum ki teelpi ciangin Tedim myonee pan mee hong ngah a, tulaitak Nyipyitaw ah om hi. Fundermental Rights, Democracy and Human rights Committee member.
Pu Khai Deih Tuang

Pu Pum Khan En
Pianna: Pu Khup Za Gin (Manlun) leh Pi Ciin Za Bia (Thawmte) s ung pan 1942 kum in Tonzang suak hi. Nu Niang Zam Ciin(Sukte)tawh 1981 kumin Tedim Catholic biakna ngeina tawh ki teeng hi. Hau San Nuam, BSc.(Bot) Economic Bank ah lai-at sem, 5. Dim Suan Muang, Tanlyin Collage ah B.A . I year kah, Cherry Store ah sem hi. Pilna zonna: Tan lang pan tan li siang SHS, Tonzang, Tan nga pan High School Final, SHS, Tedim, Tan sawm Mandalay Private sang pan zo hi. 1972 kum in Mandalay University pan B.A.(Geog) tawh zo hi. Pu Pau Lun Min Thang
Haiciin khua Pu Pum Kho Mang (Guite) leh Nu Cing Khan Vung (Thawmte) sung panin 7.12.1970 ni-in Tonzang gam Cikha khua ah suak hi. Sanggam leh laizom pasal 4 leh numei 3 lakah pasal nihna ahi hi. Sangkahna: Primary School SHS Cikha 19741978, Middle School SHS Tonzang 1978-1982, High School SHS Thuklai panin tan 10 matric 1990 kumin zo hi. B.Sc (Physic) Mandalay Arts and Science University (MASU) 1995. Nasepna: Import Export representative (2005-2007) Yangon. Director, (BDK-Trading Company Limited) Yangon. 2016-2020 kum Zogam Vuanzi, Lumuh Zi zaa Vuanzi sem hi. M.P Pau Lun Min Thang pen Chin State pan State Lotdaw kidemna Tonzang zone (2) na pan Pa Thang Suan Zam (USDP), Pa Kham Hau Lian (NLD), Pa Kap Khan Pau (CNDP) pan leh Pa Pau Lun Min Thang (ZCD) pan mee kuang lui a, mee tang 3210 tawh zo lian hi. Tua panin Zogam Vuanzi in kiteel leuleu a, Lumuh Vuanzi tavuan kipia hi. Laizom te: (1) Nu Man Khaw Lian + Pa Nang Suan Dal (SAT); (2) Nu Vung Khan Niang + Pa Cin Go Lam Thang (A/S Director); (3) Pa Thang Mung Mang (B.Sc) + Nu Zen Khawl Dim; (4) Lia Vung Deih Kim (B.A) Psychology; (5) Pa Dal Sian Mung (B.A, I.R, M.A) + Nu Vung Khawl Nuam (Nursing); (6) Pa Thang Sian Khai (B.E.Com, AGTI, M.T) + Nu Niang Nuam Lun (Eng) Nursing. 1. 2007 kum ciang Social lamah kihel in Zomus, Zolas, Tedim Association, GZA ah kihel hi. 2. 2010 kum ciang Party ah lut in, ZCD Party Secretary (2) panmun la ahi. 3. Thu bulphuh, “Bang semding cih sangin, bang ci sepding cih thupi sa hi.&#8221; 4. Pasian kammal, “Note in leitung khuavak na hi uh hi”(Mate 5:14). 5. ZCD Party min tawh UNA vai tawh meeting kahin Thailand ah nihvei pai hi.
Pu Kham Suan Mung
Pu Ling Za Thang (Gualnam/Haalkik) leh Pi Kham Hen Niang (Taithul) te tapa nihna hi aa, 1954 Feb (13) ni-in Tedim gam Thangzang khua ah suak hi. Amau unau (1) Tg En Cin Pau, (2) Siama Cing Ngaih Man (EBC) Tedim, (3) Pa Kham Suan Mung (M.P), (4) Rev Khai Khan Suan (D.D) BAG.Tedim, (5) Siama Hau Go Cing BAG.Tedim (6) Rev Zen Khan Khup M.O.R.AG Yangon, (7) Rev Hang Khen Dal B.P.C.AG Mogok, (8) Dr Tual Lian Tuang B.I.C (Bethel Academy) Yangon, (9) Nu Don Zam Dim Tedim te ahi hi. Zileh ta neihna: Pu Hang Khan Thang (Taangpua) leh Pi Ciin Khan Niang (Neekgen) te tanu upen Nu Vial Khawm Mang tawh 1978 kumin kiteeng aa, tanu (4) leh tapa (2) nei uh hi. Atate (1) Siama Niang Lam Lung B.A (Geology) M.Div, Yangon; (2) Lia Niang Sian Nem B.Sc (Chem) Tedim; (3) Tg Thang Sian Muan Lian B.Sc (Chem) Tedim; (4) Nu Man Ngaih Nuam B.Sc (Geology) Yangon; (5) Lia Cing Lung Ciin B.Sc (Botany) Tedim; (6) Tg Thang Sian Siam B.A (Eng) Tedim te ahi hi. Sangkahna leh nasepna te: Thangzang khua zolai sangah 1961-1966 sungin tan (4) zo in, 1966-1974 sungin Tedim sangpi ah tan 5 pan tan 10 ciang zo hi. 1975 April panin Tama (Co-op) ah kumpi nasem in 1993 kumciang in lai-at pi (U.D) zaa tawh pension la hi. 1944 kumin USDA () Tedim Township Secretary pan mun tawh kum (16) sung nasem hi. 2010 kum ciangin USDP party pan meekuang lui aa, teel cing ahih manin 2011-2015 sung kawlgam bup Upper Parliament ah Member of Parliament (M.P) ong sem hi. Kum 2012 pan 2016 ciang USDP party ah ah zong kihel hi. Ama (M.P) sep hun sungin zogam (Tedm) leh zomi te hamphat nading vei mahmah ahih manin, pilna sanglam, cidamna zato lam, lampi, lei, kumpi zum lam a ding nam (25) bang Parliament ah thu sung hi. Ama vei tuam na tawh in, zomi khangno siamsin siavuan (M.C) sang kah mi (15) te a sangman dong khasim in huhna ks.50000 ta angah nading un ah huhna ngetsak in, lungdam mahmah uh hi. Thu tuamtuam: (a) 2006 April in USDA vaihawmna tawh Sen gamah kawlgam tang mi-in pai hi. (b) 2014 November in, Upper Parliament Speaker (Chairman) zui-in Thai Parliament tawh kimuhna ah kawlgam tang mi-in pai hi. (c) Kimawlna lam uk mahmah a, 1990 leh 1991 kum te ah Chin State tang in Tennis ()ah kihel hi. (d) 1994 leh 1997 kum te ah Chin State tang in Golf ()ah kihel hi. Pu Kham Suan Mung pen Pasian um, Pasian muang mahmaha khat hi aa, “Kei pilna kei siamna hang hi peuhmah lo in, Pasian hong piak thupha hang bek tawh hi ciang ka tung hi” ci-in teci pan den aa Pasian min a phatphat thu um mi khat hi.
Pu Chin Sian Thang
Tonzang Township Zampi khua Pu Sum Hang leh NU Niang Khaw Cing te sung pan 6.4.1938 in suak hi. Sanggam laizom 5 lakah numei 3 leh pasal 2 hi a, a upa pen hi. Mandalay pan 1958 kumin tan 10 zo a, Yangon University ah B.A 1967, LLB 1968 kumin zo leuleu hi. Buanli khua mi Pu Kham Za Kam leh Pi Awi Cing te tanu nihna Nu Don Khan Niang tawh tapa 5 leh tanu 3 nei uh hi. Mapan nate: -Rangoon Hill Chin Student Union leh University Chin Student Association ah president sem hi. -1961 kum Taunggyi Conference, Mualtung mi teng kimuh khopna ah thugenna nei hi. -1971 kum pan Sitni (Lawyer) sep kipanin 1986 in Kalay Township Sitni makai pi ngah hi. -1988.8.4. ni-in, Zomi National Congress –ZNC minam party pankhia uh hi. -1989.5.27 ni-in, ZNC Annual Meeting, Zogam Tedim khuapi ah bawl uh hi.-1990 kum General Election ciangin Parliament Member in pang hi. -1998 kumin CRPP (Committee Representing for the People’s Parliament) phuankhia uh hi. -2001 kumin UNA (United National Alliance) phuan Member khat in kihel hi. -2010 General Election ah 2008 Constitution hangin ZNC kihel lo dingin pu laak khia hi. -2015 Kawlgam bup kiteel pi ah ZCD party panin Parliament Member hong ngah hi. Thongkiatna: -30.10.1972-4.3.1974 dong Federal tawh kisai thu a sunna hangin Mandalay thong inn tung hi. -2.3.1992 in Kawlpi a inn pan kiman in Yangon ah suak ta hi.-10.5.1993 in Kawlpi a inn mah pan kiman kik in kha khat et cik na thuak hi.-10.10.1996 in kumpi te in nipi kal nih ni(14) sung kemcip leuleu hi.-6.9.1998-14.5.1999 dong dam lohna hangin Sakura zato ah lum hi. -15.9.1999 in kumpi ten MI-14 Quarter, Botataung Township Yangon ah kem hi. -3.11.1999-14.6.2001 sung Yangon UN tawh thu kikup vai in, kumpi ten kem leuleu hi. -28.10.2007- 30.10.2007 ni nih sung Saffron Revolution (puan sansilh) te hangin Insein thong ah ki koih hi.-30.5.2012 in ZNC Party pan ZCD (Zomi Congress for Democracy) ci in laih hi. Pahtawina kipia te: (1) Zomi innkuan USA in “Zomi National Freedom Award” 2012 kumin pia hi.(2) Zomi Association of United States (ZAUS) Portland in “Zomi Patriotic Award” 2012 pia hi. (3) Zomi Association of Malaysia in “Father of Zomi” 2013 kumin pia hi.(4) Zomi Baptist Convention of Myanmar in “Ngal Liam Zua Pa” 2013 kumin pia hi.
Pa Cin Za Khup

Pu Neng Khen Thang

Pu Ngul Khan Dal
Pu Tel Khaw Cin (Neihkhup) leh Pi Niang Khawl te tapa upa pen hi a, 17.8.1947 ni-in Darkhai khua ah suak hi. 29.4.1973 ni-in Pi Vung Khan Dim (Kawngte) tawh Darkhai Tuiphum Pawlpi, Biakinn ah Rev Hmar Thang Vung in letthat hi. Tanu 3 leh tapa 1 Topan pia hi. Sangkahna: 1957 –SPS Darkhai pan tan IV zo hi. 1964 –SHS Tedim pan HSF zo hi.1967 –No (1) BEHS Dagon, Rangoon pan tan X “B” tawh zo hi.1968 –No (5) BEHS Botahtaung pan tan X “A” list tawh zo hi.1972 – Rangoon Arts and Science University pan B.A (Hist) zo hi.1978 –Institute of Education, Rangoon pan Dip Ed zo hi. 1999 – Myanmar Theological College Mandalay B.R.E Degree ngah hi. Nasepna: 1973-1988 dong PAT, JAT, SAT, Middle Head ciang sem to a, Nainganzi zom to nuam ahih manin Middle School Head Master zaa tawh pension la hi. 1977 January pan 1977 September dong Myone Pyituh Council a duanzimu. 1977-1978 Myone Pyituh Council Ohkathah in kitel to hi.1978-1981 Anih vei na Myone Pyituh Council Ohkathah in kitel kik hi.1981-1985 A thum vei na Chin Pyine Pyituh Council ah EC Member. 1985-1988 A li vei na Tonzang Myone Pyituh Council Ohkathah.1997-2007 Taungzalat Credit Co-operative Society Limited ah Director. Biakna sung: -U Naw Memorial Baptist Church (Rangoon Zomi Tuiphum Pawlpi khangno ah Secretary, President, leh Pawlpi upa) sem ngei hi.-Vial Nang Memorial Baptist Church Tonzang President, sum kem, EC Member. -Cope Memorial Baptist Church Tedim Vice President, TBA EC leh GC Member. -EZBC Mandalay Pawlpi a phuankhia sungah upa khat in kihel hi.-ZZBA Yangon EC Member, AZBC Yangon Upa (auditor) sem hi.Tate:(1) Nu Khawl Nuam Kim Tedim Economic Bank.(2) Nu Cing Lun Hau M.A; Ph.D (Cand) Psychology Department (Lecturer).(3) Pa Cin Hau Mang B.Sc; AGTI, USA. (4) Lia Cing Sian Lian B.D; M.Div, Korea. 2.11.2016 ni in hong neipa Topa pasian in hong laak sak kik tak hi.
Pa Dal Za Khup
Pu Do Za Kham (Taithul) leh Pi Niang Khaw Hau (Sukte) sung pan 27.7.1926 kumin Tedim gam Thangzang khua ah suak hi. 1949 kum ciangin Tedim Zomi pilna sang kipawl na ah manglai sia JAT sem hi. 21.8.1951 kum ciang kumpi lam panin manglai sia JAT taktak kipia hi. 24.7.1953 pan 20.4.1954 dong Teacher’s Training College Mandalay ah sangsia sin hi. 1957 kumin Matric ong hi. 26.5.1958-1967 kum dong BEMS Gamngai leh Tuithang Tlau Mun ah Middle Head sem hi. 11.6.1967 ni pan Tedim myone Ahlohtama Ashi Azone ah secretary sem hi. 21.1.1974 ni pan Chin State Judges Members Part time sem hi. 29.4.1977 ni pan Chin State EC Members sem hi. 29.4.1981-85 EC Member. 1985 kum ciangin kumpi tan giat siapi pan hitaleh State EC Members pan hitaleh kum cing tawh pension la in tawlnga hi. 1986-1998 dong Tedim Cope Memorial Baptist Church ah Pawlpi upa sem leuleu hi. Tua sung mahin Baptist Theological School ah zong sang makai kipawlna ah Chairman sem hi. 12.6.1947 ni-in Nu Dim Khawm tawh kiteeng a, tapa 4 leh tanu 5 Topa in pia hi. Tanu tapa te: (1) Pa Kham Go Pau (B.Sc, BRE) + Nu Vung Khan Dim (Nurse). (2) Rev.Thawng Khan Cin (B.Th, BD) + Nu Ning Khaw Hau (B.Sc, BE.d, BRE).(3) Pa Hang Khan Lian (M.Sc) + Nu No Reen Hung (B.Sc, BD).(4) Pa Khup Khen Kap (B.Sc) + Nu Niang Khan Huai (BA).(5) Nu Dim Lam Niang (Matric-B) + Pa Pau Khan Khup (BA).(6) Nu Hau Man Cin (B.Sc, Nurse) + Pa Khual Cin Kam (B.Sc).(7) Lia Dim Ngaih Lun B.A (Eng).(8) Lia Ning Khen Cing M.A (Eng), M.A.C.S (M.I.T).(9) Nu Cing Lam Ciin (Dip.Th, B.Th) + Rev. Vung Suan Mung (B.Th, M.Div).
Pa Mang Za Lian
Pu Suan Pum (Ngaihte) leh Pi Cing Za Niang (Sukte) sung panin 9.9.1928 ni-in Tonzang khua ah suak hi. Nu Ngai Za En tawh tanu 3 leh tapa 5 nei uh hi. 1942 kumin SPS Tonzang ah tan 4 zo hi. 1945-1947 sung Private Anglo Veernacular Middle School Tedim ah tan 7 zo hi. 1950-51 sang kum St.Johns’ Diocesan Boy’s high School Yangon ah tan 10 zo hi. Nasep na: -1951-1952 dong Tonzang St.Joseph’s A/V Middle School ah sia pisem hi.-1952-1953 dong Tonzang Private A/V Middle School Tonzang ah sia pi sem hi.-1953-1964 dong Tonzang State Middle School ah kumpi JAT za tawh sia pi ka sem hi.1966-1985 dong Lungngo, Gamngai, Tuimui leh Cikha Middle School Head sem kawikawi hi. -1985-1988 dong Chin State People’s Council Inspection Committee Member sem hi. Tate teng: (1) Nu Niang Khan Lun + Pa Kai Suan Mung (Samte),(2) Pa Pum Khan Kham + Nu Nian Khen Cing (Gualnam), (3) Nu Niang Go Mang + Pa Gin Suan Mung (Gualnam), (4) Pa Pum Lian Khai + Nu Ciin Deih Cing (Bawmkhai),(5) Nu Cin Khan Ciin + Pa Cin Lam Mang (Songput), (6) Pa En Hau Thang + Nu Ning Khan Lun (Gualnam), (7) Pa Lal Cin Lian Zola phuah te: Siapi Vung Cin thang a phuah hi;(a) Ngai tui suan hoih, Ngai tui khak pha, lun tawi pu cit hang aw ee,(b) Na nua ciang ah, Ngaih za tam tawh, min va bang thum thum ing ee, Pa Do Khan Pau a phuah hi; (a) Zang tui vang khua, mi za lai ah, von pau in ka, lai kuai ee,(b) Lai kuai lung zuang, sul hei ing, ih vang khua ah, heh vei luan khi nu ling ee, Gamnagi inn pi nu Pi Kai Za Ciin in Siapi Mang Za Lian a phuah hi; (a) Hawl dam sih tui, vang khua lai let ee, Ngal liam nang sin, lai gel siam sang ee, (b) Ngal liam nang sin, Lai hawm siam sang ee, sei no ten tuu bang, ciin ding aw ee, (a) A mi pawh za, in tam na ven, tem bang deih sak, om hi ee, (b) Tem bang dei sak, sau ki phei suan, lum suang phuh bang kho hen aw. Sangsia sepna peuh ah lailam bek hilo khantoh nading mawtaw lam, tui nekding a tuamtuam makaih hanthawn ahih manin ki it mahmah laa dawng tampi ki phuah lai hi.
Bo Suan Khan Thang
Pu Tual Za Kham leh Pi Ciin Cing te tapa upa pen hi a, July 17,1924 in Tuitum khua ah suak hi. A zi Nu Niang Khaw Dim tawh tanu 5 leh tapa 4 nei uh hi. Sangkah na: 1935 kumin sangkah kipan a Tonzang ah Tan IV a zawh dong kah hi. Tan V leh Tan VI Tedim ah kah a, 1941 kum Japan gal hangin zom suak nawn lo hi. Nasep na: 1942 kumin Tedim Sikkhau to ah sem hi. 1943 pan 1944 dong Galpi Nihna sung Mangkang kumpite khut nuai-ah lambu semin Japante hong uk sungin Japan galkap tuma, san nih ngah man hi. Japan gal ven ciang 1945 in galkap lut a 2 nd Chin ah semin, 1961 kum ciangin Lieutenant tawh pensen la hi. A galkap sep sungin kimawlna tuamtuam ah kimawl in gualzawhna cup tampi ngah hi. Tonzang SHS ngah nadingin a vaihawmte lakah khat in kihel hi. 1963 Revolutionary Council kumpi a kah ciangin ei Zogam a makai ding Falam ah khat Hakha ah khat leh Tedim ah khat mi muanhuai 3 a kitenna ah Tedim gam ai tangin amah kiteeng hi. Tua hi a, Tawlanzi kumpi (Revolutionary Government) Party Cadre kuan masa pen ahi hi.1964 in Tedim Party Unit ah Secretary sem hi. 1971 kumin Party Zumpi ah Tha-nah-su-hmu sem hi. 1972 pan 1974 dong Tonzang Township Nah-lah-kah Secretary leh Zogam Pyitu Council kitelna Sub-Commission ah Chairman sem kawm hi.1976 in Zogam Pyine Zumpi Hakha ah Aloh-Ahmuhsaung (EC) leh Secretary kum khat le alang sung sem hi. Tua kum a kipanin Yangon a galkap-lui kipawlna Zumpi ah a loh a hmuhsaung Committee sem hi. Tua pan a nihveina Pyitu council kitelna ah telcing a, Pyine Lohngan Sitsizi A phuaih –Ohkathah (Chairman of Chin State Inspection Committee) asep laitak kumpi na a sepna mun Zogam khuapi, Hakha ah April 3, 1981 nitak 10:00 in a zi leh tate nusia-in Topa kiangah hong paisan hi. Hakha pan a naseppih kumpi nasemten a khua Tuitum ah pua uh a, a nu a pa kiangah vui-in a han hoih takin bawlsak uh hi. Atate: 1. Dr Kham Lian Pau + Prof Dr Aye Aye Ngun 2. Pa Khen Lian Thang + Prof Dr Mai Mea Khin 3. Tg Kap Khen Mang B.Sc (Geology) 4. Tg Khai Khan Mung,5. Nu Cing Lam Niang B.A Lab,Officer + Pa Kam Cin Hau LLB,6. Nu Cing Lian Vung B.Sc (Physic) + Dr Vum Lian Thang (Victoria Hotel Owner), 7. Nu Cing Hau Man (Blue Staff) + Pa Vungh Lian Thang B.Com.,8. Lia Nuam Lun Cing, 9. Nu Sian Muan Cing B.A (Hist) + Pa Vungh Za KhanTenna: Tuitum khua, Tonzang Tsp.
Pu Thang Khaw Kai
Muizawl khua Pa Gin Hang (Hatlangh) leh Nu Ciang Khaw Niingte sung panin Muizawl khua ah suak hi. Sanggam lai zom 10 te sung panin numei 4 leh pasal 6 pha hi. Pasal leh zi nei a dam teng: 1.pa Thang Za Kam + Nu Thawng Za Cing (Sukte) Saizang, 2. Pa Thang Khaw Kai +Nu Gin Kho Cing(Hatlangh) Muizawl, 3. Pa Thiau Mang + Nu Niang Ngul (Gualnam) Laitui, 4. Nu Dim Lian + Pa Kai Khua Suan (Samte) Muizawl, 5. Pa Khen Kho Pau + Nu Kim Ciang (Samte) Muizawl, 6. Nu Lun Kho Zam + Pa mang Tung Nung (Hatlangh) Muizawl, 7. Nu Lian Za Ciin + Pa Thual Khup (Gualnam) Muizawl, 8. Pa Gin Za That + Nu Cing Khan Vung(Hatlangh) Kaptel. Pa Thang Khaw Kai leh Col. Khen Za Mung unu Pi Gin Kho Cingte ki teeng a, tapa 6 leh tanu 1 nei uh hi. 1. Pa Hang Khan Pau, 2. Pa Kai Khen Thang, 3. Pa Kam Do Thang, 4. Pa Pau Khan Lian 5. Pa Mang Za Suum, 6. Rev Zam Za Thang, 7 Lia Ning Khan Lun. Nasepte: (1) 1948 January kha in Captain Mang Tung Nung makai in Khamtung suahtakna vai hawm pawlpi (KSCP) phuan nautang 21 te lakah makai in ki hel hi. (2) 1952-1956 Paliament hun sungin Pa Thang Kho Kai in Tedim lumyosuh Hluttaw member kum 5 sung sem hi.
Pu Mang Cin Khup
Lomzang khua (Manlun) beh Pu Tuang Za Go, Pi Man Muang (Taithul beh) te nupa sung pan 1910 kumin, Pu Mang Cin Khup suak in, Suahpih Pu Let Za Hang a neih khit teh a nu si hi. A zi kik Pi Khan Za Cing (Taithul beh) tawh, Nu Don Za Niang, Pa Lian Cin Khup, Nu Dim Za Mang, Pa Kai Cin Thang, Nu Man Khaw Vung leh Pa Thang Khan Zam te a nei hi. Sangkahna: &#8211; SPS Tonzang ah tan IV zo-in Mawlaih khua ah tan V zo hi. -1933 kumin Paltan (Galkap) tumin, thaukap kidem na-ah 1 st price ngah aa, atung siah Bote maipha ngah ahih manin, L/copl kipia hi. 1946 ciang pensen la hi. -1947 kumin Lomzang khua hausa sem hi. -1951 kum ciang No.1 Circle Chairman in kiteel ahih manin, Tedim gam Counselor khat in, gam ki-uk na Upa khat ong suak hi. Kawllai theihding akisap lam thei ahih manin, Lomzang khua ah Kawlsia Khin Maung, Khin Taikte cial in lai hilh sak hi. -1956 kumin MP (Member of Parliament) meekuang lui-in, mipi-in MP dingin teel hi. -1958-60 (Care Taker Government) sung Zagom vuanzi Pu Ral Hmung in muang ahih manin, Tedim gamsung a vuanzi power bup ap hi. -1956-60 sungin MP, Zo vuanzi power, Home minister te sem khawm hi. Parliament zumah Vice President tavuan zong kipia hi. -1960 kumin No.1 SHS Tedim sang innpi Ama’n hong hi. -1957 leh 1958 kum nih sung Union Day ah Zolaam “Ka khawklai, Saipi khuksu” cih ngeina lam te, Rangoon ah Amah makai in lam valak ngek ngek hi. Kawl ulian te in mu nuam mahmah in lungkim peuh mah ci hi.- Ama Zo vuanzi power neih sung inter village football tourmament Gamngai khia ah tha pia in Amah mahin en ngetngut hi. Banah Cup (1) zong tua aa ding Ama min tawh pia lai hi. Thu a vaan zo, amu zo mahmah khat ahi hi. -Tedim gam Senam khua (tu’n Tonzang myone) a kat mang ciangin, Rangoon Parliament zum pi-ah huhna nget sak hi. Antang ip (200) Senam khua ah vanleeng tawh khiasuk hiau hi. -MP aa kiteel lungdam in, sialtal sangnga nei khat go-aa, khua leh tui khua kim khua pam, amah panpih khut leh khe a a zat a lawm itte tawh pawi bawl zu nungin, zan khat leh sun khat inn sung inn maikim kot in, lamgui kai uh hi. -1960 Parliament general election ah, MP meekuang lui-in ngah lo hi. Nuntak zonna hangin kumpite kepna thuakkha lai hi. -1971 kum in Lomzang pan Kalaymyone Kuanglian khua ah lal hi.-Nu Man Niang (Lianzaw beh tawh), tanu tapa 8 Topa in pia hi. -1978 a ma kum (68) in Kuanglian khua ah si hi.
Pu Hau Za Lian
Pu Pau Za Cin (Sukte) leh Pi Zam Khaw Niangh te sung panin 14.4.1912 ni-in suangzang khua ah suak hi.Pi Lam Khaw Ning tawh kiteeng a, hong nusiat ciangin Pi Ciin Khaw Niang tawh kiteeng leuleu hi. Pilna tawh kisai: 1. 1920-1924 -Burmese Primary School Tedim. 2. 1924-1928-Anglo Vernacular School Tedim.3. 1928-1932-State Middle School Tedim. 1932 March kha in Tan (7) ong. Nasepna tawh kisai: 1. 1932-1939 Suangzang khua Chief nasem2. 27.4.1942 ni pan kipaninWestern Chin Levy ah Commando Company Commander sem. 3. 20.6.1944 ni-in Sukte Independence Army (S.I.A) Phuan. Hi hun sungin Kawlgam makai Bogyoke Aungsan in AFPFL (Anti Facist People Freedom League) a phuat hun tawh kituak lian hi. Pu Hau Za Lian makaih S.I.A galkapte hanciamna tawh Japan galte Tedim gampan 27.11.1944 ni-in kinot khiazo hi. 4. 1956 kumin Tedim gam No.2 Counstituency Chamber of Nationalities panin M.P in kiteel a, 1958 kumin Chin Affair Council Chairman 1960 dong sem suak hi. 5. 1974 kum 1 st Council hunin Tedim Myo thukhen Chairman ding kiteel a, hun bei dong semin nainganyi pension ngah hi. 6. 1967 June kha a kiphuan Tedim Myone lokho kipawlna pan EC in kiteel a, lo khawhna tawh kisai trainng zong Central Political Institute Mingalardon ah nipi 6 sung kah hi. 1977 kum ciang kawlgambup lokho kipawlna-ah E.C khat in kiteel hi. 7. England kumpi in beh leh phung zui-a Ukpi leh Hausa a sepna thu hoihsa loin amah makai-in 1947 kumin England kumpi tungah angetna tungtawnin England kumpi in Ukpite leh Hausate hehnepna sum pia ahih manin beh leh phung zui a Ukpi leh Hausa sepna bei hi. Suangzang khua ading nasepnate: (a) 1946 in zolai sang phuan.(b) 1948 in Manglai tan 7 sang phuan,(c) 1955 in Health Centre ngah sak, (d) 1963-64 sung Taangthuam lei tangah buh ciin theih nading kumpi huhna leh khua mite thagui thatang tawh tai 3 kigamla luipi pan tuila in acre 80 ah buh kicing thei in Suangzang khua mite in kum lang sung khom thei uh hi.
Pu Son Cin Lian
Pu Langh Khaw Thang leh Pi Zo Dim tapa hi a, July 19, 1930 in Sezang khua ah suak hi. A zi Nu Niang khen Don tawh tanu 2 leh tapa 5 nei uh hi. 1. S/m Dim Khan Lun (LHV)+ (Rev. Go Khan Mang) Tongzang Myo, 2. S/m Zam En Cing (Midwife)+Pa Thang Do Zam Tedim myo, 3. (Rev. Thang Lian Khup) BTh. +S/m Do Suan Vung USA, 4. Pa Cin Khan Lam + Nu Pum Lun Niang, USA, 5. Pa Thang Sian Tuang BSc. (Maths) Tedim myo, 6. Tg Tual Khen Kham BSc. (Maths) Tedim myo, (7) Tg Mang Khan Tuang BTh(Cand) USA. Sangkah na: 1956 in Tan X zo hi. 1958 ciangin I.A zo hi. Nasep na: 1950 pan kum 5 sung ZEB ah EC leh Accountant thaman la loin sem hi. 1961 pan kum 2 sung Zo United Central Co-op Society (ZUCCL Ltd) ah Chairman sem hi. Sub-district Co-op Union ah zong Secretary sem hi. 1952 pan KSVP Party ah Secretary sem hi. 1957 pan CNO Party ah Assistant Secretary sem hi.1960 kitel ciangin CNO min tawh Tedim khanglam ah kuanglui a telcing hi. 11.4.60 ni panin Chin Affairs Council Chairman sem hi. 4.6.64 ni panin India gam ah tawmvei tai hi. M.P. Son Cin Lian makai in 1964 kumin Burma &#8220;Chin National Liberation Front&#8221;(CNLF) phuan in president zong sem pah hi. Pa Chung Nung (Parte) secretary hi a, Sia Dam Khaw Hau pan External Affairs minister hi. Amau mi 40te pa Chungnung(parte) makaihna tawh India gam a pawlpih General Tun Kho Pum te pawl (CR-CLA)te tawh Zampi khua nawl a guest house (Bangla) ak i ngakna pan Kawlgam palikten va um in man uh a, (Monywa-thong) mah denna hi. 1967 pan Ssubdistrict Cultural Committee ah Secretary hun bitin kum 4 sem hi. Hih hun sungin Pupa ngeinate hoihtakin laibu in bawl hi. 1971 in Tedim Myoma Tamavuazamah ah Chairman sem hi. Tedim Nah-lah-kah ah hunbit tavuan kipia hi. Nah-lah-kah Chairman tavuan a sep pak sung 1972 November in Yangon ah kisam suk a, kum khat leh khakua sung kumpi in kem hi. 4.8.74 ni-in suakta hi. 1976 Township Tamah kitelna ah Chairman ngah a 1982 dong sem hi. 1990 kitel ciangin L.D.P Party in Tedim nitumna lamah mekuang lui hi. Zomi L.D.P Chairman tavuan nei hi. 24.5.1991 ni-in Yangon, Japan Zatopi panin hong nusia hi. Tenna: Myoma veng, Tedim.
Albert. Lun Pum
Pu Kam Lian leh Pi Zam Vungte ta 7 a neih sung panin a 3 na hi a, 5.2.1920 ni-in Khuasak khua ah suak hi. Tan 4 ciang Khuasak ah kah a, Tan 7 pen Tedim ah kah hi. Tan 10 pen Falam ah kah hi. 1941 kumin Yangon St. John’s College (BEHS 1 Lanmadaw) panin Tan 10 ong hi a, 1941 October dong Judson College ah a sang zom in Japan gal (2nd Word War) hangin tawlnga hi. Japan gal 1942-45 sung, 17th Indian Division te phuat Western Chin Levies sungah lut a, 1.3.1942 pan 31.10.1945 dong sem hi. Tua asepna panin ( 1 ) Burma Star, (2) Defence Medal leh (3) Victory Medal minphatna ngah hi. Japan gal ven 1946 ciangin Rangoon University ah kah kik a, 1949 kumin B.A degree ngah hi. Sizangmi Thuantak suan sungpanin degree a ngah masapen ahi hi. 27.1.1950 pan 18.11.1951 dong SHS Thuklai ah Syapi sem hi.1952 panin gam vaihawm dingin kipia a, 1952 kumin Southern Tedim panin Member of Parliamentary (MP) hong ngah a, Chin Affairs Council Chairman hong sem hi. 1956 kum ciangin Tedim panin MP kitel na ah hong ngah kik a, Chin Affairs Council Chairman mah sem kik hi. Tua khit ciangin (Lezami Naingnganpai Phuylohzi Wingyi) hong ngah to hi. 1958 kum galkap te uk(Eain Saung Ashuzah) dong sem hi. 1960 kumin Phitaungsuh Party Thanah Lunge Ziza President ngah a, 1962 kum galkap te ii Political ciang party abei sak dong sem hi. 1961 kumin B.Ed degree ngah thuah a, 1961 pan 1980 dong SHS-2 Bahan, SHS-1 Latha, SHS-6 Botataung ah Manglai hilh in SAT sem hi. 29.11.1968 pan 31.3.1973 dong Revolution Army Council Chairman General Ne Win ii “Thu dotpi 33” sungah kihel a, Kawlgam Gam vaihawm te kikup na ah na kihel thei hi. 7.6.1980 kumin Naingngan Gongzi Pathamah asenminphatna ngah hi. Political pension leh sangsia pension ngah khawm hi.13.9.1999 in leitung nusia hi. Zileta: 8-3-1944 ni in Khuasak khua Pu Vum Sing le Pi Vum Nuamte&#8217; na nu Nu Ciang Khaw Ciin tawh kiteeng a, tapa thum leh tanu 5 nei hi. (1) Nu Vung Kho Pau,(2) Nu Nuam pau, (3) Pa Lian Za Thawn, (4) Pa Lian Khan Cin, (5) Tg Lian Cin Nang, (6) Daw Sing Khaw nem, (7) Daw Huai Cing, (8) Daw Cingh khan Neam te ahi uh hi.
m Cin Pau @ Pu Zozam
Syapi U C.Mang Thawng leh Pi Ciin Ko Mang te tanu tapa 11 a neih sung panin a 8 na ahi hi. 24.6.1956 ni-in Thuklai khua ah suak hi. Education: B.Sc., A.G.T.I.,S.F.Meister (W.Germany), M.Dev (Master of Development Studies)P.P.L.P(ANU) (Camberra), S.E.N.S.E (KSAP (Warsaw). Work Experience: 1.
