Ciang Za Dim
Thuklai suanh, lunmun tuu, Mangzong bawng Pu Vum Zam leh Pi Vung Lian te ta 5 a neih sung panin a 3 na hi a, 20.3.43 ni-in Thuklai khua ah suak hi. 1964 kumin B.A degree ngah a, tua kum ma in Thuklai SHS ah SAT sem hi. 1965 kumin Burma Socialist Programme Party ah lut a,1970 kumin ah kah hi. 1971 kum amasa bel akiphuan ah kihel a, research section ah chairman sem hi.1985- 1988 kumin Dawbon Township panin Hlutdaw Kusale (M.P) in kitel hi. 1974 kumin USSR ah ahizong,1986 in Sen gam ah ahizong pai hi.1988 kum ciangin Naingnganzi nasepna panin tawlnga hi. Ama pen biakna lam zong ahanciam mahmah khat hi a,1975-1984 dong Rangoon Evangel Church ah Secretary sem hi. Singapore Asian Theological Center of Evangelist and Mission ah Laisiangtho sin hi. South Korea, Seoul Yoido Full Gospel Church te International Fasting and Prayer Mountain ah ni 40 anntang in pai hi. Apu apa neihsa khempeuh Assembly of God Church, Myanmar ah pia hi. Yangon Baptist Church (St. Phillip) building pen Education Department te khut sung panin Anglican te khut sung a tunkik amah hi. Anglican te tungpan kilei kik hi. Amah tulaitak Australia, Melborne ah teeng hi. Sanggam laizomte: (1) Major Khai Za Pum, (2) Nu Vum Khaw Cing, (3) S/m Ciang Za Dim, (4) Pa Hau Kam, (5) Pa Kiim Cin te ahi hi. Gualzawhna te: (1) 1985-88 dong Dawbon Township Hlutdaw Kusale (M.P) hi aa, Zomi sungah numei (M.P) masa pen ahi hi. (2) 1965 kum Pha-an khua a ki bawl “Kawlgam bup ni” ah Zogam bup tang mi in pai hi. (3) 1967 kum Zominam ni Tonzang ah hong pai galkap ulian te tawh thugen khawm aa, Thuklai + Thangmual mawtaw lam leh Thuklai zato Health Center pan Station Hospital asuah nading ngen hi.(4) Singapore Laisiangtho kah sung “Chin Christian Challenge to the World” cih thulu tawh lai-at hi. (5) Thanpinkong inn pan Pale Myothit ah akituah ciang inn leh mun neih leh lam khempeuh hawm siangin Bem tawh Pale Myothit zuan hi.(6) Lanyin Lunge ah asepsung khangnote nasep leh pilna ding tawh kisai laibu tampi bawl hi.
Siapi Pau Do Nang
Bo Son Kho Gin leh Pi Niang Khaw Awi te tapa hi a, 17.8.1933 in Muizawl khua ah suak hi. A zi Nu Vial Khaw Do hi a, tanu 1 leh tapa 6 nei uh hi. Sangkahna: Cingpikot P.P sangah Tan II dong za a, Muizawl P.P sangah Tan IV dong kah hi. Cingpikot P.M school pan Tan IV dong zo hi. SHS Tedim ah Tan V pan X dong zo a, 1953 in Middle School Scholarship ngah hi.1955 in Tan X second division in zo a, 1956 in Yankin College ah kah hi. 1957 in I. Sczoa, 1959 in Yangon University pan B.A zoin1961 in B.Ed. ngah hi. Nasepna: 1961-67 in SHS Mindat ah H/m sem a, 1967- 70 in SHS Tedim H/m sem hi. 1970-74 in H/m zum TEO Tedim ah sem a, 1974-85 TEO (Lien Post) sem hi. 1974-77 in Party Unit Secretary sem a, 1977 in Party Unit Chairman Tedim ah sem hi. 1977-85 in Party Central Committee Member in om a, Member of Chin State Party Reg. Com: hi-in 1985-88 in Secretary Chin State Party Reg: Com: sem hi. 1978-88 in Pyithu Hlutdaw Member sem a, 1981-85 C.C sem hi. Gamdang paina: 1972 in Japan ah Member of Education Study Mission in pai a, 1979 in Indonesia Member of Pyithu Hlutdaw Goodwill Mission in pai hi.Tate teng:(1) Gin Lian Thang B.Sc (Zoo) late.(2) Awi Zam Cing (Matric) + Cin Za Khup (SAT) Kalemyo.(3) Kam Go Pau (Matric) + Cing Pian Lun (USA). (4) Hau Khan Mang (Matric) tangval. (5) Pau Lam Cim (B.Com) + Dim Ngaih Huai (Singapore).(6) Nang Gin Thang (Matric) Late.(7) Nang Khaw Lian (Matric) late. Nasepna: 1.10.2005 panin Town Elder Committee President sem hi. 20.6.2006 kumin Tedim- Kalay Diocese angen te lakah makai hi. 5.10.2012 ni-in hong piangsak, ih pa Pasian kiangah hong ciahsan hi.
Ukpi Thawng Za Khup
Ukpi Pu Do Tual leh Pi Pum Khaw Man te tapa hi a, March 15, 1907 in Saizang khua ah suak hi. A zi pi TelZaKaihia,tapa3lehtanu3damhi.1.PuTualKhaw Mang, 2. Pu Lian Khan Thang, 3. Pu Nang Cin Pau te ahi hi. Sangkah na: 1924 in Government Middle School Mawlaik pan Tan VII zo a, Kawllai siam mahmah hi. Nasep na: Tedim ah Manglai sia a sep sung 1928 in apa si a, sangsia pan tawpin ukpi sem hi. Mite makaih thei a, pawl leh lawm huai mahmah hi. Pilna a thupina thei ahi manin inn mun lo gam zuakin leiba-in a nau te sang kahsak hi. Western Levies ah makai hi. Coy.Commander ahih mah bangin gal kikapnaPimpih, Dolluang leh mun tampi ah makai hi. Zogam suahtak nang a vaihawmna hangin Japan mangpa in thah dingin nihvei thusit a, Pasian hehpihna leh a dawn siamna hangin suakta hi. Japan ukna sung pan suahtak nangin Sukte Independence Army phuan sim hi. 14.9.1944 in Manipur nitumna lampan honggalkah S.I.A galkap te tawh Mualbem, Yangon, Sialtaak, Saizang, Phaileng khua khung leh Suahlim te a om Japan te nawhkhiat na-ah kihel a, tua hangin ATM minphatna ngah hi. Panglong Conference ah Zomi te taangin letmat thuh hi. Nyaung- shwe a Hill Peoples’ Congress kikhopna leh Rees Williams Inquiry Commission, Maymyo ah kihel hi. Ukpi hun kilaih-in siah leh bum kaihna a kimudah a kideih loh hangin, tuate in Pu Thawng Za Khup a lok zo kei hi. Suahtakna ngah khit ciangin zong Hausa leh Circle Chairman in kitel suak lai hi. A piang khempeuh a hoih lamin mu thei hi. 1935 in a uk sung mi pawlkhat in langpang a, ama’n la phuak hi. (a) Siallum leh kawlciang tawi lobuang ka do phung zatam aw;(b) Pupa khan a do zatam zong lem siam khang vaimang hi. A nu sih-a a la phuah: (a) Na pai ve aw tun leh ka zua lengvan ah mun muang ve aw; (b) Kei zong sim leitung tul lo dia, tuangtun muang zaw ve ning e, ci hi. A nau pa Menzi Pu Thawng Cin Thang zi, Pi Niang Khaw Mang sih-a a phuah, (a) Simlei kuam luah ding mi om lo, kei zong pham zaal ding hi’ng e;(b) Thangvan sau sah tuang kong tun ciang, laambang pak a, sangbang no din, tuai Niiang na pai masa aw.Ukpi Thawng Za Khup in May 18, 1966 ni-in Falam zatopi pan leitung nusia a, Saizang ah Zo ngeina tawh kivui hi. Sai 1, Zangsial 3, Saza 1, Lawi 4, Sakol 1, Sial 15, leh bawng 18 keng hi.
Ukpi Pu Pum Za Mang
Ukpi a suahna: Pu Hau Cin Khup a dam loh ciangin, ama ngetna leh England kumpi phalna om bangin, a Ukpi za a tapa Pu Pum Za Mang tungah, November 30, 1924 ni-in a aap hi. Pu Hau Cin Khup (Sukte) leh Pi Ciin Za Niang te sung pan 1894 kumin Tonzang ah suak hi. Pu Pum Za Mang leh Pi ciin khaw Man tawh 1934 kum ki teng a, tapa 5 leh tanu 3 nei hi. (1) Khup Khen Kham (2) sian lian Pau, (3) Khup Do Dal, (4) Pau Kap Thang, (5) Kham Za Dal. Pu Pum Za Mang in Ukpi a sep a kipan in a pa gamh leh siah teng aluah to hi. Zo ngeina ahi, ton leh lam a kim takin bawl thei ahih manin, a inn tualah apa phuhsa song 76 banah 49 a phuh beh hi. Sa kap siamin sa tampi tak man ahih manin, gual tung tuanna in a innka ah song kapi aphut hi.1939 kumin Mandalay khua panin Roman Catholic Biakna la in, Tonzang khua ah mun a la sak hi. 1946 kumin Zogam Tedim mite taang in a khat veina Panglong Conference ah pai aa, zang lei a teeng Kawlte leh Mualtung a teng zomi, Kachin, Shan mite kipawl khawm a England kumpi khut sungpan SUAHTAKNA lak ding thu kikup khopna ah kihel hi.1947 kumin Maymyo Enquiry commission ah Tedim mite taangin kah a, thu na sung hi. Kawlgam in 1948 kum suahtakna ngah khit Parliamentary Democrasy ki-uk na tawh kalsuan hunin Tedim Tonzang gam sungah THU HOIH VAIHAWM PAWL (THVP) party makai khat ahi hi. Japan gal ma Tedim-Cikha mawtaw lam tawhna: Pu Pum Za Mang in Kam Hau ukpi a sep hun, Kawlgam zanglei teng Japante khutsung a tun hunin, England kumpi galkapte Imphal ah phualpi satin om uh hi. Imphal a om galkap mangte in Japante do nadingin IMPHAL leh TEDIM kal mawtawlam tawhding vaihawm uh hi. Mawtaw lam tawh ding toh kisai in, Operation of U-Go (U-Go Sitsenyi) makai Lt. Col Mutachi leh galkap mang dang te vaihawm khawm a sem ding ahi hi. Mawtaw lam tawh nading mun a zon uh ciangin, Imphal-Cikha-Mauvom-Zampi-Lentang-BuanliTuithang-Meitei gun kantan in, Tedim tung dingin a geel uh hi. Tua bang a geelna uh bangin lam tawh nading ah, mipi thatang kisam ding ahih manin, Falam Mangpi LB Naylor in Pu Pum Za Mang tungah, a uk sung mite thatang tawh huh ding angen hi. PuPum Za Mang in LB Naylor kiang “Imphal pan Tedim dong kito ding mawtaw lampi in, Tonzang Khua hong tawt kei ding leh ka uk sung mite thatang tawh kong huh zo kei ding hi,” ci-in a nial hi. LB.Naylor in Pu Pum Za Mang deihna a dot ciangin, Pu Pum Za Mang in, Imphal-Cikha-Tuikhiang-Mualkawi-Nakzang-Tonzang kantan in Tedim tunsak ding a gen hi. Pu Pum Za Mang gen bangin mawtaw lam tawh ding lungkimna nei uh ahih manin, Imphal pan Nakzang ciang galkapte in to uh a, Nakzang panin Tedim dong Kam Hau uksung mite in a to uh hi. Hih mawtaw lam tawh na-ah kumpi lam panin Engineer lam a siam Capt. Bakely, Mr Arther Singh, Mr Suran Singh, Mr David te in makai a, Tedim Pa Khup Sa Vungh PaTuang Thawng te in makai hi. Hih mawtaw lam tawh na Imphal panin, Tedim dong 1942 kum khat sungin kizo hi. Pu Pum Za Mang ngaihsut pilna gel siamna hangin, hih mawtaw lamin Tonzang khua kantanin, kito ahih manin Tonzang gam adingin gam khantohna lianpi hong suak hi. Kawlgam zanglei a teng Kawl mite leh Mualtung a teeng Zomi, Kachin, Shan mite kipawl khopna bawlna, Panglong khua ah kah dingin Tedim gam taang mi in, Tonzang Ukpi Pu Pum Za Mang, Falam gam taang mi dingin Lumbang Ukpi Pu Hlur Hmung, Haka gam taang mi dingin Ukpi Pu Kio Mang te Panglong khuaah 23.3.1946 ni-in tung uh hi.A sihna:Pu Pum Za Mang tuptup Kawlgam suahtakna ngah khit, 1948 November kha in Tedim zinna pan 10.11.1948 in si aa, a luang Tonzang khua ah kipua hi. 1949 April kha in kivui hi. A sih in Aksi neelkai zingsol tawh suak khawm pen ni 7 sung kilang hi. Ukpi Pu Pum Za Mang a sih teh, Pu Vungh Za Kham in hih la phuak hi.a) Zangtui lunmang aw kha na kiat ni’n e, Se-al neel a kaai aw ee, b) Tung ciang thangvan se-al neel kai, lun khavang kihil aw ee.
Ukpipa Pu Hau Cin Khup
Sukte Pu Kam Hau tu, Pu Hau Pum leh Pi Tel Ciin te tapasal upapen hi a, 1872 kumin Tedim khua ah suak hi.Mikang kumpi hong khantoh laitakin Tedim gamah a galhang pen, a vaihawm siam pen ahih manin May 7, 1894 ni-in ukpiza kipia hi. A kum 22 pha pan hi.Ama hun sungin Tedim-Tonzang gamah khua tampi sat sakin, khua lian teng ah Mangbuk (zintun inn) lam kawikawi hi. Khua khat leh khua khat kikawm nadingin lampi ziikin kikawmna nuam sak mahmah hi. Ama khan ma-in sial zawi bangbek tawh khua khat leh khua khat kikawmna bek om in, tu aa ih lampite ama khansung kizik lampite ahi hi.A pil a ciim, mi kizen, gam uk siam, Zo ngeina kiplet, thukhual mahmah ahi hi. Tua banah zing sangin lol mahmah se in, lungduai leh mi hehpih siam mahmah ahih manin aukna gam, khua mite in it mahmah hi. Mi minthang mahmah ahi hi. Midang tawh kibang loin, ha tung ha nuai 36 nei se-in mituam pian khat zong ahi hi. Mangkang kumpi te tungah thuman ahih manin, min phatna lai tampi tak mah tawh pahtawi na angah hi. Tua te in (Certificate of Good Service), Volunteer Decoration Medal Ngun nam (Silver Mounted Sword), kham khi guipi (Kyet thaye sang Shwe Salwe yah Min), King Service Medal (KSM), Saithau lawng khat, Pistol khat ngah hi. Galpi masa huh nadingin Rs.1150 kumpi te tung pia hi. Pasal hat leh a picing ahih zah khatin, pute pate kidemna samat galmat kidem lai ahih zah khatin, Pu Hau Cin Khup a khan sungin, Sai hapak 6, Saipi 2, Zangsial 8, Humpi 2, Kamkei 2 leh sa nautang 200 val man hi.A cidam phat nawnloh ciangin Ukpipa in a tapa Pu Pum Za Mang tungah Ukpiza November 30, 1924 ni-in aap hi. A tapa Pu Pum Za Mang Ukpiza a aap khit teh dam lo suak ahih manin kum 10 kiim a sawt dektak September 10, 1934 zingsang nai 7 hunin Ukpi khuapi a maanna khua Tonzang ah hong sihsan hi. A tapa a za luah Ukpi Pu Pum Za Mang in, 1935 kumin Sial 74, Lawi 18, Bawng 11, Sakol 2 han ken sak hi. Zo ngeina cingtakin Pu Pum Za Mang in apa vui a, Mualsuang ukpi te han gei-ah om lai hi. A zi masa Pi Ciin Za Niang tawh tapa Pum Za Mang leh tanu Lian Za Cing nei hi. A suan a khak Pu Sian Lian Pau te leh Pi cingpi ta Major Khup Cin Pau te innkuan ahi hi. A zi kik Pi Vung Khaw Man tawh tanu Ciin Khaw Lun tapa Hau Cin Pau, Kam Cin Thang leh Lian Cin Thang te ahi hi.Pu Hau Cin Khup laphuah khat:a) Sim sal in va pai ing e, zanggam lei ah kua tawi na hiam na phung min sial aw ci e, b) Tu tawm hile’ng ka phung minsial ve ninge, kapianna nibang lun e, sial ngam lang e.
Pu Kam Hau thu
Pu Kham Thuam (Sukte) leh Pi Gawh Ciin te sung panin Mualbem khua ah suak hi. Sanggam te: (1) Kam Hau, (2) Go Pau, (3) Za Khai, (4) Za Pau, (5) Khan Zam te ahi hi. Mualbem panin Lamzang ah 1800 kumin pai a, Hausa kum 5 sung sem hi. 1805 kum ciang Tedim ah pem leuleu a, tua hun in Tedim ah Gui te na teng zo ahih manin leh gal leh sa hat lua ahih manin teng tul zo lo in Lamzang ah ciah kik hi. 1810 kum ciangin Kam Hau leh Khoi Lam in Falam gam Ngal tu khua a teng Mang Gin zol uh a, Tedim ah teng kik uh hi. Tua bangin Kam Hau in thu khempeuh kei ma thu hi ci lo in Hatlang te, Kamdong tapa Mang Gin leh Hatzaw te Khoi Lam tawh thu kikum in vaihong hawmkhawm uh hi. Tedim khua inn 300 hongphak ciangin tulaitak ih zat Tedim pau hong piangkhia hi. Tua bangin a seppih upa teng thum hong minthan ciangin Vaiphei te in hi bangin la khat na phuah hi.(a) Sinthu soi ding, Tual awn pa aw, do cih tu lut, Am thang pa aw,(b) Do cih tu lut, Am thang pa aw, Van nuai tun sial a lut na, Za tual pa aw, na ci hi. Zineih na:Kam Hau in Guite tanu Ciin Ngul zi dingin la hi. Pi Ciin Ngul a pi khiat laitakin mei lum in mopi te a nungah zui liai liai hi, kici liang hi. Kam Hau tate in: (1) Za Tual, (2) Thuam Lian, (3) Lian Thang, (4) Thang Khaw Pau, (5) Hau Pum, (6) Khua Cin te ahi hi. Vanneih minthang te: Kam Hau pil leh tei thuah in hong hau sem sem a, Zogam a sum minthang khempeuh a ngah nading hamciam hi. (1) Lang za dak minthang, (2) Ton kai dak bu zong sial 100 in lei hi. (3) Ngal ngam tui thawl hu, (4) Thang Ho phih tu kuangpi, (5) Thang Pum kitat na takok lom 9, (6) Mualpi te zam kang minthang nei khin hi. A ngah nail oh Guite nuai suk dak minthang leh Mang Vung (thahdo) te pai te pa Zam no mai leh Sawm Sing Khi minthang ahi hi. Kam Hau Upadi: Kam Hau in Tedim gam khua 135 uk ahih manin thu leh la vaihawm ding hong tam semsem hi. Hih a nuai a teng tawh kikum in vaihawm na hong nei hi.1. Kam Hau-Ukpi pa (Sukte), (2) Pau Vum-Upapi (Sukte), (3) Mang GinGalkap mang (Hatlang), (4) Khoi Lam-Thu leh la vaihawm (Hatzaw), (5) Kim Thuam-Upa (Zillom), (6) Tel Khat-Upa (Hatzaw), (7) Pau Am-Upa (Samte), (8) Cin Kim-Upa (Samte).Kam Hau Upadi sungah khenpi 24 leh khenneu 143 om hi. Kam Hau Tedim khua ah teng a, Ukpi asep sung A.D 1868 kumin hong si hi. Beh leh phung tu leh ta a uk na gam sung mi ten Zongeina cingtak tawh lungkim huai tak in gui hi. Nau zaw inn luah ahih manin a gamh teng Khua Cin in luah in vaihawm in hong om hi.
Tg. Zel Sian Tan
Lailo khua Pa Vungh Khan Suum(Buansiing) leh Nu Dim Ngaih Don (Gualnam songlam)te&#8217; sung panin 1.6.2001 kum in Yangon ah suak hi. Sanggam pasal 3 leh numei 1 lakah a nau pen hi. (1) Tg. Dongh Kap Thang, Myanmar Railway, (2) Tg Zam Thawm Kim, BA.(Phil) third year, (3) Lia Niing Za Mung, BE, (Machanical), (4) Tg Zel Sian Tan, Matric, All-D te hi. Sangkahna: Tan lang BEHS, No.(3) Maymyo, a nihna ngah, Tan khat BEPS, Kawlyinmyo, Special Award, Tan nih, BEPS, Kawlyinmyo, a khatna, Tan thum, BEPS, Kawyinmyo, A khatna, Tanli BEPS, Kawlyinmyo, akhatna, (Sagaing Division) ah ki dem hi. Tan nga leh tan guk, BEHS, Kawlyinmyo, a khatna, Sagaing Division ah a nihna, Tan Sagih leh tan giat BEHS, No.(3) Kalaymyo, a khatna ngah, Tan kua leh tan sawm, Private High School, Yinyaw Kamayut, Yangon, A khatna, All-D ngah hi. Matngahte: Myanmar 76, English 75, Maths 95, Chemistry 94, Physics 97, Biology 98. Mat gawm vekpi 535 pha hi. Pasian deih sakna a om leh ka uk pen ahih mah bangin Yangon Technological University, YTU kah sawm ingh. Lungdam kohna: Amasa pen hih bang gualzawhna hong pia Pasian tungah lungdamna ko masa ingh. Ka pianna ka nu, ka pa tung leh ka u te teng tungah zong lungdam ko ingh. Thu hong nget sak pawlpi siate leh pawlpi mi a kuama peuh leh sanggam u le naute tungah lungdamna kong ko hi.
Tg Thang Hau Suum
Laitui khua Pa Kham Suan Mung (Gualnam) leh Nu Dim Sian Huai (Gualnam) te sung panin (22.9.1999) in yangon khua ah suak hi. Sanggam laizom pasal 2 leh numei 1 lakah a upa pen ahi hi. Lia Ciang Van Kim matric leh Tg Pau Sian Sang Grade II kah hi. 2015-16 sangkum ka sang min uh hi. Ka Pawlpi pen Word of Faith (WFC) hi a, ka om na uh pen No (3808) Thar Yar Aye Street (1), Mayangone Township Yangon hi. Subject zui a mark ngah zah teng Myanmar -78, English -77, Mathematics -97, Chemistry -98, Physic 98, Biology -99 hi. Vekpi gawm 547 marks hi a, tuni ciang All-D ngah lak ah a tampen ahi hi.Hih bangin All-D ngah cih ka theih caing bel nuam peuh mah ingh. Ka sia pa’n phone hongset in lungdam lua tu thei lo ding thei lo liangin ka om hi. A masa penin ih biak Pasian tungah, anihna ah nulehpa tungah, athumna ah ka sia te khempeuh tungah ka lungdam hi. Pasian mah masak leng a man lam hong lak ding hi cih ka um hi. Sia hoih zong kisam mahmah hi. Lai deihna tak tawh laisim in Pasian tungah thu ngen a ih ki ap ding thupi penin ka mu hi.Tan sawm kah lai ding tetung ah kong vaikhak noppenin old questions te subjects kimin limtakin theih siang sawm ding hi hang. Bang hang hiam cih leh old question te kumthum ciang khat vei ch bang a pai kik zel ahih manin na nunglam kum sawmsung a teng hoih tak kiging peuh le teh nagual zo ding hi cih konggen nuam hi.Topan hong lungkim pih leh kei uk leh ka lunggulh pen in Engineering kah nuam pen ingh. Ka lungdam.
Tg Pau Sian Muan Siing
Mawngken khua Pa Rev Sihas Langh Khan Mung (Thangum ) leh S/m Niang Khan Dim (Suante) te sung panin (28/ 8/1999) in Kawlpi ah ka suak hi. 2015-2016 sang kumin SHS (3) Kalemyo, Shwe Hla Min Boarder panin, sahkah 334 tawh matric All Distinction tawh gualzawhna ka ngah hi. Ka Pawlpi pen Leipi tuiphum Pawlpi Kalemyo hi a, ka om na uh zong (1/38) That-Oo-Thida, Nguwa hlan kawlpi hi. Kei muhna:(1) All-D ngahna dingin Pasian muangding thungen ding ngah sawm pah ding, (2) Let-Zyi hoih ding kisam ahih manin kisin ding, siang sak sitset ding,(3) Subject zui in akisam khempeuh lot ngah sitset ding,(4) Laisim ih gim ciang limsuaih kisin ding, a ngah sa laite khut tawh at kikkik ding,(5) Tan sawm kah lai te’n, laimah lunggulh in sim ngiat ding, hahkat ding, kisin ngiat ding. Lungdam kohna: Pasian tungah lungdam ing, nulehpa te tungah lungdam ing, ka sya tetung ah lungdam ing. A khawn khong a sang (boarder) hong om sak ka sya te tungah zong lungdam ing. Nulehpa ten haksatna tampi lakpan tha hongpia uh hi. Ka sanggam te tungah zong lungdam ingh. Hih gualzawhna dingin thu hongnget sak Pawlpi mi leh a kua maciat tungah nakpi tak ka lungdam hi. Subject zui a mark ngah te, Myanmar 75, English -79, Methamatics -87, Chemistry -83, Physic -87, Biology -92, vekpi gawm 503 ahi hi. Mailam ah kangim na pen zato siavuan mah kah sawm ingh. Siavuan sep kawmin Pasian na sem nuam ing. A kua maciat in katup na Topan hong tangtun pih dong thunget na ah hong cial nuam ing. Ka lungdam. Sanggamteng: (1) Nu Hau Khan Nuam (tan 10), (2) Lia Thang Za Niang (BA, Phil. M.Div), (3) Lia Man Sian San Muang (LCCI Level 2), (4) Lia Man Sawn Ngaih, BSc. Che.-PAT Nanyun, (5) Lia Pau Thawn Cing, BAct, (6) Lia Kam Cingh BA(Eng), (7) Lia Ciin Ngaih Zen B.Sc.Phy. (8) Tg Pau Sian Muan Siing, Matric-All D.
Lia Vung San Lian
Phaiza khua Rev Suan Go Khai (Hatzaw) leh S/m En Ngaih Lun (Tungdim) te sung panin 17.1.2000 in yangon ah suak hi. Sanggam laizom pasal 1 leh numei 4 pha uh hi. 2015-16 sang kum ka sang min SHS No (4) Tamwe myone hi. Ka Pawlpi pen Harvest Christian Centre (AG) Tamwe. Ka omna inn uh No (20) Tadihpathan Street, Tamwe Township,Yangon hi. Subject zui a mark ngah zah teng Myanmar -83, English -78, Mathematics -86, Chemistry -94, Physic -90, Biology -95 hi. Vekpi gawm 526 marks hi. Laivuan zawh akipan All-D ngah dingin bel ki lamen ingh. Ahih hang maths bel lau sim pian ing. Ka siamah ten lai kisuan madeuh in honggen a, ih biak ahoih Pasian tungah lungdam lua ingh. Kapa kanu, kapi kapu te leh ka innkuan pih khat ciat tungah zong lungdam ingh. Ka neulim a lai honghilh sia/siamah tetung hi taleh thu hongnget sak te khempeuh tungah zong lungdam ingh. Hih gualzawhna pen Pasian minthan nading hita hen. Amen.Sangkah lai khempeuh tungah kong kam vaikhak nopin Pasian mah masak in, amahmah muang tawntung ding hi hang. Anihna ah Ngimna kician (Vision) neiding, ih Ngimna tawh kituak in hanciam ngiat ding, Ngimna om kei leh sepna khat peuh khat veivei ciang a mawkna suak thei hi. Ngimna neih ding mah thupi pen hi. Sanggam laizomte: (1) Rev Pau Thawn Za Thang + Don Som Kim (2) Lia Don Sian Dim Business Management (3 rd Years)(3) Lia Man Sian Kim B.A (Eng) Second Years (4) Lia Vung San Lian All-D (5) Lia Thang Lun Khai Grade IX.Topa’n hong lungkim pih leh siavuan sin in tua tawh Pasian nasep ding lunggulh pen ingh. Ka lungdam. Anu Siamah Lun: Pasian mah muang in. Pasian mah bel in. Pasian tawh kal suan khawm in. Ei&#8217;tha tawh bangmah piang zolo hi, ci-in naupangte thapiakna nei ungh. Tua tawh ki zui in Sansan in zong hanciam thei hi. A neu a kipan lai deih lai uk hi. A pa bangin &#8220;Lamet om hi, hoih hi, hanciam lai in, han ciam lai in&#8221; ci den pahtawi den phat den, thapia den hi. Kei bel khat vei khial leh &#8221; nang a bang ci&#8221; ci nuam pahpah thei ingh. Pasian a nasemte a tate hong ompihna hong muh sakna ahih manin lungdam ingh.
Tg Thawn Suan Muang
Cikha khua Pa Thang Suan Kham ( Hangzo)leh Nu Niang Khan Man (Hatlangh)te sung panin 1/11/1998 ni in cikha khua ah suak hi. Pawlpi pen Bethel Zomi Tuiphum Pawlpi, Kawlpi ahi hi. Omna inn pen (1/38) Thazin Hlan, Kawlpi hi. 2015-16 sang kumin SHS No(3) Kalemyo ah kah a, pilna sawm pen “Ciim Nuai” hi. Laivuan na tut na No. Sahkah-481 hi.Subject zui a mark ngah zah te, Myanmar -75, English -75, Methamatics -82, Chemistry -82, Physic -95, Biology -91 vekpi gawm 500 hi. Tu ciangciang mailam ah kazuih ding pen kangaih sut laitak hi a, ki sik omloh nading ngahsut kawmin thu kangen hi. Lungdam kohna: Amasa penin Pasian tungah lungdam pen ing. Nulehpa, sya te, leh hihciang dong hong tunpih hong pantah te khempeuh tungah zong ka lungdam. Tha hongpia hong hanthawn lawm te tungah zong lungdam ing. Tan 10 kah laiding te tungah kong hop sawn nopin lai sin laitak in sia te hong hilh khempeuh limtak ciamteh zo leng, ih sin kik ciang tampi tak nuamtuam hi. Lai pen ih sin te mangngilh kik loh nading revision hih zawh den ding hong hanthawn kawm nuam ing. All-D ngah nading subject kim old question peuhmah thei kim ding. Physics ka uk pen mah bangin definition leh formula teng lot ngah mang ding. Biology pen limsuih siam ding, lot ngah mang ding thupi hi. Chemistry zong definition leh objective lot ngah ngiat ding thupi hi. Sanggamteng: (1) Pa Lian Khan Khai, Matric, Malaysia, (2) Niang Khan Cing, Matric, USA, (3) Pau Suan Khual, Matric, USA, (4) Suan Sawm Tuang, Matric, BTh., USA, (5) Cing Muan Mang, Matric, Cikha, (6) Thawn Suan Muang, Matric, All-D, Kalaymyo, (7)Man Sian Nuam , Matric, Kalaymyo.
Lia Niang Sian Tawi Lun
Tongsial khua Pa Neng Khan Pau (B.A, G.T.I H.G.P) leh Nu Cing Khawm Nuam (B.A-Hist-Nursing) te sung panin 7.11.1998 in Kalemyo ah suak hi. Unau teng lakah zong a upapen ahi hi. Lia Cin Sian Suum, Lia Man Sian Sung, Tg Suan Sian Mung leh Lia Don Suan Muangte ahi hi. Pasian hehpih na tawh kaneu lai akipan class sungah 1 to 3 ka ngah zel hi. Kaneu akipan mahin matric ah All-D ngah ding ka lamet na leh ka thunget na hi a, ka lungdam mahmah hi. Kei pilna leh hanciam na bek tawh kangah zawh loh ding lam thei kahih manin Topa mah bel in vai khempeuh ka ap hi. Lungdam kohna:Tuni dong lam honglak hong makaih ih biak Pasian leh ka nu leh ka pa tung ah genzawh loh lungdam na kako nuam hi. Ka neu tung pan lai honghilh sia te tung lungdam ing. Tan 9/10 kakah na Thiha boarder pan siama nu Daw Nang Thida Aung leh sia khempeuh tungah lungdam ing. Thu hongnget sak sanggamte Pawlpi te tungah leh hong lungdam pih khempeuh tungah lungdam kako hi. Topan thupha hong pia kimciat ta hen. Vaikhak nopna: “Try your best, God will do the rest” hong ci nuam ing. Ih hanciam ding ei vaipuak hi a, gualzawhna hong pia ding pen Topa ahi hi. Haksatna lungkiatna buai na te na tuah khak leh Topa kiang ko in Topa bekin hong huh thei hi. Na sang lai bek mah simin laa, tupna ngimna tawh nasim nak leh nagual zo ding hi. Mailam ngimna: Ka neu akipan katup leh ka ut penin a lawhcing siavuan hi. Pasian in hong thukimpih leh zato siavuan nasep tawh genthei mizawng te pumpi lungsim lapsang ding leh Pasian lungdam sakin, minam a tawi sang zato siavuan khat hih ding ka lungtup hi. Sangkahna leh Subject mark te: Tan 8 dong Kalemyo ah, tan 9 leh tan 10 BEHS No (1) Dagon Yangon ah kah ingh. Subject zui in ka mark ngah te, Myanmar -75, English -77, Maths -94, Chemistry -91, Physic -96, Biology -93, vekpi gawm 526 ahi hi.Ka Pawlpi Leipi Baptist Church, omna Hermon inn, 76/6 Pinlone, Kalemyo. Sanggamteng: (1) Lia Niang Sian Tawi Lun, MC 1, Yangon, (2) Tg Cin Sian Suum, tan 10, Yangon, (3)Lia Man Sian Sung, tan 9, Yangon, (4) Tg Suan Sian Mung, tan 6, Kalay, (5) Don Suan Muang, KG, Kalay).

Sangkah na ding leh pilna hong deih sak amau hih theih tawp dong hong panpih ka nu leh ka pa tungah lungdam ko ingh. Deih sak na tawh lai hong hilh ka siate tungah lungdam ko ingh. Sangka kahpih ka lawmte tungah zong lungdam ko ingh. Lei tung mun tuamtuam pan Zomite&#8217;n hong lung dampih cih ka zak ciangin lungdam mahmah ingh. Pawlpi tung leh thu hong ngetsak khempeuh tung ah lungdam kong ko hi.

Definition khempeuh lot ngah ingh. Lim khempeuh ahoih pen ding suaih kasin hi. Sia te hong gen khempeuh leitu saklo in hoih takin kangai hi. Ka hanciam na tawh kizui in hongpiang thei ahih manin tha kangah mahmah hi. Ka pil ka siam man zong hi kei, lunggulhna tak tawh lai kasim manin Pasian in hong piak ahi hi. Subject zui a mat ngah te Burmese 80, English 75, Maths 98, Chemistry 93, Physic 80, Biology 84 hi a, avek pi gawm 510 ahi hi. Kapilna hi kei, kakum tawl lai pek akipan Siavuan bek hilo, Siavuanpi suak ding ka lunggulh luat man a, lai ahanciam ka hi hi cih hong pulak phapha nuam ingh. Lunggulhna, tupna, Ngimna, leh geelna (Vision) kisam mahmah hi. Dr Thawn Za Lian

Fisher Quartet Thu
Rev Gin Khaw Khai, Rev Thang Khan Suan, Rev Dai Khen Mang leh Evan Awn Sian Pau te tungtawn in “Fishers of Men Quartet” cih hong piang khia hi. “Ka nung hong zui in, mi man te kong suak sak ding hi.” (Mk 1:17) leh ka hin laiteng ka Pasian phatna la kasa ding hi. (Lt.104:35) bulphuh a hong piang khia ahi hi. Mi khempeuh in phatna la asak nop nading la aw man leh aw kim tawh asak theih nading, biakpiak na ah phatna athupit zia akitel semsem nading, khangno te in phatna leh Biakna ah nuam asak theih nading, phatna late hangin satan vangletna pan suakta a, damna leh lungnopna ngah nading deihna hi. Hih min “Fishers of Men Quartet” zong Rev Cin Khaw Khai Ph.D, California a Myanmar Full-Life Mission Church Pastor in aphuah sak ahi hi. Kawlgam sung State le Division tuamtuam ah kisam a, Gamdang pen Malaysia, Singapore, India gam Lamka leh Mi zoram, Philippine-Bagio ten ahunhun in sam in paizel uh hi. Hih bangin Topa phatna tawh mapan zawh kum 24 a cin ciang in yangon a Grace Music Institute in 22.1.2010 ni-in Pahtawina (Honorary Music Award) pia hi. West Bengal Bible College, Culcutta ah C.Th, B.Th zo hi. Tedim Bethel Bible College in B.C.Min pahtawina pia hi. Sakollam Pentecostal AG ah pastor sem a, Pawlpi inn 123, Pawlpi mi 500 kem hi. Rev Nang Suan Kham @ David Kham (DD)
Pa Thual Zam (Ngaihte) leh Nu Do Khua Nuam (Tanghau) te sung panin 23.11.1966 kumin Tedim Tsp, Buan khua ah suak hi. Pianpih laizom te (1) Dongh Khan Nenh Thang, (2) Pr. Zi leh tate: Pa Lam Za Tinh (S.E.O) leh Nu Lam Za Cing te ii tanu tumpen Sm Neam Kang tawh 16.6.2015 Thursday 7-8 P.M hunin Tedim khuapi Bethel AG biakinn pi ah Rev Dr Khai Khan Suan in siangtho kitenna tawh pumkhat suahna pia hi. Tu laitak in lia Nuam Sian Siam leh Lia Cing Sian Dim, tanu nih nei pan uh hi. Sangkah sung haksatna: Anu leh apate in pilna deihsak lua ahih manin tuktum khau phelliang, leitawi liangin sang kahsak. Sum zattawm ding haksa lua ahih manin loma pan piang alu peuh zuak tawmin sangkah. Tonsim (Champhai) leh Buan ni nih lampi ah anteh theipuam zuak tawmin namgimtui puasuk in zuakkik a, ngah sunsun tawh sangkah. Kigin (Sani) ni khat veivei cimbeng zongin zuak. Nuntak haksa ahih manin tan sawm ong mial mek. Tan sawm on khit 1988-1994: Nu leh pa nasep huh Apple cing, sum zong pai zong lawhcingna om ngei mahmah lo. 1989-90 kum khat val kum natin sihna limguam thuk pan Topan honkhia. 1990-93 kumli sung Buan Tuiphum pawlpi sungah lamakai leh khangno makai sem. TBAYF khangno makai thusinna kumsim in pai, ki lamdanna neilo ci-in apa phunzel. 1994 May kha leh June kha sung Khitui Gospel te zui, Sia Do Khup thugenna tungtawn in 1994 kum June kha 22 ni zankim laitak pianthakna bukim kha baptize na ngah. Pianthak khit lungdamna leh thuakna: Apianthak ciang anu leh pa lungdam mahmah. Tuiphum pawlpi upa ten thusit zel in atawpna ciang khangno makai pan tawpsak. Lehdona atam zahin David Kham pianthak akipan a innsung uh ah thupha ki lamdang. Anu leh pa nangawn khalna kipia in Tuiphum pawlpi pualam ah koihna thuak. Pianthak pan kipan a inn uh suang tawh kideng in suang tum bekbek kumkhat sungin hanbawm khat pha zel. Innkhum sikkang vanglet zihziah. Hakha khua ah zum nasep siau in interview pan kia zel. Ulian meltheih neite bekin ngah. Lamet ngamloh thupha 1: Hakha khuapi a om State Law Officer Pu On Za Nang in ama khutnuai ah lai-at sem sak. Hakha Ciimnuai Christian Fellowship ah kumli sung Choir leader sem. 1994-1996 Law Officer Pu On Za Nang khutnuai ah, 1996-98 Pu Kap Tial Khutnuai ah lai-at sem, sum tawh leizawh loh KHA thupha tampi ngah kha. Kumpi nasep sungin Pasian sapna (divine calling) ngah. 1998 April kha in kumpi nasep nusia in Laisiangtho sang kah ding yangon zuan. Lamet ngamloh thupha 2: 1998 pan 2003 dong laisiangtho sangkahna ah Dr. Chin Do Kham in kicing takin huh. Laisiangtho sangkah akipan Rev Dr Suan Za Pau in Word of Hope AG pawlpi in Youth Pastor sem sakin hun lang sia (parttime minister) semsak. 2001-2007 dong youth pastor asep sungin khangno member 15 pan 80 dong khang. Lamet ngamloh thupha 3: 8.4.2007 Sunday ni-in Olive Christian Church kipankhia. Pawlpi inn 3 tawh pawlpi thak kipankhia in 2015 kumciang inn 60, mimal 200 val. 2014 January kha in Kawlgam bup AG kipawlna pan siampi zaa (ordination) ngah. Pa Cin Za Hu Pau (Leng Tong Pauno)
Tuithang khua Pa Zel Khua Kai (Tunglut) leh Nu Ciang Khua Niang (Songput) Lailo khua te sung pan 23.8.1962 ni-in Sakollam ka innpi pan ka suak hi. Sanggam unau 11 lakah nautum pen pa a kongkhak pa ka hi hi. Tuithang khua ka hi a, ka tangval khiat na Tonzang kapian na Tedim hi. 25.6.1990 ni-in Kawlpi khua a teng Vangteh khua mi Lia Goih Khan Dim (Vangaw) tawh kiteengin tapa 3 kanei uh hi. Nu leh Pa’n Pau no hong ci uh a, Lengtong khui kabawl ciang Lengtong Pau no hong kici hi. Kum (8) ka phak in kei phuah tawm Pasian phatna la tom nono te Sunday School ah sasa ta ing. Love Song pen kum (11) kaphak in “Nungak talpi khat a ma theih loh kal in” “Na min thei vang lo lo nuam ingh” cih phuak ta zen ingh. Ka ngaihsut kik ciang kamai zum. 1981 kum ciang lakhum ka kipan a, Studio bel Lynn Studio Yangon hi. Ka laphuak pongpong dawng 200 val khawng hi-in, Studio ah dawng 60 khawng kisa khin hi. Khui pen lawm te tawh kasak khop uh Lengtong No 1,2,3, leh mi tawh kihel lo kei guak sak khui 3 khawng bek hi pan hi.Zomi sungah komai a lakhum masa katheih khialhl kei leh Rev Lian Bawi makaih “Agape itna Late”, T.S.Khai makaih “Sihna kigo zo” leh U Lanh Cin te’ khum “Kumpi te kumpi” cih bang thei ingh. Khui hawm sate sung pan Lengtong 5 na “Zogam hong paal ding” thangah pen ingh. Lengtong No.1 sunga “Tun sung khat pan” cih a phuak tak pen Lengtong ci ziau ni kacih sa uh hi. Tulai Zomi khangno te hampha kasa mahmah hi. Gamdang pan music degree ngah te ih nei ta hi. Ih gamah music sang ih nei ta hi. Modern Style tuamtuam tawh la kiphuak, kisa, kitum ta cih kamuh ciangin ka lungdam lua a, kamai bang zum kik hi. Pilna siamna neilo tuam niam khat adding hih ciang la kasak theihna pen ka Nu leh Pa tungtawn a hong luang Pasian thupha letsong taktak hi cih pen up cihtak um ingh. La kaphuah teh a “AW” (Tune) zong masa ing. Tua La aw pen tam veipi sasa in, mau mau leng….tua aw tawh kilawm kituak ding La thu/ La mal hong piangkhia hi. Tua La tam veipi sasa in, lamal gualh dan te zong puahpha toto lai ing. Zingsang thawh tung thudang lading hong lut ma in enkik leng hoih pen hi. Ka kammal zat te Za la kam a maan hiam? Midang te a sukha hiam? Ka la kammal te hang zum kong mang kong ka tung thei diam? Cih bang in sittel khit ciang Studio ah khum theih dingin kakip sak hi. Zomi sungah La tungtawn in ki khangto mahmah a, mailam ah khangto lailai ding hi. Leitung mun tuamtuam pan hong khangkhia ding Zovontawi te kam leh muk (Leii) te zong La mah tawh ih kepsak (control) kul ding hi. Ih taang ngeina paunak leh La kam te zong La sung mahah kepcing a, khangthak mono te’ zaktheih leh lunglut theih ding in music leh La tawh a mangthang sa zomi te hong kikai khawmkik ding hi cih pen ka sun mang ahi hi. Zomi Siamsin Magazine Volume-1, 2005 Kalay University pan kitom lak hi.

Lia Zam Neih Cing ( Zam Nu )
Pa Pum Za Kap leh Nu Don Lam Cing te sung panin 30.7.1980 ni-in suak hi. Nu leh pa tawh unau 6 ka pha uh a, ka innkuan un mi 8 ka om uh hi. Ka Pawlpi pen Grace Assembly of God ahi hi. Ka inn uh pen Taih-14, Akhan 18, Bhahoshi inn ahi hi.Laa tawh kisai in ka neu tung kum 4 kaphak lim a ka-uk ahi hi. Sunday school ah zong solo ka sa den hi. Music zong ka u nau un uuk lua ka hih man un nulehpa in hong kham lo in tha hong pia aa, ka pa in Biakna laa &#8220;Tuh Niza neh Tu&#8221; cih laa hong khumsak ngei hi. Kum 13 kaphak ciang laa sak ding ut lua nuam sa lua kahih manin laa khui khempeuh ngai in ka sin pah hi. A zawdeuh in mang laa te ka kantel zaw hi.Hih ciang ka tun theih nading in hong makaih ka sia te in sia U Saw Nuh leh Siama Dim Kham te ahi hi. Laa ki phuak te ih et ciang Pasian biak na laa, gam it na laa, leh zawl laa (Love song) te hi a, sak dan thuak dan zong a tuam tek ahi hi. Biak na laa ih sak ciang in pumpi, lungsim, kha tawh ki ap kawm in ki sa hi a, biak na laa te thu thuk vive ahih manin a zaa a ngai te ading ki lamthak na a piang ding a kisa ahi hi. Laa dang te pen lungsim leh pumpi tawh kha paa lo a kisa leh deihsakna bulphuh a kisa ahi hi. A thupi pen in ih laa sak khempeuh lungtang sungah thuakna tawh saleng hoih pen ding leh kha in nasem pen dingin un ingh. Studio ka lut tungin ka dip kua in, khuasik mul hong tho hi. Tua panin nopna daihna hong lut kik hi. Aw a siat loh nadingin ki kepkul aa, tuikhal, coffee, niangtui leh tuikhum khempeuh tankul hi. Ih aw hoih nading leh a sian nading in nikhat nai lang ta bang sinkul hi. Zingsang thawh tungin huih dikdan leh aw sian nading laa sak sin leng hoih pen hi. Laa sak bek hilo in laa phuah zong ka uk hi. Gamsung gampua ah laa siam kei pahtaak deuh te in Mariah Carey, Beyonce leh &#8220;Yin Nwe Win, Le Le Win, Tin Za Maw&#8221; te ahi hi. Khang thak te tungah kong vaikhak nop penin laa siam ding na ut leh hoihtak sinin la kan in. A bulpi ahi melody, beat te theih loh phamawh hi. A lunglut te adingin hahkat takin sin in cih tha kong pia nuam hi. Topan “Huu” hong kop lai teng Topa phatna laa kasa ding hi. GMI pan kikhum “Lei mong dong in” cih sung pan ka lungsim hong sukha penin (Holy) cih ahi hi. Huu sang thei khempeuh in Topa phat un Laisiangtho in ci ahih manin, Topa phat nopna ih neih ding leh Topa hong piak aw ahoih pen tawh Topa ih phat ciat nading kong hanthawn nuam hi, Lungdam.
Lasak siam Thawn Kham
Pa Thang Thawn Kham pen Ton zang khua Pa Kham Khan Pau (Samte) leh Nu Zen Ngaih Cing (Bawmkhai)te sung panin 11.3.1971 ni-in Tonzang khua ah suak hi. 16.9.2006 ni-in Nu Dim Ngaih Lun tawh kiteeng a, Pasian piak thupha tapa 3 leh tanu 2 nei uh hi. Pianna Zuapa 27.7.1977, pianna Tuun nu’n 3.6.2011 hong nusia hi. Sangkahna: -Tan lang pan tan 10 dong SHS Tonzang 1991-92 kum Matric (tan 10) zo.1994 kumin B.A (Psychology) First year zo inzom nawnlo hi.1992-93 kum SHS Tonzang ah PAT (Zolai sianeu) kumkhat sem hi.-1994 kum akipan uk na tawh kizui in Yangon tuak suk a, (May Studio) ah sem hi. 1997 kum ciang ii Home Studio thak ah Studio kipat sak hi. 1999 pan December Studio ah 2002 dong sem hi. 1995 kumin Kawlla (Love song) dawng khatin 5000 (tul nga) in hong lei a, tua pan tuni dong hong kilei toto suak hi. Ukna (Hobbies) : i) Vasa ben. Ngasa ben. Sa ben uk ing. ii) Ka nun taak pih ukna bel Music hi. La khui bawl te: -1999 kumin “Itna ngaihna” (Tape) kabawl aa, Zogam leh Zomi ong phong mahmah ahih manin sum hongsik ih Topa leh Zua Siam tetung lungdam ka ko hi. -2001kum in “(Tape) kabawl aa, tuni dong ki sasa lai hi. -2003 kumin “Thangho lehLiando” (Tape) kabawl aa, ong kideih sak bilbel hi. -2005 kum ciang tawh ka late uh (Duet-) in Chin huam lasa minthang te tawh kabawl thei hi. -2009 kum ciang “Live in Zomi” cih Live Video kabawl hi. -2014 kum ciang “ CD, DVD kabawl thei hi. -Pasian phatna la khui tuamtuam ah zong ka kihel kawikawi thei hi.-Kawl la Zo la ka la phuah vekpi tuni ciang dawng (100) kim phata hi.Pasian leh Zomite itna tawh 2006-Lamka, 2007-Malaysia, 2008-Germany, 2009-Malaysia, 2010-USA, 2011-Malaysia+ Singapore khuapi te ah Zogam leh Zomi itna late ka va sa thei hi. Lungdam kohna: Tu ciang ka innkuan nuntakna (Music) nasep hi aa, Pasian leh Zomi te vang ahi hi. Ka inn ka lo ka sai te uh pen USA a om mipih te hongguat ahi hi. A nai a gamla a om Zo mipih te Pasian in cidamna, daupaina, gualzawhna hong pia kim ta hen. “Tonzang ah kapiang aa, Tonzang ah kiteeng hi.” GZC pan dotna leh dawnna: GZC Q1. Laphuah/Lasak lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Nong genthei ding hiam? TK: La phuah pen 1986 kum pawl pan ki pan hi ngel ning. &#8212;&#8212;&#8212; GZC Q2. Zomi sung kawlla, mangla leh minam dangte i la vasak pihthei le va tumpih theiding ih neih na angtang hiam? TK: Ei aa ih zawh khit teh namdang te&#8217; aa ih bat toh zawh leh gual tung tuang hi hang. &#8212;&#8212;&#8212; GZC Q3. La/Music/Note nang i idea ngiat tawh nagelh gei hiam, Na lasak/laphuah/ lakpan hoih nasak pen in bangla? TK: Ka late Recording bawl teh keima idea vive tawh ka bawl hi khin cih theih hi. (Kawlla/Zola), A hoih pen hih hi cih tuam ding thei lo. &#8212;&#8212;&#8212; GZC Q4. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam ah music lam ki khangto theiding? TK: Music sung ah Itna. Veina, Thuakna le Siantho na cihte nungta leh. &#8212;&#8212;&#8212; GZC Q5. Music tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. TK: Music pua lam tawh ki sai ah bel gen theih luat hau keng. Angsung bek ki khual lo ding. Pasian thu zui vive ih teh ih piak khiat na te&#8217; a zah tampi ngah ding bek lam en aa pia lo ding. Mizawng genthei te huh in&#8217; en ding. Ci ni ei. Lungdam. &#8212;&#8212;&#8212; GZC :- Kohzong nakpitak lungdam lua ei maw, kahun geelte uh hong picinh nahih manin, mailam ah na kalsuan na, nasep, nabawl khatpeuh ah Zomi te a laamsang zo semsem dingin hong lamzangh toto laita in. Na Zomi pihte in hong angtang lua ungh ei maw. &#8212;&#8212;&#8212; SOURCE: Global Zomi Celebrity pan Facebook Page
Tg Thang Sian Sang @Sangpi
Rev Cin Khan Thang leh Nu Hau Khan Ciin te tanu tapa 5 lakah aneu pen hi a, 20.12.1983 kumin suak hi. Ka Pawlpi pen Hallelujah AG ahi hi. Music cihna gawm ka theih ma in laa ka-uk khin hi. Ka laa phuah masak pen bang kum 15 ka phak lai hi ci-in ka thei hi. Ka u nun biakinn ah asak ding a ka phuah sak hi a, Isaiah 46 na sung ahi hi. Ka laa phuah vekpi bel dawng 200 val ta hi. Laa ka phuak ciangin a tam zaw a aw ka zong masa hi. Khat veivei lamal leh laa aw hong pai khawm aa, asak kik ki nung thuah hi. Kei phuah te lakah “APhe Yeh EiZeih MimiKhe” sak pen bang Daw Sung Thin Par inn pan ciah lampi ah line car tung pan 2003 kumin kaphuah hi. Laa dawng khat phuah nading minute 15-30 bang asawt om a, a kum akha a ki zolo zong om hi. Phatna leh Biakna laa hoih ih cih te a phuak laitak Pasian kha tawh kidim in Sathau nilh na ngah te in phuak leh hoih pah lel in um ingh. Love song te leh gam it na laa te zong a phuak laitak veina, thuakna leh lungtang dimin itna honglut ciang phuak leh hoih lel ding hi.Rev David Suum in GMI ah huhna hong nget ciang kha guk sung khong laa hilh ding a hong pai hing. GMI te khat veina Series “MiKyi SohTaing&#8221; pen a phuak leh a sa kahih manin hoih sa lel ing. “YongKyi Chin Mi Eain&#8221; zong kanawh phuah mahmah te khat hi. Upna pen mei inn tawh genteh in ih upna ih mitsak loh ding deihna hi. Meivak bang a ih kep ih dop ding deihna hi. Hih ciang ka tun nading midang lawm te bangin sia leh hong makaih taktak om lo in, Pasian bekmah hi. A tung lamin ka u in Guitor hong hilh hi. Laa siam te hong pai ciang hong zol hi. Ka lungkiat ciang tha hong pia hi. Kum 16-17 ka phak kum (2000-2001) kum laa sak ka kipan hi. “Anet Shaingson Chit meettu“Takhin a tuat ” Series ah kasak masak pen ahi hi. Pasian in thupha hongpia in, laa phuak ding leh a sa dingin sathau hong nilh ahih manin ka lungdam hi. Music tawh ki sai kei muhna ah Pasian pen phat ngai Pasian hi. Aging thei khempeuh tawh phat ding hi cih mu ing. Kei zong Gospel music lamah hong saplam katel hi. Pawlpi pawlkhat te in music zang lo hi. Tua te lakah ka kihel sawm kei hi. Topa in huh ong kop lai teng music tawh Pasian kaphat ding hi. Na khempeuh ahoih lamin ih zat theih ding thupi hi. Tu laitak in YMCA Hall zang in Pawlpi Topan hong kipan sak hi. Laa phuak lasa bek hilo in Pawlpi mi hongpia hong makaih hi. Tha hong pia un, tha la khawm ni, kei a dingin a tawntung in thu hong nget sak un, Pasian minthan na dingin Pasian in vision hong piak te sepzawh nading thu hong nget sak un. Ka lungdam. GMI –Magazine 2008 pan ki la hi.
Pa En Lam Cin
Gawngmual khua Pu Kham Tuan (Naulak) leh Pi Vung Za Cing (Tonsing) te sung pan 2.8.1949 in Tedim khuapi ah suak hi. Sanggam laizom 11 lakah pasal 6 leh numei 5 pha uh hi. (1) Lia Ngem Za Man (Township Co-operative Officer-TCO), (2) Pa En Lam Cin + Nu Man Khan Dim, (3) Pa Lang Do Khup B.Sc (Physic) + Nu Cing Ngaih Don, (4) Pa Pau Khan Khup + Nu Nuam Lam Cing, (5) Lia Hau Khaw Niang (pipi), (6) Nu Ciang Lian Cing + Captain Gin Za Mung, (7) Pa Thang Suan Lian (Lianpi) + Nu Vung Za Vai, (8) Lia Niang Lam Vung B.Sc (Chem), (9) Pa Gin Khan Suan B.Sc (Chem) + Nu Cin Lam Lun, (10) Pa Khup Sian Tuang + Nu Mang Sian Neam, (11) Rev Niang Khan Ciin B.A (Hist), B.Th, M.A (Bible). Zi leh ta: Tonzang khua pa Gin Khan Do tanu Syamah Man Khan Dim (UDC) Co-operative tawh kiteeng a, tanu 3 leh tapa 1 nei hi. (1) Nu Cing Gah Lun B.Th, M.Div (Bangalore), (2) Nu Ciin Sian San, (3) Nu Man Dot Lian B.Th (Bangalore), (4) Tg Tuan Thawn Mung (music). Nasepna: 1960 kum pan Zomi khangno sungah guitar nidang tumdan leh tuhun a chord tuamtuam tawh tum masa pawl lakah “Lam Cin” minthang masa pen hi. A innkuan phial un tumging siam uh a, anu leh pa zong uk uh hi. A mau inn sung pan Mandolin, Benjo, Jugalele, Double bass leh guitar kinak tum mahmah a, khangno atamzaw te kipattah na munkhat ahi hi. Lam Cin makaihna tawh “Myomah Turiya Group” phuankhia a, Zomi sungah amasa pen hi. Atum khoppih te in (1) Pa Zen Za Dal (2) Pa Kam Za Mung te hi deuh hi. Lengtong Band: Tedim ah music Band tuamtuam hong om a, “Lengtong Band” hong picing leuleu hi. Zawlla khum cilna hi a, Go Hau (Lead), Suamang (Bass), Pau Thawn (Drum) hi a, lasa Kam Khen, Pauno, Go lian te ahi hi.
Pa Gin Suan Cin (Cinpi)
Tonzang khua Pa Thawng Khan Thang leh Nu Nian Do Cing te sung panin 4.5.1968 kumin ka suak hi. Nu Cing Khan Lun (Nursing) tawh kiteeng in tanu Lia Cing Sian San Lun kanei uh hi. Sanggam numei Ngai Deih Lun leh Makpa Nang Zam Cin leh a tapa Tg Thang Sian Za Khual leh kanau pa Tg Khen Kim Siing tawh ka om uh hi. Ka Pawlpi pen Roman Cathoric (RCM) ahi hi. Music tawh kisai in 1977 kum tanli kakah lai pek ka-uk ahi hi. A tung lamin nu leh pa ten hong awi khollo hi. A sawt lam ciangin keiuk na ahih manin hong tel siam aa, tha nakpi tak in hong pia hi. Music pen kakhan sungah ka-uk mahmah khat bek ahih banah Pasian in kaki vak nading a hong deihsak leh hong piak Talent hi ding ci-in ka um hi. Ka sia masa te in U Eddie Kyaw leh Salai Za Lyan (The Aces) te ahi hi. Lazy Club Band adin suak theih nading ukna kibang lawm te tawh 1986 kum kapat uh ahi hi. T.V Programe ahih leh gualnopna dan in ka kipat mawk uh ahi hi. A sawt ciangin mopawi khong, anvak na pawi tuamtuam khong ah tum kawikawi in 1992 kumciang Pu Daly Thein Than ii Series panin music lamah lut in akip suak ka hi hi. Studio pen hunlak mahmah kul aa, Create bawl khit ciang tum theih hunsawt kingah hi. Live Show ahih leh On the Spot ahih manin muhna theihna siamna te kisam mahmah hi. Laa dawng khat pen mipi lunglut nadingin leh lungsim sukkhak nadingin lawptakin tumding ahi hi. Hih ciang dinmun katun nadingin nisim nai 2 ta bang kasin ahi hi. Lazy Club Band sung panin VCD, leh Tape khui te 200 val ka hawmkhin uh hi. Band khat peuhpeuh ah, kipawl khawmin ih tum ciangin sum leh paai ngah nading bek hilo in, music it pha mahmah a, lungsim pumpi gawmkhawm in sepkhopna in a thu pipen dingin ka um hi. Pawlpi kici peuhmah in tumtheih khempeuh tawh Topa phat aa, ih biak ding adeih ahi hi. Pasian hong piak letsong ahih manin Pasian deihna mun khempeuh ah kihel ding kaki ap na hi. A gual zo tumging siam khat ih suah nadingin a thupi pen in music pen uk mahmah aa, ih it ngiat ding Topan deih hi. Gamsung gampua ah ka pahtak pen leh ka deih pen in Eric Chapton(Guitor), Nathan East (Bass), leh Pu Za Lyan (Bass) te ahi hi. Hih ciang Topan hong laptoh nading tha hong pia leh phut khak te in 1984 kum tan 10 ka on lai in ka pa leh (pa no Richard Suan pi) in Hallow Guitor khat hong leisak hi. Ka lawm hoih Ko Maung Maung tung zong ka lungdam hi, tha hongpia hong makaih hong huh tawntung khat hi. Ka inn kuanpih te tungzong ka lungdam hi, hong telsiam in tha hong pia hi. 1992 kum lungdam bawl zan vahna ah zan 6 sung Pasian phatna ah music ka tum manin tua hun pan tuni dong nuntak nading in music a tum ka hi hi. GMI – Magazine 2008 pan kila hi.
Pa Cin Khan Pum (Bo Cin)
Buanman khua Pa Siing Za Ngo leh Nu Ciang Pum te sung panin Maymyo khua ah suak hi.Mandalay pan khangkhia in Yangon ah music lam na sem hi. Ka neu lai kum 5 kaphak pan kipan Maymyo ah ka om lai pek in Guitar ka uk mahmah hi. Mandalay katun uh ciangin zong Guitar tum kawikawi ing. Mandalay khua sung a om Band minthang khempeuh ah tum ngei ingh. Ka ciapteh sunsun Shell cih Band te khempeuh ah tumngei ingh. Mandalay pan ka lawm te cih te in Yangon ah la a khum uh ciangin Emperor pan Ko Zaw Myo Htut, Ko Maung Maung Lwin te tawh kizom ingh. Tua hun pan kipan Emperor Band tawh kipawl in Series tampi tak leh Stage Show tampi tak tum ingh. Tua khit teh Band pantawpin ka uk mahmah music tawh kisai mah semsem ing. Tu laitak in Plus Three Music Band ah ka tum laitak hi.Zomi khangthak te leh momno tetung ah konggen nop pen in, Zo minam mimal tawm mahmah lak pan Pasian in hih ciangdong hong lamsang to, Pasian min nakpi takin kaphat masa hi. Ei zomi te sung pan music uk momno te kahih zawhzah in hong panpih nuam mahmah ing. Hih pen ka lungsim tawng pan a konggen hi. Bass Guitar bek zong hilo, music tawh kisai na theihnop uh, nongdot nop uh a om leh katheih zahzah konghilh nuam hi. Tu laitak in No.35/37, First Floor, 53 St, Botataung Towhship, Yangon ah kazi Man Suan Hung leh ka tanu Esther Kaang Thian Neam leh anau tawh khazih sungah nuamtak in om ung cih tawh hong vaikhak nuam ing. Topa tung leh Zomi khempeuh tungah lungdam mahmah ing. Cin Khan Pum (Bo Chin) Email: Esther Kaang@gmail.com Ph.095062806,0943119882. Salai Kam Za Lian ( Victor Raj )
Dr. Raj (India) leh Nu Vung Khaw Mang (Thuklai) te sung pan 1950 kumin, a pa in Falam Zatopi ah Siavuan asep laitak in Falam ah suak hi. Yangon St. Paul sangpi (Tulaitak BEHS No.6 Botataung) pan tan sawm azawh khit ciangin Yangon University ah Chemistry tawh B.Sc degree ngah hi. Tua banah GTI zom suak in a sangkah sung a kipan Guitar lam ah nasia tak in pan la hi. Myanmar Music Award 2014 (MMA) vaihawm na tawh Kawlgam bup ah Tumging Music siamna lam tawh a teek dong a uk a seem tepahtawina (Life time Achievement Award 2014 piakna pen 20.2.2015 ni-in Yangon khuapi ah thupitak kinei a, Kawlgam ah music band minthang masa khat a hi ACES Music Band ah Bass Guitarist pu Victor Kam Za Lian (a) Pu Za Lian (Kum 64) in Lifetime Achievement Award 2014 Trophy leh sum tang Ks. 50000 ngah hi. A kipat cil in “The EIF” Bass Guitarist, tua khit teh “The ACES” ah tum leuleu in, tulaitak in “Freelance” Guitarist ahi hi. 16.1.1971 ni-in Nu Kam Khan Huai tawh kiteeng a, Topan tanu khat leh tapa khat pia hi. A tapa min Maku hi a, tanu min Gloria ahi hi. Tulaitak in No.44, Thazin Street (3) Pyaukkone, Cheihkaloh, Mingaladone Myone ah teeng hi.
Sia Gin Za Kai
3.6.1929 kumin Tonzang Myone Phaisat khua ah suak hi. 28.12.1949 kumin Galkap lut in 2 nd Chin Battalion ah kipuak pah hi. 1957-1967 kum 10 sung vilvel Track Field (Hurdle) kantehkan leh tai kidemna ah South East Asia Peninsular Games ah Kawlgam tangin (Burma Selected) in kiteel in kimawl hi. Hang Khan Kap

Mang Lian Siing

Lian Pau
Thuklai suan, Suum Niang tuu, Lunteng bawng Pu Hang Ko Kam leh Pi Cingh Zam te tapa neupen hi. Bawlung no sat siam ahih manin Army Selected bek hi in Burma Tennis Selected dong kitel a, Sea game ah Kawlgam tangin 1969-74 dong kimawl in China (Sen) gam zong pai hi. Sya Lian Ngo tanu Nu Uap Za Neam tawh kiteeng a, tapa 4 nei hi. U Lian Pau in hong nusia khin a, a inn kuanpih te tu in kalemyo ah teeng hi. (1) Pa Kam Suan Kap, (2) Pa Go Khan Khai, (3) Pa Lian Lam Cin, (4) Pa Thang Khat Pumte hi. Bawhlung Suihsiam Suan Lam Mang
Min: Suan Lam Mang Kham khua: Tonzang မြို့နယ် Mualpi khua Suahni: 28-7-1994 Lai pilna: Tan 9 Pianna Tuun le Zua min: &#8211; Niang hau vung ( Nu ) &#8211; Dai Lian Khup ( Pa ) Pianpih laizom te: -Lang Cin Thang -Dim Ngaih Niang -Suan Lam Mang ( my self ) -Cing Sian Muang Innkuannu min : Ciin Sian Deih Lian Cing LST mun: Paunak 3:5 GZC Q1. Bawhlung lam na kidiah zawh asawt ta na. Bang in hong uksak hiam, Krabi Football Club a dingin match bangzah sui kha ta, Krabi na zop ma in Club dang a dingin na sui ngei hiam, cih nong genthei ding hiam? SM- Hong sawt pian ta mah ei, kum 11 bang hita cileng Bawlung bel kaneu tung a ki pan ka uk hi in bang in hong uksak cih lian om kei. Krabi a dg in bel puai nga sui khin, Club dang a ding zong sui ngei mah ing ei. GZC Q2. Zomi bawhlung suih uk tampi lak pan nang zah in gampua ah pusuak in gamdang te ii club nangawn ah a kihel zo om nailo cileng, Hi ciang dong na tun theihna dingin haksatna na phu kha hiam, kua in tha hong pia in hong sponsor cih nong gen thei tam? SM- Hi ciang dong ka tung zawh nang a tha hong pia ka Nu leh kapa, tua ciang in ah sia Do Khan Khup in zong tha hong pia, kei leh kei zong TOPA tung pan in tha la ing. GZC Q3. Zomi te koici kalsuan leng mailam hun ah thu le laa khatpeuh ah ki khangto theiding? SM- Zomi te pen ki pumkhat peuh leng ki khangto in um pen ing. GZC Q4. Nang mah bangin Zomi sungah, ki vakna a nei pawlkhat minam dangte ii la vasak pihthei, va tumpih theiding leh namdang te ii ka (movie) sung nangawn ah kihel thei ding ih om na angtang hiam? SM- Angtang pih lua mhmh in tua dan a Zomi sung ah mi tam pi E om zawh dg zg lung guih mhmh lai in. GZC Q5. Bawhlung ( Football ) tawh a kisailo na gennop khatpeuh hong luikhia dingin hong thuum ungh. SM- Ei omom na ah TOPA Pasian mahmah thupi sak pen ni, Ei deih na bang in gam ta lo zaw in Topa deih na bang in gamtat zo sawm ni. Ka lung dam, Topa thu pha GZC Tanute: Manlah, buai pipi mahtawh na hun manpha hong khenkhia teta nahih manin nang sangsang in koh lungdam zaw ung. Mailam ah nasinna, nasep, na kalsuanna ding te ah hong lamzang toto lai in maw.
Pa Pau Sian Sang (Phu Koko Thein)
Sia Thang Khan Mang

(Myone Ciang). 1962-1963 Hmawbi District leh Insein District te ah kimawl hi. 1964 kum ciang (A le pai tai sit tha nah choh) Bawlung Team ah a siam pen leh a hoih pen pahtawina ngah hi. 1964 kumin Burma Army Selected pan Burma Selected Team First Line up in hong kiteel hi. Pa En Khan Gin

Tate: (1) Pa Dal Lian Sang MBA + Nu Lyin Lyin, (2) Tg Nang Tun Kim Khai M.A (Politics Social of Science ) USA.(3) Tg Dal Sian Suum Matric SHS Mandalay.(4) Lia Esther, Vung Sian Nem Grade IX Mandalay.(5) Lia Merry, Dal Sian Cing Grade IV Mandalay. Nasepte: “Lainatna Ministry” Pasian lamlahna tawh 1997 April kha in kipan hi. Laisiangtho bulphuh Nehemaih 2:18 hi a, Zomi u leh nau khua leh tui te zawngin genthei mahmah kawm kal ah hell khuk tung lai ding cih Topan veisak in musak hi. Pa Piang Suan Mung
Pian na leh khan khiat na: Suante beh, Suanman khang 14 na, Suangpi khua Hausa Pa Ngin Thang leh Nu Ngul Cing te nupa sung pan u nau numei pasal 9 lak pan a 7 na hi in 23.6.1956 ni in Suangpi khua ah suak Zi neih ding pasal neih ding mang ngilh zah dong phial liang aa Tapidaw inn kuan nuam sung pan khang khia . Suangpi Youth Organization ( SYO) leh Khuano Youth Association ( KYA) ki pawl khop n ate pen ka khua theih aa ki pan tu ni ciang dong ka nun tak pih ngiat ki pawl n a te a hi hi. Sangkah laisin nate: 1968 kum in Suangpi SPS pan Zolai tanli zo, 1971 kum in Phunom SMS pan tan 7 zo, 1973 kum in Tedim No(1) SHS pan tan 8 ka zo hi. 1975 kum in Agricultural High school, Lungpi pan tan 10 zo in 1982 kum in, Institute of Agriculture Yezin pan B.Ag degree ka ngah hi. 1992 kum in MIT (Insein) pan BRE ka zo hi. 2004 kum in Child Friendly School Education, training course pen Bangkok pan ka zo hi. International level training course leh e-learning course tuam tuam certificates 100 val ngah khin . Kumpi sung na sep nate: 1982-1987 ciang Myanmar Agriculture Service( MAS),Kayah gam ah 1987-1990 ciang Sagaing Region, tua khit ciang in Seed Division zumpi Yangon ah 1994 December ciang ka sem hi. Kum 10 sung MAS ah ka sep khit ciang in Assistant Supervisor post tawh kum pi na sep na pan tawp khuan ka ngah hi.United Nations ( ) sung na sep nate:1997 kum in Khamtung gam ah ( ) UNDP,UNOPS/CDRT project zum pi a phut khia te sung ah ka ki hel hi. 2000 kum ciang Thantlang, Hakha khuapi te ah Human Development Officer leh Area Logistic Officer te sem. 2001 March tha in UNICEF Field zumpi Kalemyo ah phut ding in tavuan hong pia. Chin State, north-western part of Sagaing Region-Naga land dong leh western part of Magwe Region gam teng ah Project Officer, M E Officer, Resident Programme Officer posts te tawh kum 13 bang tavuan khan sem in UNICEF programme na sep na tuam tuam te van kawi kawi hi.2013 ,October tha pan UNICEF Kale Field zumpi pen Hakha khua pi ah a ki tuah ciang in International Staff ( gamdang mi tavuan khan ) khat hong tung in tu ni dong ciang Health Nutrition Officer post tawh Hakha UNICEF Field Office ah ka sem hi. (UNICEF) tawh na sep khop na pawl khat: UNICEF in khuapi khat dawnding tui ( water supply ) tawh ki sai 3 vei huh na a piak pen Tedim khuapi a hi hi (1986, 2002 leh 2006 ).2003 kum in UNICEF Country Office, Yangon zum pi in Daw Aung San Su Kyi ( DASSK) sam in UNICEF na sep n a te gen pih na ki nei hi. DASSK in khua neu no no aa naupang te cidam na leh pil na lam tawh ki sai thu thuk tam pi tak dong ziah ziah mawk hi. A pil dan leh a thu ngaih sut zia te bel ngaih sut zawh loh zah dong ciang ding inin sang lua mah mah hi. Thu ki kup na a man khit teh DASSK kiang ah pai in ka cih leh DASSK in Ci in mi pi zak ding in hong ci sei sai mawk in nak pi tak in ka ki ang tan pih mah mah hi. Daw Su Su Lwin (Union President Pa ii Zi ) leh Dr. Tin Mar Aung te pen UNICEF zumpi ah Education Specialist a sep sung uh in Education project vai tawh Khamtung gam ah khual zin khawm ngei in a mau tung pan pil na leh khan toh na ding thu hoih tam pi tak ka sin thuah thei hi. UNICEF-TBC tawh a ki sem khawm EXCEL education poject zong Dr. Tin Mar Aung ii vai hawm siam na tawh a ki sem project khat a hi hi. UNICEF in TBC GS Rev. Isaac Zen Thawng leh KVBA GS Rev. Cin Lian Sum te tawh a ma sa pen Child Protection, Awareness Raising and Community Mobilization Project 1.8.2007 pan 31.7.2008 dong sep khop ding agreement ki nei khawm aa tua project tawh ki sai Tedim gam sung ah a ki zang khem peuh Ks. 296629050/ leh KVBA tung tawn in Kale township aa ding Ks. 163746000/ &#8211; ki zang khia hi.TBC tawh 2010 dong ki zom to pai suak in EXCEL project pen 2009-2013 ciang ki sem khawm hi. KMSS tawh Tedim gam ah 2007-2013 dong ECCD na sia tak in ki sem khawm hi. Hih project na sep sung in Pa Hang Za Thawn ( U Thawn No) leh Project Coordinator a sem a hi Pa Dam Khaw Nang ( TBC) leh Rev. Khoi Lam Thang ( KVBA) te tawh ma pang in n a ki sem khawm hi. TBC GS Rev. Thang Go Khup leh ZBCM GS Rev.Kham Suan Mung te in UNICEF tawh Maternal Child Health project pen 1.8.2007 pan 31.7.2008 dong khut ki len aa ma pang khawm ding lung kim na 2.4.2009 in nei khawm uh hi.ZBC GS Rev. Thawng Kaam leh TBC GS Rev. Isaac Zen Thawng te in UNICEF tawh Facts For Life leh ECCD projects te lung tuak tak aa sep khop ding 27.7.2007 in Hakha City ah lung kim na nei khawm thei hi. Ms. Carroll Long, Representative, UNICEF Myanmar October,2005 lai in Tedim hong zin hi. Tedim AD zum pi mai ah Kaptel Hausa Pa tawh a ki muh teh UNICEF in Kaptel khua ii dawn ding tui ( water supply) tawh ki sai huh na piak ding kam ciam pia pah lian hi. Tua hun lai in UNICEF in a ki tang sap mah mah na tung tawn in water supply tawh ki sai khua pawl khat ah huh na pia uh hi. 2006 kum December ni 9 ni in UNICEF te makaih na tawh Child Survival Project na sep n a te e n ding huh na a pia mi hau gam te ii Ambassadors/ Counsellors 10 ( USA, EU, Australia, Japan, Denmark, Singaore …) te Tedim leh Tuithang khua ah hong zin uh hi. Pa Vung Suan Pau leh Nu Ciin Zam te inn kuan in a vek uh in a inn uh tung sak uh hi. Sial ngawh in Tedim khua Nu khua Pa te leh Pawlpi tuaum tuam pan Pastors te tawh ni tak an kuang um khawm pih in thu ki kup na neih pih uh hi. Zo ngei na laam tuam tuam lak in Zolam in ki lam ngui khawm pih uh hi. CMBC te in Haleluizah Chorus laapi tawh Biak inn tual pan muak uh aa Tuithang khua te in Zomi te nun tak zia leh Zongei na tuam tuam lak in holim khop na n a sia pi tak in neih pih thei uh hi. Zomi khangno pawlkhat in Embassies zum tuam tuam tawh ki zop na hoih hong nei tuam thei uh hi. Representative, UNICEF Country Office, Myanmar in Pa Vung Suan Pau tung ah nau pang te aa ding na lian pi ma pang aa nong s ep khop pih na tung tawn in PAHTAWINA lai pi khat pia hi. Khamtung mi te sung ah hi bang Pahtawi na a ki pia a mah a ma sa pen a hi hi. Hih khual zin na tung tawn in Zomi khangno pwl khat in Embassies zum tuam tuam tawh ki zop na hoih hong nei tuam thei uh hi. Kawlgam sung ah tu ni ciang Chin State bek ah a ki sem phing a hi Maternal and Child Cash Transfer ( MCCT-Chin ) Nau pai nu mei te leh kum nih nuai siah nau pang khem peuh tha khat Ks. 15000/ huh na piak ding leh Chin Local Social Plan te ah Chin State government tawh a ki pat pan tu ni ciang dong ma pang khawm. Nargis emergency responded hun lai in tha 6 sung Pya Pon township ah UNICEF Team Leader ka sem hi. UNICEF te ii Cluster lead a sep na Nutrition, WASH, Education leh Child Protection project te ah leitung gam mun tuam tuam pan hong pai Emergency specialists te tawh ma pang in n a sem khawm . Ni khat nai 4 kim bang bek ih mut hun zang in na sem zo ding in Pasian ci dam na leh ma van na hong pia hi. Inn kuan pihte: Ka zi Dr. Nuam Sung tawh 8.1.2003 kum in Yangon ah ki teeng in tua ka mopawi uh ah tua lai tak full time na sem te a hi Rev. Dr. Simon Pau Khan En (GS, MBC ) in hanthot na, Rev. Smith Ngul Za Thawng( GS, MBC) in hun uk leh inn kuan lu tang hongs ep sak in Rev. Dr. Robert Thawng Hlei in Pasian mai ah nupa suah na hong pia hi. Pau nam 4 tawh lung dam n a ka ko hi. Kazi Dr. Nuam Sung in 2002 kum in M.B.B.S (MC II) Yangon pan zo . Kale General Hospital ah AS tawh 2003-2004 ciang sem, Khamti Hospital ah 2005-2006 ciang , North Okkalapah general hospital ah 20072008 ciang sem. 2009 -2012 kum in MC II Yangon ah M.Med.Sc( O G) zo . 2012-2014 ciang Thingan Kyuan General Hospital ah sem. 2014-2015 ciang Hakha General Hospital ah taphuamiyat a thukuh tavuankhan sem . 2016 pan tu ni ciang dong MC II Yangon ah Pararu course a sin lai tak a hi hi. Kata nu u pen Lia sem.Cing San Lian (Grade 8 )leh a nau Lia. Jubilee Van Bawi Sung (Grade 5) te hi in TTC, Yangon ah a kah lai tak uh a hi hi. Ka zi Dr. Nuam Sung pen Pa Zing Lom ( ex. ) Daw Ngun Ki te ii ta nu hi in u nau numei pasal 9 lak ah a 4 na hi in Matupi gam Lailenpi khua ah 18.2.1975 kum in suak hi. Ka Pa leh Ka Nu ii Vision, Mission a tang tun na ding aa ko hong ki zang hi zaw: Ka Pa pen Hausa ta te Tapidaw suah ding a ham sat mah mah hun lai tak, tang val no a pian kum 15 a phak hun 1931 kum in Zeisu na sang in Tapidaw na tang suah hi. Zeisu a na san man in buan dim lak khawng ah ki khia in, mi z a pi mai khawng ah pang bet thauk in thau tawh kap lup ding zah dong na thuak hi. Khua leh tui ma kai te ii nget na tung tawn in kum 8 sung galkap a sep na pan tawp in Ka Pu Hausa sep zom ding in khua ah ciah in Hausa sem hi.India gam ah Indian government service a sep sung galkap zato lam na sin ngei a hih man in ka neu lai uh in khua kim khua pam ah nguah pi, dai nuai meikai pi lak ci lo in hong ki sap na dung zui in a sun a zan, ci lo in it na bul phuh in nat veh pai tawn tung hi. A diak diak in nau suak zo nawn lo nau paai nu mei te tawh ki sai a tam pen hi. Kei pen ka u nau sung uh ah dang nal lo pen, khuak ( IQ) tai lo pen khat ka hi hi. Tua ban ah Vision tuam tuam zong ka neih hang in tangtung thei mel lo mawk hi. Ka sang kah ma, ka neu no lai khat in Rev. Kai Khaw Thawn( Sia Thawnno ) in Tapidaw Missionary khat Naga land ( India gam) khua khat ah Pasain thu a ngen tei tei man in a khua zang bup in Singlam teh tung ah gawng tan ding aa gal aih sa aih bang keek aa a ki thawi lai tak aa Pasain in a hot khiat na(- movie-document) leh Rev. Mang Kaam ii Falam gam, Gawn khua mun khat ah Pasian thu a ngen man in thah ding in a khua zang uh in zong uh aa Pasain in a mah leh a sa kol pen Gua phung mun khat ah lam dang tak aa a kep na thu lam dang te hang in ka neu aa ki pan kei ut pen Missionary na sep a hi hi. University pan ka man phet mah ciang in kum 7 sung bang gal ki do na gam hi in security zong a hoih loh na Kayah gam ah a hi zong in, Rev. Dr. Cin Khen Tuang, Monyua Baptist Church phut khia Pa ii hong zot na tung tawn in Ye Oo, Depeyin townships te ah MAS department ah na sep kawm in Ye Oo Baptist Church founder khat leh Chindwin Baptist Mission zum pi Monyua khua pi ah a ki tuah theih na ding in Monyua, Baptist Church aa Si a te U pa te tawh khut ki len in n a ka sem khawm uh hi. Kum 10 sung bang MAS ah khan toh na a niam na mun tuam tuam ah hong puak in, 1997 pan tu ni dong kum 20 sung bang Khamtung gam ( Chin State) ah UNDP,UNICEF sung ah Health Nutrition, Education, Social Child protection, Water Sanitation programmes leh Rural Development projects tuam tuam te ah Pasian in Humanitarian Worker na hong sem sak hi. Ka sep na khem peuh ah kei leh kei pen Missionary na sem khat bang in ka ki tuat den hi. Tua ban ah Kawlgam sung zong pan mi tawm no bek ii a ngah khak a hi UNICEF’s PERMANENT APPOINTMENT pen the UNs Secretary-General ii authority leh assignment piak na tung tawn in 30 June, 2009 kum in UNICEF Headquarter, New York pan in kei hong ki pia hi. Ka zi Dr. Nuam Sung, M.B.B.S,M.Med.Sc( O G) , Consultant ( O G) a sep kawm in tu lai tak 2nd year Doctorate/Ph.D( O G Oncology) course N. Ohkalapah General Hospital ah a sin toh theih n a t e in zong Ka Pa leh Ka Nu te ii Pasian sung ah a na neih uh a hi Vision,Mission te a taang tun theih na ding aa kei leh ka inn kuan pih te Pasian in hong zang hi zaw a hi hi. Tua hi aa Ka Paleh Ka Nu in Zeisu Khazih khephung ah a nun tak na uh aa na ki suan khak man uh in tu ni in Ka Nu leh Ka Pa tung tawn aa a gah te a lo ka hi zaw uh hi.Tua a hih man in pah tawi na khem peuh a nung ta Pasian leh Ka Pa Ngin Thang leh Ka Nu Ngul Cing aa ding hi zaw ta hen

Pa Zam Do Dal

Nasep na tangzai zawk nadingin Heilei pan 1976 kum Kawlpi ah kikhin hi. 1978 kum zi nei aa, tua zawh ciang nulehpa te kawlpi ah lasuk hi. Pasian sawlna om bang in 1996 kum ciang Kalemyo pan Yangon ah kikhin suk leuleu hi. Pasian in inn leh lo, mawtaw te akisam bangbangin pia hi. Bochohgyi ah zong kham leh ngun, suang manpha zuakna sum buk pi nei hi. Pasian it in zahtak ahih manin atuntun na khua Pawlpi ah upa sum kem sem kawikawi hi. Yangon Heilei kipawlna ah zong makai in kihel in pan nak lak mahmah hi. Yangon Buansing beh kipawlna ah zong thudot pawl in kihel aa, Pasian in it in thupha pia aa, zato siavuan te’n alawh theih loh hang Pasian in damsak hi. Pa Thawng Kho Zam
Pu Khai Ngul leh Pi Ngoih Huai te sung pan 17.3.1942 in Tedim gam Laibung khua ah suak hi. 1949 kum SPS Laibung ah sangkah a, 1962 kumin SHS Tedim High School Final zo hi. 1969 kumin Matric ‘B’ List tawh zo a, 1980 kum ciang ‘A’ List tawh zo hi. Pa Vung Lian Nang
Phaiza khua Pu Am Gin (Hatzaw) leh Pi Zen Don sung pan 1947 kumin Phaiza ah suak hi. Anu in nusia baih a, a pu anglum pan khangkhia hi. Phaiza SPS pan tan 4 zo hi. SHS Tedim ah tan 7 ciang kah a, nuntak haksatna hangin khawl in sum zon kipan hi. Phaiza khua Pu Gin Za Thawn (Gualnam) leh Pi Ngai Khaw Ning te tanu upen Nu Cing Sian Man tawh 1966 kumin pumkhat suak hi. 1973 kumin Pu Za Dawl tungtawn in Piangthak hi. Pasian in tapa nih leh tanu nga pia hi. 1.Nu Don Sian Nem (B.A,B.Sc) + Rev Than Lian Pau (B.Th, M.Div) USA. 2.Pa Gin Sian Mung (Dip.Th, M.Div) + Nu Cing Ngaih Ciin (B.A). 3. Nu Ning Sian Lun (B.Th, B.Sc (Hons), MSC, M.Res) + Rev Suan Khan Zam (B.Th, M.Div).4.Pa Thawng Sian Thang (B.A) Keyboard, Agape Church. 5.Lia Zen Sian Nuam (B.A, B.Th, M.Div) Youth Pastor, Bethany Church. 6.Lia Vung Sian Huai (B.A).7.Lia Khai Sian Cing (USA). Nuntakna haksatna hangin aneu tung mahin sumzon kipan in Pasian in asep bangbang thupha pia in hong khang toto a, Tedim ah taih inn gol mahmah dawlthum, kawlpi ah taih innpi khat leh yangon ah taih khan khat nei uh hi. Tua banah Isuzu motor pi khat, Willy Jeep khat leh Super roof te nei uh hi. Inn leh motor te sanggam u leh nau sung leh pu tuu leh ta te adingin azat banah Pasian nasep nadingin avekin zangthei hi. Pasian ading kipiakna: -19671975 Phaiza Hunter Quartet min tawh laa sa in vak kawikawi hi.-1973 kum Loud Speaker leh Casset lei in, Phaiza khua leh Tedim gam sungah Gupnathu genna dingin piakhia hi. -Bethel Bible College Sang dingin Tedim taih innpi dawl laizang pen 1991-2004 dong phaltak in piakhia hi. -BBC sang panin Sang Board khat ahih banah a tuntun na ah AG Pawlpi upa sem hi.-Phaiza AG Pawlpi piankhiat nading leh Biakinn pi din zawh nading leh Bethel Bible College leh Bethel AG church ading mapang madawk te ah kihel thei hi. -Rev Dam Suan Mung (D.D) akipan, Laisaiangtho sangkah te leh Pasian nasem te ahih theihna zah tawh panpih in huh kawikawi hi.-A diak in Phaiza khua mite adingin Tedim innpi, Kawlpi inn leh yangon inn te zintunna pai khai na, tawl ngak theihna inn bul inn pi hong sepsak hi.-Khua leh tui, beh leh phung u leh nau, pawlpi ading ma apan laitak in, git neihlo pi in hong bawlpa hong tan pa, Pasian anglum ah 15.12.2004 ni-in hong ciahsan hi.
Pa Kap Khen Pau @ Kapno
Tedim Myonee, Pangzang khua, Pu Lam Khen Thang, (Guite) leh Tedim Myonee, Heilei khua, Pi Hau Khen Cing (Thatmun)te sung pan 11.8.1969 kum in Munlai, khua, Kalay Myonee ah suak hi. 1.1.1995 ni in Rev. Nang Khan Do in pum khat suak sak hi. Nuntakna-Business -1985 pan tuni dong (1985-86 India gamgi teng ah van zuak; 1988-89 Tan sawm sangnaupang te manglai hilh, 1990-2010 Mogoke,Bombay(Mombay), Yangon ah Kham leh Suangmanpha lei/zuak, 1999 in Manipura Trading Enterprise min tawh Company nei, 2012 in K-Synergy Service Company nei, sum le pai tawh kisai laibu pawlkhat Tedim pau tawh tei-in laibu in bawl a thugenna zong nei thei zel hi. Religious –Tan lang pan tan sawm dong Munlai Tuiphum Pawlpi ah Sunday School kah a, pahtawina ngah den hi. Monywa College akah kum 1986 pen Monywa Tuiphum Pawlpi kipat kum hi a, sia Carson Cin Khen Tuang le Monywa a Thu-um innkuan pawl khat leh college sangnaupang te kipawl in amasa bel Christmas bawl uh hi. Yangon New Apostolic Church ah kum khat (1989) kihel a, khangno makai sem hi. Insein a om (1988-90) sung Biakna deidanlo a Pasian biakpiak khopna neihpih a, Christmas bawl pih zel hi. Yangon EBC ah kum li (1990-94) kihel hi. Yangon Zomi Baptist Church ah kumnih (1995-96) kihel hi. Tedim Baptist Church-Yangon (TBCY) piankum 1997 pan tuni dong TBC-Y Pawlpi ah Upa sem a, panmun tuamtuam ah mapang hi. President asep masak 2009 kumin Biakinn lamkhuan ngahpih a, President anihvei sepna 2013 kumin Biakinn honpawi neihpih hi. Tedim Christian College piankum 2000 pan tuni dong Board of Trustee ah kihel hi. Tedim Baptist Convention pian nading thapia in panpih hi. ZBC kum za (1999) pawi Hakha ah TBC-Y khangno te tawh kithuah in kihel hi. MBC khawmpi(2000) Tisule, Kayah State ah MBC GS angah TBC-Y Senior Pastor Rev. Dr. S Pau Khan En uap dingin pawlpite tawh na kihel thei hi. Social –Pau le lai le ngeina a khantoh nading laibu honkhat bawl hi. College akah lai (1987) in Monywa ah Chin National Day bawlna ah makai hi. Tedim kipawlna Yangon kipat kum 2000 pan tuni dong EC member hi den hi. Khamtung ah zusa in lo teng susia in kial atun kum 2008 in Yangon pan Chin Mautaam Relief Committee phuan in sumzonna nei uh a, angah khempeuh Paletwa, Matupi leh Thantlang ah khak uh hi. Khamtung gam khantoh nading a veina tawh 2012 kumin Environmental and Economic Research Institute (EERI) Director le alawmte Tedim ah paipih in thu kikupna neihpih hi. Tua hangin Pa Vung Suan Pau in Kabamyi Chittu Athusu ngah hi. 2012 December kha in US Embassy pan Counsellor le adang nih khamtung khuapi tuamtuam ah paipih a, Tedim atunciang khuanu khuapate tawh kimel theihnaleh ankuang um khopna neisak hi. Zinte in nuamsa in lungdam mahmah uh aihman in Tedim te in US ah Visit tawh baihtakin paitheih na’ng lampi ong kihong hi. Tedim ah Private Bank aomding lunggulh mahmah a Kanbawza Bank te huhna anget leh ngahnapi Tedim ah innmun ongzon uh ciang haksatna om ahih manin Falam te’n ngah hi. Lungkialo in hanciam toto a, tu taktak ciangin First Private Bank te’n ong hong taktak tading hi. Political -2012 bi-election ah NLD te ong kihelciang gamvai kisemthei zawdeuh ding cih upnanei ahih manin 2013 pan 2015 dong gamvai thusinna leh nasepna nakpi takin nei hi. A lawmte 4 tawh Civil Society Organization (CSO) khat phuan uh a, amin dingin The Serenity Initatives (TSI) phuak uh hi. Director sem hi. 2013-14 sung Chin State Myone 9 ah Capacity Development Training pia kawikawi uh hi. 2014 July-Sep sung Union Election Commission (UEC) phalna tawh Voter List Update Pilot Project pen Alone, Tedim, leh Myitkyina ah bawlsak uh a, tua etteh in gambup Voter List a kibawl ahi hi. UEC Chairman U Tin Aye in Naypyitaw ah Banquet annek pihna nei a, tualaiah UEC Commissioner teng, States and Regions pan Chairman teng, EU pan mi nih, USAID pan mi nih, le CSO bup tangin kei ka kihel hi. 2015 kitelpi hunciang mekhiatdan tawh kisai thusinsakna, pau nam tuamtuam tawh laibu bawlna, laidal bawlna leh website pan hunlap a thuzaksakna bawl uh hi. Website min pen www.merin-online.org ahi hi. Suahtakna le kikimna aom nading hanciam mahmah hi. TV leh media tuamtuam te tawh interview neithei zel a, ki suaksak zel hi. 2016 ciang Open Sesame Myanmar (OSM) kipan a Excutive Director sem in pau nam 15 tawh Civic Education laibu bu-30000 bawl in gambup ah hawm hi.
Pu Kham Za Kam
Mualbem khua Sat Pu Jasuan ta (Teizang nam sagih te) Sinte, Pante, Kawngte, Zahlangh, Vomlong, Lamkai, Khupson te sung pan Kawng te sung pan hi a, Buanli khua Pu (Goih Tun) Kawngte leh Pi (Zuan Vung) te sung panin 1916 kumin Buanli khua ah suak hi. Pi Sawm Cing tawh Zongei na in kipi kiteeng a, topa 4 leh tanu 4 gawm 8 nei uh hi. Lo khawh singpuak na tawh Pasian in thupha pia a, 1950 kumin Buanli khua panin Tedim khua Lawibual veng ah teeng uh hi. 1957 kum ciangin Kham Za Kam and Brother’s, Import, Export Company limited ong ngah in, 105, Seikkanthar Street ah inn nei in zum zong hong hi. 1959 kum ciangin a innkuan un Yangon inn ah kituah leuleu a, Zomi sung pan Yangon inn nei masa pawl hong suak hi. 1966 kum ciangin Seikkanthar Street panin Pansodan Street No.203, 3rd Floor ah ki tuah leuleu hi. Tapa upen Pa Tun Za Thang (B.A Ed,B.Ed, Dip.Ed) hi a, Pu Kham Za Kam leh Pi Sawm Cing te sung pan 21.3.1941 kumin suak hi. Lam et lohpi in tuap sung natna tawh 5.5.2010 ni in hong ciahsan hi. Pu Gin Do Lian
Pu Hen Kho Thang (Gualnam) leh Pi Nuam Ngai (Hatlang) sung panin 18.8.1924 in Zampi khua ah suak hi. Unau 12 pha a, pasal 5 leh numei 7 hi napi, pasal 3 leh numei 3 bek suak ta hi. 1924-1944 dong Singgial ah teeng hi. 1944-1957 dong Seitual ah teeng uh hi.1940 kumin galkap tumin, kawlgam sung, Comlombo, Panjab, gam India gam teng ah Japan gal sung Parachute (Vanleng tung pan a tuak pawl ahi hi). Tagah baih ahih manin mite hehpih thuakpih thei hi. Tua ahih manin mi huh nuam hi. Japan gal sung haksat na a tuah ciangin lawk ki ahih hang hun ka ngah ciang Tapidaw suak ning ci-in khensat hi. 2nd Burma Rifle Syrian a om sung Prome ah galkap te zat Rev Maung Toe (Komen) kiang ah 1946 kum Tui kiphum hi. 1947 May 16 ni-in galkap tawp in Seitual ah ciah a, 11.8.1947 ni-in Kansau te Nu don Za Cing (Hatlang) tawh kiteeng hi. Tapa 6 leh tanu 6 Pasian in pia hi. 1950 kumin sum bawl kipan hi. 1955 kumin Rangoon ah Import Licence siau in om hi. 1957 kum ciang a innkuan un Seitual pan Tedim ah kikhin uh hi. 1958 kum in Ragoon ah Taih khan khat lei in (124-D Seihkanta Street, First Floor) Rangoon khua ah a teng masa pawl hong suak hi.1971 kum Kawlgam khanlawhna hunah piangthak pah lian a, Topa a dingin kipia khia in Gospel pai kawikawi a, a lungsim khempeuh leh aneih khempueh Topa adingin piakhia hi. Phaiza AG zong Sia A Hong tawh pai in va kip sak hi. A zi zong Cancer natna pan Topan damsak a, Kawlgam ading Pasian nalamdang masa pawl ahi hi. Topa sungah nop a sak mahmah laitak in, tu sung suak 25 leh tu sawn 2 leh azi a tate paisan in 18.2.1981 ni in a sam pa kiang ah tawlnga hi. Tu laitak teenna: No.285, Ist Floor, Bo Aung Kyaw Street, Kyaukthada, Yangon. Naseppi: Gin Do Lian and United Limitted Importers; Exporters General Merchants and Commission Agents (1958-64).
